authors_text: Man Zhou,Naishan Zheng,Jie Huang,Xiangyu Rui,Chunle Guo,Deyu Meng,Chongyi Li,Jinwei Gu
title: Random Weights Networks Work as Loss Prior Constraint for Image Restoration
title_zh: 随机权重网络作为图像恢复的损失先验约束
abstract: In this paper, orthogonal to the existing data and model studies, we instead resort our efforts to investigate the potential of loss function in a new perspective and present our belief ``Random Weights Networks can Be Acted as Loss Prior Constraint for Image Restoration''. Inspired by Functional theory, we provide several alternative solutions to implement our belief in the strict mathematical manifolds including Taylor's Unfolding Network, Invertible Neural Network, Central Difference Convolution and Zero-order Filtering as ``random weights network prototype'' with respect of the following four levels: 1) the different random weights strategies; 2) the different network architectures, \emph{eg,} pure convolution layer or transformer; 3) the different network architecture depths; 4) the different numbers of random weights network combination. Furthermore, to enlarge the capability of the randomly initialized manifolds, we devise the manner of random weights in the following two variants: 1) the weights are randomly initialized only once during the whole training procedure; 2) the weights are randomly initialized at each training iteration epoch. Our propose belief can be directly inserted into existing networks without any training and testing computational cost. Extensive experiments across multiple image restoration tasks, including image de-noising, low-light image enhancement, guided image super-resolution demonstrate the consistent performance gains obtained by introducing our belief. To emphasize, our main focus is to spark the realms of loss function and save their current neglected status. Code will be publicly available.
summary: In this paper, orthogonal to the existing data and model studies, we instead resort our efforts to investigate the potential of loss function in a new perspective and present our belief ``Random Weights Networks can Be Acted as Loss Prior Constraint for Image Restoration''. Inspired by Functional theory, we provide several alternative solutions to implement our belief in the strict mathematical manifolds including Taylor's Unfolding Network, Invertible Neural Network, Central Difference Convolution and Zero-order Filtering as ``random weights network prototype'' with respect of the following four levels: 1) the different random weights strategies; 2) the different network architectures, \emph{eg,} pure convolution layer or transformer; 3) the different network architecture depths; 4) the different numbers of random weights network combination. Furthermore, to enlarge the capability of the randomly initialized manifolds, we devise the manner of random weights in the following two variants: 1) the weights are randomly initialized only once during the whole training procedure; 2) the weights are randomly initialized at each training iteration epoch. Our propose belief can be directly inserted into existing networks without any training and testing computational cost. Extensive experiments across multiple image restoration tasks, including image de-noising, low-light image enhancement, guided image super-resolution demonstrate the consistent performance gains obtained by introducing our belief. To emphasize, our main focus is to spark the realms of loss function and save their current neglected status. Code will be publicly available.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，与现有数据和模型研究正交，我们转而努力从新的角度研究损失函数的潜力，并提出我们的信念“随机权重网络可以充当图像恢复的损失先验约束”。受泛函理论的启发，我们提供了几种替代解决方案来实现我们对严格数学流形的信念，包括泰勒展开网络、可逆神经网络、中心差分卷积和零阶滤波作为“随机权重网络原型”，涉及以下四个级别：1）不同的随机权重策略； 2）不同的网络架构，例如纯卷积层或变压器； 3）网络架构深度不同； 4）不同数量的随机权值网络组合。此外，为了扩大随机初始化流形的能力，我们设计了以下两种变体的随机权重方式：1）权重在整个训练过程中仅随机初始化一次； 2）权重在每个训练迭代时期随机初始化。我们提出的信念可以直接插入现有网络中，无需任何训练和测试计算成本。跨多个图像恢复任务的广泛实验，包括图像去噪、低光图像增强、引导图像超分辨率，证明了通过引入我们的信念所获得的一致的性能增益。需要强调的是，我们的主要重点是激发损失函数领域并挽救其当前被忽视的状态。代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将随机权重网络作为损失函数先验约束，用于图像修复任务，通过多种网络架构和随机权重策略提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究侧重数据与模型优化，但损失函数的作用被忽视。本文旨在从新视角探索损失函数的潜力，提出随机权重网络作为先验约束以改进图像修复效果。
AI.method: 基于泛函理论，设计四种随机权重网络原型（如泰勒展开网络、可逆网络等），结合不同架构深度、组合数量及两种随机初始化方式（一次性或每轮迭代初始化），无需额外计算成本直接嵌入现有网络。
AI.result: 在去噪、低光增强和超分辨率等任务中，该方法均取得一致性能提升，验证了随机权重网络作为损失先验约束的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 随机权重网络能有效约束损失函数，提升图像修复效果，未来需进一步探索损失函数的潜在价值与优化方向。

authors_text: Yaqian Guo,Xin Wang,Ce Li,Shihui Ying
title: Domain Adaptive Semantic Segmentation by Optimal Transport
title_zh: 通过最佳传输进行域自适应语义分割
abstract: Scene segmentation is widely used in the field of autonomous driving for environment perception, and semantic scene segmentation (3S) has received a great deal of attention due to the richness of the semantic information it contains. It aims to assign labels to pixels in an image, thus enabling automatic image labeling. Current approaches are mainly based on convolutional neural networks (CNN), but they rely on a large number of labels. Therefore, how to use a small size of labeled data to achieve semantic segmentation becomes more and more important. In this paper, we propose a domain adaptation (DA) framework based on optimal transport (OT) and attention mechanism to address this issue. Concretely, first we generate the output space via CNN due to its superiority of feature representation. Second, we utilize OT to achieve a more robust alignment of source and target domains in output space, where the OT plan defines a well attention mechanism to improve the adaptation of the model. In particular, with OT, the number of network parameters has been reduced and the network has been better interpretable. Third, to better describe the multi-scale property of features, we construct a multi-scale segmentation network to perform domain adaptation. Finally, in order to verify the performance of our proposed method, we conduct experimental comparison with three benchmark and four SOTA methods on three scene datasets, and the mean intersection-over-union (mIOU) has been significant improved, and visualization results under multiple domain adaptation scenarios also show that our proposed method has better performance than compared semantic segmentation methods.
summary: Scene segmentation is widely used in the field of autonomous driving for environment perception, and semantic scene segmentation (3S) has received a great deal of attention due to the richness of the semantic information it contains. It aims to assign labels to pixels in an image, thus enabling automatic image labeling. Current approaches are mainly based on convolutional neural networks (CNN), but they rely on a large number of labels. Therefore, how to use a small size of labeled data to achieve semantic segmentation becomes more and more important. In this paper, we propose a domain adaptation (DA) framework based on optimal transport (OT) and attention mechanism to address this issue. Concretely, first we generate the output space via CNN due to its superiority of feature representation. Second, we utilize OT to achieve a more robust alignment of source and target domains in output space, where the OT plan defines a well attention mechanism to improve the adaptation of the model. In particular, with OT, the number of network parameters has been reduced and the network has been better interpretable. Third, to better describe the multi-scale property of features, we construct a multi-scale segmentation network to perform domain adaptation. Finally, in order to verify the performance of our proposed method, we conduct experimental comparison with three benchmark and four SOTA methods on three scene datasets, and the mean intersection-over-union (mIOU) has been significant improved, and visualization results under multiple domain adaptation scenarios also show that our proposed method has better performance than compared semantic segmentation methods.
abstract_zh: 场景分割广泛应用于自动驾驶领域的环境感知，而语义场景分割（3S）由于其包含的语义信息丰富而受到广泛关注。它的目的是为图像中的像素分配标签，从而实现自动图像标记。当前的方法主要基于卷积神经网络（CNN），但它们依赖大量标签。因此，如何利用小规模的标记数据来实现语义分割变得越来越重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于最优传输（OT）和注意力机制的域适应（DA）框架来解决这个问题。具体来说，首先我们通过 CNN 生成输出空间，因为它具有特征表示的优越性。其次，我们利用 OT 来实现输出空间中源域和目标域的更稳健的对齐，其中 OT 计划定义了良好的注意力机制来提高模型的适应性。特别是，通过 OT，网络参数的数量减少了，网络的可解释性也更好了。第三，为了更好地描述特征的多尺度属性，我们构建了多尺度分割网络来执行域适应。最后，为了验证我们提出的方法的性能，我们在三个场景数据集上与三个基准和四种SOTA方法进行了实验比较，平均交并集（mIOU）有了显着的提高，多领域适应场景下的可视化结果也表明我们提出的方法比语义分割方法具有更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最优传输和注意力机制的领域自适应语义分割框架，以减少对标注数据的依赖并提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有语义分割方法依赖大量标注数据，而实际场景中标注成本高。通过最优传输实现领域对齐可减少参数量并提升模型可解释性，同时多尺度特征描述能更好适应复杂场景。
AI.method: 首先用CNN生成输出空间特征，再通过最优传输计划实现源域与目标域的鲁棒对齐，并构建注意力机制；其次设计多尺度分割网络增强特征描述能力，最终在三个数据集上验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在三个场景数据集上，相比三种基准和四种SOTA方法，mIOU指标显著提升，多领域适应场景的可视化结果也验证了方法优越性。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过最优传输与多尺度网络有效解决了领域自适应语义分割问题，在性能和可解释性上均优于现有方法。

Finally, in order to verify the performance of our proposed method, we conduct experimental comparison with three benchmark and four SOTA methods on three scene datasets, and the mean intersection-over-union (mIOU) has been significant improved, and visualization results under multiple domain adaptation scenarios also show that our proposed method has better performance than compared semantic segmentation methods. 场景分割广泛应用于自动驾驶领域的环境感知，而语义场景分割（3S）由于其包含的语义信息丰富而受到广泛关注。它的目的是为图像中的像素分配标签，从而实现自动图像标记。当前的方法主要基于卷积神经网络（CNN），但它们依赖大量标签。因此，如何利用小规模的标记数据来实现语义分割变得越来越重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于最优传输（OT）和注意力机制的域适应（DA）框架来解决这个问题。具体来说，首先我们通过 CNN 生成输出空间，因为它具有特征表示的优越性。其次，我们利用 OT 来实现输出空间中源域和目标域的更稳健的对齐，其中 OT 计划定义了良好的注意力机制来提高模型的适应性。特别是，通过 OT，网络参数的数量减少了，网络的可解释性也更好了。第三，为了更好地描述特征的多尺度属性，我们构建了多尺度分割网络来执行域适应。最后，为了验证我们提出的方法的性能，我们在三个场景数据集上与三个基准和四种SOTA方法进行了实验比较，平均交并集（mIOU）有了显着的提高，多领域适应场景下的可视化结果也表明我们提出的方法比语义分割方法具有更好的性能。 本文提出一种基于最优传输和注意力机制的领域自适应语义分割框架，以减少对标注数据的依赖并提升分割性能。 Yaqian Guo,Xin Wang,Ce Li,Shihui Ying cs.CV,math.OC

authors_text: Yaobo Liang,Chenfei Wu,Ting Song,Wenshan Wu,Yan Xia,Yu Liu,Yang Ou,Shuai Lu,Lei Ji,Shaoguang Mao,Yun Wang,Linjun Shou,Ming Gong,Nan Duan
title: TaskMatrix.AI: Completing Tasks by Connecting Foundation Models with Millions of APIs
title_zh: TaskMatrix.AI：通过连接基础模型和数百万个API来完成任务
abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) has made incredible progress recently. On the one hand, advanced foundation models like ChatGPT can offer powerful conversation, in-context learning and code generation abilities on a broad range of open-domain tasks. They can also generate high-level solution outlines for domain-specific tasks based on the common sense knowledge they have acquired. However, they still face difficulties with some specialized tasks because they lack enough domain-specific data during pre-training or they often have errors in their neural network computations on those tasks that need accurate executions. On the other hand, there are also many existing models and systems (symbolic-based or neural-based) that can do some domain-specific tasks very well. However, due to the different implementation or working mechanisms, they are not easily accessible or compatible with foundation models. Therefore, there is a clear and pressing need for a mechanism that can leverage foundation models to propose task solution outlines and then automatically match some of the sub-tasks in the outlines to the off-the-shelf models and systems with special functionalities to complete them. Inspired by this, we introduce TaskMatrix.AI as a new AI ecosystem that connects foundation models with millions of APIs for task completion. Unlike most previous work that aimed to improve a single AI model, TaskMatrix.AI focuses more on using existing foundation models (as a brain-like central system) and APIs of other AI models and systems (as sub-task solvers) to achieve diversified tasks in both digital and physical domains. As a position paper, we will present our vision of how to build such an ecosystem, explain each key component, and use study cases to illustrate both the feasibility of this vision and the main challenges we need to address next.

On the one hand, advanced foundation models like ChatGPT can offer powerful conversation, in-context learning and code generation abilities on a broad range of open-domain tasks. However, they still face difficulties with some specialized tasks because they lack enough domain-specific data during pre-training or they often have errors in their neural network computations on those tasks that need accurate executions. On the other hand, there are also many existing models and systems (symbolic-based or neural-based) that can do some domain-specific tasks very well. However, due to the different implementation or working mechanisms, they are not easily accessible or compatible with foundation models. Inspired by this, we introduce TaskMatrix.AI as a new AI ecosystem that connects foundation models with millions of APIs for task completion. Unlike most previous work that aimed to improve a single AI model, TaskMatrix.AI focuses more on using existing foundation models (as a brain-like central system) and APIs of other AI models and systems (as sub-task solvers) to achieve diversified tasks in both digital and physical domains. As a position paper, we will present our vision of how to build such an ecosystem, explain each key component, and use study cases to illustrate both the feasibility of this vision and the main challenges we need to address next.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）最近取得了令人难以置信的进步。一方面，像 ChatGPT 这样的高级基础模型可以在广泛的开放域任务上提供强大的对话、上下文学习和代码生成能力。他们还可以根据所获得的常识知识为特定领域的任务生成高级解决方案大纲。然而，他们在某些专门任务上仍然面临困难，因为他们在预训练期间缺乏足够的特定领域数据，或者在需要准确执行的任务上的神经网络计算中经常出现错误。另一方面，也有许多现有的模型和系统（基于符号的或基于神经的）可以很好地完成一些特定领域的任务。然而，由于实现或工作机制的不同，它们不容易与基础模型访问或兼容。因此，显然迫切需要一种机制，能够利用基础模型提出任务解决方案大纲，然后将大纲中的一些子任务自动匹配到现成的具有特殊功能的模型和系统来完成它们。受此启发，我们推出了 TaskMatrix.AI 作为一个新的 AI 生态系统，它将基础模型与数百万个 API 连接起来以完成任务。与之前大多数旨在改进单一人工智能模型的工作不同，TaskMatrix.AI更注重使用现有的基础模型（作为类脑中央系统）和其他人工智能模型和系统的API（作为子任务求解器）来实现数字和物理领域的多样化任务。作为立场文件，我们将提出如何构建这样一个生态系统的愿景，解释每个关键组成部分，并使用研究案例来说明这一愿景的可行性以及我们下一步需要解决的主要挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TaskMatrix.AI，一种通过连接基础模型与数百万API来完成多样化任务的AI生态系统。
AI.motivation: 现有基础模型在特定任务上存在数据不足或计算误差问题，而专用模型因机制差异难以与基础模型兼容，需构建跨模型协作机制。
AI.method: 以基础模型作为中央系统生成任务框架，自动匹配子任务至具备专用功能的API或模型，实现数字与物理领域的任务完成。
AI.result: 提出了TaskMatrix.AI的架构愿景，解析核心组件，并通过案例验证可行性，同时明确需解决的集成与执行挑战。
AI.conclusion: TaskMatrix.AI通过整合基础模型与API提供新范式，但需进一步研究跨模型协作的标准化与高效执行方案。

authors_text: Shiyu Jin,Zhixian Ye,Liangjun Zhang
title: Learning Excavation of Rigid Objects with Offline Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过离线强化学习学习刚性物体的挖掘
comment: Submitted to IROS 2023
comments: Submitted to IROS 2023
abstract: Autonomous excavation is a challenging task. The unknown contact dynamics between the excavator bucket and the terrain could easily result in large contact forces and jamming problems during excavation. Traditional model-based methods struggle to handle such problems due to complex dynamic modeling. In this paper, we formulate the excavation skills with three novel manipulation primitives. We propose to learn the manipulation primitives with offline reinforcement learning (RL) to avoid large amounts of online robot interactions. The proposed method can learn efficient penetration skills from sub-optimal demonstrations, which contain sub-trajectories that can be ``stitched" together to formulate an optimal trajectory without causing jamming. We evaluate the proposed method with extensive experiments on excavating a variety of rigid objects and demonstrate that the learned policy outperforms the demonstrations. We also show that the learned policy can quickly adapt to unseen and challenging fragmented rocks with online fine-tuning.
summary: Autonomous excavation is a challenging task. The unknown contact dynamics between the excavator bucket and the terrain could easily result in large contact forces and jamming problems during excavation. Traditional model-based methods struggle to handle such problems due to complex dynamic modeling. In this paper, we formulate the excavation skills with three novel manipulation primitives. We propose to learn the manipulation primitives with offline reinforcement learning (RL) to avoid large amounts of online robot interactions. The proposed method can learn efficient penetration skills from sub-optimal demonstrations, which contain sub-trajectories that can be ``stitched" together to formulate an optimal trajectory without causing jamming. We evaluate the proposed method with extensive experiments on excavating a variety of rigid objects and demonstrate that the learned policy outperforms the demonstrations. We also show that the learned policy can quickly adapt to unseen and challenging fragmented rocks with online fine-tuning.
abstract_zh: 自主挖掘是一项具有挑战性的任务。挖掘机铲斗与地形之间未知的接触动力学很容易导致挖掘过程中产生较大的接触力和卡住问题。由于复杂的动态建模，传统的基于模型的方法很难处理此类问题。在本文中，我们用三种新颖的操纵原语制定了挖掘技能。我们建议通过离线强化学习（RL）来学习操作原语，以避免大量的在线机器人交互。所提出的方法可以从次优演示中学习有效的穿透技能，其中包含可以“缝合”在一起的子轨迹，以制定最佳轨迹而不会造成干扰。我们通过挖掘各种刚性物体的大量实验来评估所提出的方法，并证明学习的策略优于演示。我们还表明，学习的策略可以通过在线微调快速适应看不见的和具有挑战性的碎片岩石。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于离线强化学习的自主挖掘方法，通过学习机械臂的操控原语来解决挖掘过程中的接触动力学挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统模型方法难以处理挖掘过程中复杂的接触动力学问题，且在线交互可能引发卡顿和大接触力，需要更安全高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计三种新型操控原语，并利用离线强化学习从次优演示中学习高效穿透技能，通过拼接子轨迹生成最优路径以避免卡顿。
AI.result: 实验表明，所学策略在挖掘多种刚性物体时优于原始演示，并能通过在线微调快速适应未见过的破碎岩石场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过离线强化学习有效解决了自主挖掘中的动力学挑战，展示了在复杂地形中的适应性和优越性。

authors_text: Zhaoyang Zhang,Yitong Jiang,Wenqi Shao,Xiaogang Wang,Ping Luo,Kaimo Lin,Jinwei Gu
title: Real-time Controllable Denoising for Image and Video
title_zh: 图像和视频实时可控去噪
comment: CVPR 2023
comments: CVPR 2023
abstract: Controllable image denoising aims to generate clean samples with human perceptual priors and balance sharpness and smoothness. In traditional filter-based denoising methods, this can be easily achieved by adjusting the filtering strength. However, for NN (Neural Network)-based models, adjusting the final denoising strength requires performing network inference each time, making it almost impossible for real-time user interaction. In this paper, we introduce Real-time Controllable Denoising (RCD), the first deep image and video denoising pipeline that provides a fully controllable user interface to edit arbitrary denoising levels in real-time with only one-time network inference. Unlike existing controllable denoising methods that require multiple denoisers and training stages, RCD replaces the last output layer (which usually outputs a single noise map) of an existing CNN-based model with a lightweight module that outputs multiple noise maps. We propose a novel Noise Decorrelation process to enforce the orthogonality of the noise feature maps, allowing arbitrary noise level control through noise map interpolation. This process is network-free and does not require network inference. Our experiments show that RCD can enable real-time editable image and video denoising for various existing heavy-weight models without sacrificing their original performance.
summary: Controllable image denoising aims to generate clean samples with human perceptual priors and balance sharpness and smoothness. In traditional filter-based denoising methods, this can be easily achieved by adjusting the filtering strength. However, for NN (Neural Network)-based models, adjusting the final denoising strength requires performing network inference each time, making it almost impossible for real-time user interaction. In this paper, we introduce Real-time Controllable Denoising (RCD), the first deep image and video denoising pipeline that provides a fully controllable user interface to edit arbitrary denoising levels in real-time with only one-time network inference. Unlike existing controllable denoising methods that require multiple denoisers and training stages, RCD replaces the last output layer (which usually outputs a single noise map) of an existing CNN-based model with a lightweight module that outputs multiple noise maps. We propose a novel Noise Decorrelation process to enforce the orthogonality of the noise feature maps, allowing arbitrary noise level control through noise map interpolation. This process is network-free and does not require network inference. Our experiments show that RCD can enable real-time editable image and video denoising for various existing heavy-weight models without sacrificing their original performance.
abstract_zh: Controllable image denoising aims to generate clean samples with human perceptual priors and balance sharpness and smoothness. In traditional filter-based denoising methods, this can be easily achieved by adjusting the filtering strength.然而，对于基于NN（神经网络）的模型来说，调整最终的去噪强度需要每次都进行网络推理，几乎无法实现实时的用户交互。在本文中，我们介绍了实时可控去噪（RCD），这是第一个深度图像和视频去噪管道，它提供了完全可控的用户界面，只需一次网络推理即可实时编辑任意去噪级别。与需要多个降噪器和训练阶段的现有可控去噪方法不同，RCD 用输出多个噪声图的轻量级模块替换了现有基于 CNN 的模型的最后一个输出层（通常输出单个噪声图）。我们提出了一种新颖的噪声解相关过程来强制噪声特征图的正交性，从而允许通过噪声图插值来控制任意噪声水平。 This process is network-free and does not require network inference.我们的实验表明，RCD 可以为各种现有的重量级模型实现实时可编辑的图像和视频去噪，而不会牺牲其原始性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种实时可控的图像和视频去噪方法RCD，通过单次网络推理实现任意去噪级别的实时编辑。
AI.motivation: 传统基于神经网络的去噪方法需多次推理调整去噪强度，难以实现实时用户交互，而现有可控去噪方法需多个去噪器和训练阶段，效率低下。
AI.method: 将现有CNN模型的最后一层替换为轻量模块输出多噪声图，并提出噪声去相关过程，通过噪声图插值实现任意噪声级别控制，无需网络推理。
AI.result: 实验表明RCD可在不牺牲原有性能的前提下，为多种重型模型提供实时可编辑的图像和视频去噪能力。
AI.conclusion: RCD通过网络无关的噪声图插值机制，首次实现了单次推理下的实时可控去噪，为交互式图像视频处理提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: Real-time Controllable Denoising for Image and Video 图像和视频实时可控去噪 Controllable image denoising aims to generate clean samples with human perceptual priors and balance sharpness and smoothness. In traditional filter-based denoising methods, this can be easily achieved by adjusting the filtering strength. However, for NN (Neural Network)-based models, adjusting the final denoising strength requires performing network inference each time, making it almost impossible for real-time user interaction. In this paper, we introduce Real-time Controllable Denoising (RCD), the first deep image and video denoising pipeline that provides a fully controllable user interface to edit arbitrary denoising levels in real-time with only one-time network inference. Unlike existing controllable denoising methods that require multiple denoisers and training stages, RCD replaces the last output layer (which usually outputs a single noise map) of an existing CNN-based model with a lightweight module that outputs multiple noise maps. We propose a novel Noise Decorrelation process to enforce the orthogonality of the noise feature maps, allowing arbitrary noise level control through noise map interpolation. This process is network-free and does not require network inference. Our experiments show that RCD can enable real-time editable image and video denoising for various existing heavy-weight models without sacrificing their original performance. authors_text: Mohammad Vahid Jamali,Hamid Saber,Homayoon Hatami,Jung Hyun Bae
title: ProductAE: Toward Deep Learning Driven Error-Correction Codes of Large Dimensions
title_zh: ProductAE：走向深度学习驱动的大维纠错码
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2110.04466
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2110.04466
abstract: While decades of theoretical research have led to the invention of several classes of error-correction codes, the design of such codes is an extremely challenging task, mostly driven by human ingenuity. Recent studies demonstrate that such designs can be effectively automated and accelerated via tools from machine learning (ML), thus enabling ML-driven classes of error-correction codes with promising performance gains compared to classical designs. A fundamental challenge, however, is that it is prohibitively complex, if not impossible, to design and train fully ML-driven encoder and decoder pairs for large code dimensions. In this paper, we propose Product Autoencoder (ProductAE) -- a computationally-efficient family of deep learning driven (encoder, decoder) pairs -- aimed at enabling the training of relatively large codes (both encoder and decoder) with a manageable training complexity. We build upon ideas from classical product codes and propose constructing large neural codes using smaller code components. ProductAE boils down the complex problem of training the encoder and decoder for a large code dimension $k$ and blocklength $n$ to less-complex sub-problems of training encoders and decoders for smaller dimensions and blocklengths. Our training results show successful training of ProductAEs of dimensions as large as $k = 300$ bits with meaningful performance gains compared to state-of-the-art classical and neural designs. Moreover, we demonstrate excellent robustness and adaptivity of ProductAEs to channel models different than the ones used for training.
summary: While decades of theoretical research have led to the invention of several classes of error-correction codes, the design of such codes is an extremely challenging task, mostly driven by human ingenuity. Recent studies demonstrate that such designs can be effectively automated and accelerated via tools from machine learning (ML), thus enabling ML-driven classes of error-correction codes with promising performance gains compared to classical designs. A fundamental challenge, however, is that it is prohibitively complex, if not impossible, to design and train fully ML-driven encoder and decoder pairs for large code dimensions. In this paper, we propose Product Autoencoder (ProductAE) -- a computationally-efficient family of deep learning driven (encoder, decoder) pairs -- aimed at enabling the training of relatively large codes (both encoder and decoder) with a manageable training complexity. We build upon ideas from classical product codes and propose constructing large neural codes using smaller code components. ProductAE boils down the complex problem of training the encoder and decoder for a large code dimension $k$ and blocklength $n$ to less-complex sub-problems of training encoders and decoders for smaller dimensions and blocklengths. Our training results show successful training of ProductAEs of dimensions as large as $k = 300$ bits with meaningful performance gains compared to state-of-the-art classical and neural designs. Moreover, we demonstrate excellent robustness and adaptivity of ProductAEs to channel models different than the ones used for training.
abstract_zh: 虽然数十年的理论研究已经导致了几类纠错码的发明，但此类代码的设计是一项极具挑战性的任务，主要是由人类的聪明才智驱动的。最近的研究表明，此类设计可以通过机器学习 (ML) 工具有效地实现自动化和加速，从而使 ML 驱动的纠错码类别与经典设计相比具有可观的性能提升。然而，一个根本的挑战是，为大代码维度设计和训练完全机器学习驱动的编码器和解码器对，即使不是不可能，也是极其复杂的。在本文中，我们提出了产品自动编码器（ProductAE）——一种计算高效的深度学习驱动（编码器、解码器）对系列——旨在以可管理的训练复杂度来训练相对较大的代码（编码器和解码器）。我们以经典产品代码的思想为基础，并建议使用较小的代码组件构建大型神经代码。 ProductAE 将大代码维度 $k$ 和块长度 $n$ 训练编码器和解码器的复杂问题归结为较小维度和块长度训练编码器和解码器的不太复杂的子问题。我们的训练结果表明，与最先进的经典和神经设计相比，对尺寸高达 $k = 300$ 位的 ProductAE 进行了成功训练，并取得了有意义的性能提升。此外，我们还展示了 ProductAE 对与训练所用模型不同的渠道模型的出色鲁棒性和适应性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ProductAE的深度学习驱动的纠错码设计方法，用于解决大维度纠错码的设计难题。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有大量理论研究，但纠错码的设计仍然主要依赖人工，且对于大维度纠错码的设计和训练复杂度极高，难以实现。
AI.method: 本文基于经典产品码的思想，提出了一种名为ProductAE的深度学习驱动的编码器-解码器对，通过将大维度问题分解为多个小维度子问题来降低训练复杂度。
AI.result: 实验表明，ProductAE能够成功训练高达300位的大维度纠错码，并在性能上优于现有最先进的经典和神经网络设计，同时表现出良好的鲁棒性和适应性。
AI.conclusion: ProductAE提供了一种高效训练大维度纠错码的方法，为深度学习驱动的纠错码设计提供了新的思路和解决方案。

authors_text: Trevor Tsue,Brent Mombourquette,Ahmed Taha,Thomas Paul Matthews,Yen Nhi Truong Vu,Jason Su
title: Problems and shortcuts in deep learning for screening mammography
title_zh: 深度学习筛查乳腺X线检查的问题与捷径
abstract: This work reveals undiscovered challenges in the performance and generalizability of deep learning models. We (1) identify spurious shortcuts and evaluation issues that can inflate performance and (2) propose training and analysis methods to address them. We trained an AI model to classify cancer on a retrospective dataset of 120,112 US exams (3,467 cancers) acquired from 2008 to 2017 and 16,693 UK exams (5,655 cancers) acquired from 2011 to 2015. We evaluated on a screening mammography test set of 11,593 US exams (102 cancers; 7,594 women; age 57.1 \pm 11.0) and 1,880 UK exams (590 cancers; 1,745 women; age 63.3 \pm 7.2). A model trained on images of only view markers (no breast) achieved a 0.691 AUC. The original model trained on both datasets achieved a 0.945 AUC on the combined US+UK dataset but paradoxically only 0.838 and 0.892 on the US and UK datasets, respectively. Sampling cancers equally from both datasets during training mitigated this shortcut. A similar AUC paradox (0.903) occurred when evaluating diagnostic exams vs screening exams (0.862 vs 0.861, respectively). Removing diagnostic exams during training alleviated this bias. Finally, the model did not exhibit the AUC paradox over scanner models but still exhibited a bias toward Selenia Dimension (SD) over Hologic Selenia (HS) exams. Analysis showed that this AUC paradox occurred when a dataset attribute had values with a higher cancer prevalence (dataset bias) and the model consequently assigned a higher probability to these attribute values (model bias). Stratification and balancing cancer prevalence can mitigate shortcuts during evaluation. Dataset and model bias can introduce shortcuts and the AUC paradox, potentially pervasive issues within the healthcare AI space. Our methods can verify and mitigate shortcuts while providing a clear understanding of performance.
summary: This work reveals undiscovered challenges in the performance and generalizability of deep learning models. We (1) identify spurious shortcuts and evaluation issues that can inflate performance and (2) propose training and analysis methods to address them. We trained an AI model to classify cancer on a retrospective dataset of 120,112 US exams (3,467 cancers) acquired from 2008 to 2017 and 16,693 UK exams (5,655 cancers) acquired from 2011 to 2015. We evaluated on a screening mammography test set of 11,593 US exams (102 cancers; 7,594 women; age 57.1 \pm 11.0) and 1,880 UK exams (590 cancers; 1,745 women; age 63.3 \pm 7.2). A model trained on images of only view markers (no breast) achieved a 0.691 AUC. The original model trained on both datasets achieved a 0.945 AUC on the combined US+UK dataset but paradoxically only 0.838 and 0.892 on the US and UK datasets, respectively. Sampling cancers equally from both datasets during training mitigated this shortcut. A similar AUC paradox (0.903) occurred when evaluating diagnostic exams vs screening exams (0.862 vs 0.861, respectively). Removing diagnostic exams during training alleviated this bias. Finally, the model did not exhibit the AUC paradox over scanner models but still exhibited a bias toward Selenia Dimension (SD) over Hologic Selenia (HS) exams. Analysis showed that this AUC paradox occurred when a dataset attribute had values with a higher cancer prevalence (dataset bias) and the model consequently assigned a higher probability to these attribute values (model bias). Stratification and balancing cancer prevalence can mitigate shortcuts during evaluation. Dataset and model bias can introduce shortcuts and the AUC paradox, potentially pervasive issues within the healthcare AI space. Our methods can verify and mitigate shortcuts while providing a clear understanding of performance.
abstract_zh: 这项工作揭示了深度学习模型的性能和泛化性方面尚未发现的挑战。我们（1）识别可能夸大绩效的虚假捷径和评估问题，并（2）提出解决这些问题的培训和分析方法。我们训练了一个人工智能模型，在 2008 年至 2017 年获得的 120,112 项美国检查（3,467 种癌症）和 2011 年至 2015 年获得的 16,693 项英国检查（5,655 种癌症）的回顾性数据集上对癌症进行分类。我们对由 11,593 项美国检查（102 种癌症；7,594 种癌症）组成的筛查性乳房 X 光检查测试集进行了评估。女性；年龄 57.1 \pm 11.0）和 1,880 项英国检查（590 种癌症；1,745 名女性；年龄 63.3 \pm 7.2）。仅对视图标记（无乳房）图像进行训练的模型达到了 0.691 AUC。在这两个数据集上训练的原始模型在美国+英国组合数据集上的 AUC 为 0.945，但矛盾的是，在美国和英国数据集上分别仅为 0.838 和 0.892。在训练期间从两个数据集中对癌症进行同等采样可以缓解这种捷径。在评估诊断检查与筛查检查时，也出现了类似的 AUC 悖论 (0.903)（分别为 0.862 和 0.861）。在培训期间取消诊断检查减轻了这种偏见。最后，该模型没有表现出与扫描仪模型相比的 AUC 悖论，但仍然表现出偏向 Selenia Dimension (SD) 而不是 Hologic Selenia (HS) 检查。分析表明，当数据集属性具有较高癌症患病率的值（数据集偏差）并且模型因此为这些属性值分配更高的概率（模型偏差）时，就会出现这种 AUC 悖论。分层和平衡癌症患病率可以减少评估过程中的捷径。数据集和模型偏差可能会引入捷径和 AUC 悖论，这是医疗保健人工智能领域中潜在的普遍问题。我们的方法可以验证和缓解捷径，同时提供对性能的清晰了解。

search_text: Problems and shortcuts in deep learning for screening mammography 深度学习筛查乳腺X线检查的问题与捷径 This work reveals undiscovered challenges in the performance and generalizability of deep learning models. We (1) identify spurious shortcuts and evaluation issues that can inflate performance and (2) propose training and analysis methods to address them. We trained an AI model to classify cancer on a retrospective dataset of 120,112 US exams (3,467 cancers) acquired from 2008 to 2017 and 16,693 UK exams (5,655 cancers) acquired from 2011 to 2015. We evaluated on a screening mammography test set of 11,593 US exams (102 cancers; 7,594 women; age 57.1 \pm 11.0) and 1,880 UK exams (590 cancers; 1,745 women; age 63.3 \pm 7.2). A model trained on images of only view markers (no breast) achieved a 0.691 AUC. The original model trained on both datasets achieved a 0.945 AUC on the combined US+UK dataset but paradoxically only 0.838 and 0.892 on the US and UK datasets, respectively. Sampling cancers equally from both datasets during training mitigated this shortcut. A similar AUC paradox (0.903) occurred when evaluating diagnostic exams vs screening exams (0.862 vs 0.861, respectively). Removing diagnostic exams during training alleviated this bias. Finally, the model did not exhibit the AUC paradox over scanner models but still exhibited a bias toward Selenia Dimension (SD) over Hologic Selenia (HS) exams. Analysis showed that this AUC paradox occurred when a dataset attribute had values with a higher cancer prevalence (dataset bias) and the model consequently assigned a higher probability to these attribute values (model bias). Stratification and balancing cancer prevalence can mitigate shortcuts during evaluation. Dataset and model bias can introduce shortcuts and the AUC paradox, potentially pervasive issues within the healthcare AI space. Our methods can verify and mitigate shortcuts while providing a clear understanding of performance. 这项工作揭示了深度学习模型的性能和泛化性方面尚未发现的挑战。我们（1）识别可能夸大绩效的虚假捷径和评估问题，并（2）提出解决这些问题的培训和分析方法。我们训练了一个人工智能模型，在 2008 年至 2017 年获得的 120,112 项美国检查（3,467 种癌症）和 2011 年至 2015 年获得的 16,693 项英国检查（5,655 种癌症）的回顾性数据集上对癌症进行分类。我们对由 11,593 项美国检查（102 种癌症；7,594 种癌症）组成的筛查性乳房 X 光检查测试集进行了评估。女性；年龄 57.1 \pm 11.0）和 1,880 项英国检查（590 种癌症；1,745 名女性；年龄 63.3 \pm 7.2）。仅对视图标记（无乳房）图像进行训练的模型达到了 0.691 AUC。在这两个数据集上训练的原始模型在美国+英国组合数据集上的 AUC 为 0.945，但矛盾的是，在美国和英国数据集上分别仅为 0.838 和 0.892。在训练期间从两个数据集中对癌症进行同等采样可以缓解这种捷径。在评估诊断检查与筛查检查时，也出现了类似的 AUC 悖论 (0.903)（分别为 0.862 和 0.861）。在培训期间取消诊断检查减轻了这种偏见。最后，该模型没有表现出与扫描仪模型相比的 AUC 悖论，但仍然表现出偏向 Selenia Dimension (SD) 而不是 Hologic Selenia (HS) 检查。分析表明，当数据集属性具有较高癌症患病率的值（数据集偏差）并且模型因此为这些属性值分配更高的概率（模型偏差）时，就会出现这种 AUC 悖论。分层和平衡癌症患病率可以减少评估过程中的捷径。数据集和模型偏差可能会引入捷径和 AUC 悖论，这是医疗保健人工智能领域中潜在的普遍问题。我们的方法可以验证和缓解捷径，同时提供对性能的清晰了解。 本文揭示了深度学习模型在乳腺X光筛查中的性能和泛化性挑战，并提出解决方法。 Trevor Tsue,Brent Mombourquette,Ahmed Taha,Thomas Paul Matthews,Yen Nhi Truong Vu,Jason Su cs.CV,cs.LG,q-bio.QM

authors_text: Edward Pyne,Ran Raz,Wei Zhan
title: Certified Hardness vs. Randomness for Log-Space
title_zh: 对数空间的认证硬度与随机性
comment: Abstract shortened to fit arXiv requirements
comments: Abstract shortened to fit arXiv requirements
abstract: Let $\mathcal{L}$ be a language that can be decided in linear space and let $ε>0$ be any constant. Let $\mathcal{A}$ be the exponential hardness assumption that for every $n$, membership in $\mathcal{L}$ for inputs of length~$n$ cannot be decided by circuits of size smaller than $2^{εn}$. We prove that for every function $f :\{0,1\}^* \rightarrow \{0,1\}$, computable by a randomized logspace algorithm $R$, there exists a deterministic logspace algorithm $D$ (attempting to compute $f$), such that on every input $x$ of length $n$, the algorithm $D$ outputs one of the following: 1: The correct value $f(x)$. 2: The string: ``I am unable to compute $f(x)$ because the hardness assumption $\mathcal{A}$ is false'', followed by a (provenly correct) circuit of size smaller than $2^{εn'}$ for membership in $\mathcal{L}$ for inputs of length~$n'$, for some $n' = Θ(\log n)$; that is, a circuit that refutes $\mathcal{A}$. Our next result is a universal derandomizer for $BPL$: We give a deterministic algorithm $U$ that takes as an input a randomized logspace algorithm $R$ and an input $x$ and simulates the computation of $R$ on $x$, deteriministically. Under the widely believed assumption $BPL=L$, the space used by $U$ is at most $C_R \cdot \log n$ (where $C_R$ is a constant depending on~$R$). Moreover, for every constant $c \geq 1$, if $BPL\subseteq SPACE[(\log(n))^{c}]$ then the space used by $U$ is at most $C_R \cdot (\log(n))^{c}$. Finally, we prove that if optimal hitting sets for ordered branching programs exist then there is a deterministic logspace algorithm that, given a black-box access to an ordered branching program $B$ of size $n$, estimates the probability that $B$ accepts on a uniformly random input. This extends the result of (Cheng and Hoza CCC 2020), who proved that an optimal hitting set implies a white-box two-sided derandomization.
summary: Let $\mathcal{L}$ be a language that can be decided in linear space and let $ε>0$ be any constant. Let $\mathcal{A}$ be the exponential hardness assumption that for every $n$, membership in $\mathcal{L}$ for inputs of length~$n$ cannot be decided by circuits of size smaller than $2^{εn}$. We prove that for every function $f :\{0,1\}^* \rightarrow \{0,1\}$, computable by a randomized logspace algorithm $R$, there exists a deterministic logspace algorithm $D$ (attempting to compute $f$), such that on every input $x$ of length $n$, the algorithm $D$ outputs one of the following: 1: The correct value $f(x)$. 2: The string: ``I am unable to compute $f(x)$ because the hardness assumption $\mathcal{A}$ is false'', followed by a (provenly correct) circuit of size smaller than $2^{εn'}$ for membership in $\mathcal{L}$ for inputs of length~$n'$, for some $n' = Θ(\log n)$; that is, a circuit that refutes $\mathcal{A}$. Our next result is a universal derandomizer for $BPL$: We give a deterministic algorithm $U$ that takes as an input a randomized logspace algorithm $R$ and an input $x$ and simulates the computation of $R$ on $x$, deteriministically. Under the widely believed assumption $BPL=L$, the space used by $U$ is at most $C_R \cdot \log n$ (where $C_R$ is a constant depending on~$R$). Moreover, for every constant $c \geq 1$, if $BPL\subseteq SPACE[(\log(n))^{c}]$ then the space used by $U$ is at most $C_R \cdot (\log(n))^{c}$. Finally, we prove that if optimal hitting sets for ordered branching programs exist then there is a deterministic logspace algorithm that, given a black-box access to an ordered branching program $B$ of size $n$, estimates the probability that $B$ accepts on a uniformly random input. This extends the result of (Cheng and Hoza CCC 2020), who proved that an optimal hitting set implies a white-box two-sided derandomization.
abstract_zh: 令$\mathcal{L}$为线性空间中可判定的语言，令$ε>0$为任意常数。令 $\mathcal{A}$ 为指数硬度假设，即对于每个 $n$，长度~$n$ 输入的 $\mathcal{L}$ 中的隶属度不能由尺寸小于 $2^{εn}$ 的电路决定。我们证明，对于每个可通过随机对数空间算法 $R$ 计算的函数 $f :\{0,1\}^* \rightarrow \{0,1\}$，都存在一个确定性对数空间算法 $D$（尝试计算 $f$），这样对于长度为 $n$ 的每个输入 $x$，算法 $D$ 输出以下值之一： 1：正确值 $f(x)$。 2：字符串：``我无法计算 $f(x)$，因为硬度假设 $\mathcal{A}$ 为假''，后跟一个（已证明正确的）尺寸小于 $2^{εn'}$ 的电路，用于 $\mathcal{L}$ 中的成员资格，输入长度~$n'$，对于某些 $n' = θ(\log n)$；也就是说，一个反驳 $\mathcal{A}$ 的电路。我们的下一个结果是 $BPL$ 的通用去随机化器：我们给出一个确定性算法 $U$，它将随机对数空间算法 $R$ 和输入 $x$ 作为输入，并确定性地模拟 $R$ 在 $x$ 上的计算。在广泛相信的假设$BPL=L$下，$U$使用的空间至多为$C_R \cdot \log n$（其中$C_R$是取决于~$R$的常数）。此外，对于每个常数 $c \geq 1$，如果 $BPL\subseteq SPACE[(\log(n))^{c}]$ 则 $U$ 使用的空间最多为 $C_R \cdot (\log(n))^{c}$。最后，我们证明，如果有序分支程序的最佳命中集存在，则存在确定性对数空间算法，给定对大小为 $n$ 的有序分支程序 $B$ 的黑盒访问，估计 $B$ 接受均匀随机输入的概率。这扩展了（Cheng and Hoza CCC 2020）的结果，他们证明最佳击球集意味着白盒两侧去随机化。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在对数空间中，通过证明计算复杂性假设与随机化算法的去随机化之间的关系，将电路复杂性与随机性转换相结合。
AI.motivation: 旨在探索计算复杂性理论中‘困难性与随机性’的对立关系，为对数空间内的随机算法提供确定性替代方案，并验证广泛假设（如BPL=L）的可行性。
AI.method: 基于电路复杂性假设，构建确定性算法D，使其在无法计算时输出反例电路；设计通用去随机化算法U，模拟随机算法R的计算过程；利用有序分支程序的最优击中集理论扩展去随机化结果。
AI.result: 证明了在指数级电路复杂性假设下，随机对数空间算法可被确定性算法替代；提出BPL的通用去随机化方案；表明有序分支程序的最优击中集可实现概率估计的确定性算法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作深化了对数空间计算中困难性与随机性的理论联系，为复杂性理论提供了新工具，并推动了去随机化技术在算法设计中的应用。

Our next result is a universal derandomizer for $BPL$: We give a deterministic algorithm $U$ that takes as an input a randomized logspace algorithm $R$ and an input $x$ and simulates the computation of $R$ on $x$, deteriministically. Under the widely believed assumption $BPL=L$, the space used by $U$ is at most $C_R \cdot \log n$ (where $C_R$ is a constant depending on~$R$). Moreover, for every constant $c \geq 1$, if $BPL\subseteq SPACE[(\log(n))^{c}]$ then the space used by $U$ is at most $C_R \cdot (\log(n))^{c}$. Finally, we prove that if optimal hitting sets for ordered branching programs exist then there is a deterministic logspace algorithm that, given a black-box access to an ordered branching program $B$ of size $n$, estimates the probability that $B$ accepts on a uniformly random input. This extends the result of (Cheng and Hoza CCC 2020), who proved that an optimal hitting set implies a white-box two-sided derandomization. 令$\mathcal{L}$为线性空间中可判定的语言，令$ε>0$为任意常数。令 $\mathcal{A}$ 为指数硬度假设，即对于每个 $n$，长度~$n$ 输入的 $\mathcal{L}$ 中的隶属度不能由尺寸小于 $2^{εn}$ 的电路决定。我们证明，对于每个可通过随机对数空间算法 $R$ 计算的函数 $f :\{0,1\}^* \rightarrow \{0,1\}$，都存在一个确定性对数空间算法 $D$（尝试计算 $f$），这样对于长度为 $n$ 的每个输入 $x$，算法 $D$ 输出以下值之一： 1：正确值 $f(x)$。 2：字符串：``我无法计算 $f(x)$，因为硬度假设 $\mathcal{A}$ 为假''，后跟一个（已证明正确的）尺寸小于 $2^{εn'}$ 的电路，用于 $\mathcal{L}$ 中的成员资格，输入长度~$n'$，对于某些 $n' = θ(\log n)$；也就是说，一个反驳 $\mathcal{A}$ 的电路。我们的下一个结果是 $BPL$ 的通用去随机化器：我们给出一个确定性算法 $U$，它将随机对数空间算法 $R$ 和输入 $x$ 作为输入，并确定性地模拟 $R$ 在 $x$ 上的计算。在广泛相信的假设$BPL=L$下，$U$使用的空间至多为$C_R \cdot \log n$（其中$C_R$是取决于~$R$的常数）。此外，对于每个常数 $c \geq 1$，如果 $BPL\subseteq SPACE[(\log(n))^{c}]$ 则 $U$ 使用的空间最多为 $C_R \cdot (\log(n))^{c}$。最后，我们证明，如果有序分支程序的最佳命中集存在，则存在确定性对数空间算法，给定对大小为 $n$ 的有序分支程序 $B$ 的黑盒访问，估计 $B$ 接受均匀随机输入的概率。这扩展了（Cheng and Hoza CCC 2020）的结果，他们证明最佳击球集意味着白盒两侧去随机化。 该论文研究了在对数空间中，通过证明计算复杂性假设与随机化算法的去随机化之间的关系，将电路复杂性与随机性转换相结合。 Edward Pyne,Ran Raz,Wei Zhan cs.CC,cs.DS

authors_text: Shun Muroga,Yasuaki Miki,Kenji Hata
title: A Comprehensive and Versatile Multimodal Deep Learning Approach for Predicting Diverse Properties of Advanced Materials
title_zh: 用于预测先进材料多种特性的全面且多功能的多模态深度学习方法
comment: 38 pages, 17 figures, 1 table
comments: 38 pages, 17 figures, 1 table
abstract: We present a multimodal deep learning (MDL) framework for predicting physical properties of a 10-dimensional acrylic polymer composite material by merging physical attributes and chemical data. Our MDL model comprises four modules, including three generative deep learning models for material structure characterization and a fourth model for property prediction. Our approach handles an 18-dimensional complexity, with 10 compositional inputs and 8 property outputs, successfully predicting 913,680 property data points across 114,210 composition conditions. This level of complexity is unprecedented in computational materials science, particularly for materials with undefined structures. We propose a framework to analyze the high-dimensional information space for inverse material design, demonstrating flexibility and adaptability to various materials and scales, provided sufficient data is available. This study advances future research on different materials and the development of more sophisticated models, drawing us closer to the ultimate goal of predicting all properties of all materials.
summary: We present a multimodal deep learning (MDL) framework for predicting physical properties of a 10-dimensional acrylic polymer composite material by merging physical attributes and chemical data. Our MDL model comprises four modules, including three generative deep learning models for material structure characterization and a fourth model for property prediction. Our approach handles an 18-dimensional complexity, with 10 compositional inputs and 8 property outputs, successfully predicting 913,680 property data points across 114,210 composition conditions. This level of complexity is unprecedented in computational materials science, particularly for materials with undefined structures. We propose a framework to analyze the high-dimensional information space for inverse material design, demonstrating flexibility and adaptability to various materials and scales, provided sufficient data is available. This study advances future research on different materials and the development of more sophisticated models, drawing us closer to the ultimate goal of predicting all properties of all materials.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种多模态深度学习 (MDL) 框架，用于通过合并物理属性和化学数据来预测 10 维丙烯酸聚合物复合材料的物理性能。我们的 MDL 模型由四个模块组成，其中包括三个用于材料结构表征的生成深度学习模型和第四个用于性能预测的模型。我们的方法处理 18 维复杂性，具有 10 个成分输入和 8 个属性输出，成功预测了 114,210 个成分条件下的 913,680 个属性数据点。这种复杂程度在计算材料科学中是前所未有的，特别是对于结构未定义的材料。我们提出了一个框架来分析逆向材料设计的高维信息空间，在有足够数据的情况下展示对各种材料和尺度的灵活性和适应性。这项研究推进了未来对不同材料的研究和更复杂模型的开发，使我们更接近预测所有材料的所有特性的最终目标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态深度学习框架，通过整合物理属性和化学数据，预测10维丙烯酸聚合物复合材料的多种物理性质。
AI.motivation: 传统计算材料科学难以处理高维复杂材料属性预测问题，尤其是结构未定义材料的逆向设计需求未被满足。
AI.method: 构建包含三个生成模型（用于材料结构表征）和一个属性预测模型的多模态深度学习框架，整合10个组分输入与8个属性输出，处理18维复杂数据空间。
AI.result: 成功预测114,210种组分条件下913,680个属性数据点，实现材料科学中前所未有的高维复杂性处理水平。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为多尺度材料研究提供灵活工具，证明了在数据充足条件下预测所有材料属性的可行性，推动材料设计智能化发展。

authors_text: Man Zhou,Naishan Zheng,Jie Huang,Chunle Guo,Chongyi Li
title: Unlocking Masked Autoencoders as Loss Function for Image and Video Restoration
title_zh: 解锁掩码自动编码器作为图像和视频恢复的损失函数
abstract: Image and video restoration has achieved a remarkable leap with the advent of deep learning. The success of deep learning paradigm lies in three key components: data, model, and loss. Currently, many efforts have been devoted to the first two while seldom study focuses on loss function. With the question ``are the de facto optimization functions e.g., $L_1$, $L_2$, and perceptual losses optimal?'', we explore the potential of loss and raise our belief ``learned loss function empowers the learning capability of neural networks for image and video restoration''. Concretely, we stand on the shoulders of the masked Autoencoders (MAE) and formulate it as a `learned loss function', owing to the fact the pre-trained MAE innately inherits the prior of image reasoning. We investigate the efficacy of our belief from three perspectives: 1) from task-customized MAE to native MAE, 2) from image task to video task, and 3) from transformer structure to convolution neural network structure. Extensive experiments across multiple image and video tasks, including image denoising, image super-resolution, image enhancement, guided image super-resolution, video denoising, and video enhancement, demonstrate the consistent performance improvements introduced by the learned loss function. Besides, the learned loss function is preferable as it can be directly plugged into existing networks during training without involving computations in the inference stage. Code will be publicly available.
summary: Image and video restoration has achieved a remarkable leap with the advent of deep learning. The success of deep learning paradigm lies in three key components: data, model, and loss. Currently, many efforts have been devoted to the first two while seldom study focuses on loss function. With the question ``are the de facto optimization functions e.g., $L_1$, $L_2$, and perceptual losses optimal?'', we explore the potential of loss and raise our belief ``learned loss function empowers the learning capability of neural networks for image and video restoration''. Concretely, we stand on the shoulders of the masked Autoencoders (MAE) and formulate it as a `learned loss function', owing to the fact the pre-trained MAE innately inherits the prior of image reasoning. We investigate the efficacy of our belief from three perspectives: 1) from task-customized MAE to native MAE, 2) from image task to video task, and 3) from transformer structure to convolution neural network structure. Extensive experiments across multiple image and video tasks, including image denoising, image super-resolution, image enhancement, guided image super-resolution, video denoising, and video enhancement, demonstrate the consistent performance improvements introduced by the learned loss function. Besides, the learned loss function is preferable as it can be directly plugged into existing networks during training without involving computations in the inference stage. Code will be publicly available.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习的出现，图像和视频修复实现了显着的飞跃。深度学习范式的成功在于三个关键组成部分：数据、模型和损失。目前，很多工作都集中在前两者上，而很少有研究关注损失函数。带着“事实上的优化函数，例如 $L_1$、$L_2$ 和感知损失是否最优？”的问题，我们探索了损失的潜力，并提出了“学习损失函数增强了神经网络用于图像和视频恢复的学习能力”的信念。具体来说，我们站在掩码自动编码器（MAE）的肩膀上，并将其表述为“学习损失函数”，因为预训练的 MAE 天生继承了图像推理的先验。我们从三个角度研究我们信念的有效性：1）从任务定制的 MAE 到原生 MAE，2）从图像任务到视频任务，3）从 Transformer 结构到卷积神经网络结构。跨多个图像和视频任务（包括图像去噪、图像超分辨率、图像增强、引导图像超分辨率、视频去噪和视频增强）的广泛实验证明了学习的损失函数带来的一致的性能改进。此外，学习到的损失函数是更可取的，因为它可以在训练期间直接插入现有网络，而不涉及推理阶段的计算。代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将预训练的掩码自编码器（MAE）作为图像和视频修复任务中的学习损失函数，以提升修复效果。
AI.motivation: 传统损失函数（如L1、L2和感知损失）可能存在优化不足的问题，而学习到的损失函数可能更有效地提升神经网络的修复能力。
AI.method: 基于MAE框架，将其作为学习损失函数应用于图像和视频修复任务，并通过跨任务（图像到视频）、跨架构（Transformer到CNN）的实验验证其有效性。
AI.result: 在图像去噪、超分辨率、增强及视频修复等任务中，使用学习损失函数的方法均取得一致性能提升，且无需推理阶段额外计算。
AI.conclusion: 学习损失函数能增强神经网络的修复能力，且易于集成到现有网络中，为图像和视频修复提供新思路。

Extensive experiments across multiple image and video tasks, including image denoising, image super-resolution, image enhancement, guided image super-resolution, video denoising, and video enhancement, demonstrate the consistent performance improvements introduced by the learned loss function. Besides, the learned loss function is preferable as it can be directly plugged into existing networks during training without involving computations in the inference stage. Code will be publicly available. 随着深度学习的出现，图像和视频修复实现了显着的飞跃。深度学习范式的成功在于三个关键组成部分：数据、模型和损失。目前，很多工作都集中在前两者上，而很少有研究关注损失函数。带着“事实上的优化函数，例如 $L_1$、$L_2$ 和感知损失是否最优？”的问题，我们探索了损失的潜力，并提出了“学习损失函数增强了神经网络用于图像和视频恢复的学习能力”的信念。具体来说，我们站在掩码自动编码器（MAE）的肩膀上，并将其表述为“学习损失函数”，因为预训练的 MAE 天生继承了图像推理的先验。我们从三个角度研究我们信念的有效性：1）从任务定制的 MAE 到原生 MAE，2）从图像任务到视频任务，3）从 Transformer 结构到卷积神经网络结构。跨多个图像和视频任务（包括图像去噪、图像超分辨率、图像增强、引导图像超分辨率、视频去噪和视频增强）的广泛实验证明了学习的损失函数带来的一致的性能改进。此外，学习到的损失函数是更可取的，因为它可以在训练期间直接插入现有网络，而不涉及推理阶段的计算。代码将公开。 本文提出将预训练的掩码自编码器（MAE）作为图像和视频修复任务中的学习损失函数，以提升修复效果。 Man Zhou,Naishan Zheng,Jie Huang,Chunle Guo,Chongyi Li cs.CV

authors_text: Adam K. Taras,Niko Suenderhauf,Peter Corke,Donald G. Dansereau
title: The Need for Inherently Privacy-Preserving Vision in Trustworthy Autonomous Systems
title_zh: 值得信赖的自治系统需要固有的隐私保护愿景
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures
comments: 7 pages, 6 figures
abstract: Vision is a popular and effective sensor for robotics from which we can derive rich information about the environment: the geometry and semantics of the scene, as well as the age, gender, identity, activity and even emotional state of humans within that scene. This raises important questions about the reach, lifespan, and potential misuse of this information. This paper is a call to action to consider privacy in the context of robotic vision. We propose a specific form privacy preservation in which no images are captured or could be reconstructed by an attacker even with full remote access. We present a set of principles by which such systems can be designed, and through a case study in localisation demonstrate in simulation a specific implementation that delivers an important robotic capability in an inherently privacy-preserving manner. This is a first step, and we hope to inspire future works that expand the range of applications open to sighted robotic systems.
summary: Vision is a popular and effective sensor for robotics from which we can derive rich information about the environment: the geometry and semantics of the scene, as well as the age, gender, identity, activity and even emotional state of humans within that scene. This raises important questions about the reach, lifespan, and potential misuse of this information. This paper is a call to action to consider privacy in the context of robotic vision. We propose a specific form privacy preservation in which no images are captured or could be reconstructed by an attacker even with full remote access. We present a set of principles by which such systems can be designed, and through a case study in localisation demonstrate in simulation a specific implementation that delivers an important robotic capability in an inherently privacy-preserving manner. This is a first step, and we hope to inspire future works that expand the range of applications open to sighted robotic systems.
abstract_zh: 视觉是一种流行且有效的机器人传感器，我们可以从中获取有关环境的丰富信息：场景的几何形状和语义，以及场景中人类的年龄、性别、身份、活动甚至情绪状态。这就提出了有关这些信息的范围、寿命和潜在滥用的重要问题。本文呼吁采取行动，在机器人视觉的背景下考虑隐私问题。我们提出了一种特定形式的隐私保护，其中即使具有完全远程访问，攻击者也不会捕获或重建任何图像。我们提出了一套设计此类系统的原则，并通过本地化案例研究在模拟中演示了一种特定的实现，该实现以固有的隐私保护方式提供了重要的机器人功能。这是第一步，我们希望激发未来的工作，扩大对有视力的机器人系统开放的应用范围。

AI.tldr: 本文呼吁在机器人视觉中重视隐私保护，并提出一种固有隐私保护方法，确保即使攻击者有远程访问权限，也无法获取或重建图像。
AI.motivation: 视觉传感器能获取大量环境信息，包括人类敏感数据，引发隐私泄露和滥用风险，需在机器人系统中实现隐私保护。
AI.method: 提出固有隐私保护原则，设计无法被攻击者捕获或重建图像的系统，并通过定位案例的仿真实现验证。
AI.result: 仿真验证了隐私保护系统在定位任务中的可行性，展示了在隐私保护下仍能实现关键机器人功能。
AI.conclusion: 本文为可信自主系统提供了隐私保护框架，未来需扩展其应用范围以提升机器人视觉的隐私安全性。

authors_text: Zhengqing Miao,Xin Zhang,Meirong Zhao,Dong Ming
title: LMDA-Net:A lightweight multi-dimensional attention network for general EEG-based brain-computer interface paradigms and interpretability
title_zh: LMDA-Net：一种轻量级多维注意力网络，用于基于脑电图的通用脑机接口范例和可解释性
comment: 20 pages, 7 Figures
comments: 20 pages, 7 Figures
abstract: EEG-based recognition of activities and states involves the use of prior neuroscience knowledge to generate quantitative EEG features, which may limit BCI performance. Although neural network-based methods can effectively extract features, they often encounter issues such as poor generalization across datasets, high predicting volatility, and low model interpretability. Hence, we propose a novel lightweight multi-dimensional attention network, called LMDA-Net. By incorporating two novel attention modules designed specifically for EEG signals, the channel attention module and the depth attention module, LMDA-Net can effectively integrate features from multiple dimensions, resulting in improved classification performance across various BCI tasks. LMDA-Net was evaluated on four high-impact public datasets, including motor imagery (MI) and P300-Speller paradigms, and was compared with other representative models. The experimental results demonstrate that LMDA-Net outperforms other representative methods in terms of classification accuracy and predicting volatility, achieving the highest accuracy in all datasets within 300 training epochs. Ablation experiments further confirm the effectiveness of the channel attention module and the depth attention module. To facilitate an in-depth understanding of the features extracted by LMDA-Net, we propose class-specific neural network feature interpretability algorithms that are suitable for event-related potentials (ERPs) and event-related desynchronization/synchronization (ERD/ERS). By mapping the output of the specific layer of LMDA-Net to the time or spatial domain through class activation maps, the resulting feature visualizations can provide interpretable analysis and establish connections with EEG time-spatial analysis in neuroscience. In summary, LMDA-Net shows great potential as a general online decoding model for various EEG tasks.
summary: EEG-based recognition of activities and states involves the use of prior neuroscience knowledge to generate quantitative EEG features, which may limit BCI performance. Although neural network-based methods can effectively extract features, they often encounter issues such as poor generalization across datasets, high predicting volatility, and low model interpretability. Hence, we propose a novel lightweight multi-dimensional attention network, called LMDA-Net. By incorporating two novel attention modules designed specifically for EEG signals, the channel attention module and the depth attention module, LMDA-Net can effectively integrate features from multiple dimensions, resulting in improved classification performance across various BCI tasks. LMDA-Net was evaluated on four high-impact public datasets, including motor imagery (MI) and P300-Speller paradigms, and was compared with other representative models. The experimental results demonstrate that LMDA-Net outperforms other representative methods in terms of classification accuracy and predicting volatility, achieving the highest accuracy in all datasets within 300 training epochs. Ablation experiments further confirm the effectiveness of the channel attention module and the depth attention module. To facilitate an in-depth understanding of the features extracted by LMDA-Net, we propose class-specific neural network feature interpretability algorithms that are suitable for event-related potentials (ERPs) and event-related desynchronization/synchronization (ERD/ERS). By mapping the output of the specific layer of LMDA-Net to the time or spatial domain through class activation maps, the resulting feature visualizations can provide interpretable analysis and establish connections with EEG time-spatial analysis in neuroscience. In summary, LMDA-Net shows great potential as a general online decoding model for various EEG tasks.
abstract_zh: 基于脑电图的活动和状态识别涉及使用先前的神经科学知识来生成定量脑电图特征，这可能会限制脑机接口的性能。虽然基于神经网络的方法可以有效地提取特征，但它们经常遇到数据集泛化性差、预测波动性高、模型可解释性低等问题。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的轻量级多维注意力网络，称为 LMDA-Net。通过结合专门为脑电图信号设计的两个新颖的注意力模块——通道注意力模块和深度注意力模块，LMDA-Net 可以有效地集成多个维度的特征，从而提高各种 BCI 任务的分类性能。 LMDA-Net 在四个高影响力的公共数据集上进行了评估，包括运动想象 (MI) 和 P300-Speller 范例，并与其他代表性模型进行了比较。实验结果表明，LMDA-Net 在分类精度和预测波动性方面优于其他代表性方法，在 300 个训练 epoch 内实现了所有数据集中的最高精度。消融实验进一步证实了通道注意力模块和深度注意力模块的有效性。为了便于深入理解 LMDA-Net 提取的特征，我们提出了适用于事件相关电位（ERP）和事件相关去同步/同步（ERD/ERS）的特定类神经网络特征可解释性算法。通过类激活图将 LMDA-Net 特定层的输出映射到时间或空间域，生成的特征可视化可以提供可解释的分析，并与神经科学中的脑电图时空分析建立联系。总之，LMDA-Net 作为各种脑电图任务的通用在线解码模型显示出巨大的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级多维注意力网络LMDA-Net，用于提升基于脑电图（EEG）的脑机接口（BCI）任务的分类性能与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统EEG特征提取方法依赖先验神经科学知识，限制了BCI性能；现有神经网络方法存在跨数据集泛化能力差、预测波动性高及模型可解释性低的问题。
AI.method: 设计包含通道注意力模块和深度注意力模块的LMDA-Net，通过多维特征融合提升分类性能，并提出基于类激活映射的特征可解释性算法，支持ERP和ERD/ERS分析。
AI.result: 在四个公开数据集（含运动想象和P300-Speller范式）上，LMDA-Net在300训练周期内达到最高分类准确率，且预测波动性更低；消融实验证实了注意力模块的有效性。
AI.conclusion: LMDA-Net在分类性能、稳定性及可解释性方面优于现有方法，具有作为通用在线解码模型的潜力。

To facilitate an in-depth understanding of the features extracted by LMDA-Net, we propose class-specific neural network feature interpretability algorithms that are suitable for event-related potentials (ERPs) and event-related desynchronization/synchronization (ERD/ERS). By mapping the output of the specific layer of LMDA-Net to the time or spatial domain through class activation maps, the resulting feature visualizations can provide interpretable analysis and establish connections with EEG time-spatial analysis in neuroscience. In summary, LMDA-Net shows great potential as a general online decoding model for various EEG tasks. 基于脑电图的活动和状态识别涉及使用先前的神经科学知识来生成定量脑电图特征，这可能会限制脑机接口的性能。虽然基于神经网络的方法可以有效地提取特征，但它们经常遇到数据集泛化性差、预测波动性高、模型可解释性低等问题。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的轻量级多维注意力网络，称为 LMDA-Net。通过结合专门为脑电图信号设计的两个新颖的注意力模块——通道注意力模块和深度注意力模块，LMDA-Net 可以有效地集成多个维度的特征，从而提高各种 BCI 任务的分类性能。 LMDA-Net 在四个高影响力的公共数据集上进行了评估，包括运动想象 (MI) 和 P300-Speller 范例，并与其他代表性模型进行了比较。实验结果表明，LMDA-Net 在分类精度和预测波动性方面优于其他代表性方法，在 300 个训练 epoch 内实现了所有数据集中的最高精度。消融实验进一步证实了通道注意力模块和深度注意力模块的有效性。为了便于深入理解 LMDA-Net 提取的特征，我们提出了适用于事件相关电位（ERP）和事件相关去同步/同步（ERD/ERS）的特定类神经网络特征可解释性算法。通过类激活图将 LMDA-Net 特定层的输出映射到时间或空间域，生成的特征可视化可以提供可解释的分析，并与神经科学中的脑电图时空分析建立联系。总之，LMDA-Net 作为各种脑电图任务的通用在线解码模型显示出巨大的潜力。 本文提出一种轻量级多维注意力网络LMDA-Net，用于提升基于脑电图（EEG）的脑机接口（BCI）任务的分类性能与可解释性。 Zhengqing Miao,Xin Zhang,Meirong Zhao,Dong Ming cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SP,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Abhay Zala,Jaemin Cho,Satwik Kottur,Xilun Chen,Barlas Oğuz,Yasher Mehdad,Mohit Bansal
title: Hierarchical Video-Moment Retrieval and Step-Captioning
title_zh: 分层视频时刻检索和分步字幕
comment: CVPR 2023 (15 pages; the first two authors contributed equally; Project website: https://hirest-cvpr2023.github.io)
comments: CVPR 2023 (15 pages; the first two authors contributed equally; Project website: https://hirest-cvpr2023.github.io)
abstract: There is growing interest in searching for information from large video corpora. Prior works have studied relevant tasks, such as text-based video retrieval, moment retrieval, video summarization, and video captioning in isolation, without an end-to-end setup that can jointly search from video corpora and generate summaries. Such an end-to-end setup would allow for many interesting applications, e.g., a text-based search that finds a relevant video from a video corpus, extracts the most relevant moment from that video, and segments the moment into important steps with captions. To address this, we present the HiREST (HIerarchical REtrieval and STep-captioning) dataset and propose a new benchmark that covers hierarchical information retrieval and visual/textual stepwise summarization from an instructional video corpus. HiREST consists of 3.4K text-video pairs from an instructional video dataset, where 1.1K videos have annotations of moment spans relevant to text query and breakdown of each moment into key instruction steps with caption and timestamps (totaling 8.6K step captions). Our hierarchical benchmark consists of video retrieval, moment retrieval, and two novel moment segmentation and step captioning tasks. In moment segmentation, models break down a video moment into instruction steps and identify start-end boundaries. In step captioning, models generate a textual summary for each step. We also present starting point task-specific and end-to-end joint baseline models for our new benchmark. While the baseline models show some promising results, there still exists large room for future improvement by the community. Project website: https://hirest-cvpr2023.github.io

Prior works have studied relevant tasks, such as text-based video retrieval, moment retrieval, video summarization, and video captioning in isolation, without an end-to-end setup that can jointly search from video corpora and generate summaries. Such an end-to-end setup would allow for many interesting applications, e.g., a text-based search that finds a relevant video from a video corpus, extracts the most relevant moment from that video, and segments the moment into important steps with captions. To address this, we present the HiREST (HIerarchical REtrieval and STep-captioning) dataset and propose a new benchmark that covers hierarchical information retrieval and visual/textual stepwise summarization from an instructional video corpus. HiREST consists of 3.4K text-video pairs from an instructional video dataset, where 1.1K videos have annotations of moment spans relevant to text query and breakdown of each moment into key instruction steps with caption and timestamps (totaling 8.6K step captions). Our hierarchical benchmark consists of video retrieval, moment retrieval, and two novel moment segmentation and step captioning tasks. In moment segmentation, models break down a video moment into instruction steps and identify start-end boundaries. In step captioning, models generate a textual summary for each step. We also present starting point task-specific and end-to-end joint baseline models for our new benchmark. While the baseline models show some promising results, there still exists large room for future improvement by the community. Project website: https://hirest-cvpr2023.github.io
abstract_zh: 人们对从大型视频语料库中搜索信息越来越感兴趣。先前的工作已经研究了相关任务，例如基于文本的视频检索、时刻检索、视频摘要和孤立的视频字幕，没有可以从视频语料库中联合搜索并生成摘要的端到端设置。这种端到端的设置将允许许多有趣的应用程序，例如基于文本的搜索，从视频语料库中查找相关视频，从该视频中提取最相关的时刻，并将该时刻分割成带有字幕的重要步骤。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 HiREST（分层检索和 STep 字幕）数据集，并提出了一个新的基准，该基准涵盖了教学视频语料库的分层信息检索和视觉/文本逐步摘要。 HiREST 由来自教学视频数据集的 3.4K 文本视频对组成，其中 1.1K 视频具有与文本查询相关的时刻跨度注释，并将每个时刻分解为带有标题和时间戳的关键指令步骤（总共 8.6K 个步骤标题）。我们的分层基准包括视频检索、时刻检索以及两个新颖的时刻分割和步骤字幕任务。在时刻分割中，模型将视频时刻分解为指令步骤并识别起始边界。在步骤字幕中，模型为每个步骤生成文本摘要。我们还为我们的新基准提供了起点特定任务和端到端联合基线模型。虽然基线模型显示出一些有希望的结果，但社区未来仍有很大的改进空间。项目网站：https://hirest-cvpr2023.github.io

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个分层视频片段检索与步骤描述生成框架，通过HiREST数据集实现从指令视频中检索相关视频、提取关键片段并生成分步描述的端到端任务。
AI.motivation: 现有视频检索与摘要方法多为独立处理，缺乏端到端联合处理能力，无法满足复杂场景下从视频库中检索并生成分步描述的需求。
AI.method: 构建包含3.4K文本-视频对的HiREST数据集，设计分层基准测试，包含视频检索、片段检索、片段分割及步骤描述生成任务，并提供任务特定与端到端基线模型。
AI.result: 基线模型在分层任务中取得初步成效，但存在显著改进空间，尤其在片段分割边界识别与多步骤描述连贯性方面。
AI.conclusion: HiREST为视频理解领域提供新基准，未来研究需聚焦于更精确的时空对齐与跨模态生成技术。

authors_text: Xi Chen,Binghui Peng
title: Complexity of Equilibria in First-Price Auctions under General Tie-Breaking Rules
title_zh: 一般打破平局规则下的首价拍卖均衡的复杂性
abstract: We study the complexity of finding an approximate (pure) Bayesian Nash equilibrium in a first-price auction with common priors when the tie-breaking rule is part of the input. We show that the problem is PPAD-complete even when the tie-breaking rule is trilateral (i.e., it specifies item allocations when no more than three bidders are in tie, and adopts the uniform tie-breaking rule otherwise). This is the first hardness result for equilibrium computation in first-price auctions with common priors. On the positive side, we give a PTAS for the problem under the uniform tie-breaking rule.
summary: We study the complexity of finding an approximate (pure) Bayesian Nash equilibrium in a first-price auction with common priors when the tie-breaking rule is part of the input. We show that the problem is PPAD-complete even when the tie-breaking rule is trilateral (i.e., it specifies item allocations when no more than three bidders are in tie, and adopts the uniform tie-breaking rule otherwise). This is the first hardness result for equilibrium computation in first-price auctions with common priors. On the positive side, we give a PTAS for the problem under the uniform tie-breaking rule.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了当打破平局规则是输入的一部分时，在具有共同先验的最高价格拍卖中找到近似（纯）贝叶斯纳什均衡的复杂性。我们证明，即使平局规则是三边的（即，当不超过三个投标人平局时指定项目分配，否则采用统一平局规则），问题也是 PPAD 完全的。这是具有共同先验的第一价格拍卖中均衡计算的第一个硬度结果。从积极的一面来看，我们在统一打破平局规则下为该问题提供了 PTAS。

AI.tldr: 研究在一般平局规则下第一价格拍卖中近似贝叶斯纳什均衡的计算复杂度
AI.motivation: 填补第一价格拍卖在共同先验下均衡计算复杂度的理论空白，分析不同平局规则对计算难度的影响
AI.method: 通过计算复杂性理论分析，证明问题的PPAD完全性，并设计PTAS算法
AI.result: 证明在三元平局规则下问题PPAD完全，且在统一规则下存在PTAS
AI.conclusion: 计算此类均衡在一般情况下具有高复杂度，但在特定平局规则下存在有效近似方法

authors_text: Stephanie Tsuei,Stefano Soatto
title: Quantifying VIO Uncertainty
title_zh: 量化 VIO 不确定性
abstract: We compute the uncertainty of XIVO, a monocular visual-inertial odometry system based on the Extended Kalman Filter, in the presence of Gaussian noise, drift, and attribution errors in the feature tracks in addition to Gaussian noise and drift in the IMU. Uncertainty is computed using Monte-Carlo simulations of a sufficiently exciting trajectory in the midst of a point cloud that bypass the typical image processing and feature tracking steps. We find that attribution errors have the largest detrimental effect on performance. Even with just small amounts of Gaussian noise and/or drift, however, the probability that XIVO's performance resembles the mean performance when noise and/or drift is artificially high is greater than 1 in 100.
summary: We compute the uncertainty of XIVO, a monocular visual-inertial odometry system based on the Extended Kalman Filter, in the presence of Gaussian noise, drift, and attribution errors in the feature tracks in addition to Gaussian noise and drift in the IMU. Uncertainty is computed using Monte-Carlo simulations of a sufficiently exciting trajectory in the midst of a point cloud that bypass the typical image processing and feature tracking steps. We find that attribution errors have the largest detrimental effect on performance. Even with just small amounts of Gaussian noise and/or drift, however, the probability that XIVO's performance resembles the mean performance when noise and/or drift is artificially high is greater than 1 in 100.

Uncertainty is computed using Monte-Carlo simulations of a sufficiently exciting trajectory in the midst of a point cloud that bypass the typical image processing and feature tracking steps.我们发现归因错误对绩效的影响最大。 Even with just small amounts of Gaussian noise and/or drift, however, the probability that XIVO's performance resembles the mean performance when noise and/or drift is artificially high is greater than 1 in 100.

AI.motivation: 现有VIO系统在复杂噪声和误差环境下性能不稳定，需明确不同误差源对系统的影响程度以提升可靠性。
AI.method: 通过蒙特卡洛模拟在点云环境中生成足够激励的轨迹，绕过图像处理步骤直接计算系统不确定性。
AI.result: 归因误差对系统性能影响最大，即使少量噪声和漂移，系统表现与高噪声场景均值匹配的概率超过1/100。
AI.conclusion: 需重点优化特征轨迹归因算法，同时系统在轻度噪声下仍具备一定鲁棒性。

authors_text: Chaitanya Mitash,Fan Wang,Shiyang Lu,Vikedo Terhuja,Tyler Garaas,Felipe Polido,Manikantan Nambi
title: ARMBench: An Object-centric Benchmark Dataset for Robotic Manipulation
title_zh: ARMBench：以对象为中心的机器人操作基准数据集
comment: To appear at the IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2023
comments: To appear at the IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2023
abstract: This paper introduces Amazon Robotic Manipulation Benchmark (ARMBench), a large-scale, object-centric benchmark dataset for robotic manipulation in the context of a warehouse. Automation of operations in modern warehouses requires a robotic manipulator to deal with a wide variety of objects, unstructured storage, and dynamically changing inventory. Such settings pose challenges in perceiving the identity, physical characteristics, and state of objects during manipulation. Existing datasets for robotic manipulation consider a limited set of objects or utilize 3D models to generate synthetic scenes with limitation in capturing the variety of object properties, clutter, and interactions. We present a large-scale dataset collected in an Amazon warehouse using a robotic manipulator performing object singulation from containers with heterogeneous contents. ARMBench contains images, videos, and metadata that corresponds to 235K+ pick-and-place activities on 190K+ unique objects. The data is captured at different stages of manipulation, i.e., pre-pick, during transfer, and after placement. Benchmark tasks are proposed by virtue of high-quality annotations and baseline performance evaluation are presented on three visual perception challenges, namely 1) object segmentation in clutter, 2) object identification, and 3) defect detection. ARMBench can be accessed at http://armbench.com
summary: This paper introduces Amazon Robotic Manipulation Benchmark (ARMBench), a large-scale, object-centric benchmark dataset for robotic manipulation in the context of a warehouse. Automation of operations in modern warehouses requires a robotic manipulator to deal with a wide variety of objects, unstructured storage, and dynamically changing inventory. Such settings pose challenges in perceiving the identity, physical characteristics, and state of objects during manipulation. Existing datasets for robotic manipulation consider a limited set of objects or utilize 3D models to generate synthetic scenes with limitation in capturing the variety of object properties, clutter, and interactions. We present a large-scale dataset collected in an Amazon warehouse using a robotic manipulator performing object singulation from containers with heterogeneous contents. ARMBench contains images, videos, and metadata that corresponds to 235K+ pick-and-place activities on 190K+ unique objects. The data is captured at different stages of manipulation, i.e., pre-pick, during transfer, and after placement. Benchmark tasks are proposed by virtue of high-quality annotations and baseline performance evaluation are presented on three visual perception challenges, namely 1) object segmentation in clutter, 2) object identification, and 3) defect detection. ARMBench can be accessed at http://armbench.com
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Amazon Robotic Manipulation Benchmark (ARMBench)，这是一个大规模、以对象为中心的基准数据集，用于仓库环境中的机器人操作。现代仓库中的操作自动化需要机器人操纵器来处理各种物体、非结构化存储和动态变化的库存。这种设置对在操作过程中感知物体的身份、物理特征和状态提出了挑战。现有的机器人操作数据集考虑一组有限的对象或利用 3D 模型生成合成场景，但在捕获各种对象属性、杂波和交互方面存在限制。我们展示了在亚马逊仓库中收集的大规模数据集，使用机器人操纵器从具有异构内容的容器中执行对象分割。 ARMBench 包含与 190K 多个独特对象上的 235K 多次拾取和放置活动相对应的图像、视频和元数据。数据是在不同的操作阶段捕获的，即预拾取、传输期间和放置后。凭借高质量的注释提出了基准任务，并针对三个视觉感知挑战提出了基线性能评估，即1）杂乱中的对象分割，2）对象识别和3）缺陷检测。 ARMBench 可以通过 http://armbench.com 访问

AI.tldr: 本文提出ARMBench，一个面向仓储场景的机器人操作大規模数据集，专注于解决多样化物体感知与操作中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集在物体多样性、杂乱场景和交互模拟方面存在局限，难以满足现代仓储自动化中机器人处理异构物体和动态库存的需求。
AI.method: 在亚马逊仓库中使用机械臂执行容器内异构物体分离任务，采集235K+次抓取与放置操作的图像、视频及元数据，涵盖操作前、中、后三个阶段，并标注三个视觉感知任务。
AI.result: 构建包含190K+独特物体的数据集，提供分割、识别和缺陷检测基准任务的高质量标注，并展示基线性能评估结果。
AI.conclusion: ARMBench通过真实场景数据推动机器人操作算法研究，为解决仓储环境中物体感知与操作难题提供新基准。

authors_text: Haomin Zhuang,Yihua Zhang,Sijia Liu
title: A Pilot Study of Query-Free Adversarial Attack against Stable Diffusion
title_zh: 针对稳定扩散的无查询对抗攻击的试点研究
comment: The 3rd Workshop of Adversarial Machine Learning on Computer Vision: Art of Robustness
comments: The 3rd Workshop of Adversarial Machine Learning on Computer Vision: Art of Robustness
abstract: Despite the record-breaking performance in Text-to-Image (T2I) generation by Stable Diffusion, less research attention is paid to its adversarial robustness. In this work, we study the problem of adversarial attack generation for Stable Diffusion and ask if an adversarial text prompt can be obtained even in the absence of end-to-end model queries. We call the resulting problem 'query-free attack generation'. To resolve this problem, we show that the vulnerability of T2I models is rooted in the lack of robustness of text encoders, e.g., the CLIP text encoder used for attacking Stable Diffusion. Based on such insight, we propose both untargeted and targeted query-free attacks, where the former is built on the most influential dimensions in the text embedding space, which we call steerable key dimensions. By leveraging the proposed attacks, we empirically show that only a five-character perturbation to the text prompt is able to cause the significant content shift of synthesized images using Stable Diffusion. Moreover, we show that the proposed target attack can precisely steer the diffusion model to scrub the targeted image content without causing much change in untargeted image content. Our code is available at https://github.com/OPTML-Group/QF-Attack.
summary: Despite the record-breaking performance in Text-to-Image (T2I) generation by Stable Diffusion, less research attention is paid to its adversarial robustness. In this work, we study the problem of adversarial attack generation for Stable Diffusion and ask if an adversarial text prompt can be obtained even in the absence of end-to-end model queries. We call the resulting problem 'query-free attack generation'. To resolve this problem, we show that the vulnerability of T2I models is rooted in the lack of robustness of text encoders, e.g., the CLIP text encoder used for attacking Stable Diffusion. Based on such insight, we propose both untargeted and targeted query-free attacks, where the former is built on the most influential dimensions in the text embedding space, which we call steerable key dimensions. By leveraging the proposed attacks, we empirically show that only a five-character perturbation to the text prompt is able to cause the significant content shift of synthesized images using Stable Diffusion. Moreover, we show that the proposed target attack can precisely steer the diffusion model to scrub the targeted image content without causing much change in untargeted image content. Our code is available at https://github.com/OPTML-Group/QF-Attack.
abstract_zh: 尽管稳定扩散在文本到图像（T2I）生成方面具有破纪录的性能，但对其对抗鲁棒性的研究关注较少。在这项工作中，我们研究了稳定扩散的对抗性攻击生成问题，并询问即使在没有端到端模型查询的情况下是否也可以获得对抗性文本提示。 We call the resulting problem 'query-free attack generation'.为了解决这个问题，我们证明 T2I 模型的漏洞根源在于文本编码器缺乏鲁棒性，例如用于攻击稳定扩散的 CLIP 文本编码器。基于这种见解，我们提出了非针对性和针对性的免查询攻击，其中前者建立在文本嵌入空间中最有影响力的维度上，我们将其称为可操纵关键维度。通过利用所提出的攻击，我们凭经验表明，只有对文本提示进行五个字符的扰动才能导致使用稳定扩散的合成图像发生显着的内容变化。此外，我们表明所提出的目标攻击可以精确地引导扩散模型来擦除目标图像内容，而不会对非目标图像内容造成太大变化。 Our code is available at https://github.com/OPTML-Group/QF-Attack.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在不查询模型的情况下对Stable Diffusion模型进行对抗攻击的方法，提出了无目标和目标导向的query-free攻击技术。
AI.motivation: 尽管Stable Diffusion在文本到图像生成领域表现优异，但其对抗鲁棒性研究不足。现有攻击方法通常依赖模型查询，而实际场景中攻击者可能无法直接访问模型接口，因此需探索无需查询的攻击方式。
AI.method: 通过分析文本编码器（如CLIP）的脆弱性，提出基于文本嵌入空间关键维度的扰动方法。无目标攻击利用文本嵌入中最具影响力的维度生成扰动，目标攻击则通过精确调整嵌入空间引导模型生成特定内容。
AI.result: 实验表明，仅需对文本提示进行5个字符的微小扰动即可显著改变生成图像内容；目标攻击可精准移除指定图像内容而不影响其他部分，且攻击效果在多个模型版本中保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了文本编码器鲁棒性不足是T2I模型对抗脆弱性的根本原因，提出的query-free攻击方法为理解扩散模型安全风险提供了新视角，也为后续防御机制研究奠定了基础。
