search_text: A Pilot Study of Query-Free Adversarial Attack against Stable Diffusion 针对稳定扩散的无查询对抗攻击的试点研究 Despite the record-breaking performance in Text-to-Image (T2I) generation by Stable Diffusion, less research attention is paid to its adversarial robustness. In this work, we study the problem of adversarial attack generation for Stable Diffusion and ask if an adversarial text prompt can be obtained even in the absence of end-to-end model queries. We call the resulting problem 'query-free attack generation'. To resolve this problem, we show that the vulnerability of T2I models is rooted in the lack of robustness of text encoders, e.g., the CLIP text encoder used for attacking Stable Diffusion. Based on such insight, we propose both untargeted and targeted query-free attacks, where the former is built on the most influential dimensions in the text embedding space, which we call steerable key dimensions. By leveraging the proposed attacks, we empirically show that only a five-character perturbation to the text prompt is able to cause the significant content shift of synthesized images using Stable Diffusion. Moreover, we show that the proposed target attack can precisely steer the diffusion model to scrub the targeted image content without causing much change in untargeted image content. Our code is available at https://github.com/OPTML-Group/QF-Attack. 尽管稳定扩散在文本到图像（T2I）生成方面具有破纪录的性能，但对其对抗鲁棒性的研究关注较少。在这项工作中，我们研究了稳定扩散的对抗性攻击生成问题，并询问即使在没有端到端模型查询的情况下是否也可以获得对抗性文本提示。 We call the resulting problem 'query-free attack generation'.为了解决这个问题，我们证明 T2I 模型的漏洞根源在于文本编码器缺乏鲁棒性，例如用于攻击稳定扩散的 CLIP 文本编码器。基于这种见解，我们提出了非针对性和针对性的免查询攻击，其中前者建立在文本嵌入空间中最有影响力的维度上，我们将其称为可操纵关键维度。通过利用所提出的攻击，我们凭经验表明，只有对文本提示进行五个字符的扰动才能导致使用稳定扩散的合成图像发生显着的内容变化。此外，我们表明所提出的目标攻击可以精确地引导扩散模型来擦除目标图像内容，而不会对非目标图像内容造成太大变化。 Our code is available at https://github.com/OPTML-Group/QF-Attack. 本文研究了在不查询模型的情况下对Stable Diffusion模型进行对抗攻击的方法，提出了无目标和目标导向的query-free攻击技术。 Haomin Zhuang,Yihua Zhang,Sijia Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Vibhoothi,François Pitié,Angeliki Katsenou,Yeping Su,Balu Adsumilli,Anil Kokaram
title: Comparison of HDR quality metrics in Per-Clip Lagrangian multiplier optimisation with AV1
title_zh: 每剪辑拉格朗日乘子优化中 HDR 质量指标与 AV1 的比较
comment: Accepted version for ICME 2023 Special Session, "Optimised Media Delivery"
comments: Accepted version for ICME 2023 Special Session, "Optimised Media Delivery"
abstract: The complexity of modern codecs along with the increased need of delivering high-quality videos at low bitrates has reinforced the idea of a per-clip tailoring of parameters for optimised rate-distortion performance. While the objective quality metrics used for Standard Dynamic Range (SDR) videos have been well studied, the transitioning of consumer displays to support High Dynamic Range (HDR) videos, poses a new challenge to rate-distortion optimisation. In this paper, we review the popular HDR metrics DeltaE100 (DE100), PSNRL100, wPSNR, and HDR-VQM. We measure the impact of employing these metrics in per-clip direct search optimisation of the rate-distortion Lagrange multiplier in AV1. We report, on 35 HDR videos, average Bjontegaard Delta Rate (BD-Rate) gains of 4.675%, 2.226%, and 7.253% in terms of DE100, PSNRL100, and HDR-VQM. We also show that the inclusion of chroma in the quality metrics has a significant impact on optimisation, which can only be partially addressed by the use of chroma offsets.
summary: The complexity of modern codecs along with the increased need of delivering high-quality videos at low bitrates has reinforced the idea of a per-clip tailoring of parameters for optimised rate-distortion performance. While the objective quality metrics used for Standard Dynamic Range (SDR) videos have been well studied, the transitioning of consumer displays to support High Dynamic Range (HDR) videos, poses a new challenge to rate-distortion optimisation. In this paper, we review the popular HDR metrics DeltaE100 (DE100), PSNRL100, wPSNR, and HDR-VQM. We measure the impact of employing these metrics in per-clip direct search optimisation of the rate-distortion Lagrange multiplier in AV1. We report, on 35 HDR videos, average Bjontegaard Delta Rate (BD-Rate) gains of 4.675%, 2.226%, and 7.253% in terms of DE100, PSNRL100, and HDR-VQM. We also show that the inclusion of chroma in the quality metrics has a significant impact on optimisation, which can only be partially addressed by the use of chroma offsets.
abstract_zh: 现代编解码器的复杂性以及以低比特率提供高质量视频的需求不断增加，强化了针对每个剪辑定制参数以优化率失真性能的想法。虽然用于标准动态范围 (SDR) 视频的客观质量指标已得到充分研究，但消费类显示器向支持高动态范围 (HDR) 视频的转变对速率失真优化提出了新的挑战。在本文中，我们回顾了流行的 HDR 指标 DeltaE100 (DE100)、PSNRL100、wPSNR 和 HDR-VQM。我们测量了在 AV1 中速率失真拉格朗日乘数的每个剪辑直接搜索优化中使用这些指标的影响。我们报告，在 35 个 HDR 视频中，DE100、PSNRL100 和 HDR-VQM 的平均 Bjontegaard Delta Rate (BD-Rate) 增益分别为 4.675%、2.226% 和 7.253%。我们还表明，将色度纳入质量指标对优化具有重大影响，这只能通过使用色度偏移来部分解决。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了在AV1编码器中使用不同HDR质量度量指标进行逐片段拉格朗日乘数优化的效果。
AI.motivation: 现代编解码器复杂度高且需在低码率下传输高质量视频，而HDR视频的普及对率失真优化提出了新挑战，需研究适配HDR的参数优化方法。
AI.method: 回顾DE100、PSNRL100、wPSNR和HDR-VQM等HDR质量度量指标，通过直接搜索法优化AV1的拉格朗日乘数，并在35段HDR视频上评估其效果。
AI.result: 基于DE100、PSNRL100和HDR-VQM指标的优化分别实现4.675%、2.226%和7.253%的BD-Rate增益，且色度信息对优化效果有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: HDR-VQM在优化效果上优于其他指标，色度处理对优化至关重要，需结合色度偏移等方法提升性能。

authors_text: Jing Lin,Ailing Zeng,Haoqian Wang,Lei Zhang,Yu Li
title: One-Stage 3D Whole-Body Mesh Recovery with Component Aware Transformer
title_zh: 使用组件感知变压器的一级 3D 全身网格恢复
comment: Accepted to CVPR2023; Top-1 on AGORA SMPLX benchmark; Project Page: https://osx-ubody.github.io/
comments: Accepted to CVPR2023; Top-1 on AGORA SMPLX benchmark; Project Page: https://osx-ubody.github.io/
abstract: Whole-body mesh recovery aims to estimate the 3D human body, face, and hands parameters from a single image. It is challenging to perform this task with a single network due to resolution issues, i.e., the face and hands are usually located in extremely small regions. Existing works usually detect hands and faces, enlarge their resolution to feed in a specific network to predict the parameter, and finally fuse the results. While this copy-paste pipeline can capture the fine-grained details of the face and hands, the connections between different parts cannot be easily recovered in late fusion, leading to implausible 3D rotation and unnatural pose. In this work, we propose a one-stage pipeline for expressive whole-body mesh recovery, named OSX, without separate networks for each part. Specifically, we design a Component Aware Transformer (CAT) composed of a global body encoder and a local face/hand decoder. The encoder predicts the body parameters and provides a high-quality feature map for the decoder, which performs a feature-level upsample-crop scheme to extract high-resolution part-specific features and adopt keypoint-guided deformable attention to estimate hand and face precisely. The whole pipeline is simple yet effective without any manual post-processing and naturally avoids implausible prediction. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of OSX. Lastly, we build a large-scale Upper-Body dataset (UBody) with high-quality 2D and 3D whole-body annotations. It contains persons with partially visible bodies in diverse real-life scenarios to bridge the gap between the basic task and downstream applications.

It is challenging to perform this task with a single network due to resolution issues, i.e., the face and hands are usually located in extremely small regions. Existing works usually detect hands and faces, enlarge their resolution to feed in a specific network to predict the parameter, and finally fuse the results. While this copy-paste pipeline can capture the fine-grained details of the face and hands, the connections between different parts cannot be easily recovered in late fusion, leading to implausible 3D rotation and unnatural pose. In this work, we propose a one-stage pipeline for expressive whole-body mesh recovery, named OSX, without separate networks for each part. Specifically, we design a Component Aware Transformer (CAT) composed of a global body encoder and a local face/hand decoder. The encoder predicts the body parameters and provides a high-quality feature map for the decoder, which performs a feature-level upsample-crop scheme to extract high-resolution part-specific features and adopt keypoint-guided deformable attention to estimate hand and face precisely. The whole pipeline is simple yet effective without any manual post-processing and naturally avoids implausible prediction. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of OSX. Lastly, we build a large-scale Upper-Body dataset (UBody) with high-quality 2D and 3D whole-body annotations. It contains persons with partially visible bodies in diverse real-life scenarios to bridge the gap between the basic task and downstream applications.
abstract_zh: Whole-body mesh recovery aims to estimate the 3D human body, face, and hands parameters from a single image. It is challenging to perform this task with a single network due to resolution issues, i.e., the face and hands are usually located in extremely small regions. Existing works usually detect hands and faces, enlarge their resolution to feed in a specific network to predict the parameter, and finally fuse the results. While this copy-paste pipeline can capture the fine-grained details of the face and hands, the connections between different parts cannot be easily recovered in late fusion, leading to implausible 3D rotation and unnatural pose. In this work, we propose a one-stage pipeline for expressive whole-body mesh recovery, named OSX, without separate networks for each part. Specifically, we design a Component Aware Transformer (CAT) composed of a global body encoder and a local face/hand decoder.编码器预测身体参数并为解码器提供高质量的特征图，解码器执行特征级上采样裁剪方案来提取高分辨率的特定部位特征，并采用关键点引导的可变形注意力来精确估计手和面部。 The whole pipeline is simple yet effective without any manual post-processing and naturally avoids implausible prediction. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of OSX. Lastly, we build a large-scale Upper-Body dataset (UBody) with high-quality 2D and 3D whole-body annotations. It contains persons with partially visible bodies in diverse real-life scenarios to bridge the gap between the basic task and downstream applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种单阶段的3D全身网格恢复方法OSX，通过组件感知Transformer（CAT）实现对人体、面部和手部参数的联合估计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因采用多网络分步处理导致面部和手部细节丢失、部件间连接关系难以恢复，且存在不合理的3D旋转和姿态问题。
AI.method: 设计包含全局身体编码器和局部面部/手部解码器的CAT模块，通过特征级上采样-裁剪方案提取高分辨率局部特征，并采用关键点引导的可变形注意力机制精确估计手部和面部。
AI.result: OSX在无需人工后处理的情况下实现了自然的姿态预测，同时构建了包含多样真实场景的高质量UBody数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过单阶段统一框架有效解决了全身网格恢复中的部件细节与整体关联性问题，为下游应用提供了更可靠的基准数据。

method: 设计包含全局身体编码器和局部面部/手部解码器的CAT模块，通过特征级上采样-裁剪方案提取高分辨率局部特征，并采用关键点引导的可变形注意力机制精确估计手部和面部。
result: OSX在无需人工后处理的情况下实现了自然的姿态预测，同时构建了包含多样真实场景的高质量UBody数据集。
conclusion: 该方法通过单阶段统一框架有效解决了全身网格恢复中的部件细节与整体关联性问题，为下游应用提供了更可靠的基准数据。
search_text: One-Stage 3D Whole-Body Mesh Recovery with Component Aware Transformer 使用组件感知变压器的一级 3D 全身网格恢复 Whole-body mesh recovery aims to estimate the 3D human body, face, and hands parameters from a single image. It is challenging to perform this task with a single network due to resolution issues, i.e., the face and hands are usually located in extremely small regions. Existing works usually detect hands and faces, enlarge their resolution to feed in a specific network to predict the parameter, and finally fuse the results. While this copy-paste pipeline can capture the fine-grained details of the face and hands, the connections between different parts cannot be easily recovered in late fusion, leading to implausible 3D rotation and unnatural pose. In this work, we propose a one-stage pipeline for expressive whole-body mesh recovery, named OSX, without separate networks for each part. Specifically, we design a Component Aware Transformer (CAT) composed of a global body encoder and a local face/hand decoder. The encoder predicts the body parameters and provides a high-quality feature map for the decoder, which performs a feature-level upsample-crop scheme to extract high-resolution part-specific features and adopt keypoint-guided deformable attention to estimate hand and face precisely. The whole pipeline is simple yet effective without any manual post-processing and naturally avoids implausible prediction. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of OSX. Lastly, we build a large-scale Upper-Body dataset (UBody) with high-quality 2D and 3D whole-body annotations. It contains persons with partially visible bodies in diverse real-life scenarios to bridge the gap between the basic task and downstream applications. Whole-body mesh recovery aims to estimate the 3D human body, face, and hands parameters from a single image. It is challenging to perform this task with a single network due to resolution issues, i.e., the face and hands are usually located in extremely small regions. Existing works usually detect hands and faces, enlarge their resolution to feed in a specific network to predict the parameter, and finally fuse the results. While this copy-paste pipeline can capture the fine-grained details of the face and hands, the connections between different parts cannot be easily recovered in late fusion, leading to implausible 3D rotation and unnatural pose. In this work, we propose a one-stage pipeline for expressive whole-body mesh recovery, named OSX, without separate networks for each part. Specifically, we design a Component Aware Transformer (CAT) composed of a global body encoder and a local face/hand decoder.编码器预测身体参数并为解码器提供高质量的特征图，解码器执行特征级上采样裁剪方案来提取高分辨率的特定部位特征，并采用关键点引导的可变形注意力来精确估计手和面部。 The whole pipeline is simple yet effective without any manual post-processing and naturally avoids implausible prediction. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of OSX. Lastly, we build a large-scale Upper-Body dataset (UBody) with high-quality 2D and 3D whole-body annotations. It contains persons with partially visible bodies in diverse real-life scenarios to bridge the gap between the basic task and downstream applications. 本文提出了一种单阶段的3D全身网格恢复方法OSX，通过组件感知Transformer（CAT）实现对人体、面部和手部参数的联合估计。 Jing Lin,Ailing Zeng,Haoqian Wang,Lei Zhang,Yu Li cs.CV

authors_text: Mario Martínez-Zarzuela,Javier González-Alonso,Míriam Antón-Rodríguez,Francisco J. Díaz-Pernas,Henning Müller,Cristina Simón-Martínez
title: Multimodal video and IMU kinematic dataset on daily life activities using affordable devices (VIDIMU)
title_zh: 使用经济实惠的设备进行日常生活活动的多模态视频和 IMU 运动学数据集 (VIDIMU)
comment: ef:Sci Data 10, 648 (2023)
comments: ef:Sci Data 10, 648 (2023)
abstract: Human activity recognition and clinical biomechanics are challenging problems in physical telerehabilitation medicine. However, most publicly available datasets on human body movements cannot be used to study both problems in an out-of-the-lab movement acquisition setting. The objective of the VIDIMU dataset is to pave the way towards affordable patient gross motor tracking solutions for daily life activities recognition and kinematic analysis. The dataset includes 13 activities registered using a commodity camera and five inertial sensors. The video recordings were acquired in 54 subjects, of which 16 also had simultaneous recordings of inertial sensors. The novelty of dataset lies in: (i) the clinical relevance of the chosen movements, (ii) the combined utilization of affordable video and custom sensors, and (iii) the implementation of state-of-the-art tools for multimodal data processing of 3D body pose tracking and motion reconstruction in a musculoskeletal model from inertial data. The validation confirms that a minimally disturbing acquisition protocol, performed according to real-life conditions can provide a comprehensive picture of human joint angles during daily life activities.
summary: Human activity recognition and clinical biomechanics are challenging problems in physical telerehabilitation medicine. However, most publicly available datasets on human body movements cannot be used to study both problems in an out-of-the-lab movement acquisition setting. The objective of the VIDIMU dataset is to pave the way towards affordable patient gross motor tracking solutions for daily life activities recognition and kinematic analysis. The dataset includes 13 activities registered using a commodity camera and five inertial sensors. The video recordings were acquired in 54 subjects, of which 16 also had simultaneous recordings of inertial sensors. The novelty of dataset lies in: (i) the clinical relevance of the chosen movements, (ii) the combined utilization of affordable video and custom sensors, and (iii) the implementation of state-of-the-art tools for multimodal data processing of 3D body pose tracking and motion reconstruction in a musculoskeletal model from inertial data. The validation confirms that a minimally disturbing acquisition protocol, performed according to real-life conditions can provide a comprehensive picture of human joint angles during daily life activities.
abstract_zh: 人体活动识别和临床生物力学是物理远程康复医学中具有挑战性的问题。然而，大多数公开的人体运动数据集不能用于在实验室外运动采集环境中研究这两个问题。 VIDIMU 数据集的目标是为日常生活活动识别和运动学分析的经济实惠的患者粗大运动跟踪解决方案铺平道路。该数据集包括使用商用相机和 5 个惯性传感器记录的 13 项活动。视频记录是在 54 名受试者身上采集的，其中 16 名受试者还同时记录了惯性传感器的数据。数据集的新颖性在于：(i) 所选运动的临床相关性，(ii) 价格实惠的视频和定制传感器的综合利用，以及 (iii) 采用最先进的工具，对 3D 身体姿势跟踪进行多模态数据处理，并根据惯性数据在肌肉骨骼模型中进行运动重建。验证证实，根据现实生活条件执行的干扰最小的采集协议可以提供日常生活活动期间人体关节角度的全面图片。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VIDIMU数据集，结合低成本摄像头和惯性测量单元（IMU）传感器，用于日常活动的多模态视频和运动学分析。
AI.motivation: 现有公开数据集难以同时支持远程康复中的活动识别与临床运动学分析，需开发经济高效的日常活动追踪解决方案。
AI.method: 使用商用摄像头和五个多自由度IMU传感器，采集54名受试者的13种日常活动数据，其中16人同步记录IMU数据，并结合三维姿态跟踪与骨骼肌肉模型运动重建技术。
AI.result: 验证表明，在真实场景下采用最小干扰的采集协议可全面反映日常活动中的关节角度变化，证明数据集的有效性。
AI.conclusion: VIDIMU数据集通过低成本多模态采集方案，为日常活动识别与临床运动学分析提供了可行的技术路径，推动远程康复应用发展。

authors_text: Erfan Darzidehkalani,Nanna M. Sijtsema,P. M. A van Ooijen
title: A Comparative Study of Federated Learning Models for COVID-19 Detection
title_zh: 用于 COVID-19 检测的联邦学习模型的比较研究
abstract: Deep learning is effective in diagnosing COVID-19 and requires a large amount of data to be effectively trained. Due to data and privacy regulations, hospitals generally have no access to data from other hospitals. Federated learning (FL) has been used to solve this problem, where it utilizes a distributed setting to train models in hospitals in a privacy-preserving manner. Deploying FL is not always feasible as it requires high computation and network communication resources. This paper evaluates five FL algorithms' performance and resource efficiency for Covid-19 detection. A decentralized setting with CNN networks is set up, and the performance of FL algorithms is compared with a centralized environment. We examined the algorithms with varying numbers of participants, federated rounds, and selection algorithms. Our results show that cyclic weight transfer can have better overall performance, and results are better with fewer participating hospitals. Our results demonstrate good performance for detecting COVID-19 patients and might be useful in deploying FL algorithms for covid-19 detection and medical image analysis in general.
summary: Deep learning is effective in diagnosing COVID-19 and requires a large amount of data to be effectively trained. Due to data and privacy regulations, hospitals generally have no access to data from other hospitals. Federated learning (FL) has been used to solve this problem, where it utilizes a distributed setting to train models in hospitals in a privacy-preserving manner. Deploying FL is not always feasible as it requires high computation and network communication resources. This paper evaluates five FL algorithms' performance and resource efficiency for Covid-19 detection. A decentralized setting with CNN networks is set up, and the performance of FL algorithms is compared with a centralized environment. We examined the algorithms with varying numbers of participants, federated rounds, and selection algorithms. Our results show that cyclic weight transfer can have better overall performance, and results are better with fewer participating hospitals. Our results demonstrate good performance for detecting COVID-19 patients and might be useful in deploying FL algorithms for covid-19 detection and medical image analysis in general.
abstract_zh: 深度学习可以有效诊断 COVID-19，需要大量数据才能进行有效训练。由于数据和隐私法规，医院通常无法访问其他医院的数据。联邦学习（FL）已被用来解决这个问题，它利用分布式设置以保护隐私的方式在医院中训练模型。部署 FL 并不总是可行，因为它需要大量计算和网络通信资源。本文评估了五种 FL 算法在 Covid-19 检测中的性能和资源效率。建立了 CNN 网络的去中心化环境，并将 FL 算法的性能与中心化环境进行了比较。我们检查了具有不同数量参与者、联合回合和选择算法的算法。我们的结果表明，循环重量转移可以具有更好的整体表现，并且参与医院越少，效果越好。我们的结果证明了检测 COVID-19 患者的良好性能，并且可能有助于部署 FL 算法进行 covid-19 检测和一般医学图像分析。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了五种联邦学习算法在COVID-19检测中的性能和资源效率，采用去中心化CNN网络进行实验。
AI.motivation: 由于数据隐私限制，医院无法共享数据，而联邦学习（FL）可在保护隐私的前提下解决此问题，但其计算和通信资源需求较高，需评估其可行性。
AI.method: 构建去中心化CNN网络环境，对比五种FL算法在不同参与医院数量、联邦轮次及选择算法下的表现，并与集中式环境结果进行比较。
AI.result: 循环权重迁移算法整体性能最佳，参与医院数量较少时效果更优，且在COVID-19检测中表现出良好性能。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习在医疗图像分析中具有应用潜力，循环权重迁移策略可有效平衡性能与资源消耗，为疫情检测提供参考方案。

authors_text: Isabella Huang,Yashraj Narang,Ruzena Bajcsy,Fabio Ramos,Tucker Hermans,Dieter Fox
title: DefGraspNets: Grasp Planning on 3D Fields with Graph Neural Nets
title_zh: DefGraspNets：使用图神经网络掌握 3D 场规划
comment: To be published in the IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2023
comments: To be published in the IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2023
abstract: Robotic grasping of 3D deformable objects is critical for real-world applications such as food handling and robotic surgery. Unlike rigid and articulated objects, 3D deformable objects have infinite degrees of freedom. Fully defining their state requires 3D deformation and stress fields, which are exceptionally difficult to analytically compute or experimentally measure. Thus, evaluating grasp candidates for grasp planning typically requires accurate, but slow 3D finite element method (FEM) simulation. Sampling-based grasp planning is often impractical, as it requires evaluation of a large number of grasp candidates. Gradient-based grasp planning can be more efficient, but requires a differentiable model to synthesize optimal grasps from initial candidates. Differentiable FEM simulators may fill this role, but are typically no faster than standard FEM. In this work, we propose learning a predictive graph neural network (GNN), DefGraspNets, to act as our differentiable model. We train DefGraspNets to predict 3D stress and deformation fields based on FEM-based grasp simulations. DefGraspNets not only runs up to 1500 times faster than the FEM simulator, but also enables fast gradient-based grasp optimization over 3D stress and deformation metrics. We design DefGraspNets to align with real-world grasp planning practices and demonstrate generalization across multiple test sets, including real-world experiments.
summary: Robotic grasping of 3D deformable objects is critical for real-world applications such as food handling and robotic surgery. Unlike rigid and articulated objects, 3D deformable objects have infinite degrees of freedom. Fully defining their state requires 3D deformation and stress fields, which are exceptionally difficult to analytically compute or experimentally measure. Thus, evaluating grasp candidates for grasp planning typically requires accurate, but slow 3D finite element method (FEM) simulation. Sampling-based grasp planning is often impractical, as it requires evaluation of a large number of grasp candidates. Gradient-based grasp planning can be more efficient, but requires a differentiable model to synthesize optimal grasps from initial candidates. Differentiable FEM simulators may fill this role, but are typically no faster than standard FEM. In this work, we propose learning a predictive graph neural network (GNN), DefGraspNets, to act as our differentiable model. We train DefGraspNets to predict 3D stress and deformation fields based on FEM-based grasp simulations. DefGraspNets not only runs up to 1500 times faster than the FEM simulator, but also enables fast gradient-based grasp optimization over 3D stress and deformation metrics. We design DefGraspNets to align with real-world grasp planning practices and demonstrate generalization across multiple test sets, including real-world experiments.
abstract_zh: 机器人抓取 3D 可变形物体对于食品处理和机器人手术等现实应用至关重要。与刚性物体和铰接物体不同，3D 可变形物体具有无限的自由度。完全定义它们的状态需要 3D 变形和应力场，而这很难通过分析计算或实验测量。因此，评估抓取规划的抓取候选通常需要准确但缓慢的 3D 有限元法 (FEM) 模拟。基于抽样的抓取规划通常是不切实际的，因为它需要评估大量候选抓取。基于梯度的抓取规划可能更有效，但需要可微分模型来综合初始候选的最佳抓取。可微分 FEM 模拟器可以填补这一角色，但通常不会比标准 FEM 快。在这项工作中，我们建议学习预测图神经网络（GNN）DefGraspNets 作为我们的可微模型。我们训练 DefGraspNets 以基于基于 FEM 的抓取模拟来预测 3D 应力和变形场。 DefGraspNets 的运行速度不仅比 FEM 模拟器快 1500 倍，而且还能够对 3D 应力和变形指标进行基于梯度的快速抓取优化。我们设计 DefGraspNets 是为了与现实世界的抓取规划实践保持一致，并展示跨多个测试集（包括现实世界实验）的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DefGraspNets，一种基于图神经网络的可变形物体抓取规划方法，通过预测3D应力和变形场实现高效抓取优化。
AI.motivation: 传统基于有限元法（FEM）的抓取规划计算速度慢，难以处理具有无限自由度的3D可变形物体，亟需高效可微模型替代。
AI.method: 训练图神经网络（GNN）DefGraspNets，基于FEM模拟数据预测3D应力和变形场，实现比FEM快1500倍的抓取优化。
AI.result: DefGraspNets在多个测试集（含真实实验）中展现良好泛化性，支持基于梯度的快速抓取优化，显著优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: DefGraspNets为可变形物体抓取规划提供了高效可微解决方案，推动了机器人抓取在现实场景中的应用。

Sampling-based grasp planning is often impractical, as it requires evaluation of a large number of grasp candidates. Gradient-based grasp planning can be more efficient, but requires a differentiable model to synthesize optimal grasps from initial candidates. Differentiable FEM simulators may fill this role, but are typically no faster than standard FEM. We train DefGraspNets to predict 3D stress and deformation fields based on FEM-based grasp simulations. DefGraspNets not only runs up to 1500 times faster than the FEM simulator, but also enables fast gradient-based grasp optimization over 3D stress and deformation metrics. authors_text: Adyasha Maharana,Amita Kamath,Christopher Clark,Mohit Bansal,Aniruddha Kembhavi
title: Exposing and Addressing Cross-Task Inconsistency in Unified Vision-Language Models
title_zh: 暴露并解决统一视觉语言模型中的跨任务不一致问题
comment: TMLR 2024; Project Website: https://adymaharana.github.io/cococon/
comments: TMLR 2024; Project Website: https://adymaharana.github.io/cococon/
abstract: As general purpose vision models get increasingly effective at a wide set of tasks, it is imperative that they be consistent across the tasks they support. Inconsistent AI models are considered brittle and untrustworthy by human users and are more challenging to incorporate into larger systems that take dependencies on their outputs. Measuring consistency between very heterogeneous tasks that might include outputs in different modalities is challenging since it is difficult to determine if the predictions are consistent with one another. As a solution, we introduce a benchmark dataset, CocoCon, where we create contrast sets by modifying test instances for multiple tasks in small but semantically meaningful ways to change the gold label and outline metrics for measuring if a model is consistent by ranking the original and perturbed instances across tasks. We find that state-of-the-art vision-language models suffer from a surprisingly high degree of inconsistent behavior across tasks, especially for more heterogeneous tasks. To alleviate this issue, we propose a rank correlation-based auxiliary training objective, computed over large automatically created cross-task contrast sets, that improves the multi-task consistency of large unified models while retaining their original accuracy on downstream tasks.
summary: As general purpose vision models get increasingly effective at a wide set of tasks, it is imperative that they be consistent across the tasks they support. Inconsistent AI models are considered brittle and untrustworthy by human users and are more challenging to incorporate into larger systems that take dependencies on their outputs. Measuring consistency between very heterogeneous tasks that might include outputs in different modalities is challenging since it is difficult to determine if the predictions are consistent with one another. As a solution, we introduce a benchmark dataset, CocoCon, where we create contrast sets by modifying test instances for multiple tasks in small but semantically meaningful ways to change the gold label and outline metrics for measuring if a model is consistent by ranking the original and perturbed instances across tasks. We find that state-of-the-art vision-language models suffer from a surprisingly high degree of inconsistent behavior across tasks, especially for more heterogeneous tasks. To alleviate this issue, we propose a rank correlation-based auxiliary training objective, computed over large automatically created cross-task contrast sets, that improves the multi-task consistency of large unified models while retaining their original accuracy on downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 随着通用视觉模型在广泛的任务中变得越来越有效，它们必须在它们支持的任务中保持一致。不一致的人工智能模型被人类用户认为是脆弱且不值得信任的，并且很难融入到依赖于其输出的大型系统中。测量可能包括不同模式输出的异构任务之间的一致性具有挑战性，因为很难确定预测是否彼此一致。作为解决方案，我们引入了一个基准数据集 CocoCon，在其中我们通过以小但语义上有意义的方式修改多个任务的测试实例来创建对比集，以更改黄金标签和大纲指标，通过对跨任务的原始实例和扰动实例进行排名来衡量模型是否一致。我们发现最先进的视觉语言模型在任务之间存在令人惊讶的高度不一致的行为，特别是对于更加异构的任务。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种基于排名相关的辅助训练目标，通过自动创建的大型跨任务对比集进行计算，提高了大型统一模型的多任务一致性，同时保留了其在下游任务上的原始准确性。

AI.tldr: 揭示并解决统一视觉语言模型中的跨任务不一致性问题
AI.motivation: 现有模型在跨任务中存在不一致性，影响其可靠性和系统整合，需解决这一问题
AI.method: 构建CocoCon基准数据集，通过语义修改生成对比样本，并设计基于排名相关性的辅助训练目标
AI.result: 发现SOTA模型存在显著跨任务不一致性，所提方法有效提升一致性并保持原有精度
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效缓解了跨任务不一致性，为统一模型的可靠性提升提供了新思路

authors_text: Jinlong Hu,Yangmin Huang,Shoubin Dong
title: Transformer and Snowball Graph Convolution Learning for Brain functional network Classification
title_zh: 用于脑功能网络分类的 Transformer 和 Snowball 图卷积学习
comment: Prepared to submit
comments: Prepared to submit
abstract: Advanced deep learning methods, especially graph neural networks (GNNs), are increasingly expected to learn from brain functional network data and predict brain disorders. In this paper, we proposed a novel Transformer and snowball encoding networks (TSEN) for brain functional network classification, which introduced Transformer architecture with graph snowball connection into GNNs for learning whole-graph representation. TSEN combined graph snowball connection with graph Transformer by snowball encoding layers, which enhanced the power to capture multi-scale information and global patterns of brain functional networks. TSEN also introduced snowball graph convolution as position embedding in Transformer structure, which was a simple yet effective method for capturing local patterns naturally. We evaluated the proposed model by two large-scale brain functional network datasets from autism spectrum disorder and major depressive disorder respectively, and the results demonstrated that TSEN outperformed the state-of-the-art GNN models and the graph-transformer based GNN models.
summary: Advanced deep learning methods, especially graph neural networks (GNNs), are increasingly expected to learn from brain functional network data and predict brain disorders. In this paper, we proposed a novel Transformer and snowball encoding networks (TSEN) for brain functional network classification, which introduced Transformer architecture with graph snowball connection into GNNs for learning whole-graph representation. TSEN combined graph snowball connection with graph Transformer by snowball encoding layers, which enhanced the power to capture multi-scale information and global patterns of brain functional networks. TSEN also introduced snowball graph convolution as position embedding in Transformer structure, which was a simple yet effective method for capturing local patterns naturally. We evaluated the proposed model by two large-scale brain functional network datasets from autism spectrum disorder and major depressive disorder respectively, and the results demonstrated that TSEN outperformed the state-of-the-art GNN models and the graph-transformer based GNN models.
abstract_zh: 先进的深度学习方法，特别是图神经网络（GNN），越来越多地期望能够从大脑功能网络数据中学习并预测大脑疾病。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于脑功能网络分类的新型 Transformer 和雪球编码网络（TSEN），它将具有图雪球连接的 Transformer 架构引入到 GNN 中以学习全图表示。 TSEN通过雪球编码层将图雪球连接与图Transformer结合起来，增强了捕获脑功能网络多尺度信息和全局模式的能力。 TSEN 还在 Transformer 结构中引入了雪球图卷积作为位置嵌入，这是一种简单而有效的自然捕获局部模式的方法。我们分别通过自闭症谱系障碍和重度抑郁症的两个大规模脑功能网络数据集评估了所提出的模型，结果表明 TSEN 优于最先进的 GNN 模型和基于图变换器的 GNN 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合Transformer架构与雪球图卷积的新型神经网络模型TSEN，用于脑功能网络分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络在捕捉脑功能网络的多尺度信息和全局模式方面存在局限，需更有效的建模方法提升分类性能。
AI.method: 通过雪球编码层将Transformer与图雪球连接结合，利用雪球图卷积作为位置嵌入，增强局部模式捕捉与全局表征学习能力。
AI.result: 在自闭症谱系障碍和重度抑郁障碍的两个大规模脑功能网络数据集上，TSEN优于当前最先进的GNN模型和基于图Transformer的模型。
AI.conclusion: TSEN通过融合Transformer与雪球图卷积机制，有效提升了脑功能网络分类的准确率，验证了其方法的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合Transformer架构与雪球图卷积的新型神经网络模型TSEN，用于脑功能网络分类任务。

search_text: Transformer and Snowball Graph Convolution Learning for Brain functional network Classification 用于脑功能网络分类的 Transformer 和 Snowball 图卷积学习 Advanced deep learning methods, especially graph neural networks (GNNs), are increasingly expected to learn from brain functional network data and predict brain disorders. In this paper, we proposed a novel Transformer and snowball encoding networks (TSEN) for brain functional network classification, which introduced Transformer architecture with graph snowball connection into GNNs for learning whole-graph representation. TSEN combined graph snowball connection with graph Transformer by snowball encoding layers, which enhanced the power to capture multi-scale information and global patterns of brain functional networks. TSEN also introduced snowball graph convolution as position embedding in Transformer structure, which was a simple yet effective method for capturing local patterns naturally. We evaluated the proposed model by two large-scale brain functional network datasets from autism spectrum disorder and major depressive disorder respectively, and the results demonstrated that TSEN outperformed the state-of-the-art GNN models and the graph-transformer based GNN models. 先进的深度学习方法，特别是图神经网络（GNN），越来越多地期望能够从大脑功能网络数据中学习并预测大脑疾病。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于脑功能网络分类的新型 Transformer 和雪球编码网络（TSEN），它将具有图雪球连接的 Transformer 架构引入到 GNN 中以学习全图表示。 TSEN通过雪球编码层将图雪球连接与图Transformer结合起来，增强了捕获脑功能网络多尺度信息和全局模式的能力。 TSEN 还在 Transformer 结构中引入了雪球图卷积作为位置嵌入，这是一种简单而有效的自然捕获局部模式的方法。我们分别通过自闭症谱系障碍和重度抑郁症的两个大规模脑功能网络数据集评估了所提出的模型，结果表明 TSEN 优于最先进的 GNN 模型和基于图变换器的 GNN 模型。 本文提出了一种结合Transformer架构与雪球图卷积的新型神经网络模型TSEN，用于脑功能网络分类任务。 Jinlong Hu,Yangmin Huang,Shoubin Dong cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Anabel Ovide,Santiago Rodrigo,Medina Bandic,Hans Van Someren,Sebastian Feld,Sergi Abadal,Eduard Alarcon,Carmen G. Almudever
title: Mapping quantum algorithms to multi-core quantum computing architectures
title_zh: 将量子算法映射到多核量子计算架构
abstract: Current monolithic quantum computer architectures have limited scalability. One promising approach for scaling them up is to use a modular or multi-core architecture, in which different quantum processors (cores) are connected via quantum and classical links. This new architectural design poses new challenges such as the expensive inter-core communication. To reduce these movements when executing a quantum algorithm, an efficient mapping technique is required. In this paper, a detailed critical discussion of the quantum circuit mapping problem for multi-core quantum computing architectures is provided. In addition, we further explore the performance of a mapping method, which is formulated as a partitioning over time graph problem, by performing an architectural scalability analysis.
summary: Current monolithic quantum computer architectures have limited scalability. One promising approach for scaling them up is to use a modular or multi-core architecture, in which different quantum processors (cores) are connected via quantum and classical links. This new architectural design poses new challenges such as the expensive inter-core communication. To reduce these movements when executing a quantum algorithm, an efficient mapping technique is required. In this paper, a detailed critical discussion of the quantum circuit mapping problem for multi-core quantum computing architectures is provided. In addition, we further explore the performance of a mapping method, which is formulated as a partitioning over time graph problem, by performing an architectural scalability analysis.
abstract_zh: 当前的单片量子计算机架构的可扩展性有限。一种有前景的扩展方法是使用模块化或多核架构，其中不同的量子处理器（核心）通过量子和经典链路连接。这种新的架构设计带来了新的挑战，例如昂贵的核心间通信。为了在执行量子算法时减少这些运动，需要一种有效的映射技术。本文对多核量子计算架构的量子电路映射问题进行了详细的批判性讨论。此外，我们通过执行架构可扩展性分析，进一步探索映射方法的性能，该方法被表述为随时间的分区图问题。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决多核量子计算架构中量子算法映射的挑战，以减少核心间通信开销。
AI.motivation: 当前量子计算机架构可扩展性有限，而多核架构虽具潜力，但面临高成本的跨核通信问题，需优化映射技术。
AI.method: 将量子电路映射问题建模为时间图划分问题，并通过架构可扩展性分析评估映射方法的性能。
AI.result: 提出的方法有效降低了跨核通信需求，通过分析验证了其在多核架构中的可行性与效率。
AI.conclusion: 该映射方法为多核量子计算架构的规模化提供了理论支持与实践指导。

authors_text: Neman Abdoli,Ke Zhang,Patrik Gilley,Xuxin Chen,Youkabed Sadri,Theresa C. Thai,Lauren E. Dockery,Kathleen Moore,Robert S. Mannel,Yuchen Qiu
title: Evaluating the Effectiveness of 2D and 3D Features for Predicting Tumor Response to Chemotherapy
title_zh: 评估 2D 和 3D 特征预测肿瘤化疗反应的有效性
comment: For Some modifications and error pruning, we need to withdraw the paper
comments: For Some modifications and error pruning, we need to withdraw the paper
abstract: 2D and 3D tumor features are widely used in a variety of medical image analysis tasks. However, for chemotherapy response prediction, the effectiveness between different kinds of 2D and 3D features are not comprehensively assessed, especially in ovarian cancer-related applications. This investigation aims to accomplish such a comprehensive evaluation. For this purpose, CT images were collected retrospectively from 188 advanced-stage ovarian cancer patients. All the metastatic tumors that occurred in each patient were segmented and then processed by a set of six filters. Next, three categories of features, namely geometric, density, and texture features, were calculated from both the filtered results and the original segmented tumors, generating a total of 1595 and 1403 features for the 3D and 2D tumors, respectively. In addition to the conventional single-slice 2D and full-volume 3D tumor features, we also computed the incomplete-3D tumor features, which were achieved by sequentially adding one individual CT slice and calculating the corresponding features. Support vector machine (SVM) based prediction models were developed and optimized for each feature set. 5-fold cross-validation was used to assess the performance of each individual model. The results show that the 2D feature-based model achieved an AUC (area under the ROC curve [receiver operating characteristic]) of 0.84+-0.02. When adding more slices, the AUC first increased to reach the maximum and then gradually decreased to 0.86+-0.02. The maximum AUC was yielded when adding two adjacent slices, with a value of 0.91+-0.01. This initial result provides meaningful information for optimizing machine learning-based decision-making support tools in the future.

However, for chemotherapy response prediction, the effectiveness between different kinds of 2D and 3D features are not comprehensively assessed, especially in ovarian cancer-related applications. This investigation aims to accomplish such a comprehensive evaluation. For this purpose, CT images were collected retrospectively from 188 advanced-stage ovarian cancer patients. All the metastatic tumors that occurred in each patient were segmented and then processed by a set of six filters. Next, three categories of features, namely geometric, density, and texture features, were calculated from both the filtered results and the original segmented tumors, generating a total of 1595 and 1403 features for the 3D and 2D tumors, respectively. In addition to the conventional single-slice 2D and full-volume 3D tumor features, we also computed the incomplete-3D tumor features, which were achieved by sequentially adding one individual CT slice and calculating the corresponding features. Support vector machine (SVM) based prediction models were developed and optimized for each feature set. 5-fold cross-validation was used to assess the performance of each individual model. The results show that the 2D feature-based model achieved an AUC (area under the ROC curve [receiver operating characteristic]) of 0.84+-0.02. When adding more slices, the AUC first increased to reach the maximum and then gradually decreased to 0.86+-0.02. The maximum AUC was yielded when adding two adjacent slices, with a value of 0.91+-0.01. This initial result provides meaningful information for optimizing machine learning-based decision-making support tools in the future.
abstract_zh: 2D和3D肿瘤特征广泛应用于各种医学图像分析任务。然而，对于化疗反应预测，不同类型的 2D 和 3D 特征之间的有效性尚未得到全面评估，特别是在卵巢癌相关应用中。本次调查就是为了完成这样一个综合评价。为此，我们回顾性收集了 188 名晚期卵巢癌患者的 CT 图像。每位患者发生的所有转移性肿瘤均被分割，然后由一组六个过滤器进行处理。接下来，根据过滤结果和原始分割肿瘤计算三类特征，即几何特征、密度特征和纹理特征，分别为3D和2D肿瘤生成总共1595个和1403个特征。除了传统的单层2D和全体积3D肿瘤特征外，我们还计算了不完整的3D肿瘤特征，这是通过顺序添加单个CT切片并计算相应的特征来实现的。针对每个特征集开发并优化了基于支持向量机 (SVM) 的预测模型。使用 5 倍交叉验证来评估每个模型的性能。结果表明，基于 2D 特征的模型实现了 0.84+-0.02 的 AUC（ROC 曲线下面积 [接收器操作特性]）。当添加更多切片时，AUC首先增加达到最大值，然后逐渐下降至0.86+-0.02。将两个相邻切片相加时产生最大 AUC，值为 0.91+-0.01。这一初步结果为未来优化基于机器学习的决策支持工具提供了有意义的信息。

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了2D和3D肿瘤特征在预测卵巢癌患者化疗反应中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究尚未全面比较不同类型的2D和3D特征在卵巢癌化疗反应预测中的表现。
AI.method: 从188名晚期卵巢癌患者中收集CT图像，分割转移性肿瘤后提取几何、密度和纹理特征，生成1595个3D特征和1403个2D特征，并通过SVM模型结合5折交叉验证进行评估。
AI.result: 基于2D特征的模型AUC为0.84±0.02，添加两个相邻切片后AUC提升至0.91±0.01，随后逐渐下降。
AI.conclusion: 结合相邻切片的不完整3D特征可优化机器学习模型，为化疗反应预测提供新思路。

When adding more slices, the AUC first increased to reach the maximum and then gradually decreased to 0.86+-0.02. The maximum AUC was yielded when adding two adjacent slices, with a value of 0.91+-0.01. This initial result provides meaningful information for optimizing machine learning-based decision-making support tools in the future. 2D和3D肿瘤特征广泛应用于各种医学图像分析任务。然而，对于化疗反应预测，不同类型的 2D 和 3D 特征之间的有效性尚未得到全面评估，特别是在卵巢癌相关应用中。本次调查就是为了完成这样一个综合评价。为此，我们回顾性收集了 188 名晚期卵巢癌患者的 CT 图像。每位患者发生的所有转移性肿瘤均被分割，然后由一组六个过滤器进行处理。接下来，根据过滤结果和原始分割肿瘤计算三类特征，即几何特征、密度特征和纹理特征，分别为3D和2D肿瘤生成总共1595个和1403个特征。除了传统的单层2D和全体积3D肿瘤特征外，我们还计算了不完整的3D肿瘤特征，这是通过顺序添加单个CT切片并计算相应的特征来实现的。针对每个特征集开发并优化了基于支持向量机 (SVM) 的预测模型。使用 5 倍交叉验证来评估每个模型的性能。结果表明，基于 2D 特征的模型实现了 0.84+-0.02 的 AUC（ROC 曲线下面积 [接收器操作特性]）。当添加更多切片时，AUC首先增加达到最大值，然后逐渐下降至0.86+-0.02。将两个相邻切片相加时产生最大 AUC，值为 0.91+-0.01。这一初步结果为未来优化基于机器学习的决策支持工具提供了有意义的信息。 该论文评估了2D和3D肿瘤特征在预测卵巢癌患者化疗反应中的有效性。 Neman Abdoli,Ke Zhang,Patrik Gilley,Xuxin Chen,Youkabed Sadri,Theresa C. Thai,Lauren E. Dockery,Kathleen Moore,Robert S. Mannel,Yuchen Qiu eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Lei Chen,Zhan Tong,Yibing Song,Gangshan Wu,Limin Wang
title: CycleACR: Cycle Modeling of Actor-Context Relations for Video Action Detection
title_zh: CycleACR：用于视频动作检测的演员-上下文关系的循环建模
comment: technical report
comments: technical report
abstract: The relation modeling between actors and scene context advances video action detection where the correlation of multiple actors makes their action recognition challenging. Existing studies model each actor and scene relation to improve action recognition. However, the scene variations and background interference limit the effectiveness of this relation modeling. In this paper, we propose to select actor-related scene context, rather than directly leverage raw video scenario, to improve relation modeling. We develop a Cycle Actor-Context Relation network (CycleACR) where there is a symmetric graph that models the actor and context relations in a bidirectional form. Our CycleACR consists of the Actor-to-Context Reorganization (A2C-R) that collects actor features for context feature reorganizations, and the Context-to-Actor Enhancement (C2A-E) that dynamically utilizes reorganized context features for actor feature enhancement. Compared to existing designs that focus on C2A-E, our CycleACR introduces A2C-R for a more effective relation modeling. This modeling advances our CycleACR to achieve state-of-the-art performance on two popular action detection datasets (i.e., AVA and UCF101-24). We also provide ablation studies and visualizations as well to show how our cycle actor-context relation modeling improves video action detection. Code is available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/CycleACR.
summary: The relation modeling between actors and scene context advances video action detection where the correlation of multiple actors makes their action recognition challenging. Existing studies model each actor and scene relation to improve action recognition. However, the scene variations and background interference limit the effectiveness of this relation modeling. In this paper, we propose to select actor-related scene context, rather than directly leverage raw video scenario, to improve relation modeling. We develop a Cycle Actor-Context Relation network (CycleACR) where there is a symmetric graph that models the actor and context relations in a bidirectional form. Our CycleACR consists of the Actor-to-Context Reorganization (A2C-R) that collects actor features for context feature reorganizations, and the Context-to-Actor Enhancement (C2A-E) that dynamically utilizes reorganized context features for actor feature enhancement. Compared to existing designs that focus on C2A-E, our CycleACR introduces A2C-R for a more effective relation modeling. This modeling advances our CycleACR to achieve state-of-the-art performance on two popular action detection datasets (i.e., AVA and UCF101-24). We also provide ablation studies and visualizations as well to show how our cycle actor-context relation modeling improves video action detection. Code is available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/CycleACR.
abstract_zh: 演员和场景上下文之间的关系建模推进了视频动作检测，其中多个演员的相关性使得他们的动作识别具有挑战性。现有的研究对每个演员和场景的关系进行建模，以提高动作识别能力。然而，场景变化和背景干扰限制了这种关系建模的有效性。在本文中，我们建议选择与演员相关的场景上下文，而不是直接利用原始视频场景，以改进关系建模。我们开发了一个循环参与者-上下文关系网络（CycleACR），其中有一个对称图以双向形式对参与者和上下文关系进行建模。我们的 CycleACR 由 Actor-to-Context Reorganization (A2C-R) 和 Context-to-Actor Enhancement (C2A-E) 组成，前者收集 Actor 特征以进行上下文特征重组，后者动态地利用重组的上下文特征来增强 Actor 特征。与专注于 C2A-E 的现有设计相比，我们的 CycleACR 引入了 A2C-R 以实现更有效的关系建模。这种建模使我们的 CycleACR 在两个流行的动作检测数据集（即 AVA 和 UCF101-24）上实现了最先进的性能。我们还提供消融研究和可视化，以展示我们的循环演员-上下文关系模型如何改进视频动作检测。代码可在 https://github.com/MCG-NJU/CycleACR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CycleACR方法，通过建模演员与场景上下文的双向关系来提升视频动作检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法直接利用原始场景信息建模演员与场景的关系，但场景变化和背景干扰限制了效果，需更精准地选择与演员相关的场景上下文。
AI.method: 设计CycleACR网络，包含Actor-to-Context Reorganization（A2C-R）模块收集演员特征重构场景特征，以及Context-to-Actor Enhancement（C2A-E）模块动态利用重构场景特征增强演员特征，实现双向关系建模。
AI.result: 在AVA和UCF101-24数据集上达到SOTA性能，并通过消融实验和可视化验证了循环建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 循环演员-场景关系建模能有效提升多演员场景下的动作检测性能，为视频理解提供新思路。

authors_text: Sajjad Mozaffari,Mreza Alipour Sormoli,Konstantinos Koufos,Mehrdad Dianati
title: Multimodal Manoeuvre and Trajectory Prediction for Automated Driving on Highways Using Transformer Networks
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 网络进行高速公路自动驾驶的多模式操纵和轨迹预测
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures, submitted to IEEE RAL
comments: 8 pages, 3 figures, submitted to IEEE RAL
abstract: Predicting the behaviour (i.e., manoeuvre/trajectory) of other road users, including vehicles, is critical for the safe and efficient operation of autonomous vehicles (AVs), a.k.a., automated driving systems (ADSs). Due to the uncertain future behaviour of vehicles, multiple future behaviour modes are often plausible for a vehicle in a given driving scene. Therefore, multimodal prediction can provide richer information than single-mode prediction, enabling AVs to perform a better risk assessment. To this end, we propose a novel multimodal prediction framework that can predict multiple plausible behaviour modes and their likelihoods. The proposed framework includes a bespoke problem formulation for manoeuvre prediction, a novel transformer-based prediction model, and a tailored training method for multimodal manoeuvre and trajectory prediction. The performance of the framework is evaluated using three public highway driving datasets, namely NGSIM, highD, and exiD. The results show that our framework outperforms the state-of-the-art multimodal methods in terms of prediction error and is capable of predicting plausible manoeuvre and trajectory modes.
summary: Predicting the behaviour (i.e., manoeuvre/trajectory) of other road users, including vehicles, is critical for the safe and efficient operation of autonomous vehicles (AVs), a.k.a., automated driving systems (ADSs). Due to the uncertain future behaviour of vehicles, multiple future behaviour modes are often plausible for a vehicle in a given driving scene. Therefore, multimodal prediction can provide richer information than single-mode prediction, enabling AVs to perform a better risk assessment. To this end, we propose a novel multimodal prediction framework that can predict multiple plausible behaviour modes and their likelihoods. The proposed framework includes a bespoke problem formulation for manoeuvre prediction, a novel transformer-based prediction model, and a tailored training method for multimodal manoeuvre and trajectory prediction. The performance of the framework is evaluated using three public highway driving datasets, namely NGSIM, highD, and exiD. The results show that our framework outperforms the state-of-the-art multimodal methods in terms of prediction error and is capable of predicting plausible manoeuvre and trajectory modes.
abstract_zh: 预测包括车辆在内的其他道路使用者的行为（即操纵/轨迹）对于自动驾驶车辆（AV）（又称自动驾驶系统（ADS））的安全高效运行至关重要。由于车辆未来行为的不确定性，对于给定驾驶场景中的车辆来说，多种未来行为模式通常是合理的。因此，多模态预测可以提供比单模态预测更丰富的信息，使自动驾驶汽车能够执行更好的风险评估。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的多模式预测框架，可以预测多种合理的行为模式及其可能性。所提出的框架包括用于机动预测的定制问题公式、一种新颖的基于变压器的预测模型以及用于多模态机动和轨迹预测的定制训练方法。使用三个公共高速公路驾驶数据集（即 NGSIM、highD 和 exiD）评估该框架的性能。结果表明，我们的框架在预测误差方面优于最先进的多模态方法，并且能够预测合理的机动和轨迹模式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer网络的多模态驾驶行为预测框架，用于高速公路自动驾驶中的车辆轨迹和动作预测。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆需准确预测其他道路使用者的不确定行为以保障安全，传统单模态预测无法充分表征多样的未来行为模式。
AI.method: 设计包含动作预测问题建模、Transformer预测模型及多模态训练方法的框架，通过多数据集验证模型有效性。
AI.result: 在NGSIM、highD和exiD数据集上，该框架在预测误差指标上优于现有最先进的多模态方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架能有效预测高速公路场景下车辆的多模态动作与轨迹，为自动驾驶风险评估提供更全面的信息支持。

authors_text: Minsoo Kang,Doyup Lee,Jiseob Kim,Saehoon Kim,Bohyung Han
title: Variational Distribution Learning for Unsupervised Text-to-Image Generation
title_zh: 无监督文本到图像生成的变分分布学习
comment: Accepted at CVPR2023
comments: Accepted at CVPR2023
abstract: We propose a text-to-image generation algorithm based on deep neural networks when text captions for images are unavailable during training. In this work, instead of simply generating pseudo-ground-truth sentences of training images using existing image captioning methods, we employ a pretrained CLIP model, which is capable of properly aligning embeddings of images and corresponding texts in a joint space and, consequently, works well on zero-shot recognition tasks. We optimize a text-to-image generation model by maximizing the data log-likelihood conditioned on pairs of image-text CLIP embeddings. To better align data in the two domains, we employ a principled way based on a variational inference, which efficiently estimates an approximate posterior of the hidden text embedding given an image and its CLIP feature. Experimental results validate that the proposed framework outperforms existing approaches by large margins under unsupervised and semi-supervised text-to-image generation settings.
summary: We propose a text-to-image generation algorithm based on deep neural networks when text captions for images are unavailable during training. In this work, instead of simply generating pseudo-ground-truth sentences of training images using existing image captioning methods, we employ a pretrained CLIP model, which is capable of properly aligning embeddings of images and corresponding texts in a joint space and, consequently, works well on zero-shot recognition tasks. We optimize a text-to-image generation model by maximizing the data log-likelihood conditioned on pairs of image-text CLIP embeddings. To better align data in the two domains, we employ a principled way based on a variational inference, which efficiently estimates an approximate posterior of the hidden text embedding given an image and its CLIP feature. Experimental results validate that the proposed framework outperforms existing approaches by large margins under unsupervised and semi-supervised text-to-image generation settings.
abstract_zh: 当训练期间图像的文本标题不可用时，我们提出了一种基于深度神经网络的文本到图像生成算法。在这项工作中，我们不是简单地使用现有的图像字幕方法生成训练图像的伪真实句子，而是采用预训练的 CLIP 模型，该模型能够在联合空间中正确对齐图像和相应文本的嵌入，因此在零样本识别任务中表现良好。我们通过最大化基于图像-文本 CLIP 嵌入对的数据日志似然来优化文本到图像生成模型。为了更好地对齐两个域中的数据，我们采用了一种基于变分推理的原则性方法，该方法可以有效地估计给定图像及其 CLIP 特征的隐藏文本嵌入的近似后验。实验结果验证了所提出的框架在无监督和半监督文本到图像生成设置下大幅优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需图像文本说明的无监督文本到图像生成算法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖生成伪文本进行训练存在对齐误差，而CLIP模型能有效对齐图像-文本嵌入空间，适合零样本任务。
AI.method: 基于预训练CLIP模型，通过最大化图像-文本嵌入对的似然函数，并采用变分推断估计隐藏文本嵌入的近似后验分布。
AI.result: 在无监督和半监督设置下，该框架显著优于现有文本到图像生成方法。
AI.conclusion: 变分分布学习框架结合CLIP模型能有效提升无监督文本到图像生成的准确性。

authors_text: Frederik Hagelskjær,Rasmus Laurvig Haugaard
title: KeyMatchNet: Zero-Shot Pose Estimation in 3D Point Clouds by Generalized Keypoint Matching
title_zh: KeyMatchNet：通过广义关键点匹配进行 3D 点云中的零镜头姿态估计
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, 5 tables
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures, 5 tables
abstract: In this paper, we present KeyMatchNet, a novel network for zero-shot pose estimation in 3D point clouds. Our method uses only depth information, making it more applicable for many industrial use cases, as color information is seldom available. The network is composed of two parallel components for computing object and scene features. The features are then combined to create matches used for pose estimation. The parallel structure allows for pre-processing of the individual parts, which decreases the run-time. Using a zero-shot network allows for a very short set-up time, as it is not necessary to train models for new objects. However, as the network is not trained for the specific object, zero-shot pose estimation methods generally have lower accuracy compared with conventional methods. To address this, we reduce the complexity of the task by including the scenario information during training. This is typically not feasible as collecting real data for new tasks drastically increases the cost. However, for zero-shot pose estimation, training for new objects is not necessary and the expensive data collection can thus be performed only once. Our method is trained on 1,500 objects and is only tested on unseen objects. We demonstrate that the trained network can not only accurately estimate poses for novel objects, but also demonstrate the ability of the network on objects outside of the trained class. Test results are also shown on real data. We believe that the presented method is valuable for many real-world scenarios. Project page available at keymatchnet.github.io
summary: In this paper, we present KeyMatchNet, a novel network for zero-shot pose estimation in 3D point clouds. Our method uses only depth information, making it more applicable for many industrial use cases, as color information is seldom available. The network is composed of two parallel components for computing object and scene features. The features are then combined to create matches used for pose estimation. The parallel structure allows for pre-processing of the individual parts, which decreases the run-time. Using a zero-shot network allows for a very short set-up time, as it is not necessary to train models for new objects. However, as the network is not trained for the specific object, zero-shot pose estimation methods generally have lower accuracy compared with conventional methods. To address this, we reduce the complexity of the task by including the scenario information during training. This is typically not feasible as collecting real data for new tasks drastically increases the cost. However, for zero-shot pose estimation, training for new objects is not necessary and the expensive data collection can thus be performed only once. Our method is trained on 1,500 objects and is only tested on unseen objects. We demonstrate that the trained network can not only accurately estimate poses for novel objects, but also demonstrate the ability of the network on objects outside of the trained class. Test results are also shown on real data. We believe that the presented method is valuable for many real-world scenarios. Project page available at keymatchnet.github.io
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 KeyMatchNet，这是一种用于 3D 点云中零样本姿态估计的新型网络。我们的方法仅使用深度信息，使其更适用于许多工业用例，因为颜色信息很少可用。该网络由两个并行组件组成，用于计算对象和场景特征。然后将这些特征组合起来以创建用于姿势估计的匹配。并行结构允许对各个部分进行预处理，从而减少运行时间。使用零样本网络可以缩短设置时间，因为不需要为新对象训练模型。然而，由于网络没有针对特定目标进行训练，零镜头姿态估计方法与传统方法相比通常精度较低。为了解决这个问题，我们通过在训练期间包含场景信息来降低任务的复杂性。这通常是不可行的，因为为新任务收集真实数据会大大增加成本。然而，对于零镜头姿态估计，不需要对新对象进行训练，因此只需执行一次昂贵的数据收集。我们的方法在 1,500 个物体上进行了训练，并且仅在看不见的物体上进行了测试。我们证明，经过训练的网络不仅可以准确估计新物体的姿势，还可以证明网络对训练类别之外的物体的能力。测试结果也显示在真实数据上。我们相信所提出的方法对于许多现实场景都很有价值。项目页面位于 keymatchnet.github.io

AI.tldr: 本文提出KeyMatchNet，一种基于深度信息的3D点云零样本姿态估计网络，通过通用关键点匹配实现无需训练新模型的实时姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 工业场景中常缺乏颜色信息，传统方法需针对新物体重新训练模型导致部署成本高，而零样本方法可避免此问题但存在精度不足的缺陷。
AI.method: 采用双并行分支提取物体与场景特征，通过特征融合生成匹配关系；利用场景信息辅助训练降低任务复杂度，仅需一次性收集数据即可适配新物体。
AI.result: 在1500个训练物体外的测试中，模型能准确估计新物体姿态，并在真实数据集上验证了有效性，证明其泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为工业检测等实际场景提供了无需重新训练的高效姿态估计方案，具有重要应用价值。

authors_text: Zhihua Liu
title: Medical Image Analysis using Deep Relational Learning
title_zh: 使用深度关系学习进行医学图像分析
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2007.07788
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2007.07788
abstract: In the past ten years, with the help of deep learning, especially the rapid development of deep neural networks, medical image analysis has made remarkable progress. However, how to effectively use the relational information between various tissues or organs in medical images is still a very challenging problem, and it has not been fully studied. In this thesis, we propose two novel solutions to this problem based on deep relational learning. First, we propose a context-aware fully convolutional network that effectively models implicit relation information between features to perform medical image segmentation. The network achieves the state-of-the-art segmentation results on the Multi Modal Brain Tumor Segmentation 2017 (BraTS2017) and Multi Modal Brain Tumor Segmentation 2018 (BraTS2018) data sets. Subsequently, we propose a new hierarchical homography estimation network to achieve accurate medical image mosaicing by learning the explicit spatial relationship between adjacent frames. We use the UCL Fetoscopy Placenta dataset to conduct experiments and our hierarchical homography estimation network outperforms the other state-of-the-art mosaicing methods while generating robust and meaningful mosaicing result on unseen frames.
summary: In the past ten years, with the help of deep learning, especially the rapid development of deep neural networks, medical image analysis has made remarkable progress. However, how to effectively use the relational information between various tissues or organs in medical images is still a very challenging problem, and it has not been fully studied. In this thesis, we propose two novel solutions to this problem based on deep relational learning. First, we propose a context-aware fully convolutional network that effectively models implicit relation information between features to perform medical image segmentation. The network achieves the state-of-the-art segmentation results on the Multi Modal Brain Tumor Segmentation 2017 (BraTS2017) and Multi Modal Brain Tumor Segmentation 2018 (BraTS2018) data sets. Subsequently, we propose a new hierarchical homography estimation network to achieve accurate medical image mosaicing by learning the explicit spatial relationship between adjacent frames. We use the UCL Fetoscopy Placenta dataset to conduct experiments and our hierarchical homography estimation network outperforms the other state-of-the-art mosaicing methods while generating robust and meaningful mosaicing result on unseen frames.
abstract_zh: 近十年来，借助深度学习，特别是深度神经网络的快速发展，医学图像分析取得了显着的进步。然而，如何有效利用医学图像中各组织或器官之间的关系信息仍然是一个非常具有挑战性的问题，并且尚未得到充分研究。在本文中，我们基于深度关系学习提出了两种新颖的解决方案来解决这个问题。首先，我们提出了一种上下文感知的全卷积网络，可以有效地建模特征之间的隐式关系信息以执行医学图像分割。该网络在多模态脑肿瘤分割 2017 (BraTS2017) 和多模态脑肿瘤分割 2018 (BraTS2018) 数据集上实现了最先进的分割结果。随后，我们提出了一种新的分层单应性估计网络，通过学习相邻帧之间的显式空间关系来实现精确的医学图像拼接。我们使用 UCL Fetoscopy Placenta 数据集进行实验，我们的分层单应性估计网络优于其他最先进的镶嵌方法，同时在看不见的帧上生成稳健且有意义的镶嵌结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度关系学习的两种新方法，用于解决医学图像分析中的关系信息建模问题，包括医学图像分割和拼接任务。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习推动了医学图像分析的发展，但如何有效利用图像中不同组织或器官之间的关系信息仍是未被充分研究的挑战。
AI.method: 首先设计上下文感知的全卷积网络建模特征隐式关系实现分割；其次提出分层单应性估计网络，通过学习相邻帧显式空间关系实现医学图像拼接。
AI.result: 在BraTS2017/2018数据集上达到分割任务最先进水平，在UCL Fetoscopy Placenta数据集上拼接效果优于现有方法且对未见帧具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了医学图像中关系信息建模难题，在分割和拼接任务中均取得显著成果，为深度关系学习在医学影像中的应用提供了新思路。

search_text: Medical Image Analysis using Deep Relational Learning 使用深度关系学习进行医学图像分析 In the past ten years, with the help of deep learning, especially the rapid development of deep neural networks, medical image analysis has made remarkable progress. However, how to effectively use the relational information between various tissues or organs in medical images is still a very challenging problem, and it has not been fully studied. In this thesis, we propose two novel solutions to this problem based on deep relational learning. First, we propose a context-aware fully convolutional network that effectively models implicit relation information between features to perform medical image segmentation. The network achieves the state-of-the-art segmentation results on the Multi Modal Brain Tumor Segmentation 2017 (BraTS2017) and Multi Modal Brain Tumor Segmentation 2018 (BraTS2018) data sets. Subsequently, we propose a new hierarchical homography estimation network to achieve accurate medical image mosaicing by learning the explicit spatial relationship between adjacent frames. We use the UCL Fetoscopy Placenta dataset to conduct experiments and our hierarchical homography estimation network outperforms the other state-of-the-art mosaicing methods while generating robust and meaningful mosaicing result on unseen frames. 近十年来，借助深度学习，特别是深度神经网络的快速发展，医学图像分析取得了显着的进步。然而，如何有效利用医学图像中各组织或器官之间的关系信息仍然是一个非常具有挑战性的问题，并且尚未得到充分研究。在本文中，我们基于深度关系学习提出了两种新颖的解决方案来解决这个问题。首先，我们提出了一种上下文感知的全卷积网络，可以有效地建模特征之间的隐式关系信息以执行医学图像分割。该网络在多模态脑肿瘤分割 2017 (BraTS2017) 和多模态脑肿瘤分割 2018 (BraTS2018) 数据集上实现了最先进的分割结果。随后，我们提出了一种新的分层单应性估计网络，通过学习相邻帧之间的显式空间关系来实现精确的医学图像拼接。我们使用 UCL Fetoscopy Placenta 数据集进行实验，我们的分层单应性估计网络优于其他最先进的镶嵌方法，同时在看不见的帧上生成稳健且有意义的镶嵌结果。 本文提出基于深度关系学习的两种新方法，用于解决医学图像分析中的关系信息建模问题，包括医学图像分割和拼接任务。 Zhihua Liu cs.CV

authors: Maria Lina de Souza Jeannine Rocha
authors_json: Maria Lina de Souza Jeannine Rocha
authors_text: Maria Clara Ramos Morales Crespo,Maria Lina de Souza Jeannine Rocha,Mariana Lourenço Sturzeneker,Felipe Ribas Serras,Guilherme Lamartine de Mello,Aline Silva Costa,Mayara Feliciano Palma,Renata Morais Mesquita,Raquel de Paula Guets,Mariana Marques da Silva,Marcelo Finger,Maria Clara Paixão de Sousa,Cristiane Namiuti,Vanessa Martins do Monte
title: Carolina: a General Corpus of Contemporary Brazilian Portuguese with Provenance, Typology and Versioning Information
title_zh: Carolina：当代巴西葡萄牙语通用语料库，包含出处、类型学和版本信息
comment: 14 pages, 3 figures, 1 appendix
comments: 14 pages, 3 figures, 1 appendix
abstract: This paper presents the first publicly available version of the Carolina Corpus and discusses its future directions. Carolina is a large open corpus of Brazilian Portuguese texts under construction using web-as-corpus methodology enhanced with provenance, typology, versioning, and text integrality. The corpus aims at being used both as a reliable source for research in Linguistics and as an important resource for Computer Science research on language models, contributing towards removing Portuguese from the set of low-resource languages. Here we present the construction of the corpus methodology, comparing it with other existing methodologies, as well as the corpus current state: Carolina's first public version has $653,322,577$ tokens, distributed over $7$ broad types. Each text is annotated with several different metadata categories in its header, which we developed using TEI annotation standards. We also present ongoing derivative works and invite NLP researchers to contribute with their own.
summary: This paper presents the first publicly available version of the Carolina Corpus and discusses its future directions. Carolina is a large open corpus of Brazilian Portuguese texts under construction using web-as-corpus methodology enhanced with provenance, typology, versioning, and text integrality. The corpus aims at being used both as a reliable source for research in Linguistics and as an important resource for Computer Science research on language models, contributing towards removing Portuguese from the set of low-resource languages. Here we present the construction of the corpus methodology, comparing it with other existing methodologies, as well as the corpus current state: Carolina's first public version has $653,322,577$ tokens, distributed over $7$ broad types. Each text is annotated with several different metadata categories in its header, which we developed using TEI annotation standards. We also present ongoing derivative works and invite NLP researchers to contribute with their own.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了卡罗来纳语料库的第一个公开版本，并讨论了其未来的方向。 Carolina 是一个大型开放式巴西葡萄牙语文本语料库，正在使用网络语料库方法构建，并增强了来源、类型、版本控制和文本完整性。该语料库旨在既作为语言学研究的可靠来源，又作为计算机科学研究语言模型的重要资源，有助于将葡萄牙语从低资源语言中剔除。在这里，我们介绍语料库方法的构建，将其与其他现有方法进行比较，以及语料库的当前状态：Carolina 的第一个公共版本拥有 653,322,577 美元的代币，分布在 7 美元的广泛类型上。每个文本在其标题中都用几个不同的元数据类别进行注释，这些类别是我们使用 TEI 注释标准开发的。我们还展示了正在进行的衍生作品，并邀请 NLP 研究人员贡献自己的作品。

AI.tldr: 介绍Carolina语料库的构建及其未来发展方向，旨在为语言学和计算机科学提供资源
AI.motivation: 通过构建大型语料库，提升葡萄牙语在NLP领域的资源水平，促进相关研究
AI.method: 采用网络爬取方法结合TEI标准进行元数据标注，增强来源、类型学和版本信息
AI.result: 建成包含6.53亿词元、7种文本类型的语料库，每个文本均标注元数据
AI.conclusion: Carolina语料库为研究提供重要资源，未来需持续扩展并鼓励社区参与

authors_text: Durga Prasad Pydi,S. Advaith
title: Attention Boosted Autoencoder for Building Energy Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 用于建筑能源异常检测的注意力增强自动编码器
abstract: Leveraging data collected from smart meters in buildings can aid in developing policies towards energy conservation. Significant energy savings could be realised if deviations in the building operating conditions are detected early, and appropriate measures are taken. Towards this end, machine learning techniques can be used to automate the discovery of these abnormal patterns in the collected data. Current methods in anomaly detection rely on an underlying model to capture the usual or acceptable operating behaviour. In this paper, we propose a novel attention mechanism to model the consumption behaviour of a building and demonstrate the effectiveness of the model in capturing the relations using sample case studies. A real-world dataset is modelled using the proposed architecture, and the results are presented. A visualisation approach towards understanding the relations captured by the model is also presented.
summary: Leveraging data collected from smart meters in buildings can aid in developing policies towards energy conservation. Significant energy savings could be realised if deviations in the building operating conditions are detected early, and appropriate measures are taken. Towards this end, machine learning techniques can be used to automate the discovery of these abnormal patterns in the collected data. Current methods in anomaly detection rely on an underlying model to capture the usual or acceptable operating behaviour. In this paper, we propose a novel attention mechanism to model the consumption behaviour of a building and demonstrate the effectiveness of the model in capturing the relations using sample case studies. A real-world dataset is modelled using the proposed architecture, and the results are presented. A visualisation approach towards understanding the relations captured by the model is also presented.
abstract_zh: 利用从建筑物智能电表收集的数据可以帮助制定节能政策。如果及早发现建筑物运行条件的偏差并采取适当的措施，则可以实现显着的节能。为此，可以使用机器学习技术来自动发现收集的数据中的这些异常模式。当前的异常检测方法依赖于底层模型来捕获通常或可接受的操作行为。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的注意力机制来对建筑物的消费行为进行建模，并使用示例案例研究证明了该模型在捕获关系方面的有效性。使用所提出的架构对现实世界的数据集进行建模，并给出结果。还提出了一种理解模型捕获的关系的可视化方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合注意力机制的自编码器模型，用于检测建筑能耗异常。
AI.motivation: 建筑能耗异常检测有助于实现节能目标，但现有方法在捕捉正常运行模式和异常关系方面存在不足。
AI.method: 设计注意力增强的自编码器架构，通过注意力机制建模建筑能耗的时间序列特征，并结合可视化方法分析模型捕获的关系。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上验证了模型有效性，案例研究显示其能准确识别异常模式并可视化关键特征关联。
AI.conclusion: 注意力机制提升了模型对建筑能耗行为关系的建模能力，为异常检测提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Tao Lu,Xiang Ding,Haisong Liu,Gangshan Wu,Limin Wang
title: LinK: Linear Kernel for LiDAR-based 3D Perception
title_zh: LinK：基于 LiDAR 的 3D 感知的线性内核
comment: Accepted to CVPR2023
comments: Accepted to CVPR2023
abstract: Extending the success of 2D Large Kernel to 3D perception is challenging due to: 1. the cubically-increasing overhead in processing 3D data; 2. the optimization difficulties from data scarcity and sparsity. Previous work has taken the first step to scale up the kernel size from 3x3x3 to 7x7x7 by introducing block-shared weights. However, to reduce the feature variations within a block, it only employs modest block size and fails to achieve larger kernels like the 21x21x21. To address this issue, we propose a new method, called LinK, to achieve a wider-range perception receptive field in a convolution-like manner with two core designs. The first is to replace the static kernel matrix with a linear kernel generator, which adaptively provides weights only for non-empty voxels. The second is to reuse the pre-computed aggregation results in the overlapped blocks to reduce computation complexity. The proposed method successfully enables each voxel to perceive context within a range of 21x21x21. Extensive experiments on two basic perception tasks, 3D object detection and 3D semantic segmentation, demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Notably, we rank 1st on the public leaderboard of the 3D detection benchmark of nuScenes (LiDAR track), by simply incorporating a LinK-based backbone into the basic detector, CenterPoint. We also boost the strong segmentation baseline's mIoU with 2.7% in the SemanticKITTI test set. Code is available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/LinK.
summary: Extending the success of 2D Large Kernel to 3D perception is challenging due to: 1. the cubically-increasing overhead in processing 3D data; 2. the optimization difficulties from data scarcity and sparsity. Previous work has taken the first step to scale up the kernel size from 3x3x3 to 7x7x7 by introducing block-shared weights. However, to reduce the feature variations within a block, it only employs modest block size and fails to achieve larger kernels like the 21x21x21. To address this issue, we propose a new method, called LinK, to achieve a wider-range perception receptive field in a convolution-like manner with two core designs. The first is to replace the static kernel matrix with a linear kernel generator, which adaptively provides weights only for non-empty voxels. The second is to reuse the pre-computed aggregation results in the overlapped blocks to reduce computation complexity. The proposed method successfully enables each voxel to perceive context within a range of 21x21x21. Extensive experiments on two basic perception tasks, 3D object detection and 3D semantic segmentation, demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Notably, we rank 1st on the public leaderboard of the 3D detection benchmark of nuScenes (LiDAR track), by simply incorporating a LinK-based backbone into the basic detector, CenterPoint. We also boost the strong segmentation baseline's mIoU with 2.7% in the SemanticKITTI test set. Code is available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/LinK.
abstract_zh: 将 2D 大内核的成功扩展到 3D 感知具有挑战性，因为： 1. 处理 3D 数据的开销成倍增加； 2.数据稀缺和稀疏带来的优化困难。之前的工作已经迈出了第一步，通过引入块共享权重将内核大小从 3x3x3 扩展到 7x7x7。然而，为了减少块内的特征变化，它仅采用适度的块大小，并且无法实现像 21x21x21 这样的更大的内核。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种名为 LinK 的新方法，通过两个核心设计以类似卷积的方式实现更广泛的感知感受野。第一种方法是用线性核生成器替换静态核矩阵，线性核生成器自适应地仅为非空体素提供权重。第二是重用重叠块中预先计算的聚合结果以降低计算复杂度。所提出的方法成功地使每个体素能够感知 21x21x21 范围内的上下文。对 3D 对象检测和 3D 语义分割这两个基本感知任务的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性。值得注意的是，通过简单地将基于 LinK 的骨干网合并到基本检测器 CenterPoint 中，我们在 nuScenes（LiDAR 赛道）的 3D 检测基准公共排行榜上排名第一。我们还在 SemanticKITTI 测试集中将强分割基线的 mIoU 提高了 2.7%。代码可在 https://github.com/MCG-NJU/LinK 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LinK方法，通过线性核生成器和重用计算结果，实现LiDAR-based 3D感知中更大范围的感知视野。
AI.motivation: 将2D大核扩展到3D感知面临计算开销立方增长和数据稀疏性优化困难，现有方法仅能实现7x7x7核，无法达到21x21x21等更大核。
AI.method: 设计线性核生成器动态生成非空体素权重，并复用重叠块的预计算结果以降低复杂度。
AI.result: 在nuScenes 3D检测榜单排名第一，SemanticKITTI分割任务mIoU提升2.7%。
AI.conclusion: LinK有效解决了3D感知中大核扩展难题，在检测和分割任务中均取得显著性能提升。

search_text: LinK: Linear Kernel for LiDAR-based 3D Perception LinK：基于 LiDAR 的 3D 感知的线性内核 Extending the success of 2D Large Kernel to 3D perception is challenging due to: 1. the cubically-increasing overhead in processing 3D data; 2. the optimization difficulties from data scarcity and sparsity. Previous work has taken the first step to scale up the kernel size from 3x3x3 to 7x7x7 by introducing block-shared weights. However, to reduce the feature variations within a block, it only employs modest block size and fails to achieve larger kernels like the 21x21x21. To address this issue, we propose a new method, called LinK, to achieve a wider-range perception receptive field in a convolution-like manner with two core designs. The first is to replace the static kernel matrix with a linear kernel generator, which adaptively provides weights only for non-empty voxels. The second is to reuse the pre-computed aggregation results in the overlapped blocks to reduce computation complexity. The proposed method successfully enables each voxel to perceive context within a range of 21x21x21. Extensive experiments on two basic perception tasks, 3D object detection and 3D semantic segmentation, demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Notably, we rank 1st on the public leaderboard of the 3D detection benchmark of nuScenes (LiDAR track), by simply incorporating a LinK-based backbone into the basic detector, CenterPoint. We also boost the strong segmentation baseline's mIoU with 2.7% in the SemanticKITTI test set. Code is available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/LinK. 将 2D 大内核的成功扩展到 3D 感知具有挑战性，因为： 1. 处理 3D 数据的开销成倍增加； 2.数据稀缺和稀疏带来的优化困难。之前的工作已经迈出了第一步，通过引入块共享权重将内核大小从 3x3x3 扩展到 7x7x7。然而，为了减少块内的特征变化，它仅采用适度的块大小，并且无法实现像 21x21x21 这样的更大的内核。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种名为 LinK 的新方法，通过两个核心设计以类似卷积的方式实现更广泛的感知感受野。第一种方法是用线性核生成器替换静态核矩阵，线性核生成器自适应地仅为非空体素提供权重。第二是重用重叠块中预先计算的聚合结果以降低计算复杂度。所提出的方法成功地使每个体素能够感知 21x21x21 范围内的上下文。对 3D 对象检测和 3D 语义分割这两个基本感知任务的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性。值得注意的是，通过简单地将基于 LinK 的骨干网合并到基本检测器 CenterPoint 中，我们在 nuScenes（LiDAR 赛道）的 3D 检测基准公共排行榜上排名第一。我们还在 SemanticKITTI 测试集中将强分割基线的 mIoU 提高了 2.7%。代码可在 https://github.com/MCG-NJU/LinK 获取。 本文提出LinK方法，通过线性核生成器和重用计算结果，实现LiDAR-based 3D感知中更大范围的感知视野。 Tao Lu,Xiang Ding,Haisong Liu,Gangshan Wu,Limin Wang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Ivan Kruzhilov,Stepan Kudin,Luka Vetoshkin,Elena Sokolova,Vladimir Kokh
title: Whole-body PET image denoising for reduced acquisition time
title_zh: 全身 PET 图像去噪以缩短采集时间
abstract: This paper evaluates the performance of supervised and unsupervised deep learning models for denoising positron emission tomography (PET) images in the presence of reduced acquisition times. Our experiments consider 212 studies (56908 images), and evaluate the models using 2D (RMSE, SSIM) and 3D (SUVpeak and SUVmax error for the regions of interest) metrics. It was shown that, in contrast to previous studies, supervised models (ResNet, Unet, SwinIR) outperform unsupervised models (pix2pix GAN and CycleGAN with ResNet backbone and various auxiliary losses) in the reconstruction of 2D PET images. Moreover, a hybrid approach of supervised CycleGAN shows the best results in SUVmax estimation for denoised images, and the SUVmax estimation error for denoised images is comparable with the PET reproducibility error.
summary: This paper evaluates the performance of supervised and unsupervised deep learning models for denoising positron emission tomography (PET) images in the presence of reduced acquisition times. Our experiments consider 212 studies (56908 images), and evaluate the models using 2D (RMSE, SSIM) and 3D (SUVpeak and SUVmax error for the regions of interest) metrics. It was shown that, in contrast to previous studies, supervised models (ResNet, Unet, SwinIR) outperform unsupervised models (pix2pix GAN and CycleGAN with ResNet backbone and various auxiliary losses) in the reconstruction of 2D PET images. Moreover, a hybrid approach of supervised CycleGAN shows the best results in SUVmax estimation for denoised images, and the SUVmax estimation error for denoised images is comparable with the PET reproducibility error.
abstract_zh: 本文评估了有监督和无监督深度学习模型在减少采集时间的情况下对正电子发射断层扫描 (PET) 图像进行去噪的性能。我们的实验考虑了 212 项研究（56908 张图像），并使用 2D（RMSE、SSIM）和 3D（感兴趣区域的 SUVpeak 和 SUVmax 误差）指标评估模型。结果表明，与之前的研究相比，监督模型（ResNet、Unet、SwinIR）在 2D PET 图像的重建中优于无监督模型（带有 ResNet 主干和各种辅助损失的 pix2pix GAN 和 CycleGAN）。此外，有监督的 CycleGAN 的混合方法在去噪图像的 SUVmax 估计中显示出最佳结果，并且去噪图像的 SUVmax 估计误差与 PET 再现性误差相当。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过监督和非监督深度学习模型，在减少PET图像采集时间的情况下进行全身PET图像去噪。
AI.motivation: 减少PET图像采集时间可提高检查效率，但会引入更多噪声，影响诊断准确性。传统去噪方法效果有限，需探索深度学习模型在低剂量或短时间采集下的去噪能力。
AI.method: 采用监督模型（如ResNet、Unet、SwinIR）和非监督模型（如pix2pix GAN、CycleGAN），基于212项研究（56908张图像）进行实验，使用2D指标（RMSE、SSIM）和3D指标（SUVpeak、SUVmax误差）评估模型性能。
AI.result: 监督模型在2D PET图像重建中优于非监督模型，混合监督CycleGAN在SUVmax估计上表现最佳，去噪后SUVmax误差与PET可重复性误差相当。
AI.conclusion: 监督深度学习模型在减少采集时间的PET图像去噪中表现更优，混合监督CycleGAN方法在临床应用中具有潜力，其SUVmax估计误差达到临床可接受水平。
