ai_content_json.conclusion: 本文方法通过解耦路径规划与控制优化，为动态环境下的机器人避障提供了高效且鲁棒的解决方案，具有潜在应用价值。

tldr: 本文提出一种无需直接使用障碍物信息的动态环境机器人避障运动控制方案，通过隧道跟踪MPC与自适应引导向量场实现路径规划与碰撞避免。
motivation: 传统避障方法依赖实时障碍物信息，难以应对动态环境中的凹形障碍物，且存在计算复杂度高、鲁棒性不足等问题。
method: 构建基于递推时域路径跟踪的MPC控制器，结合自由工作空间子空间中的自适应引导向量场，通过最小距离准则生成避障路径并确保跟踪性能。
result: 仿真结果验证了该控制方案在动态环境中可有效实现目标跟踪与碰撞避免，且无需显式处理障碍物信息。
conclusion: 本文方法通过解耦路径规划与控制优化，为动态环境下的机器人避障提供了高效且鲁棒的解决方案，具有潜在应用价值。
search_text: Obstacle Avoidance in Dynamic Environments via Tunnel-following MPC with Adaptive Guiding Vector Fields 通过具有自适应引导矢量场的隧道跟随 MPC 在动态环境中避障 This paper proposes a motion control scheme for robots operating in a dynamic environment with concave obstacles. A Model Predictive Controller (MPC) is constructed to drive the robot towards a goal position while ensuring collision avoidance without direct use of obstacle information in the optimization problem. This is achieved by guaranteeing tracking performance of an appropriately designed receding horizon path. The path is computed using a guiding vector field defined in a subspace of the free workspace where each point in the subspace satisfies a criteria for minimum distance to all obstacles. The effectiveness of the control scheme is illustrated by means of simulation. 本文提出了一种在具有凹形障碍物的动态环境中运行的机器人的运动控制方案。构建模型预测控制器（MPC）来驱动机器人朝目标位置移动，同时确保避免碰撞，而无需在优化问题中直接使用障碍物信息。这是通过保证适当设计的后退地平线路径的跟踪性能来实现的。使用在自由工作空间的子空间中定义的引导向量场来计算路径，其中子空间中的每个点满足到所有障碍物的最小距离的标准。通过仿真验证了控制方案的有效性。 本文提出一种无需直接使用障碍物信息的动态环境机器人避障运动控制方案，通过隧道跟踪MPC与自适应引导向量场实现路径规划与碰撞避免。 Albin Dahlin,Yiannis Karayiannidis cs.RO

authors_text: Cheng Wang,Guoli Wang,Qian Zhang,Peng Guo,Wenyu Liu,Xinggang Wang
title: OpenInst: A Simple Query-Based Method for Open-World Instance Segmentation
title_zh: OpenInst：一种基于简单查询的开放世界实例分割方法
abstract: Open-world instance segmentation has recently gained significant popularitydue to its importance in many real-world applications, such as autonomous driving, robot perception, and remote sensing. However, previous methods have either produced unsatisfactory results or relied on complex systems and paradigms. We wonder if there is a simple way to obtain state-of-the-art results. Fortunately, we have identified two observations that help us achieve the best of both worlds: 1) query-based methods demonstrate superiority over dense proposal-based methods in open-world instance segmentation, and 2) learning localization cues is sufficient for open world instance segmentation. Based on these observations, we propose a simple query-based method named OpenInst for open world instance segmentation. OpenInst leverages advanced query-based methods like QueryInst and focuses on learning localization cues. Notably, OpenInst is an extremely simple and straightforward framework without any auxiliary modules or post-processing, yet achieves state-of-the-art results on multiple benchmarks. Specifically, in the COCO$\to$UVO scenario, OpenInst achieves a mask AR of 53.3, outperforming the previous best methods by 2.0 AR with a simpler structure. We hope that OpenInst can serve as a solid baselines for future research in this area.
summary: Open-world instance segmentation has recently gained significant popularitydue to its importance in many real-world applications, such as autonomous driving, robot perception, and remote sensing. However, previous methods have either produced unsatisfactory results or relied on complex systems and paradigms. We wonder if there is a simple way to obtain state-of-the-art results. Fortunately, we have identified two observations that help us achieve the best of both worlds: 1) query-based methods demonstrate superiority over dense proposal-based methods in open-world instance segmentation, and 2) learning localization cues is sufficient for open world instance segmentation. Based on these observations, we propose a simple query-based method named OpenInst for open world instance segmentation. OpenInst leverages advanced query-based methods like QueryInst and focuses on learning localization cues. Notably, OpenInst is an extremely simple and straightforward framework without any auxiliary modules or post-processing, yet achieves state-of-the-art results on multiple benchmarks. Specifically, in the COCO$\to$UVO scenario, OpenInst achieves a mask AR of 53.3, outperforming the previous best methods by 2.0 AR with a simpler structure. We hope that OpenInst can serve as a solid baselines for future research in this area.
abstract_zh: 开放世界实例分割最近因其在自动驾驶、机器人感知和遥感等许多现实应用中的重要性而受到广泛欢迎。然而，以前的方法要么产生了不令人满意的结果，要么依赖于复杂的系统和范式。我们想知道是否有一种简单的方法可以获得最先进的结果。幸运的是，我们发现了两个观察结果，可以帮助我们实现两全其美：1）基于查询的方法在开放世界实例分割中表现出优于基于密集提案的方法，2）学习本地化线索足以进行开放世界实例分割。基于这些观察，我们提出了一种名为 OpenInst 的简单的基于查询的方法，用于开放世界实例分割。 OpenInst 利用基于查询的高级方法（如 QueryInst），并专注于学习本地化线索。值得注意的是，OpenInst 是一个极其简单直接的框架，没有任何辅助模块或后处理，但在多个基准测试中取得了最先进的结果。具体来说，在 COCO$\to$UVO 场景中，OpenInst 实现了 53.3 的掩模 AR，以更简单的结构超越了之前最好的方法 2.0 AR。我们希望 OpenInst 能够成为该领域未来研究的坚实基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为OpenInst的简单查询-based方法，用于解决开放世界实例分割问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在开放世界实例分割任务中要么效果不佳，要么依赖复杂系统，因此作者希望探索一种更简单且高效的方法。
AI.method: 基于查询的实例分割方法（如QueryInst），专注于学习定位线索，无需辅助模块或后处理步骤。
AI.result: 在COCO→UVO场景下，OpenInst实现了53.3的mask AR，优于先前最佳方法2.0 AR。
AI.conclusion: OpenInst为开放世界实例分割提供了简单有效的基准框架，可为未来研究提供参考。

authors_text: Maxime Adjigble,Brahim Tamadazte,Cristiana de Farias,Rustam Stolkin,Naresh Marturi
title: 3D Spectral Domain Registration-Based Visual Servoing
title_zh: 基于 3D 谱域配准的视觉伺服
comment: Accepted to 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA'23)
comments: Accepted to 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA'23)
abstract: This paper presents a spectral domain registration-based visual servoing scheme that works on 3D point clouds. Specifically, we propose a 3D model/point cloud alignment method, which works by finding a global transformation between reference and target point clouds using spectral analysis. A 3D Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) in R3 is used for the translation estimation, and the real spherical harmonics in SO(3) are used for the rotations estimation. Such an approach allows us to derive a decoupled 6 degrees of freedom (DoF) controller, where we use gradient ascent optimisation to minimise translation and rotational costs. We then show how this methodology can be used to regulate a robot arm to perform a positioning task. In contrast to the existing state-of-the-art depth-based visual servoing methods that either require dense depth maps or dense point clouds, our method works well with partial point clouds and can effectively handle larger transformations between the reference and the target positions. Furthermore, the use of spectral data (instead of spatial data) for transformation estimation makes our method robust to sensor-induced noise and partial occlusions. We validate our approach by performing experiments using point clouds acquired by a robot-mounted depth camera. Obtained results demonstrate the effectiveness of our visual servoing approach.
summary: This paper presents a spectral domain registration-based visual servoing scheme that works on 3D point clouds. Specifically, we propose a 3D model/point cloud alignment method, which works by finding a global transformation between reference and target point clouds using spectral analysis. A 3D Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) in R3 is used for the translation estimation, and the real spherical harmonics in SO(3) are used for the rotations estimation. Such an approach allows us to derive a decoupled 6 degrees of freedom (DoF) controller, where we use gradient ascent optimisation to minimise translation and rotational costs. We then show how this methodology can be used to regulate a robot arm to perform a positioning task. In contrast to the existing state-of-the-art depth-based visual servoing methods that either require dense depth maps or dense point clouds, our method works well with partial point clouds and can effectively handle larger transformations between the reference and the target positions. Furthermore, the use of spectral data (instead of spatial data) for transformation estimation makes our method robust to sensor-induced noise and partial occlusions. We validate our approach by performing experiments using point clouds acquired by a robot-mounted depth camera. Obtained results demonstrate the effectiveness of our visual servoing approach.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种适用于 3D 点云的基于谱域配准的视觉伺服方案。具体来说，我们提出了一种 3D 模型/点云对齐方法，该方法通过使用光谱分析找到参考点云和目标点云之间的全局变换来工作。 R3 中的 3D 快速傅里叶变换 (FFT) 用于平移估计，SO(3) 中的实球谐函数用于旋转估计。这种方法使我们能够导出解耦的 6 自由度 (DoF) 控制器，其中我们使用梯度上升优化来最小化平移和旋转成本。然后，我们展示如何使用这种方法来调节机器人手臂以执行定位任务。与现有最先进的基于深度的视觉伺服方法（需要密集的深度图或密集的点云）相比，我们的方法可以很好地处理部分点云，并且可以有效地处理参考位置和目标位置之间的较大变换。此外，使用光谱数据（而不是空间数据）进行变换估计使我们的方法对传感器引起的噪声和部分遮挡具有鲁棒性。我们通过使用机器人安装的深度相机获取的点云进行实验来验证我们的方法。获得的结果证明了我们的视觉伺服方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于谱域注册的3D点云视觉伺服方法，通过谱分析实现参考点云与目标点云的全局变换对齐，并应用于机器人定位任务。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度图的视觉伺服方法依赖密集点云或深度图，难以处理部分遮挡和大范围变换。本文旨在提出一种鲁棒性强、适用于稀疏点云的视觉伺服方案。
AI.method: 利用3D FFT估计平移量，结合SO(3)球谐函数估计旋转量，构建解耦的6自由度控制器，通过梯度上升法优化平移和旋转代价函数，实现机器人定位控制。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在部分点云和大范围变换场景下表现优异，对传感器噪声和遮挡具有鲁棒性，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过谱域分析实现高效点云对齐，解决了传统方法对密集数据的依赖，为复杂环境下的视觉伺服提供了新思路。

Furthermore, the use of spectral data (instead of spatial data) for transformation estimation makes our method robust to sensor-induced noise and partial occlusions. We validate our approach by performing experiments using point clouds acquired by a robot-mounted depth camera. Obtained results demonstrate the effectiveness of our visual servoing approach. 本文提出了一种适用于 3D 点云的基于谱域配准的视觉伺服方案。具体来说，我们提出了一种 3D 模型/点云对齐方法，该方法通过使用光谱分析找到参考点云和目标点云之间的全局变换来工作。 R3 中的 3D 快速傅里叶变换 (FFT) 用于平移估计，SO(3) 中的实球谐函数用于旋转估计。这种方法使我们能够导出解耦的 6 自由度 (DoF) 控制器，其中我们使用梯度上升优化来最小化平移和旋转成本。然后，我们展示如何使用这种方法来调节机器人手臂以执行定位任务。与现有最先进的基于深度的视觉伺服方法（需要密集的深度图或密集的点云）相比，我们的方法可以很好地处理部分点云，并且可以有效地处理参考位置和目标位置之间的较大变换。此外，使用光谱数据（而不是空间数据）进行变换估计使我们的方法对传感器引起的噪声和部分遮挡具有鲁棒性。我们通过使用机器人安装的深度相机获取的点云进行实验来验证我们的方法。获得的结果证明了我们的视觉伺服方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种基于谱域注册的3D点云视觉伺服方法，通过谱分析实现参考点云与目标点云的全局变换对齐，并应用于机器人定位任务。 Maxime Adjigble,Brahim Tamadazte,Cristiana de Farias,Rustam Stolkin,Naresh Marturi cs.RO

authors_text: Aakash Singh,Vivek Kumar Singh
title: Exploring Deep Learning Methods for Classification of SAR Images: Towards NextGen Convolutions via Transformers
title_zh: 探索 SAR 图像分类的深度学习方法：通过 Transformers 迈向下一代卷积
comment: 6 pages, 9 figures
comments: 6 pages, 9 figures
abstract: Images generated by high-resolution SAR have vast areas of application as they can work better in adverse light and weather conditions. One such area of application is in the military systems. This study is an attempt to explore the suitability of current state-of-the-art models introduced in the domain of computer vision for SAR target classification (MSTAR). Since the application of any solution produced for military systems would be strategic and real-time, accuracy is often not the only criterion to measure its performance. Other important parameters like prediction time and input resiliency are equally important. The paper deals with these issues in the context of SAR images. Experimental results show that deep learning models can be suitably applied in the domain of SAR image classification with the desired performance levels.
summary: Images generated by high-resolution SAR have vast areas of application as they can work better in adverse light and weather conditions. One such area of application is in the military systems. This study is an attempt to explore the suitability of current state-of-the-art models introduced in the domain of computer vision for SAR target classification (MSTAR). Since the application of any solution produced for military systems would be strategic and real-time, accuracy is often not the only criterion to measure its performance. Other important parameters like prediction time and input resiliency are equally important. The paper deals with these issues in the context of SAR images. Experimental results show that deep learning models can be suitably applied in the domain of SAR image classification with the desired performance levels.
abstract_zh: 高分辨率 SAR 生成的图像具有广泛的应用领域，因为它们可以在不利的光线和天气条件下更好地工作。这样的应用领域之一是军事系统。本研究试图探索计算机视觉领域当前最先进模型对 SAR 目标分类 (MSTAR) 的适用性。由于为军事系统生产的任何解决方案的应用都是战略性的和实时的，因此准确性通常不是衡量其性能的唯一标准。其他重要参数（例如预测时间和输入弹性）也同样重要。本文在 SAR 图像的背景下讨论了这些问题。实验结果表明，深度学习模型可以适用于SAR图像分类领域，并具有所需的性能水平。

AI.tldr: 本文探索了深度学习方法在合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像分类中的应用，重点研究了Transformer等新型卷积方法在军事目标分类（MSTAR）中的有效性。
AI.motivation: SAR图像在军事系统中具有重要应用价值，但现有模型需同时满足高准确率、实时预测速度和对输入噪声的鲁棒性要求，传统方法难以兼顾这些指标。
AI.method: 采用计算机视觉领域最新深度学习模型（包括Transformer架构），通过实验对比分析不同模型在SAR图像分类任务中的性能表现，重点评估准确率、预测时间及输入弹性等指标。
AI.result: 实验表明深度学习模型能够达到SAR图像分类所需的性能水平，在准确率、处理速度和抗干扰能力方面均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法特别是Transformer架构为SAR图像分类提供了有效解决方案，未来可进一步优化模型效率以满足军事应用的实时性需求。

authors_text: Kilian Zepf,Eike Petersen,Jes Frellsen,Aasa Feragen
title: That Label's Got Style: Handling Label Style Bias for Uncertain Image Segmentation
title_zh: 该标签有风格：处理不确定图像分割的标签风格偏差
abstract: Segmentation uncertainty models predict a distribution over plausible segmentations for a given input, which they learn from the annotator variation in the training set. However, in practice these annotations can differ systematically in the way they are generated, for example through the use of different labeling tools. This results in datasets that contain both data variability and differing label styles. In this paper, we demonstrate that applying state-of-the-art segmentation uncertainty models on such datasets can lead to model bias caused by the different label styles. We present an updated modelling objective conditioning on labeling style for aleatoric uncertainty estimation, and modify two state-of-the-art-architectures for segmentation uncertainty accordingly. We show with extensive experiments that this method reduces label style bias, while improving segmentation performance, increasing the applicability of segmentation uncertainty models in the wild. We curate two datasets, with annotations in different label styles, which we will make publicly available along with our code upon publication.
summary: Segmentation uncertainty models predict a distribution over plausible segmentations for a given input, which they learn from the annotator variation in the training set. However, in practice these annotations can differ systematically in the way they are generated, for example through the use of different labeling tools. This results in datasets that contain both data variability and differing label styles. In this paper, we demonstrate that applying state-of-the-art segmentation uncertainty models on such datasets can lead to model bias caused by the different label styles. We present an updated modelling objective conditioning on labeling style for aleatoric uncertainty estimation, and modify two state-of-the-art-architectures for segmentation uncertainty accordingly. We show with extensive experiments that this method reduces label style bias, while improving segmentation performance, increasing the applicability of segmentation uncertainty models in the wild. We curate two datasets, with annotations in different label styles, which we will make publicly available along with our code upon publication.
abstract_zh: 分割不确定性模型预测给定输入的合理分割的分布，它们从训练集中的注释器变化中学习。然而，在实践中，这些注释的生成方式可能会系统地有所不同，例如通过使用不同的标记工具。这导致数据集包含数据可变性和不同的标签样式。在本文中，我们证明在此类数据集上应用最先进的分割不确定性模型可能会导致由不同标签样式引起的模型偏差。我们针对任意不确定性估计的标签风格提出了更新的建模客观条件，并相应地修改了两种最先进的分割不确定性架构。我们通过大量实验表明，该方法减少了标签样式偏差，同时提高了分割性能，增加了分割不确定性模型在野外的适用性。我们策划了两个数据集，带有不同标签样式的注释，我们将在发布时与我们的代码一起公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何处理图像分割中因标签风格差异导致的模型偏差问题，提出新的建模方法以提升分割不确定性模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有分割不确定性模型在面对不同标注工具生成的系统性差异标签时，会产生模型偏差，影响实际应用效果。
AI.method: 提出基于标签风格的条件化建模目标，用于估计aleatoric不确定性，并改进两种主流分割不确定性模型架构。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法有效降低标签风格偏差，提升分割性能，同时发布两个包含不同标注风格的公开数据集。
AI.conclusion: 通过考虑标签风格差异，可显著提升分割不确定性模型的鲁棒性与实用性，公开数据集为后续研究提供支持。

authors_text: Zhuoran Zheng,Xiuyi Jia
title: 4K-HAZE: A Dehazing Benchmark with 4K Resolution Hazy and Haze-Free Images
title_zh: 4K-HAZE：4K 分辨率有雾和无雾图像的去雾基准
abstract: Currently, mobile and IoT devices are in dire need of a series of methods to enhance 4K images with limited resource expenditure. The absence of large-scale 4K benchmark datasets hampers progress in this area, especially for dehazing. The challenges in building ultra-high-definition (UHD) dehazing datasets are the absence of estimation methods for UHD depth maps, high-quality 4K depth estimation datasets, and migration strategies for UHD haze images from synthetic to real domains. To address these problems, we develop a novel synthetic method to simulate 4K hazy images (including nighttime and daytime scenes) from clear images, which first estimates the scene depth, simulates the light rays and object reflectance, then migrates the synthetic images to real domains by using a GAN, and finally yields the hazy effects on 4K resolution images. We wrap these synthesized images into a benchmark called the 4K-HAZE dataset. Specifically, we design the CS-Mixer (an MLP-based model that integrates \textbf{C}hannel domain and \textbf{S}patial domain) to estimate the depth map of 4K clear images, the GU-Net to migrate a 4K synthetic image to the real hazy domain. The most appealing aspect of our approach (depth estimation and domain migration) is the capability to run a 4K image on a single GPU with 24G RAM in real-time (33fps). Additionally, this work presents an objective assessment of several state-of-the-art single-image dehazing methods that are evaluated using the 4K-HAZE dataset. At the end of the paper, we discuss the limitations of the 4K-HAZE dataset and its social implications.
summary: Currently, mobile and IoT devices are in dire need of a series of methods to enhance 4K images with limited resource expenditure. We wrap these synthesized images into a benchmark called the 4K-HAZE dataset. Specifically, we design the CS-Mixer (an MLP-based model that integrates \textbf{C}hannel domain and \textbf{S}patial domain) to estimate the depth map of 4K clear images, the GU-Net to migrate a 4K synthetic image to the real hazy domain. The most appealing aspect of our approach (depth estimation and domain migration) is the capability to run a 4K image on a single GPU with 24G RAM in real-time (33fps). Additionally, this work presents an objective assessment of several state-of-the-art single-image dehazing methods that are evaluated using the 4K-HAZE dataset. At the end of the paper, we discuss the limitations of the 4K-HAZE dataset and its social implications.
abstract_zh: 目前，移动和物联网设备迫切需要一系列方法来在有限的资源支出下增强 4K 图像。缺乏大规模 4K 基准数据集阻碍了该领域的进展，尤其是去雾方面。构建超高清 (UHD) 去雾数据集的挑战是缺乏 UHD 深度图的估计方法、高质量 4K 深度估计数据集以及 UHD 雾霾图像从合成域到真实域的迁移策略。为了解决这些问题，我们开发了一种新颖的合成方法，从清晰图像中模拟 4K 模糊图像（包括夜间和白天场景），该方法首先估计场景深度，模拟光线和物体反射率，然后使用 GAN 将合成图像迁移到真实域，最后在 4K 分辨率图像上产生模糊效果。我们将这些合成图像包装到称为 4K-HAZE 数据集的基准中。具体来说，我们设计了 CS-Mixer（一种基于 MLP 的模型，集成了 \textbf{C}hannel 域和 \textbf{S}patial 域）来估计 4K 清晰图像的深度图，GU-Net 将 4K 合成图像迁移到真实的模糊域。我们的方法（深度估计和域迁移）最吸引人的方面是能够在具有 24G RAM 的单个 GPU 上实时运行 4K 图像 (33fps)。此外，这项工作还对使用 4K-HAZE 数据集进行评估的几种最先进的单图像去雾方法进行了客观评估。在本文的最后，我们讨论了 4K-HAZE 数据集的局限性及其社会影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为4K-HAZE的4K分辨率去雾基准数据集，解决超高清图像去雾领域缺乏大规模数据集的问题。
AI.motivation: 移动设备和物联网设备需要高效处理4K图像的去雾方法，但现有研究缺乏高质量的4K分辨率基准数据集，且难以在有限资源下实现实时处理。
AI.method: 通过合成方法生成4K雾天图像：首先使用CS-Mixer模型估计场景深度，再利用GU-Net网络将合成图像迁移至真实域，最终生成包含昼夜场景的4K雾天图像并构建基准数据集。
AI.result: 开发了支持单GPU实时处理（33fps）的4K去雾数据集，评估了多种先进单图像去雾算法的性能，并讨论了数据集的局限性与社会影响。
AI.conclusion: 4K-HAZE数据集为4K分辨率去雾研究提供了重要基准，其提出的深度估计与领域迁移方法可有效支持资源受限设备的实时图像增强需求。

search_text: 4K-HAZE: A Dehazing Benchmark with 4K Resolution Hazy and Haze-Free Images 4K-HAZE：4K 分辨率有雾和无雾图像的去雾基准 Currently, mobile and IoT devices are in dire need of a series of methods to enhance 4K images with limited resource expenditure. The absence of large-scale 4K benchmark datasets hampers progress in this area, especially for dehazing. The challenges in building ultra-high-definition (UHD) dehazing datasets are the absence of estimation methods for UHD depth maps, high-quality 4K depth estimation datasets, and migration strategies for UHD haze images from synthetic to real domains. To address these problems, we develop a novel synthetic method to simulate 4K hazy images (including nighttime and daytime scenes) from clear images, which first estimates the scene depth, simulates the light rays and object reflectance, then migrates the synthetic images to real domains by using a GAN, and finally yields the hazy effects on 4K resolution images. We wrap these synthesized images into a benchmark called the 4K-HAZE dataset. Specifically, we design the CS-Mixer (an MLP-based model that integrates \textbf{C}hannel domain and \textbf{S}patial domain) to estimate the depth map of 4K clear images, the GU-Net to migrate a 4K synthetic image to the real hazy domain. The most appealing aspect of our approach (depth estimation and domain migration) is the capability to run a 4K image on a single GPU with 24G RAM in real-time (33fps). Additionally, this work presents an objective assessment of several state-of-the-art single-image dehazing methods that are evaluated using the 4K-HAZE dataset. At the end of the paper, we discuss the limitations of the 4K-HAZE dataset and its social implications. 目前，移动和物联网设备迫切需要一系列方法来在有限的资源支出下增强 4K 图像。缺乏大规模 4K 基准数据集阻碍了该领域的进展，尤其是去雾方面。构建超高清 (UHD) 去雾数据集的挑战是缺乏 UHD 深度图的估计方法、高质量 4K 深度估计数据集以及 UHD 雾霾图像从合成域到真实域的迁移策略。为了解决这些问题，我们开发了一种新颖的合成方法，从清晰图像中模拟 4K 模糊图像（包括夜间和白天场景），该方法首先估计场景深度，模拟光线和物体反射率，然后使用 GAN 将合成图像迁移到真实域，最后在 4K 分辨率图像上产生模糊效果。我们将这些合成图像包装到称为 4K-HAZE 数据集的基准中。具体来说，我们设计了 CS-Mixer（一种基于 MLP 的模型，集成了 \textbf{C}hannel 域和 \textbf{S}patial 域）来估计 4K 清晰图像的深度图，GU-Net 将 4K 合成图像迁移到真实的模糊域。我们的方法（深度估计和域迁移）最吸引人的方面是能够在具有 24G RAM 的单个 GPU 上实时运行 4K 图像 (33fps)。此外，这项工作还对使用 4K-HAZE 数据集进行评估的几种最先进的单图像去雾方法进行了客观评估。在本文的最后，我们讨论了 4K-HAZE 数据集的局限性及其社会影响。 本文提出一个名为4K-HAZE的4K分辨率去雾基准数据集，解决超高清图像去雾领域缺乏大规模数据集的问题。 Zhuoran Zheng,Xiuyi Jia cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Auke Elfrink,Iacopo Vagliano,Ameen Abu-Hanna,Iacer Calixto
title: Soft-prompt tuning to predict lung cancer using primary care free-text Dutch medical notes
title_zh: 使用初级保健自由文本荷兰医学笔记进行软提示调整以预测肺癌
comment: A short version of this paper has been published at the 21st International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Medicine (AIME 2023)
comments: A short version of this paper has been published at the 21st International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Medicine (AIME 2023)
abstract: We investigate different natural language processing (NLP) approaches based on contextualised word representations for the problem of early prediction of lung cancer using free-text patient medical notes of Dutch primary care physicians. Because lung cancer has a low prevalence in primary care, we also address the problem of classification under highly imbalanced classes. Specifically, we use large Transformer-based pretrained language models (PLMs) and investigate: 1) how \textit{soft prompt-tuning} -- an NLP technique used to adapt PLMs using small amounts of training data -- compares to standard model fine-tuning; 2) whether simpler static word embedding models (WEMs) can be more robust compared to PLMs in highly imbalanced settings; and 3) how models fare when trained on notes from a small number of patients. We find that 1) soft-prompt tuning is an efficient alternative to standard model fine-tuning; 2) PLMs show better discrimination but worse calibration compared to simpler static word embedding models as the classification problem becomes more imbalanced; and 3) results when training models on small number of patients are mixed and show no clear differences between PLMs and WEMs. All our code is available open source in \url{https://bitbucket.org/aumc-kik/prompt_tuning_cancer_prediction/}.
summary: We investigate different natural language processing (NLP) approaches based on contextualised word representations for the problem of early prediction of lung cancer using free-text patient medical notes of Dutch primary care physicians. Because lung cancer has a low prevalence in primary care, we also address the problem of classification under highly imbalanced classes. Specifically, we use large Transformer-based pretrained language models (PLMs) and investigate: 1) how \textit{soft prompt-tuning} -- an NLP technique used to adapt PLMs using small amounts of training data -- compares to standard model fine-tuning; 2) whether simpler static word embedding models (WEMs) can be more robust compared to PLMs in highly imbalanced settings; and 3) how models fare when trained on notes from a small number of patients. We find that 1) soft-prompt tuning is an efficient alternative to standard model fine-tuning; 2) PLMs show better discrimination but worse calibration compared to simpler static word embedding models as the classification problem becomes more imbalanced; and 3) results when training models on small number of patients are mixed and show no clear differences between PLMs and WEMs. All our code is available open source in \url{https://bitbucket.org/aumc-kik/prompt_tuning_cancer_prediction/}.
abstract_zh: 我们使用荷兰初级保健医生的自由文本患者医疗记录，研究了基于上下文单词表示的不同自然语言处理（NLP）方法，以解决肺癌早期预测的问题。由于肺癌在初级保健中的患病率较低，因此我们还解决了高度不平衡类别下的分类问题。具体来说，我们使用基于 Transformer 的大型预训练语言模型 (PLM) 并研究：1) \textit{softprompt-tuning}（一种用于使用少量训练数据调整 PLM 的 NLP 技术）与标准模型微调相比如何； 2）在高度不平衡的环境中，与 PLM 相比，更简单的静态词嵌入模型 (WEM) 是否更稳健； 3）模型在根据少数患者的笔记进行训练时表现如何。我们发现 1）软提示调整是标准模型微调的有效替代方案； 2）随着分类问题变得更加不平衡，与更简单的静态词嵌入模型相比，PLM 显示出更好的辨别力，但校准能力更差； 3) 对少量患者进行混合训练模型时的结果，并且 PLM 和 WEM 之间没有明显差异。我们所有的代码都可以在 \url{https://bitbucket.org/aumc-kik/prompt_tuning_cancer_prediction/} 中开源。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用软提示调优技术结合荷兰初级护理自由文本医疗记录预测肺癌的方法，对比不同自然语言处理模型在不平衡数据下的表现。
AI.motivation: 肺癌在初级护理中患病率低导致类别不平衡，传统模型在此类问题上表现不佳，需探索更高效的模型调优方法及适用模型类型。
AI.method: 采用基于Transformer的预训练语言模型（PLMs）和静态词嵌入模型（WEMs），对比软提示调优与标准微调效果，并分析小样本训练下的模型表现。
AI.result: 软提示调优效率优于标准微调；PLMs在不平衡数据中区分能力更强但校准性较差，WEMs更稳健；小样本训练下PLMs与WEMs表现无显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 软提示调优是有效替代方案，模型选择需权衡数据平衡性与样本量，PLMs适合高区分需求场景，WEMs适合高不平衡数据环境。

search_text: Soft-prompt tuning to predict lung cancer using primary care free-text Dutch medical notes 使用初级保健自由文本荷兰医学笔记进行软提示调整以预测肺癌 We investigate different natural language processing (NLP) approaches based on contextualised word representations for the problem of early prediction of lung cancer using free-text patient medical notes of Dutch primary care physicians. authors_text: Olusanmi Hundogan,Xixi Lu,Yupei Du,Hajo A. Reijers
title: CREATED: Generating Viable Counterfactual Sequences for Predictive Process Analytics
title_zh: 创建：为预测过程分析生成可行的反事实序列
abstract: Predictive process analytics focuses on predicting future states, such as the outcome of running process instances. These techniques often use machine learning models or deep learning models (such as LSTM) to make such predictions. However, these deep models are complex and difficult for users to understand. Counterfactuals answer ``what-if'' questions, which are used to understand the reasoning behind the predictions. For example, what if instead of emailing customers, customers are being called? Would this alternative lead to a different outcome? Current methods to generate counterfactual sequences either do not take the process behavior into account, leading to generating invalid or infeasible counterfactual process instances, or heavily rely on domain knowledge. In this work, we propose a general framework that uses evolutionary methods to generate counterfactual sequences. Our framework does not require domain knowledge. Instead, we propose to train a Markov model to compute the feasibility of generated counterfactual sequences and adapt three other measures (delta in outcome prediction, similarity, and sparsity) to ensure their overall viability. The evaluation shows that we generate viable counterfactual sequences, outperform baseline methods in viability, and yield similar results when compared to the state-of-the-art method that requires domain knowledge.
summary: Predictive process analytics focuses on predicting future states, such as the outcome of running process instances. These techniques often use machine learning models or deep learning models (such as LSTM) to make such predictions. However, these deep models are complex and difficult for users to understand. Counterfactuals answer ``what-if'' questions, which are used to understand the reasoning behind the predictions. For example, what if instead of emailing customers, customers are being called? Would this alternative lead to a different outcome? Current methods to generate counterfactual sequences either do not take the process behavior into account, leading to generating invalid or infeasible counterfactual process instances, or heavily rely on domain knowledge. In this work, we propose a general framework that uses evolutionary methods to generate counterfactual sequences. Our framework does not require domain knowledge. Instead, we propose to train a Markov model to compute the feasibility of generated counterfactual sequences and adapt three other measures (delta in outcome prediction, similarity, and sparsity) to ensure their overall viability. The evaluation shows that we generate viable counterfactual sequences, outperform baseline methods in viability, and yield similar results when compared to the state-of-the-art method that requires domain knowledge.
abstract_zh: 预测流程分析侧重于预测未来状态，例如运行流程实例的结果。这些技术通常使用机器学习模型或深度学习模型（例如 LSTM）来进行此类预测。然而，这些深层模型非常复杂，用户难以理解。反事实回答“假设”问题，用于理解预测背后的推理。例如，如果不是给客户发电子邮件，而是给客户打电话怎么办？这种选择会导致不同的结果吗？ Current methods to generate counterfactual sequences either do not take the process behavior into account, leading to generating invalid or infeasible counterfactual process instances, or heavily rely on domain knowledge.在这项工作中，我们提出了一个使用进化方法来生成反事实序列的通用框架。我们的框架不需要领域知识。 Instead, we propose to train a Markov model to compute the feasibility of generated counterfactual sequences and adapt three other measures (delta in outcome prediction, similarity, and sparsity) to ensure their overall viability. The evaluation shows that we generate viable counterfactual sequences, outperform baseline methods in viability, and yield similar results when compared to the state-of-the-art method that requires domain knowledge.

search_text: CREATED: Generating Viable Counterfactual Sequences for Predictive Process Analytics 创建：为预测过程分析生成可行的反事实序列 Predictive process analytics focuses on predicting future states, such as the outcome of running process instances. These techniques often use machine learning models or deep learning models (such as LSTM) to make such predictions. However, these deep models are complex and difficult for users to understand. Counterfactuals answer ``what-if'' questions, which are used to understand the reasoning behind the predictions. For example, what if instead of emailing customers, customers are being called? Would this alternative lead to a different outcome? Current methods to generate counterfactual sequences either do not take the process behavior into account, leading to generating invalid or infeasible counterfactual process instances, or heavily rely on domain knowledge. In this work, we propose a general framework that uses evolutionary methods to generate counterfactual sequences. Our framework does not require domain knowledge. Instead, we propose to train a Markov model to compute the feasibility of generated counterfactual sequences and adapt three other measures (delta in outcome prediction, similarity, and sparsity) to ensure their overall viability. The evaluation shows that we generate viable counterfactual sequences, outperform baseline methods in viability, and yield similar results when compared to the state-of-the-art method that requires domain knowledge. 预测流程分析侧重于预测未来状态，例如运行流程实例的结果。这些技术通常使用机器学习模型或深度学习模型（例如 LSTM）来进行此类预测。然而，这些深层模型非常复杂，用户难以理解。反事实回答“假设”问题，用于理解预测背后的推理。例如，如果不是给客户发电子邮件，而是给客户打电话怎么办？这种选择会导致不同的结果吗？ Current methods to generate counterfactual sequences either do not take the process behavior into account, leading to generating invalid or infeasible counterfactual process instances, or heavily rely on domain knowledge.在这项工作中，我们提出了一个使用进化方法来生成反事实序列的通用框架。我们的框架不需要领域知识。 Instead, we propose to train a Markov model to compute the feasibility of generated counterfactual sequences and adapt three other measures (delta in outcome prediction, similarity, and sparsity) to ensure their overall viability. The evaluation shows that we generate viable counterfactual sequences, outperform baseline methods in viability, and yield similar results when compared to the state-of-the-art method that requires domain knowledge. 本文提出一种无需领域知识的框架，通过进化方法生成可行的反事实序列，用于预测性过程分析。 Olusanmi Hundogan,Xixi Lu,Yupei Du,Hajo A. authors_text: Zukai Li,Wei Tian,Jingjin Wu
title: Modeling and Joint Optimization of Security, Latency, and Computational Cost in Blockchain-based Healthcare Systems
title_zh: 基于区块链的医疗系统中安全性、延迟和计算成本的建模和联合优化
abstract: In the era of the Internet of Things (IoT), blockchain is a promising technology for improving the efficiency of healthcare systems, as it enables secure storage, management, and sharing of real-time health data collected by the IoT devices. As the implementations of blockchain-based healthcare systems usually involve multiple conflicting metrics, it is essential to balance them according to the requirements of specific scenarios. In this paper, we formulate a joint optimization model with three metrics, namely latency, security, and computational cost, that are particularly important for IoT-enabled healthcare. However, it is computationally intractable to identify the exact optimal solution of this problem for practical sized systems. Thus, we propose an algorithm called the Adaptive Discrete Particle Swarm Algorithm (ADPSA) to obtain near-optimal solutions in a low-complexity manner. With its roots in the classical Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) algorithm, our proposed ADPSA can effectively manage the numerous binary and integer variables in the formulation. We demonstrate by extensive numerical experiments that the ADPSA consistently outperforms existing benchmark approaches, including the original PSO, exhaustive search and Simulated Annealing, in a wide range of scenarios.
summary: In the era of the Internet of Things (IoT), blockchain is a promising technology for improving the efficiency of healthcare systems, as it enables secure storage, management, and sharing of real-time health data collected by the IoT devices. As the implementations of blockchain-based healthcare systems usually involve multiple conflicting metrics, it is essential to balance them according to the requirements of specific scenarios. In this paper, we formulate a joint optimization model with three metrics, namely latency, security, and computational cost, that are particularly important for IoT-enabled healthcare. However, it is computationally intractable to identify the exact optimal solution of this problem for practical sized systems. Thus, we propose an algorithm called the Adaptive Discrete Particle Swarm Algorithm (ADPSA) to obtain near-optimal solutions in a low-complexity manner. With its roots in the classical Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) algorithm, our proposed ADPSA can effectively manage the numerous binary and integer variables in the formulation. We demonstrate by extensive numerical experiments that the ADPSA consistently outperforms existing benchmark approaches, including the original PSO, exhaustive search and Simulated Annealing, in a wide range of scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在物联网（IoT）时代，区块链是提高医疗保健系统效率的一项有前途的技术，因为它可以安全存储、管理和共享物联网设备收集的实时健康数据。由于基于区块链的医疗保健系统的实施通常涉及多个相互冲突的指标，因此有必要根据具体场景的要求来平衡它们。在本文中，我们制定了一个联合优化模型，其中包含三个指标，即延迟、安全性和计算成本，这对于支持物联网的医疗保健尤为重要。然而，对于实际规模的系统来说，确定该问题的精确最优解在计算上是困难的。因此，我们提出了一种称为自适应离散粒子群算法（ADPSA）的算法，以低复杂度的方式获得接近最优的解决方案。我们提出的 ADPSA 植根于经典的粒子群优化 (PSO) 算法，可以有效地管理公式中的大量二进制和整数变量。我们通过大量的数值实验证明，ADPSA 在各种场景中始终优于现有的基准方法，包括原始 PSO、穷举搜索和模拟退火。

AI.tldr: 本文针对区块链医疗系统中的安全、延迟和计算成本进行联合优化建模，并提出一种低复杂度算法以解决实际系统中的优化问题。
AI.motivation: 区块链技术虽能提升医疗系统效率，但其在物联网医疗场景中需平衡安全、延迟和计算成本等矛盾指标，现有方法难以高效求解。
AI.method: 提出自适应离散粒子群算法（ADPSA），基于经典PSO算法改进，通过处理二进制和整数变量实现低复杂度近优解求解。
AI.result: 实验表明ADPSA在多种场景下优于原始PSO、穷举搜索和模拟退火等基准方法，能有效平衡三类关键指标。
AI.conclusion: ADPSA为区块链医疗系统的多目标联合优化提供了可行方案，兼顾计算效率与优化效果，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Jia-Wei Guo,Hung-Chyun Chou,Sen-Hua Zhu,Chang-Zheng Zhang,Ming Ouyang,Ning Ding
title: Sparse Depth-Guided Attention for Accurate Depth Completion: A Stereo-Assisted Monitored Distillation Approach
title_zh: 稀疏深度引导注意力以实现准确的深度完成：立体辅助监控蒸馏方法
comment: 7 pages, 8 figures, references added
comments: 7 pages, 8 figures, references added
abstract: This paper proposes a novel method for depth completion, which leverages multi-view improved monitored distillation to generate more precise depth maps. Our approach builds upon the state-of-the-art ensemble distillation method, in which we introduce a stereo-based model as a teacher model to improve the accuracy of the student model for depth completion. By minimizing the reconstruction error of a target image during ensemble distillation, we can avoid learning inherent error modes of completion-based teachers. We introduce an Attention-based Sparse-to-Dense (AS2D) module at the front layer of the student model to enhance its ability to extract global features from sparse depth. To provide self-supervised information, we also employ multi-view depth consistency and multi-scale minimum reprojection. These techniques utilize existing structural constraints to yield supervised signals for student model training, without requiring costly ground truth depth information. Our extensive experimental evaluation demonstrates that our proposed method significantly improves the accuracy of the baseline monitored distillation method.
summary: This paper proposes a novel method for depth completion, which leverages multi-view improved monitored distillation to generate more precise depth maps. Our approach builds upon the state-of-the-art ensemble distillation method, in which we introduce a stereo-based model as a teacher model to improve the accuracy of the student model for depth completion. By minimizing the reconstruction error of a target image during ensemble distillation, we can avoid learning inherent error modes of completion-based teachers. We introduce an Attention-based Sparse-to-Dense (AS2D) module at the front layer of the student model to enhance its ability to extract global features from sparse depth. To provide self-supervised information, we also employ multi-view depth consistency and multi-scale minimum reprojection. These techniques utilize existing structural constraints to yield supervised signals for student model training, without requiring costly ground truth depth information. Our extensive experimental evaluation demonstrates that our proposed method significantly improves the accuracy of the baseline monitored distillation method.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的深度完成方法，该方法利用多视图改进的监控蒸馏来生成更精确的深度图。我们的方法建立在最先进的集成蒸馏方法的基础上，其中我们引入基于立体的模型作为教师模型，以提高学生模型深度完成的准确性。通过在集成蒸馏过程中最小化目标图像的重建误差，我们可以避免学习基于完成的教师的固有错误模式。我们在学生模型的前层引入了基于注意力的稀疏到密集（AS2D）模块，以增强其从稀疏深度提取全局特征的能力。为了提供自我监督信息，我们还采用多视图深度一致性和多尺度最小重投影。这些技术利用现有的结构约束来生成用于学生模型训练的监督信号，而不需要昂贵的地面真实深度信息。我们广泛的实验评估表明，我们提出的方法显着提高了基线监测蒸馏方法的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于立体视觉的监控蒸馏方法，通过引入稀疏深度引导的注意力机制提升深度补全的精度。
AI.motivation: 现有深度补全方法依赖昂贵的真实深度数据，且易受教师模型固有误差影响，需探索更高效、自监督的训练框架。
AI.method: 采用立体模型作为教师模型，结合多视角深度一致性与多尺度重投影生成自监督信号；在学生模型前端引入注意力驱动的稀疏到密集（AS2D）模块以增强全局特征提取能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个基准数据集上显著优于基线监控蒸馏方法，深度补全精度大幅提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过立体辅助监控蒸馏与稀疏深度注意力机制，可在无需真实深度标签的情况下实现更精确的深度补全。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过立体辅助监控蒸馏与稀疏深度注意力机制，可在无需真实深度标签的情况下实现更精确的深度补全。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于立体视觉的监控蒸馏方法，通过引入稀疏深度引导的注意力机制提升深度补全的精度。
motivation: 现有深度补全方法依赖昂贵的真实深度数据，且易受教师模型固有误差影响，需探索更高效、自监督的训练框架。
method: 采用立体模型作为教师模型，结合多视角深度一致性与多尺度重投影生成自监督信号；在学生模型前端引入注意力驱动的稀疏到密集（AS2D）模块以增强全局特征提取能力。
result: 实验表明，该方法在多个基准数据集上显著优于基线监控蒸馏方法，深度补全精度大幅提升。
conclusion: 通过立体辅助监控蒸馏与稀疏深度注意力机制，可在无需真实深度标签的情况下实现更精确的深度补全。
search_text: Sparse Depth-Guided Attention for Accurate Depth Completion: A Stereo-Assisted Monitored Distillation Approach 稀疏深度引导注意力以实现准确的深度完成：立体辅助监控蒸馏方法 This paper proposes a novel method for depth completion, which leverages multi-view improved monitored distillation to generate more precise depth maps. Our approach builds upon the state-of-the-art ensemble distillation method, in which we introduce a stereo-based model as a teacher model to improve the accuracy of the student model for depth completion. By minimizing the reconstruction error of a target image during ensemble distillation, we can avoid learning inherent error modes of completion-based teachers. We introduce an Attention-based Sparse-to-Dense (AS2D) module at the front layer of the student model to enhance its ability to extract global features from sparse depth. To provide self-supervised information, we also employ multi-view depth consistency and multi-scale minimum reprojection. These techniques utilize existing structural constraints to yield supervised signals for student model training, without requiring costly ground truth depth information. Our extensive experimental evaluation demonstrates that our proposed method significantly improves the accuracy of the baseline monitored distillation method. 本文提出了一种新的深度完成方法，该方法利用多视图改进的监控蒸馏来生成更精确的深度图。我们的方法建立在最先进的集成蒸馏方法的基础上，其中我们引入基于立体的模型作为教师模型，以提高学生模型深度完成的准确性。通过在集成蒸馏过程中最小化目标图像的重建误差，我们可以避免学习基于完成的教师的固有错误模式。我们在学生模型的前层引入了基于注意力的稀疏到密集（AS2D）模块，以增强其从稀疏深度提取全局特征的能力。为了提供自我监督信息，我们还采用多视图深度一致性和多尺度最小重投影。这些技术利用现有的结构约束来生成用于学生模型训练的监督信号，而不需要昂贵的地面真实深度信息。我们广泛的实验评估表明，我们提出的方法显着提高了基线监测蒸馏方法的准确性。 本文提出一种基于立体视觉的监控蒸馏方法，通过引入稀疏深度引导的注意力机制提升深度补全的精度。 Jia-Wei Guo,Hung-Chyun Chou,Sen-Hua Zhu,Chang-Zheng Zhang,Ming Ouyang,Ning Ding cs.CV

authors_text: Dan You,Pengcheng Xia,Qiuzhu Chen,Minghui Wu,Suncheng Xiang,Jun Wang
title: AutoKary2022: A Large-Scale Densely Annotated Dataset for Chromosome Instance Segmentation
title_zh: AutoKary2022：用于染色体实例分割的大规模密集注释数据集
comment: Accepted by ICME 2023
comments: Accepted by ICME 2023
abstract: Automated chromosome instance segmentation from metaphase cell microscopic images is critical for the diagnosis of chromosomal disorders (i.e., karyotype analysis). However, it is still a challenging task due to lacking of densely annotated datasets and the complicated morphologies of chromosomes, e.g., dense distribution, arbitrary orientations, and wide range of lengths. To facilitate the development of this area, we take a big step forward and manually construct a large-scale densely annotated dataset named AutoKary2022, which contains over 27,000 chromosome instances in 612 microscopic images from 50 patients. Specifically, each instance is annotated with a polygonal mask and a class label to assist in precise chromosome detection and segmentation. On top of it, we systematically investigate representative methods on this dataset and obtain a number of interesting findings, which helps us have a deeper understanding of the fundamental problems in chromosome instance segmentation. We hope this dataset could advance research towards medical understanding. The dataset can be available at: https://github.com/wangjuncongyu/chromosome-instance-segmentation-dataset.
summary: Automated chromosome instance segmentation from metaphase cell microscopic images is critical for the diagnosis of chromosomal disorders (i.e., karyotype analysis). However, it is still a challenging task due to lacking of densely annotated datasets and the complicated morphologies of chromosomes, e.g., dense distribution, arbitrary orientations, and wide range of lengths. To facilitate the development of this area, we take a big step forward and manually construct a large-scale densely annotated dataset named AutoKary2022, which contains over 27,000 chromosome instances in 612 microscopic images from 50 patients. Specifically, each instance is annotated with a polygonal mask and a class label to assist in precise chromosome detection and segmentation. On top of it, we systematically investigate representative methods on this dataset and obtain a number of interesting findings, which helps us have a deeper understanding of the fundamental problems in chromosome instance segmentation. We hope this dataset could advance research towards medical understanding. The dataset can be available at: https://github.com/wangjuncongyu/chromosome-instance-segmentation-dataset.
abstract_zh: 从中期细胞显微图像中自动进行染色体实例分割对于染色体疾病的诊断（即核型分析）至关重要。然而，由于缺乏密集注释的数据集和染色体的复杂形态，例如密集分布、任意方向和广泛的长度，这仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。为了促进这一领域的发展，我们向前迈出了一大步，手动构建了一个名为 AutoKary2022 的大规模密集注释数据集，其中包含来自 50 名患者的 612 张显微图像中的 27,000 多个染色体实例。具体来说，每个实例都用多边形掩模和类标签进行注释，以协助精确的染色体检测和分割。除此之外，我们系统地研究了该数据集上的代表性方法并获得了许多有趣的发现，这有助于我们更深入地了解染色体实例分割的基本问题。我们希望这个数据集能够推进医学理解的研究。该数据集可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/wangjuncongyu/chromosome-instance-segmentation-dataset。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为AutoKary2022的大规模密集标注数据集，用于解决染色体实例分割中的挑战性问题。
AI.motivation: 染色体实例分割对染色体疾病诊断至关重要，但现有数据集标注不足且染色体形态复杂，阻碍了算法发展。
AI.method: 手动构建包含50名患者612张显微图像的AutoKary2022数据集，每张图像含27,000+染色体实例，采用多边形掩码和类别标签进行密集标注，并系统评估主流分割方法。
AI.result: 数据集已公开，通过实验揭示了染色体分割中的关键问题，为后续研究提供基准和新思路。
AI.conclusion: AutoKary2022数据集将推动染色体分割领域的发展，促进医学影像分析的进步。

authors_text: Robin Hirt,Niklas Kühl,Dominik Martin,Gerhard Satzger
title: Enabling Inter-organizational Analytics in Business Networks Through Meta Machine Learning
title_zh: 通过元机器学习在业务网络中启用组织间分析
comment: Preprint, forthcoming at Information Technology and Management
comments: Preprint, forthcoming at Information Technology and Management
abstract: Successful analytics solutions that provide valuable insights often hinge on the connection of various data sources. While it is often feasible to generate larger data pools within organizations, the application of analytics within (inter-organizational) business networks is still severely constrained. As data is distributed across several legal units, potentially even across countries, the fear of disclosing sensitive information as well as the sheer volume of the data that would need to be exchanged are key inhibitors for the creation of effective system-wide solutions -- all while still reaching superior prediction performance. In this work, we propose a meta machine learning method that deals with these obstacles to enable comprehensive analyses within a business network. We follow a design science research approach and evaluate our method with respect to feasibility and performance in an industrial use case. First, we show that it is feasible to perform network-wide analyses that preserve data confidentiality as well as limit data transfer volume. Second, we demonstrate that our method outperforms a conventional isolated analysis and even gets close to a (hypothetical) scenario where all data could be shared within the network. Thus, we provide a fundamental contribution for making business networks more effective, as we remove a key obstacle to tap the huge potential of learning from data that is scattered throughout the network.
summary: Successful analytics solutions that provide valuable insights often hinge on the connection of various data sources. While it is often feasible to generate larger data pools within organizations, the application of analytics within (inter-organizational) business networks is still severely constrained. As data is distributed across several legal units, potentially even across countries, the fear of disclosing sensitive information as well as the sheer volume of the data that would need to be exchanged are key inhibitors for the creation of effective system-wide solutions -- all while still reaching superior prediction performance. In this work, we propose a meta machine learning method that deals with these obstacles to enable comprehensive analyses within a business network. We follow a design science research approach and evaluate our method with respect to feasibility and performance in an industrial use case. First, we show that it is feasible to perform network-wide analyses that preserve data confidentiality as well as limit data transfer volume. Second, we demonstrate that our method outperforms a conventional isolated analysis and even gets close to a (hypothetical) scenario where all data could be shared within the network. Thus, we provide a fundamental contribution for making business networks more effective, as we remove a key obstacle to tap the huge potential of learning from data that is scattered throughout the network.
abstract_zh: 提供有价值见解的成功分析解决方案通常取决于各种数据源的连接。虽然在组织内生成更大的数据池通常是可行的，但（组织间）业务网络中的分析应用仍然受到严重限制。由于数据分布在多个法律单位，甚至可能分布在各个国家，对敏感信息泄露的担忧以及需要交换的数据量巨大是创建有效的全系统解决方案的关键障碍，同时仍能达到卓越的预测性能。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种元机器学习方法，可以解决这些障碍，以便在业务网络内进行全面分析。我们遵循设计科学研究方法，并评估我们的方法在工业用例中的可行性和性能。首先，我们证明执行网络范围的分析以保护数据机密性并限制数据传输量是可行的。其次，我们证明我们的方法优于传统的孤立分析，甚至接近所有数据都可以在网络内共享的（假设）场景。因此，我们为提高业务网络的效率做出了根本性的贡献，因为我们消除了一个关键障碍，以挖掘从分散在整个网络中的数据中学习的巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种元机器学习方法，解决跨组织业务网络中数据保密与传输限制导致的分析难题，实现网络级数据分析。
AI.motivation: 跨组织业务网络中数据分散于不同法律实体且涉及敏感信息，传统方法因数据共享障碍难以实现系统级分析，限制了预测性能提升。
AI.method: 基于设计科学方法论，构建元机器学习框架，在工业场景中验证其可行性与性能，通过数据加密与分布式学习减少数据传输量并保护隐私。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保障数据机密性的同时，相较孤立分析提升预测效果，且性能接近理想数据共享场景。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为跨组织数据分析提供关键技术突破，通过消除数据共享障碍显著提升业务网络的智能化水平。

Second, we demonstrate that our method outperforms a conventional isolated analysis and even gets close to a (hypothetical) scenario where all data could be shared within the network. Thus, we provide a fundamental contribution for making business networks more effective, as we remove a key obstacle to tap the huge potential of learning from data that is scattered throughout the network. 提供有价值见解的成功分析解决方案通常取决于各种数据源的连接。虽然在组织内生成更大的数据池通常是可行的，但（组织间）业务网络中的分析应用仍然受到严重限制。由于数据分布在多个法律单位，甚至可能分布在各个国家，对敏感信息泄露的担忧以及需要交换的数据量巨大是创建有效的全系统解决方案的关键障碍，同时仍能达到卓越的预测性能。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种元机器学习方法，可以解决这些障碍，以便在业务网络内进行全面分析。我们遵循设计科学研究方法，并评估我们的方法在工业用例中的可行性和性能。首先，我们证明执行网络范围的分析以保护数据机密性并限制数据传输量是可行的。其次，我们证明我们的方法优于传统的孤立分析，甚至接近所有数据都可以在网络内共享的（假设）场景。因此，我们为提高业务网络的效率做出了根本性的贡献，因为我们消除了一个关键障碍，以挖掘从分散在整个网络中的数据中学习的巨大潜力。 本文提出一种元机器学习方法，解决跨组织业务网络中数据保密与传输限制导致的分析难题，实现网络级数据分析。 Robin Hirt,Niklas Kühl,Dominik Martin,Gerhard Satzger cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Wonguk Cho,Jinha Park,Taesup Kim
title: Complementary Domain Adaptation and Generalization for Unsupervised Continual Domain Shift Learning
title_zh: 无监督持续领域转移学习的互补领域适应和泛化
comment: ICCV 2023
comments: ICCV 2023
abstract: Continual domain shift poses a significant challenge in real-world applications, particularly in situations where labeled data is not available for new domains. The challenge of acquiring knowledge in this problem setting is referred to as unsupervised continual domain shift learning. Existing methods for domain adaptation and generalization have limitations in addressing this issue, as they focus either on adapting to a specific domain or generalizing to unseen domains, but not both. In this paper, we propose Complementary Domain Adaptation and Generalization (CoDAG), a simple yet effective learning framework that combines domain adaptation and generalization in a complementary manner to achieve three major goals of unsupervised continual domain shift learning: adapting to a current domain, generalizing to unseen domains, and preventing forgetting of previously seen domains. Our approach is model-agnostic, meaning that it is compatible with any existing domain adaptation and generalization algorithms. We evaluate CoDAG on several benchmark datasets and demonstrate that our model outperforms state-of-the-art models in all datasets and evaluation metrics, highlighting its effectiveness and robustness in handling unsupervised continual domain shift learning.
summary: Continual domain shift poses a significant challenge in real-world applications, particularly in situations where labeled data is not available for new domains. The challenge of acquiring knowledge in this problem setting is referred to as unsupervised continual domain shift learning. Existing methods for domain adaptation and generalization have limitations in addressing this issue, as they focus either on adapting to a specific domain or generalizing to unseen domains, but not both. In this paper, we propose Complementary Domain Adaptation and Generalization (CoDAG), a simple yet effective learning framework that combines domain adaptation and generalization in a complementary manner to achieve three major goals of unsupervised continual domain shift learning: adapting to a current domain, generalizing to unseen domains, and preventing forgetting of previously seen domains. Our approach is model-agnostic, meaning that it is compatible with any existing domain adaptation and generalization algorithms. We evaluate CoDAG on several benchmark datasets and demonstrate that our model outperforms state-of-the-art models in all datasets and evaluation metrics, highlighting its effectiveness and robustness in handling unsupervised continual domain shift learning.
abstract_zh: 持续的领域转移在现实应用中提出了重大挑战，特别是在标记数据不可用于新领域的情况下。在这个问题设置中获取知识的挑战被称为无监督连续领域转移学习。现有的领域适应和泛化方法在解决这个问题方面存在局限性，因为它们要么专注于适应特定领域，要么泛化到未知领域，但不能同时关注两者。在本文中，我们提出了互补领域适应和泛化（CoDAG），这是一种简单而有效的学习框架，以互补的方式将领域适应和泛化结合起来，以实现无监督连续领域转移学习的三个主要目标：适应当前领域、泛化到未见过的领域以及防止忘记以前见过的领域。我们的方法与模型无关，这意味着它与任何现有的领域适应和泛化算法兼容。我们在多个基准数据集上评估 CoDAG，并证明我们的模型在所有数据集和评估指标中都优于最先进的模型，突出了其在处理无监督连续域转移学习方面的有效性和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CoDAG的互补领域适应与泛化框架，用于解决无监督持续领域偏移学习问题，旨在同时实现对当前领域的适应、对未见领域的泛化以及防止遗忘已学习领域。
AI.motivation: 现有领域适应和泛化方法难以同时应对持续领域偏移中的三个核心挑战：适应新领域、泛化到未见领域以及防止遗忘旧知识，需设计兼顾三者的统一框架。
AI.method: CoDAG通过互补性结合领域适应与泛化机制，采用模型无关的设计，兼容现有算法，利用互补学习策略协调三项目标。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实验表明，CoDAG在所有评估指标上均优于现有最先进方法，验证了其有效性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: CoDAG为无监督持续领域偏移学习提供了简单有效的解决方案，通过互补性设计实现了适应、泛化与记忆保持的统一目标。

authors_text: Ricardo Vinuesa,Steven L. Brunton,Beverley J. McKeon
title: The transformative potential of machine learning for experiments in fluid mechanics
title_zh: 机器学习对流体力学实验的变革潜力
abstract: The field of machine learning has rapidly advanced the state of the art in many fields of science and engineering, including experimental fluid dynamics, which is one of the original big-data disciplines. This perspective will highlight several aspects of experimental fluid mechanics that stand to benefit from progress advances in machine learning, including: 1) augmenting the fidelity and quality of measurement techniques, 2) improving experimental design and surrogate digital-twin models and 3) enabling real-time estimation and control. In each case, we discuss recent success stories and ongoing challenges, along with caveats and limitations, and outline the potential for new avenues of ML-augmented and ML-enabled experimental fluid mechanics.
summary: The field of machine learning has rapidly advanced the state of the art in many fields of science and engineering, including experimental fluid dynamics, which is one of the original big-data disciplines. This perspective will highlight several aspects of experimental fluid mechanics that stand to benefit from progress advances in machine learning, including: 1) augmenting the fidelity and quality of measurement techniques, 2) improving experimental design and surrogate digital-twin models and 3) enabling real-time estimation and control. In each case, we discuss recent success stories and ongoing challenges, along with caveats and limitations, and outline the potential for new avenues of ML-augmented and ML-enabled experimental fluid mechanics.
abstract_zh: 机器学习领域迅速提升了许多科学和工程领域的技术水平，其中包括实验流体动力学，它是最初的大数据学科之一。这一观点将强调实验流体力学的几个方面，这些方面将受益于机器学习的进步，包括：1）增强测量技术的保真度和质量，2）改进实验设计和替代数字孪生模型，3）实现实时估计和控制。在每种情况下，我们都会讨论最近的成功案例和持续的挑战，以及注意事项和限制，并概述机器学习增强和机器学习支持的实验流体力学新途径的潜力。

AI.tldr: 探讨机器学习在实验流体力学中的变革潜力，分析其在测量技术、实验设计及实时控制等方面的应用与挑战
AI.motivation: 机器学习技术的快速发展为实验流体力学提供了新的工具，推动测量技术、实验设计及实时控制等领域的创新
AI.method: 通过分析现有成功案例和挑战，探讨机器学习在实验流体力学不同方面的应用潜力
AI.result: 识别了机器学习在提升测量精度、优化实验设计和实现实时控制方面的应用潜力，并指出了当前的技术限制与未来研究方向
AI.conclusion: 机器学习有望显著提升实验流体力学的效率和精度，但需解决数据质量、模型可解释性和实时性等关键挑战

authors_text: Lina-Estelle Linelle Louis,Saïd Moussaoui,Vincent Roualdes,Aurélien van Langhenhove,Sébastien Ravoux,Isabelle Milleville-Pennel
title: Monitoring mental workload by EEG during a game in Virtual Reality
title_zh: 在虚拟现实游戏中通过脑电图监测心理负荷
comment: IHM'23 - 34e Conf{é}rence Internationale Francophone sur l'Interaction Humain-Machine, AFIHM; Universit{é} de Technologie de Troyes, Apr 2023, Troyes, France
comments: IHM'23 - 34e Conf{é}rence Internationale Francophone sur l'Interaction Humain-Machine, AFIHM; Universit{é} de Technologie de Troyes, Apr 2023, Troyes, France
abstract: During an activity, knowing the mental workload (MWL) of the user allows to improve the Human-Machine Interactions (HMI). Indeed, the MWL has an impact on the individual and its interaction with the environment. Monitoring it is therefore a crucial issue. In this context, we have created the virtual game Back to Pizza which is based on the N-back task (commonly used for measuring MWL). In this more playful variant, users must carry out orders from customers of a pizza food truck. It is an interactive game that involves the audience of the IHM'23 conference, choosing several parameters like the number of ingredients. During this experience, the objective is to measure MWL in real time through an ElectroEncephaloGraph (EEG) and visual feedback on MWL level is given to the audience. With this demonstration, we propose to present a concept of a virtual interactive game that measures MWL in real time.
summary: During an activity, knowing the mental workload (MWL) of the user allows to improve the Human-Machine Interactions (HMI). Indeed, the MWL has an impact on the individual and its interaction with the environment. Monitoring it is therefore a crucial issue. In this context, we have created the virtual game Back to Pizza which is based on the N-back task (commonly used for measuring MWL). In this more playful variant, users must carry out orders from customers of a pizza food truck. It is an interactive game that involves the audience of the IHM'23 conference, choosing several parameters like the number of ingredients. During this experience, the objective is to measure MWL in real time through an ElectroEncephaloGraph (EEG) and visual feedback on MWL level is given to the audience. With this demonstration, we propose to present a concept of a virtual interactive game that measures MWL in real time.
abstract_zh: 在活动期间，了解用户的脑力负荷 (MWL) 可以改善人机交互 (HMI)。事实上，MWL 对个体及其与环境的相互作用有影响。因此对其进行监控是一个至关重要的问题。在此背景下，我们创建了基于 N-back 任务（通常用于测量 MWL）的虚拟游戏 Back to Pizza。在这个更有趣的变体中，用户必须执行披萨食品车顾客的订单。这是一款互动游戏，IHM'23 会议的观众需要选择多个参数，例如成分数量。在这次体验中，目标是通过脑电图 (EEG) 实时测量 MWL，并向观众提供 MWL 水平的视觉反馈。通过这次演示，我们提出了一种实时测量 MWL 的虚拟互动游戏的概念。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一款基于虚拟现实的互动游戏，通过脑电图（EEG）实时监测用户的认知负荷（MWL）。
AI.motivation: 认知负荷影响用户与环境的交互效果，实时监测有助于优化人机交互（HMI）体验。
AI.method: 开发了名为Back to Pizza的虚拟游戏，结合N-back任务机制，通过EEG采集脑电信号并提供实时视觉反馈。
AI.result: 在IHM'23会议中演示了该系统，验证了通过游戏化方式实时测量认知负荷的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种利用虚拟现实和EEG技术实时监测认知负荷的创新交互概念。

search_text: Monitoring mental workload by EEG during a game in Virtual Reality 在虚拟现实游戏中通过脑电图监测心理负荷 During an activity, knowing the mental workload (MWL) of the user allows to improve the Human-Machine Interactions (HMI). Indeed, the MWL has an impact on the individual and its interaction with the environment. Monitoring it is therefore a crucial issue. In this context, we have created the virtual game Back to Pizza which is based on the N-back task (commonly used for measuring MWL). In this more playful variant, users must carry out orders from customers of a pizza food truck. It is an interactive game that involves the audience of the IHM'23 conference, choosing several parameters like the number of ingredients. During this experience, the objective is to measure MWL in real time through an ElectroEncephaloGraph (EEG) and visual feedback on MWL level is given to the audience. With this demonstration, we propose to present a concept of a virtual interactive game that measures MWL in real time. 在活动期间，了解用户的脑力负荷 (MWL) 可以改善人机交互 (HMI)。事实上，MWL 对个体及其与环境的相互作用有影响。因此对其进行监控是一个至关重要的问题。在此背景下，我们创建了基于 N-back 任务（通常用于测量 MWL）的虚拟游戏 Back to Pizza。在这个更有趣的变体中，用户必须执行披萨食品车顾客的订单。这是一款互动游戏，IHM'23 会议的观众需要选择多个参数，例如成分数量。在这次体验中，目标是通过脑电图 (EEG) 实时测量 MWL，并向观众提供 MWL 水平的视觉反馈。通过这次演示，我们提出了一种实时测量 MWL 的虚拟互动游戏的概念。 本文设计了一款基于虚拟现实的互动游戏，通过脑电图（EEG）实时监测用户的认知负荷（MWL）。 Lina-Estelle Linelle Louis,Saïd Moussaoui,Vincent Roualdes,Aurélien van Langhenhove,Sébastien Ravoux,Isabelle Milleville-Pennel cs.HC

authors_text: Ziyuan Zhao,Kaixin Xu,Huai Zhe Yeo,Xulei Yang,Cuntai Guan
title: MS-MT: Multi-Scale Mean Teacher with Contrastive Unpaired Translation for Cross-Modality Vestibular Schwannoma and Cochlea Segmentation
title_zh: MS-MT：跨模态前庭神经鞘瘤和耳蜗分割的对比非配对翻译的多尺度均值教师
comment: Accepted by BrainLes MICCAI proceedings (5th solution for MICCAI 2022 Cross-Modality Domain Adaptation (crossMoDA) Challenge)
comments: Accepted by BrainLes MICCAI proceedings (5th solution for MICCAI 2022 Cross-Modality Domain Adaptation (crossMoDA) Challenge)
abstract: Domain shift has been a long-standing issue for medical image segmentation. Recently, unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) methods have achieved promising cross-modality segmentation performance by distilling knowledge from a label-rich source domain to a target domain without labels. In this work, we propose a multi-scale self-ensembling based UDA framework for automatic segmentation of two key brain structures i.e., Vestibular Schwannoma (VS) and Cochlea on high-resolution T2 images. First, a segmentation-enhanced contrastive unpaired image translation module is designed for image-level domain adaptation from source T1 to target T2. Next, multi-scale deep supervision and consistency regularization are introduced to a mean teacher network for self-ensemble learning to further close the domain gap. Furthermore, self-training and intensity augmentation techniques are utilized to mitigate label scarcity and boost cross-modality segmentation performance. Our method demonstrates promising segmentation performance with a mean Dice score of 83.8% and 81.4% and an average asymmetric surface distance (ASSD) of 0.55 mm and 0.26 mm for the VS and Cochlea, respectively in the validation phase of the crossMoDA 2022 challenge.
summary: Domain shift has been a long-standing issue for medical image segmentation. Recently, unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) methods have achieved promising cross-modality segmentation performance by distilling knowledge from a label-rich source domain to a target domain without labels. In this work, we propose a multi-scale self-ensembling based UDA framework for automatic segmentation of two key brain structures i.e., Vestibular Schwannoma (VS) and Cochlea on high-resolution T2 images. First, a segmentation-enhanced contrastive unpaired image translation module is designed for image-level domain adaptation from source T1 to target T2. Next, multi-scale deep supervision and consistency regularization are introduced to a mean teacher network for self-ensemble learning to further close the domain gap. Furthermore, self-training and intensity augmentation techniques are utilized to mitigate label scarcity and boost cross-modality segmentation performance. Our method demonstrates promising segmentation performance with a mean Dice score of 83.8% and 81.4% and an average asymmetric surface distance (ASSD) of 0.55 mm and 0.26 mm for the VS and Cochlea, respectively in the validation phase of the crossMoDA 2022 challenge.
abstract_zh: 域转移一直是医学图像分割的一个长期存在的问题。最近，无监督域适应（UDA）方法通过将知识从富含标签的源域提取到没有标签的目标域，实现了有前景的跨模态分割性能。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于多尺度自集成的 UDA 框架，用于在高分辨率 T2 图像上自动分割两个关键的大脑结构，即前庭神经鞘瘤 (VS) 和耳蜗。首先，设计了一个分割增强对比非配对图像转换模块，用于从源 T1 到目标 T2 的图像级域适应。接下来，将多尺度深度监督和一致性正则化引入平均教师网络中进行自集成学习，以进一步缩小领域差距。此外，利用自我训练和强度增强技术来减轻标签稀缺性并提高跨模态分割性能。我们的方法展示了良好的分割性能，在 crossMoDA 2022 挑战赛的验证阶段，VS 和 Cochlea 的平均 Dice 得分分别为 83.8% 和 81.4%，平均不对称表面距离 (ASSD) 为 0.55 mm 和 0.26 mm。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨模态医学图像分割方法，解决高分辨率T2图像上前庭神经鞘瘤和耳蜗的自动分割问题。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割中领域偏移问题长期存在，传统UDA方法在跨模态分割中效果有限，需更有效的域适应策略应对高分辨率T2图像的分割挑战。
AI.method: 设计对比无配对图像翻译模块实现T1到T2的域适应，结合多尺度深度监督、一致性正则化、自训练和强度增强技术的多尺度均值教师网络框架。
AI.result: 在crossMoDA 2022挑战赛验证中，VS Dice 83.8%/ASSD 0.55mm，耳蜗Dice 81.4%/ASSD 0.26mm，达到先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多尺度域适应框架有效缓解跨模态分割中的领域偏移，为高分辨率医学图像分割提供新思路。

authors_text: Ludwig Bothmann,Lisa Wimmer,Omid Charrakh,Tobias Weber,Hendrik Edelhoff,Wibke Peters,Hien Nguyen,Caryl Benjamin,Annette Menzel
title: Automated wildlife image classification: An active learning tool for ecological applications
title_zh: 自动野生动物图像分类：生态应用的主动学习工具
comment: ef:Ecological Informatics (2023) 102231
comments: ef:Ecological Informatics (2023) 102231
abstract: Wildlife camera trap images are being used extensively to investigate animal abundance, habitat associations, and behavior, which is complicated by the fact that experts must first classify the images manually. Artificial intelligence systems can take over this task but usually need a large number of already-labeled training images to achieve sufficient performance. This requirement necessitates human expert labor and poses a particular challenge for projects with few cameras or short durations. We propose a label-efficient learning strategy that enables researchers with small or medium-sized image databases to leverage the potential of modern machine learning, thus freeing crucial resources for subsequent analyses. Our methodological proposal is two-fold: (1) We improve current strategies of combining object detection and image classification by tuning the hyperparameters of both models. (2) We provide an active learning (AL) system that allows training deep learning models very efficiently in terms of required human-labeled training images. We supply a software package that enables researchers to use these methods directly and thereby ensure the broad applicability of the proposed framework in ecological practice. We show that our tuning strategy improves predictive performance. We demonstrate how the AL pipeline reduces the amount of pre-labeled data needed to achieve a specific predictive performance and that it is especially valuable for improving out-of-sample predictive performance. We conclude that the combination of tuning and AL increases predictive performance substantially. Furthermore, we argue that our work can broadly impact the community through the ready-to-use software package provided. Finally, the publication of our models tailored to European wildlife data enriches existing model bases mostly trained on data from Africa and North America.
summary: Wildlife camera trap images are being used extensively to investigate animal abundance, habitat associations, and behavior, which is complicated by the fact that experts must first classify the images manually. Artificial intelligence systems can take over this task but usually need a large number of already-labeled training images to achieve sufficient performance. This requirement necessitates human expert labor and poses a particular challenge for projects with few cameras or short durations. We propose a label-efficient learning strategy that enables researchers with small or medium-sized image databases to leverage the potential of modern machine learning, thus freeing crucial resources for subsequent analyses. Our methodological proposal is two-fold: (1) We improve current strategies of combining object detection and image classification by tuning the hyperparameters of both models. (2) We provide an active learning (AL) system that allows training deep learning models very efficiently in terms of required human-labeled training images. We supply a software package that enables researchers to use these methods directly and thereby ensure the broad applicability of the proposed framework in ecological practice. We show that our tuning strategy improves predictive performance. We demonstrate how the AL pipeline reduces the amount of pre-labeled data needed to achieve a specific predictive performance and that it is especially valuable for improving out-of-sample predictive performance. We conclude that the combination of tuning and AL increases predictive performance substantially. Furthermore, we argue that our work can broadly impact the community through the ready-to-use software package provided. Finally, the publication of our models tailored to European wildlife data enriches existing model bases mostly trained on data from Africa and North America.
abstract_zh: 野生动物相机陷阱图像被广泛用于调查动物丰度、栖息地关联和行为，但由于专家必须首先对图像进行手动分类，这一事实使情况变得复杂。人工智能系统可以接管这项任务，但通常需要大量已标记的训练图像才能获得足够的性能。这一要求需要人类专家的劳动力，并且对于摄像机很少或持续时间短的项目构成了特殊的挑战。我们提出了一种标签高效的学习策略，使拥有中小型图像数据库的研究人员能够利用现代机器学习的潜力，从而为后续分析释放关键资源。我们的方法建议有两个方面：（1）我们通过调整两个模型的超参数来改进当前将对象检测和图像分类相结合的策略。 (2) 我们提供了一个主动学习（AL）系统，可以根据所需的人工标记训练图像非常有效地训练深度学习模型。我们提供了一个软件包，使研究人员能够直接使用这些方法，从而确保所提出的框架在生态实践中的广泛适用性。我们证明了我们的调整策略可以提高预测性能。我们演示了 AL 管道如何减少实现特定预测性能所需的预标记数据量，并且它对于提高样本外预测性能特别有价值。我们得出的结论是，调优和 AL 的结合可以显着提高预测性能。此外，我们认为我们的工作可以通过提供的即用型软件包对社区产生广泛影响。最后，我们针对欧洲野生动物数据定制的模型的发布丰富了现有的模型库，这些模型库主要是根据非洲和北美的数据进行训练的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的主动学习工具，用于生态学中的野生动物图像分类，以减少对大量标记数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 传统野生动物图像分类依赖人工标注，耗时且难以满足小规模或短期项目需求，而现有AI模型需大量标注数据，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 通过优化目标检测与图像分类模型的超参数组合，并结合主动学习系统，高效利用有限标注数据训练深度学习模型。
AI.result: 调参策略提升预测性能，主动学习显著减少所需标注数据量，且增强模型泛化能力；提供软件包及欧洲野生动物专用模型。
AI.conclusion: 调参与主动学习结合显著提升性能，软件包推动生态学应用，欧洲数据补充现有模型库的地域局限性。

tldr: 本文提出一种高效的主动学习工具，用于生态学中的野生动物图像分类，以减少对大量标记数据的依赖。
motivation: 传统野生动物图像分类依赖人工标注，耗时且难以满足小规模或短期项目需求，而现有AI模型需大量标注数据，限制了其应用。
method: 通过优化目标检测与图像分类模型的超参数组合，并结合主动学习系统，高效利用有限标注数据训练深度学习模型。
result: 调参策略提升预测性能，主动学习显著减少所需标注数据量，且增强模型泛化能力；提供软件包及欧洲野生动物专用模型。
conclusion: 调参与主动学习结合显著提升性能，软件包推动生态学应用，欧洲数据补充现有模型库的地域局限性。
search_text: Automated wildlife image classification: An active learning tool for ecological applications 自动野生动物图像分类：生态应用的主动学习工具 Wildlife camera trap images are being used extensively to investigate animal abundance, habitat associations, and behavior, which is complicated by the fact that experts must first classify the images manually. Artificial intelligence systems can take over this task but usually need a large number of already-labeled training images to achieve sufficient performance. This requirement necessitates human expert labor and poses a particular challenge for projects with few cameras or short durations. We propose a label-efficient learning strategy that enables researchers with small or medium-sized image databases to leverage the potential of modern machine learning, thus freeing crucial resources for subsequent analyses. Our methodological proposal is two-fold: (1) We improve current strategies of combining object detection and image classification by tuning the hyperparameters of both models. (2) We provide an active learning (AL) system that allows training deep learning models very efficiently in terms of required human-labeled training images. We supply a software package that enables researchers to use these methods directly and thereby ensure the broad applicability of the proposed framework in ecological practice. We show that our tuning strategy improves predictive performance. We demonstrate how the AL pipeline reduces the amount of pre-labeled data needed to achieve a specific predictive performance and that it is especially valuable for improving out-of-sample predictive performance. We conclude that the combination of tuning and AL increases predictive performance substantially. Furthermore, we argue that our work can broadly impact the community through the ready-to-use software package provided. Finally, the publication of our models tailored to European wildlife data enriches existing model bases mostly trained on data from Africa and North America. 野生动物相机陷阱图像被广泛用于调查动物丰度、栖息地关联和行为，但由于专家必须首先对图像进行手动分类，这一事实使情况变得复杂。人工智能系统可以接管这项任务，但通常需要大量已标记的训练图像才能获得足够的性能。这一要求需要人类专家的劳动力，并且对于摄像机很少或持续时间短的项目构成了特殊的挑战。我们提出了一种标签高效的学习策略，使拥有中小型图像数据库的研究人员能够利用现代机器学习的潜力，从而为后续分析释放关键资源。我们的方法建议有两个方面：（1）我们通过调整两个模型的超参数来改进当前将对象检测和图像分类相结合的策略。 (2) 我们提供了一个主动学习（AL）系统，可以根据所需的人工标记训练图像非常有效地训练深度学习模型。我们提供了一个软件包，使研究人员能够直接使用这些方法，从而确保所提出的框架在生态实践中的广泛适用性。我们证明了我们的调整策略可以提高预测性能。我们演示了 AL 管道如何减少实现特定预测性能所需的预标记数据量，并且它对于提高样本外预测性能特别有价值。我们得出的结论是，调优和 AL 的结合可以显着提高预测性能。此外，我们认为我们的工作可以通过提供的即用型软件包对社区产生广泛影响。最后，我们针对欧洲野生动物数据定制的模型的发布丰富了现有的模型库，这些模型库主要是根据非洲和北美的数据进行训练的。 本文提出一种高效的主动学习工具，用于生态学中的野生动物图像分类，以减少对大量标记数据的依赖。 Ludwig Bothmann,Lisa Wimmer,Omid Charrakh,Tobias Weber,Hendrik Edelhoff,Wibke Peters,Hien Nguyen,Caryl Benjamin,Annette Menzel cs.CV,stat.AP

authors_text: Deze Wang,Boxing Chen,Shanshan Li,Wei Luo,Shaoliang Peng,Wei Dong,Xiangke Liao
title: One Adapter for All Programming Languages? Adapter Tuning for Code Search and Summarization
title_zh: 适用于所有编程语言的一种适配器？用于代码搜索和摘要的适配器调整
comment: Accepted to the 45th International Conference on Software Engineering (ICSE 2023)
comments: Accepted to the 45th International Conference on Software Engineering (ICSE 2023)
abstract: As pre-trained models automate many code intelligence tasks, a widely used paradigm is to fine-tune a model on the task dataset for each programming language. A recent study reported that multilingual fine-tuning benefits a range of tasks and models. However, we find that multilingual fine-tuning leads to performance degradation on recent models UniXcoder and CodeT5. To alleviate the potentially catastrophic forgetting issue in multilingual models, we fix all pre-trained model parameters, insert the parameter-efficient structure adapter, and fine-tune it. Updating only 0.6\% of the overall parameters compared to full-model fine-tuning for each programming language, adapter tuning yields consistent improvements on code search and summarization tasks, achieving state-of-the-art results. In addition, we experimentally show its effectiveness in cross-lingual and low-resource scenarios. Multilingual fine-tuning with 200 samples per programming language approaches the results fine-tuned with the entire dataset on code summarization. Our experiments on three probing tasks show that adapter tuning significantly outperforms full-model fine-tuning and effectively overcomes catastrophic forgetting.
summary: As pre-trained models automate many code intelligence tasks, a widely used paradigm is to fine-tune a model on the task dataset for each programming language. A recent study reported that multilingual fine-tuning benefits a range of tasks and models. However, we find that multilingual fine-tuning leads to performance degradation on recent models UniXcoder and CodeT5. To alleviate the potentially catastrophic forgetting issue in multilingual models, we fix all pre-trained model parameters, insert the parameter-efficient structure adapter, and fine-tune it. Updating only 0.6\% of the overall parameters compared to full-model fine-tuning for each programming language, adapter tuning yields consistent improvements on code search and summarization tasks, achieving state-of-the-art results. In addition, we experimentally show its effectiveness in cross-lingual and low-resource scenarios. Multilingual fine-tuning with 200 samples per programming language approaches the results fine-tuned with the entire dataset on code summarization. Our experiments on three probing tasks show that adapter tuning significantly outperforms full-model fine-tuning and effectively overcomes catastrophic forgetting.
abstract_zh: 由于预训练模型可以自动执行许多代码智能任务，因此广泛使用的范例是在每种编程语言的任务数据集上微调模型。最近的一项研究报告称，多语言微调有利于一系列任务和模型。然而，我们发现多语言微调会导致最新模型 UniXcoder 和 CodeT5 的性能下降。为了缓解多语言模型中潜在的灾难性遗忘问题，我们修复了所有预训练的模型参数，插入参数高效的结构适配器，并对其进行微调。与每种编程语言的全模型微调相比，适配器调整仅更新总体参数的 0.6%，适配器调优对代码搜索和摘要任务产生了一致的改进，实现了最先进的结果。此外，我们还通过实验证明了其在跨语言和资源匮乏的场景中的有效性。每种编程语言 200 个样本的多语言微调接近于代码摘要的整个数据集微调的结果。我们对三个探测任务的实验表明，适配器调整显着优于全模型微调，并有效克服了灾难性遗忘。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于所有编程语言的适配器调优方法，用于代码搜索和摘要任务。
AI.motivation: 多语言微调在近期模型（如UniXcoder和CodeT5）上导致性能下降，且存在灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.method: 固定预训练模型参数，插入参数高效的适配器结构并仅微调适配器，更新参数比例仅为全模型微调的0.6%。
AI.result: 在代码搜索和摘要任务中取得最先进结果，且在跨语言和低资源场景下表现优异，三类探测任务中显著优于全模型微调。
AI.conclusion: 适配器调优能有效克服多语言微调中的灾难性遗忘问题，以极低参数更新成本实现跨语言代码任务的性能提升。
