authors_text: Yu-Peng Wu,Hong Qian,Rong-Jun Qin,Yi Chen,Aimin Zhou
title: Scaling Multi-Objective Security Games Provably via Space Discretization Based Evolutionary Search
title_zh: 通过基于空间离散化的进化搜索可证明地扩展多目标安全博弈
abstract: In the field of security, multi-objective security games (MOSGs) allow defenders to simultaneously protect targets from multiple heterogeneous attackers. MOSGs aim to simultaneously maximize all the heterogeneous payoffs, e.g., life, money, and crime rate, without merging heterogeneous attackers. In real-world scenarios, the number of heterogeneous attackers and targets to be protected may exceed the capability of most existing state-of-the-art methods, i.e., MOSGs are limited by the issue of scalability. To this end, this paper proposes a general framework called SDES based on many-objective evolutionary search to scale up MOSGs to large-scale targets and heterogeneous attackers. SDES consists of four consecutive key components, i.e., discretization, optimization, evaluation, and refinement. Specifically, SDES first discretizes the originally high-dimensional continuous solution space to the low-dimensional discrete one by the maximal indifference property in game theory. This property helps evolutionary algorithms (EAs) bypass the high-dimensional step function and ensure a well-convergent Pareto front. Then, a many-objective EA is used for optimization in the low-dimensional discrete solution space to obtain a well-spaced Pareto front. To evaluate solutions, SDES restores solutions back to the original space via greedily optimizing a novel divergence measurement. Finally, the refinement in SDES boosts the optimization performance with acceptable cost. Theoretically, we prove the optimization consistency and convergence of SDES. Experiment results show that SDES is the first linear-time MOSG algorithm for both large-scale attackers and targets. SDES is able to solve up to 20 attackers and 100 targets MOSG problems, while the state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods can only solve up to 8 attackers and 25 targets ones. Ablation study verifies the necessity of all components in SDES.
summary: In the field of security, multi-objective security games (MOSGs) allow defenders to simultaneously protect targets from multiple heterogeneous attackers. MOSGs aim to simultaneously maximize all the heterogeneous payoffs, e.g., life, money, and crime rate, without merging heterogeneous attackers. In real-world scenarios, the number of heterogeneous attackers and targets to be protected may exceed the capability of most existing state-of-the-art methods, i.e., MOSGs are limited by the issue of scalability. To this end, this paper proposes a general framework called SDES based on many-objective evolutionary search to scale up MOSGs to large-scale targets and heterogeneous attackers. SDES consists of four consecutive key components, i.e., discretization, optimization, evaluation, and refinement. Specifically, SDES first discretizes the originally high-dimensional continuous solution space to the low-dimensional discrete one by the maximal indifference property in game theory. This property helps evolutionary algorithms (EAs) bypass the high-dimensional step function and ensure a well-convergent Pareto front. Then, a many-objective EA is used for optimization in the low-dimensional discrete solution space to obtain a well-spaced Pareto front. To evaluate solutions, SDES restores solutions back to the original space via greedily optimizing a novel divergence measurement. Finally, the refinement in SDES boosts the optimization performance with acceptable cost. Theoretically, we prove the optimization consistency and convergence of SDES. Experiment results show that SDES is the first linear-time MOSG algorithm for both large-scale attackers and targets. SDES is able to solve up to 20 attackers and 100 targets MOSG problems, while the state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods can only solve up to 8 attackers and 25 targets ones. Ablation study verifies the necessity of all components in SDES.
abstract_zh: 在安全领域，多目标安全博弈（MOSG）允许防御者同时保护目标免受多个异构攻击者的侵害。 MOSG 的目标是同时最大化所有异质收益，例如生命、金钱和犯罪率，而不合并异质攻击者。在现实场景中，异构攻击者和要保护的目标的数量可能超出大多数现有最先进方法的能力，即 MOSG 受到可扩展性问题的限制。为此，本文提出了一种基于多目标进化搜索的通用框架 SDES，将 MOSG 扩展到大规模目标和异构攻击者。 SDES 由四个连续的关键部分组成，即离散化、优化、评估和细化。具体来说，SDES首先利用博弈论中的最大无差异性质，将原本高维的连续解空间离散化为低维离散解空间。此属性有助于进化算法 (EA) 绕过高维阶跃函数并确保良好收敛的帕累托前沿。然后，使用多目标 EA 在低维离散解空间中进行优化，以获得间隔良好的 Pareto 前沿。为了评估解决方案，SDES 通过贪婪地优化一种新颖的散度测量将解决方案恢复到原始空间。最后，SDES 的改进以可接受的成本提高了优化性能。理论上，我们证明了SDES的优化一致性和收敛性。实验结果表明，SDES是第一个同时适用于大规模攻击者和目标的线性时间MOSG算法。 SDES能够解决最多20个攻击者和100个目标的MOSG问题，而最先进的（SOTA）方法只能解决最多8个攻击者和25个目标的MOSG问题。消融研究验证了 SDES 中所有组件的必要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于空间离散化的进化搜索框架SDES，用于解决大规模多目标安全博弈（MOSGs）的可扩展性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理大规模异构攻击者和目标时存在可扩展性限制，难以同时优化多个异构收益目标。
AI.method: SDES框架包含四个阶段：通过博弈论的极大无差异性将高维连续解空间离散化、在低维空间进行多目标进化优化、通过贪心优化新发散度量恢复解、最后通过精细化提升性能。
AI.result: SDES首次实现线性时间复杂度的MOSG算法，可处理最多20个攻击者和100个目标，而现有方法仅支持8个攻击者和25个目标。
AI.conclusion: SDES通过理论证明和实验验证，在保证收敛性的同时显著提升了MOSGs的可扩展性，各组件均被证明必要。

motivation: 现有方法在处理大规模异构攻击者和目标时存在可扩展性限制，难以同时优化多个异构收益目标。
method: SDES框架包含四个阶段：通过博弈论的极大无差异性将高维连续解空间离散化、在低维空间进行多目标进化优化、通过贪心优化新发散度量恢复解、最后通过精细化提升性能。
result: SDES首次实现线性时间复杂度的MOSG算法，可处理最多20个攻击者和100个目标，而现有方法仅支持8个攻击者和25个目标。
conclusion: SDES通过理论证明和实验验证，在保证收敛性的同时显著提升了MOSGs的可扩展性，各组件均被证明必要。
search_text: Scaling Multi-Objective Security Games Provably via Space Discretization Based Evolutionary Search 通过基于空间离散化的进化搜索可证明地扩展多目标安全博弈 In the field of security, multi-objective security games (MOSGs) allow defenders to simultaneously protect targets from multiple heterogeneous attackers. MOSGs aim to simultaneously maximize all the heterogeneous payoffs, e.g., life, money, and crime rate, without merging heterogeneous attackers. In real-world scenarios, the number of heterogeneous attackers and targets to be protected may exceed the capability of most existing state-of-the-art methods, i.e., MOSGs are limited by the issue of scalability. To this end, this paper proposes a general framework called SDES based on many-objective evolutionary search to scale up MOSGs to large-scale targets and heterogeneous attackers. SDES consists of four consecutive key components, i.e., discretization, optimization, evaluation, and refinement. Specifically, SDES first discretizes the originally high-dimensional continuous solution space to the low-dimensional discrete one by the maximal indifference property in game theory. This property helps evolutionary algorithms (EAs) bypass the high-dimensional step function and ensure a well-convergent Pareto front. Then, a many-objective EA is used for optimization in the low-dimensional discrete solution space to obtain a well-spaced Pareto front. To evaluate solutions, SDES restores solutions back to the original space via greedily optimizing a novel divergence measurement. Finally, the refinement in SDES boosts the optimization performance with acceptable cost. Theoretically, we prove the optimization consistency and convergence of SDES. Experiment results show that SDES is the first linear-time MOSG algorithm for both large-scale attackers and targets. SDES is able to solve up to 20 attackers and 100 targets MOSG problems, while the state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods can only solve up to 8 attackers and 25 targets ones. Ablation study verifies the necessity of all components in SDES. 在安全领域，多目标安全博弈（MOSG）允许防御者同时保护目标免受多个异构攻击者的侵害。 MOSG 的目标是同时最大化所有异质收益，例如生命、金钱和犯罪率，而不合并异质攻击者。在现实场景中，异构攻击者和要保护的目标的数量可能超出大多数现有最先进方法的能力，即 MOSG 受到可扩展性问题的限制。为此，本文提出了一种基于多目标进化搜索的通用框架 SDES，将 MOSG 扩展到大规模目标和异构攻击者。 SDES 由四个连续的关键部分组成，即离散化、优化、评估和细化。具体来说，SDES首先利用博弈论中的最大无差异性质，将原本高维的连续解空间离散化为低维离散解空间。此属性有助于进化算法 (EA) 绕过高维阶跃函数并确保良好收敛的帕累托前沿。然后，使用多目标 EA 在低维离散解空间中进行优化，以获得间隔良好的 Pareto 前沿。为了评估解决方案，SDES 通过贪婪地优化一种新颖的散度测量将解决方案恢复到原始空间。最后，SDES 的改进以可接受的成本提高了优化性能。理论上，我们证明了SDES的优化一致性和收敛性。实验结果表明，SDES是第一个同时适用于大规模攻击者和目标的线性时间MOSG算法。 SDES能够解决最多20个攻击者和100个目标的MOSG问题，而最先进的（SOTA）方法只能解决最多8个攻击者和25个目标的MOSG问题。消融研究验证了 SDES 中所有组件的必要性。 本文提出了一种基于空间离散化的进化搜索框架SDES，用于解决大规模多目标安全博弈（MOSGs）的可扩展性问题。 Yu-Peng Wu,Hong Qian,Rong-Jun Qin,Yi Chen,Aimin Zhou cs.LG,cs.GT,cs.NE

authors_text: Xiao Yang,Chang Liu,Longlong Xu,Yikai Wang,Yinpeng Dong,Ning Chen,Hang Su,Jun Zhu
title: Towards Effective Adversarial Textured 3D Meshes on Physical Face Recognition
title_zh: 在物理人脸识别上实现有效的对抗性纹理 3D 网格
comment: ef:CVPR 2023
comments: ef:CVPR 2023
abstract: Face recognition is a prevailing authentication solution in numerous biometric applications. Physical adversarial attacks, as an important surrogate, can identify the weaknesses of face recognition systems and evaluate their robustness before deployed. However, most existing physical attacks are either detectable readily or ineffective against commercial recognition systems. The goal of this work is to develop a more reliable technique that can carry out an end-to-end evaluation of adversarial robustness for commercial systems. It requires that this technique can simultaneously deceive black-box recognition models and evade defensive mechanisms. To fulfill this, we design adversarial textured 3D meshes (AT3D) with an elaborate topology on a human face, which can be 3D-printed and pasted on the attacker's face to evade the defenses. However, the mesh-based optimization regime calculates gradients in high-dimensional mesh space, and can be trapped into local optima with unsatisfactory transferability. To deviate from the mesh-based space, we propose to perturb the low-dimensional coefficient space based on 3D Morphable Model, which significantly improves black-box transferability meanwhile enjoying faster search efficiency and better visual quality. Extensive experiments in digital and physical scenarios show that our method effectively explores the security vulnerabilities of multiple popular commercial services, including three recognition APIs, four anti-spoofing APIs, two prevailing mobile phones and two automated access control systems.

It requires that this technique can simultaneously deceive black-box recognition models and evade defensive mechanisms. To fulfill this, we design adversarial textured 3D meshes (AT3D) with an elaborate topology on a human face, which can be 3D-printed and pasted on the attacker's face to evade the defenses. However, the mesh-based optimization regime calculates gradients in high-dimensional mesh space, and can be trapped into local optima with unsatisfactory transferability. To deviate from the mesh-based space, we propose to perturb the low-dimensional coefficient space based on 3D Morphable Model, which significantly improves black-box transferability meanwhile enjoying faster search efficiency and better visual quality. Extensive experiments in digital and physical scenarios show that our method effectively explores the security vulnerabilities of multiple popular commercial services, including three recognition APIs, four anti-spoofing APIs, two prevailing mobile phones and two automated access control systems.
abstract_zh: 人脸识别是众多生物识别应用中流行的身份验证解决方案。 Physical adversarial attacks, as an important surrogate, can identify the weaknesses of face recognition systems and evaluate their robustness before deployed.然而，大多数现有的物理攻击要么很容易被检测到，要么对商业识别系统无效。这项工作的目标是开发一种更可靠的技术，可以对商业系统的对抗鲁棒性进行端到端评估。它要求该技术能够同时欺骗黑盒识别模型并逃避防御机制。 To fulfill this, we design adversarial textured 3D meshes (AT3D) with an elaborate topology on a human face, which can be 3D-printed and pasted on the attacker's face to evade the defenses.然而，基于网格的优化机制在高维网格空间中计算梯度，并且可能陷入局部最优且可传递性不令人满意。为了摆脱基于网格的空间，我们提出基于3D Morphable Model扰动低维系数空间，这显着提高了黑盒可转移性，同时享受更快的搜索效率和更好的视觉质量。在数字和物理场景中的大量实验表明，我们的方法有效地探索了多种流行商业服务的安全漏洞，包括三个识别API、四个反欺骗API、两种流行的手机和两种自动访问控制系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成对抗性纹理3D网格的方法，用于物理环境下的面部识别系统攻击，以评估其鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有物理攻击方法在商业人脸识别系统中存在易被检测或效果不佳的问题，需开发更可靠的攻击技术以全面评估系统安全性。
AI.method: 设计具有复杂拓扑结构的对抗性纹理3D网格（AT3D），通过3D可变形模型在低维系数空间进行扰动优化，提升黑盒攻击的迁移性与效率。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效攻击多种主流商业服务（包括3个识别API、4个反欺骗API、2款手机及2套门禁系统），且具有更优视觉质量与搜索效率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的AT3D方法通过低维优化突破网格空间局限，在物理攻击场景中实现了对商业人脸识别系统的有效安全性评估。

authors_text: Florian Müller,Daniel Schmitt,Andrii Matviienko,Dominik Schön,Sebastian Günther,Thomas Kosch,Martin Schmitz
title: TicTacToes: Assessing Toe Movements as an Input Modality
title_zh: TicTacToes：评估脚趾运动作为输入方式
comment: To appear in Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI 23), April 23-28, 2023, Hamburg, Germany. ACM, New York, NY, USA, 17 pages
comments: To appear in Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI 23), April 23-28, 2023, Hamburg, Germany. ACM, New York, NY, USA, 17 pages
abstract: From carrying grocery bags to holding onto handles on the bus, there are a variety of situations where one or both hands are busy, hindering the vision of ubiquitous interaction with technology. Voice commands, as a popular hands-free alternative, struggle with ambient noise and privacy issues. As an alternative approach, research explored movements of various body parts (e.g., head, arms) as input modalities, with foot-based techniques proving particularly suitable for hands-free interaction. Whereas previous research only considered the movement of the foot as a whole, in this work, we argue that our toes offer further degrees of freedom that can be leveraged for interaction. To explore the viability of toe-based interaction, we contribute the results of a controlled experiment with 18 participants assessing the impact of five factors on the accuracy, efficiency and user experience of such interfaces. Based on the findings, we provide design recommendations for future toe-based interfaces.
summary: From carrying grocery bags to holding onto handles on the bus, there are a variety of situations where one or both hands are busy, hindering the vision of ubiquitous interaction with technology. Voice commands, as a popular hands-free alternative, struggle with ambient noise and privacy issues. As an alternative approach, research explored movements of various body parts (e.g., head, arms) as input modalities, with foot-based techniques proving particularly suitable for hands-free interaction. Whereas previous research only considered the movement of the foot as a whole, in this work, we argue that our toes offer further degrees of freedom that can be leveraged for interaction. To explore the viability of toe-based interaction, we contribute the results of a controlled experiment with 18 participants assessing the impact of five factors on the accuracy, efficiency and user experience of such interfaces. Based on the findings, we provide design recommendations for future toe-based interfaces.
abstract_zh: 从提购物袋到在公交车上握住把手，在各种情况下，一只手或两只手都会忙碌，从而阻碍了与技术无处不在的交互的愿景。语音命令作为一种流行的免提替代方案，与环境噪音和隐私问题作斗争。作为一种替代方法，研究探索了不同身体部位（例如头部、手臂）的运动作为输入方式，事实证明基于脚的技术特别适合免提交互。虽然之前的研究只考虑了脚部的整体运动，但在这项工作中，我们认为我们的脚趾提供了更大的自由度，可用于互动。为了探索基于脚趾的交互的可行性，我们贡献了 18 名参与者的对照实验结果，评估了五个因素对此类界面的准确性、效率和用户体验的影响。根据研究结果，我们为未来基于脚趾的界面提供设计建议。

AI.tldr: 本文评估脚趾动作作为输入方式的可行性，通过实验分析其准确性、效率及用户体验。
AI.motivation: 在双手被占用的场景下，传统交互方式（如语音）存在噪音干扰和隐私问题，而现有足部交互研究仅关注整体脚部运动，未充分利用脚趾的自由度。
AI.method: 设计受控实验，招募18名参与者，评估五个因素对脚趾交互准确性、效率及用户体验的影响。
AI.result: 实验发现脚趾交互在特定条件下具备较高准确性，但需优化设计以提升效率；用户普遍接受该交互方式但存在学习成本。
AI.conclusion: 脚趾动作可作为新型免手持交互模态，未来设计需平衡自由度与操作复杂度，并提供直观反馈机制。

Whereas previous research only considered the movement of the foot as a whole, in this work, we argue that our toes offer further degrees of freedom that can be leveraged for interaction. To explore the viability of toe-based interaction, we contribute the results of a controlled experiment with 18 participants assessing the impact of five factors on the accuracy, efficiency and user experience of such interfaces. Based on the findings, we provide design recommendations for future toe-based interfaces. 从提购物袋到在公交车上握住把手，在各种情况下，一只手或两只手都会忙碌，从而阻碍了与技术无处不在的交互的愿景。语音命令作为一种流行的免提替代方案，与环境噪音和隐私问题作斗争。作为一种替代方法，研究探索了不同身体部位（例如头部、手臂）的运动作为输入方式，事实证明基于脚的技术特别适合免提交互。虽然之前的研究只考虑了脚部的整体运动，但在这项工作中，我们认为我们的脚趾提供了更大的自由度，可用于互动。为了探索基于脚趾的交互的可行性，我们贡献了 18 名参与者的对照实验结果，评估了五个因素对此类界面的准确性、效率和用户体验的影响。根据研究结果，我们为未来基于脚趾的界面提供设计建议。 本文评估脚趾动作作为输入方式的可行性，通过实验分析其准确性、效率及用户体验。 Florian Müller,Daniel Schmitt,Andrii Matviienko,Dominik Schön,Sebastian Günther,Thomas Kosch,Martin Schmitz cs.HC

authors_text: Haoran Xu,Li Jiang,Jianxiong Li,Zhuoran Yang,Zhaoran Wang,Victor Wai Kin Chan,Xianyuan Zhan
title: Offline RL with No OOD Actions: In-Sample Learning via Implicit Value Regularization
title_zh: 无 OOD 操作的离线强化学习：通过隐式值正则化进行样本内学习
comment: ICLR 2023 notable top 5%
comments: ICLR 2023 notable top 5%
abstract: Most offline reinforcement learning (RL) methods suffer from the trade-off between improving the policy to surpass the behavior policy and constraining the policy to limit the deviation from the behavior policy as computing $Q$-values using out-of-distribution (OOD) actions will suffer from errors due to distributional shift. The recently proposed \textit{In-sample Learning} paradigm (i.e., IQL), which improves the policy by quantile regression using only data samples, shows great promise because it learns an optimal policy without querying the value function of any unseen actions. However, it remains unclear how this type of method handles the distributional shift in learning the value function. In this work, we make a key finding that the in-sample learning paradigm arises under the \textit{Implicit Value Regularization} (IVR) framework. This gives a deeper understanding of why the in-sample learning paradigm works, i.e., it applies implicit value regularization to the policy. Based on the IVR framework, we further propose two practical algorithms, Sparse $Q$-learning (SQL) and Exponential $Q$-learning (EQL), which adopt the same value regularization used in existing works, but in a complete in-sample manner. Compared with IQL, we find that our algorithms introduce sparsity in learning the value function, making them more robust in noisy data regimes. We also verify the effectiveness of SQL and EQL on D4RL benchmark datasets and show the benefits of in-sample learning by comparing them with CQL in small data regimes.
summary: Most offline reinforcement learning (RL) methods suffer from the trade-off between improving the policy to surpass the behavior policy and constraining the policy to limit the deviation from the behavior policy as computing $Q$-values using out-of-distribution (OOD) actions will suffer from errors due to distributional shift. The recently proposed \textit{In-sample Learning} paradigm (i.e., IQL), which improves the policy by quantile regression using only data samples, shows great promise because it learns an optimal policy without querying the value function of any unseen actions. However, it remains unclear how this type of method handles the distributional shift in learning the value function. In this work, we make a key finding that the in-sample learning paradigm arises under the \textit{Implicit Value Regularization} (IVR) framework. This gives a deeper understanding of why the in-sample learning paradigm works, i.e., it applies implicit value regularization to the policy. Based on the IVR framework, we further propose two practical algorithms, Sparse $Q$-learning (SQL) and Exponential $Q$-learning (EQL), which adopt the same value regularization used in existing works, but in a complete in-sample manner. Compared with IQL, we find that our algorithms introduce sparsity in learning the value function, making them more robust in noisy data regimes. We also verify the effectiveness of SQL and EQL on D4RL benchmark datasets and show the benefits of in-sample learning by comparing them with CQL in small data regimes.
abstract_zh: 大多数离线强化学习 (RL) 方法都面临着改进策略以超越行为策略和约束策略以限制与行为策略的偏差之间的权衡，因为使用分布外 (OOD) 操作计算 $Q$ 值会因分布偏移而出现错误。最近提出的 \textit{样本内学习} 范式（即 IQL）仅使用数据样本通过分位数回归来改进策略，显示出巨大的前景，因为它无需查询任何未见动作的价值函数即可学习最优策略。然而，目前尚不清楚这种方法如何处理学习价值函数的分布变化。在这项工作中，我们做出了一个重要发现，即样本内学习范式出现在\textit{隐式值正则化}（IVR）框架下。这可以更深入地理解样本内学习范式为何有效，即将隐式值正则化应用于策略。基于 IVR 框架，我们进一步提出了两种实用算法，稀疏 $Q$-learning (SQL) 和指数 $Q$-learning (EQL)，它们采用与现有工作中使用的相同的值正则化，但采用完全样本内的方式。与 IQL 相比，我们发现我们的算法在学习价值函数时引入了稀疏性，使它们在噪声数据环境中更加稳健。我们还在 D4RL 基准数据集上验证了 SQL 和 EQL 的有效性，并通过将它们与小数据体系中的 CQL 进行比较来展示样本内学习的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需使用分布外（OOD）动作的离线强化学习方法，通过隐式价值正则化框架实现完全在样本内的学习。
AI.motivation: 现有离线强化学习方法在提升策略与限制策略偏离行为策略之间存在权衡，而基于样本内学习的方法（如IQL）在处理价值函数分布偏移问题时的机制尚不明确。
AI.method: 本文提出隐式价值正则化（IVR）框架，揭示样本内学习的本质，并在此基础上设计了稀疏Q学习（SQL）和指数Q学习（EQL）算法，通过完全在样本内的方式应用价值正则化。
AI.result: 实验表明，SQL和EQL在噪声数据环境下更具鲁棒性，在D4RL基准数据集上优于CQL，尤其在小数据场景下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 样本内学习结合隐式价值正则化能有效解决离线强化学习中的分布偏移问题，所提算法在数据效率和鲁棒性方面具有显著优势。

authors_text: Yunfan Zhang,Hao Wang,Guosheng Lin,Vun Chan Hua Nicholas,Zhiqi Shen,Chunyan Miao
title: StarNet: Style-Aware 3D Point Cloud Generation
title_zh: StarNet：风格感知 3D 点云生成
abstract: This paper investigates an open research task of reconstructing and generating 3D point clouds. Most existing works of 3D generative models directly take the Gaussian prior as input for the decoder to generate 3D point clouds, which fail to learn disentangled latent codes, leading noisy interpolated results. Most of the GAN-based models fail to discriminate the local geometries, resulting in the point clouds generated not evenly distributed at the object surface, hence degrading the point cloud generation quality. Moreover, prevailing methods adopt computation-intensive frameworks, such as flow-based models and Markov chains, which take plenty of time and resources in the training phase. To resolve these limitations, this paper proposes a unified style-aware network architecture combining both point-wise distance loss and adversarial loss, StarNet which is able to reconstruct and generate high-fidelity and even 3D point clouds using a mapping network that can effectively disentangle the Gaussian prior from input's high-level attributes in the mapped latent space to generate realistic interpolated objects. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework achieves comparable state-of-the-art performance on various metrics in the point cloud reconstruction and generation tasks, but is more lightweight in model size, requires much fewer parameters and less time for model training.
summary: This paper investigates an open research task of reconstructing and generating 3D point clouds. Most existing works of 3D generative models directly take the Gaussian prior as input for the decoder to generate 3D point clouds, which fail to learn disentangled latent codes, leading noisy interpolated results. Most of the GAN-based models fail to discriminate the local geometries, resulting in the point clouds generated not evenly distributed at the object surface, hence degrading the point cloud generation quality. Moreover, prevailing methods adopt computation-intensive frameworks, such as flow-based models and Markov chains, which take plenty of time and resources in the training phase. To resolve these limitations, this paper proposes a unified style-aware network architecture combining both point-wise distance loss and adversarial loss, StarNet which is able to reconstruct and generate high-fidelity and even 3D point clouds using a mapping network that can effectively disentangle the Gaussian prior from input's high-level attributes in the mapped latent space to generate realistic interpolated objects. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework achieves comparable state-of-the-art performance on various metrics in the point cloud reconstruction and generation tasks, but is more lightweight in model size, requires much fewer parameters and less time for model training.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了重建和生成 3D 点云的开放研究任务。大多数现有的 3D 生成模型工作直接采用高斯先验作为解码器的输入来生成 3D 点云，这无法学习解开的潜在代码，从而导致有噪声的插值结果。大多数基于 GAN 的模型无法区分局部几何形状，导致生成的点云在物体表面分布不均匀，从而降低了点云生成质量。此外，流行的方法采用计算密集型框架，例如基于流的模型和马尔可夫链，这在训练阶段需要大量的时间和资源。为了解决这些限制，本文提出了一种结合了逐点距离损失和对抗性损失的统一风格感知网络架构，StarNet，它能够使用映射网络重建和生成高保真甚至 3D 点云，该映射网络可以有效地将高斯先验与映射潜在空间中输入的高级属性分开，以生成逼真的插值对象。实验结果表明，我们的框架在点云重建和生成任务中的各种指标上实现了可比的最先进性能，但模型大小更轻，需要更少的参数和更少的模型训练时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为StarNet的风格感知3D点云生成网络，旨在解决现有方法在重建和生成高质量3D点云时存在的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有3D生成模型存在潜在代码无法解耦、局部几何区分度低以及计算复杂度高的问题，导致生成结果质量差且训练效率低。
AI.method: 设计结合点对点距离损失和对抗损失的统一网络架构，通过映射网络在潜在空间中分离高斯先验与输入的高层属性，实现高质量点云生成。
AI.result: 在多个指标上达到与现有方法相当的先进水平，同时模型参数更少、训练时间更短。
AI.conclusion: StarNet有效解决了3D点云生成中的关键问题，在保证质量的同时显著提升了计算效率。

Moreover, prevailing methods adopt computation-intensive frameworks, such as flow-based models and Markov chains, which take plenty of time and resources in the training phase. To resolve these limitations, this paper proposes a unified style-aware network architecture combining both point-wise distance loss and adversarial loss, StarNet which is able to reconstruct and generate high-fidelity and even 3D point clouds using a mapping network that can effectively disentangle the Gaussian prior from input's high-level attributes in the mapped latent space to generate realistic interpolated objects. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework achieves comparable state-of-the-art performance on various metrics in the point cloud reconstruction and generation tasks, but is more lightweight in model size, requires much fewer parameters and less time for model training. 本文研究了重建和生成 3D 点云的开放研究任务。大多数现有的 3D 生成模型工作直接采用高斯先验作为解码器的输入来生成 3D 点云，这无法学习解开的潜在代码，从而导致有噪声的插值结果。大多数基于 GAN 的模型无法区分局部几何形状，导致生成的点云在物体表面分布不均匀，从而降低了点云生成质量。此外，流行的方法采用计算密集型框架，例如基于流的模型和马尔可夫链，这在训练阶段需要大量的时间和资源。为了解决这些限制，本文提出了一种结合了逐点距离损失和对抗性损失的统一风格感知网络架构，StarNet，它能够使用映射网络重建和生成高保真甚至 3D 点云，该映射网络可以有效地将高斯先验与映射潜在空间中输入的高级属性分开，以生成逼真的插值对象。实验结果表明，我们的框架在点云重建和生成任务中的各种指标上实现了可比的最先进性能，但模型大小更轻，需要更少的参数和更少的模型训练时间。 本文提出了一种名为StarNet的风格感知3D点云生成网络，旨在解决现有方法在重建和生成高质量3D点云时存在的问题。 Yunfan Zhang,Hao Wang,Guosheng Lin,Vun Chan Hua Nicholas,Zhiqi Shen,Chunyan Miao cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Jayakant Kumar,Himanshu,Harikumar Kandath,Pooja Agrawal
title: Vision based UAV Navigation through Narrow Passages
title_zh: 基于视觉的无人机狭窄通道导航
comment: Currently under review in IEEE CASE 2023
comments: Currently under review in IEEE CASE 2023
abstract: This research paper presents a novel approach for navigating a micro UAV (Unmanned Aerial Vehicle) through narrow passages using only its onboard camera feed and a PID control system. The proposed method uses edge detection and homography techniques to extract the key features of the passage from the camera feed and then employs a tuned PID controller to guide the UAV through and out of the passage while avoiding collisions with the walls. To evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed approach, a series of experiments were conducted using a micro-UAV navigating in and out of a custom-built test environment (constrained rectangular box). The results demonstrate that the system is able to successfully guide the UAV through the passages while avoiding collisions with the walls.
summary: This research paper presents a novel approach for navigating a micro UAV (Unmanned Aerial Vehicle) through narrow passages using only its onboard camera feed and a PID control system. The proposed method uses edge detection and homography techniques to extract the key features of the passage from the camera feed and then employs a tuned PID controller to guide the UAV through and out of the passage while avoiding collisions with the walls. To evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed approach, a series of experiments were conducted using a micro-UAV navigating in and out of a custom-built test environment (constrained rectangular box). The results demonstrate that the system is able to successfully guide the UAV through the passages while avoiding collisions with the walls.
abstract_zh: 本研究论文提出了一种仅使用机载摄像头和 PID 控制系统即可在狭窄通道中导航微型无人机的新颖方法。该方法使用边缘检测和单应性技术从摄像机输入中提取通道的关键特征，然后采用调谐 PID 控制器引导无人机进出通道，同时避免与墙壁碰撞。为了评估所提出方法的有效性，使用微型无人机在定制测试环境（约束矩形框）中进出进行了一系列实验。结果表明，该系统能够成功引导无人机通过通道，同时避免与墙壁碰撞。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉的微型无人机导航方法，通过 onboard 相机和 PID 控制系统实现狭窄通道内的自主导航。
AI.motivation: 传统无人机导航依赖 GPS 等外部设备，在狭窄通道等复杂环境中存在局限性，需开发无需外部传感器的自主导航方案。
AI.method: 结合边缘检测与单应性变换提取通道特征，通过调校后的 PID 控制器实现无人机姿态控制与避障。
AI.result: 实验表明系统可成功引导微型无人机通过定制的狭长矩形通道，全程未发生碰撞。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了纯视觉与 PID 控制结合在狭窄空间无人机导航中的可行性，为自主飞行提供了新思路。

authors_text: Florian Müller,Arantxa Ye,Dominik Schön,Julian Rasch
title: UndoPort: Exploring the Influence of Undo-Actions for Locomotion in Virtual Reality on the Efficiency, Spatial Understanding and User Experience
title_zh: UndoPort：探索虚拟现实中运动的撤消操作对效率、空间理解和用户体验的影响
comment: To appear in Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI 23), April 23-28, 2023, Hamburg, Germany. ACM, New York, NY, USA, 15 pages
comments: To appear in Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI 23), April 23-28, 2023, Hamburg, Germany. ACM, New York, NY, USA, 15 pages
abstract: When we get lost in Virtual Reality (VR) or want to return to a previous location, we use the same methods of locomotion for the way back as for the way forward. This is time-consuming and requires additional physical orientation changes, increasing the risk of getting tangled in the headsets' cables. In this paper, we propose the use of undo actions to revert locomotion steps in VR. We explore eight different variations of undo actions as extensions of point\&teleport, based on the possibility to undo position and orientation changes together with two different visualizations of the undo step (discrete and continuous). We contribute the results of a controlled experiment with 24 participants investigating the efficiency and orientation of the undo techniques in a radial maze task. We found that the combination of position and orientation undo together with a discrete visualization resulted in the highest efficiency without increasing orientation errors.
summary: When we get lost in Virtual Reality (VR) or want to return to a previous location, we use the same methods of locomotion for the way back as for the way forward. This is time-consuming and requires additional physical orientation changes, increasing the risk of getting tangled in the headsets' cables. In this paper, we propose the use of undo actions to revert locomotion steps in VR. We explore eight different variations of undo actions as extensions of point\&teleport, based on the possibility to undo position and orientation changes together with two different visualizations of the undo step (discrete and continuous). We contribute the results of a controlled experiment with 24 participants investigating the efficiency and orientation of the undo techniques in a radial maze task. We found that the combination of position and orientation undo together with a discrete visualization resulted in the highest efficiency without increasing orientation errors.
abstract_zh: 当我们在虚拟现实 (VR) 中迷路或想要返回之前的位置时，我们会使用与前进相同的移动方法来返回。这非常耗时，并且需要额外的物理方向改变，从而增加了耳机电缆缠结的风险。在本文中，我们建议使用撤消操作来恢复 VR 中的运动步骤。我们基于撤消位置和方向变化的可能性以及撤消步骤的两种不同可视化（离散和连续），探索了撤消操作的八种不同变体作为点传送的扩展。我们提供了 24 名参与者参与的对照实验的结果，该实验调查了径向迷宫任务中撤消技术的效率和方向。我们发现，将位置和方向撤消与离散可视化相结合可实现最高效率，而不会增加方向误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UndoPort方法，通过撤销动作优化虚拟现实中的移动效率、空间认知和用户体验。
AI.motivation: 传统VR移动方式返回路径时效率低下且易导致身体方向调整困难，存在电缆缠绕风险，需更高效的回退机制。
AI.method: 设计8种基于点传送的撤销动作变体，结合位置/方向撤销及离散/连续可视化，通过24人参与的径向迷宫任务实验验证效果。
AI.result: 位置与方向联合撤销搭配离散可视化方案在提升效率的同时未增加方向误差，表现最优。
AI.conclusion: UndoPort通过引入撤销机制有效优化了VR空间导航效率，为交互设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Xiangyang Li,Zihan Wang,Jiahao Yang,Yaowei Wang,Shuqiang Jiang
title: KERM: Knowledge Enhanced Reasoning for Vision-and-Language Navigation
title_zh: KERM：视觉和语言导航的知识增强推理
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023. The code is available at https://github.com/XiangyangLi20/KERM
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023. The code is available at https://github.com/XiangyangLi20/KERM
abstract: Vision-and-language navigation (VLN) is the task to enable an embodied agent to navigate to a remote location following the natural language instruction in real scenes. Most of the previous approaches utilize the entire features or object-centric features to represent navigable candidates. However, these representations are not efficient enough for an agent to perform actions to arrive the target location. As knowledge provides crucial information which is complementary to visible content, in this paper, we propose a Knowledge Enhanced Reasoning Model (KERM) to leverage knowledge to improve agent navigation ability. Specifically, we first retrieve facts (i.e., knowledge described by language descriptions) for the navigation views based on local regions from the constructed knowledge base. The retrieved facts range from properties of a single object (e.g., color, shape) to relationships between objects (e.g., action, spatial position), providing crucial information for VLN. We further present the KERM which contains the purification, fact-aware interaction, and instruction-guided aggregation modules to integrate visual, history, instruction, and fact features. The proposed KERM can automatically select and gather crucial and relevant cues, obtaining more accurate action prediction. Experimental results on the REVERIE, R2R, and SOON datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: Vision-and-language navigation (VLN) is the task to enable an embodied agent to navigate to a remote location following the natural language instruction in real scenes. Most of the previous approaches utilize the entire features or object-centric features to represent navigable candidates. However, these representations are not efficient enough for an agent to perform actions to arrive the target location. As knowledge provides crucial information which is complementary to visible content, in this paper, we propose a Knowledge Enhanced Reasoning Model (KERM) to leverage knowledge to improve agent navigation ability. Specifically, we first retrieve facts (i.e., knowledge described by language descriptions) for the navigation views based on local regions from the constructed knowledge base. The retrieved facts range from properties of a single object (e.g., color, shape) to relationships between objects (e.g., action, spatial position), providing crucial information for VLN. We further present the KERM which contains the purification, fact-aware interaction, and instruction-guided aggregation modules to integrate visual, history, instruction, and fact features. The proposed KERM can automatically select and gather crucial and relevant cues, obtaining more accurate action prediction. Experimental results on the REVERIE, R2R, and SOON datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 视觉和语言导航（VLN）是使实体代理能够按照真实场景中的自然语言指令导航到远程位置的任务。 Most of the previous approaches utilize the entire features or object-centric features to represent navigable candidates. However, these representations are not efficient enough for an agent to perform actions to arrive the target location.由于知识提供了与可见内容互补的关键信息，因此在本文中，我们提出了一种知识增强推理模型（KERM）来利用知识来提高代理导航能力。具体来说，我们首先从构建的知识库中基于局部区域检索导航视图的事实（即由语言描述描述的知识）。检索到的事实范围从单个对象的属性（例如颜色、形状）到对象之间的关系（例如动作、空间位置），为 VLN 提供关键信息。我们进一步提出了 KERM，其中包含净化、事实感知交互和指令引导聚合模块，以集成视觉、历史、指令和事实特征。 The proposed KERM can automatically select and gather crucial and relevant cues, obtaining more accurate action prediction. Experimental results on the REVERIE, R2R, and SOON datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种知识增强推理模型（KERM），通过整合视觉、语言指令和外部知识库中的事实信息，提升视觉与语言导航任务的效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖视觉特征或物体中心特征表示导航候选区域，但难以高效捕捉关键信息；而知识库中的事实（如物体属性、空间关系）能提供互补信息，可增强导航决策能力。
AI.method: 构建包含净化模块、事实感知交互模块和指令引导聚合模块的KERM模型，从知识库检索导航场景的局部区域事实，并融合视觉、历史轨迹、指令和知识特征进行动作预测。
AI.result: 在REVERIE、R2R和SOON数据集上的实验表明，KERM在导航成功率和路径质量指标上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 知识增强的推理框架能有效提升视觉与语言导航性能，为未来多模态导航任务提供了结合外部知识的新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种知识增强推理模型（KERM），通过整合视觉、语言指令和外部知识库中的事实信息，提升视觉与语言导航任务的效率和准确性。
ai_content.motivation: 传统方法依赖视觉特征或物体中心特征表示导航候选区域，但难以高效捕捉关键信息；而知识库中的事实（如物体属性、空间关系）能提供互补信息，可增强导航决策能力。
ai_content.method: 构建包含净化模块、事实感知交互模块和指令引导聚合模块的KERM模型，从知识库检索导航场景的局部区域事实，并融合视觉、历史轨迹、指令和知识特征进行动作预测。
ai_content.result: 在REVERIE、R2R和SOON数据集上的实验表明，KERM在导航成功率和路径质量指标上均优于现有方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 知识增强的推理框架能有效提升视觉与语言导航性能，为未来多模态导航任务提供了结合外部知识的新思路。

search_text: KERM: Knowledge Enhanced Reasoning for Vision-and-Language Navigation KERM：视觉和语言导航的知识增强推理 Vision-and-language navigation (VLN) is the task to enable an embodied agent to navigate to a remote location following the natural language instruction in real scenes. Most of the previous approaches utilize the entire features or object-centric features to represent navigable candidates. However, these representations are not efficient enough for an agent to perform actions to arrive the target location. As knowledge provides crucial information which is complementary to visible content, in this paper, we propose a Knowledge Enhanced Reasoning Model (KERM) to leverage knowledge to improve agent navigation ability. Specifically, we first retrieve facts (i.e., knowledge described by language descriptions) for the navigation views based on local regions from the constructed knowledge base. The retrieved facts range from properties of a single object (e.g., color, shape) to relationships between objects (e.g., action, spatial position), providing crucial information for VLN. We further present the KERM which contains the purification, fact-aware interaction, and instruction-guided aggregation modules to integrate visual, history, instruction, and fact features. The proposed KERM can automatically select and gather crucial and relevant cues, obtaining more accurate action prediction. Experimental results on the REVERIE, R2R, and SOON datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. 视觉和语言导航（VLN）是使实体代理能够按照真实场景中的自然语言指令导航到远程位置的任务。 Most of the previous approaches utilize the entire features or object-centric features to represent navigable candidates. However, these representations are not efficient enough for an agent to perform actions to arrive the target location.由于知识提供了与可见内容互补的关键信息，因此在本文中，我们提出了一种知识增强推理模型（KERM）来利用知识来提高代理导航能力。具体来说，我们首先从构建的知识库中基于局部区域检索导航视图的事实（即由语言描述描述的知识）。检索到的事实范围从单个对象的属性（例如颜色、形状）到对象之间的关系（例如动作、空间位置），为 VLN 提供关键信息。我们进一步提出了 KERM，其中包含净化、事实感知交互和指令引导聚合模块，以集成视觉、历史、指令和事实特征。 The proposed KERM can automatically select and gather crucial and relevant cues, obtaining more accurate action prediction. Experimental results on the REVERIE, R2R, and SOON datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. 本文提出了一种知识增强推理模型（KERM），通过整合视觉、语言指令和外部知识库中的事实信息，提升视觉与语言导航任务的效率和准确性。 Xiangyang Li,Zihan Wang,Jiahao Yang,Yaowei Wang,Shuqiang Jiang cs.CV

authors_text: Yuval Becker,Raz Z. Nossek,Tomer Peleg
title: SDAT: Sub-Dataset Alternation Training for Improved Image Demosaicing
title_zh: SDAT：用于改进图像去马赛克的子数据集交替训练
abstract: Image demosaicing is an important step in the image processing pipeline for digital cameras. In data centric approaches, such as deep learning, the distribution of the dataset used for training can impose a bias on the networks' outcome. For example, in natural images most patches are smooth, and high-content patches are much rarer. This can lead to a bias in the performance of demosaicing algorithms. Most deep learning approaches address this challenge by utilizing specific losses or designing special network architectures. We propose a novel approach, SDAT, Sub-Dataset Alternation Training, that tackles the problem from a training protocol perspective. SDAT is comprised of two essential phases. In the initial phase, we employ a method to create sub-datasets from the entire dataset, each inducing a distinct bias. The subsequent phase involves an alternating training process, which uses the derived sub-datasets in addition to training also on the entire dataset. SDAT can be applied regardless of the chosen architecture as demonstrated by various experiments we conducted for the demosaicing task. The experiments are performed across a range of architecture sizes and types, namely CNNs and transformers. We show improved performance in all cases. We are also able to achieve state-of-the-art results on three highly popular image demosaicing benchmarks.
summary: Image demosaicing is an important step in the image processing pipeline for digital cameras. In data centric approaches, such as deep learning, the distribution of the dataset used for training can impose a bias on the networks' outcome. For example, in natural images most patches are smooth, and high-content patches are much rarer. This can lead to a bias in the performance of demosaicing algorithms. Most deep learning approaches address this challenge by utilizing specific losses or designing special network architectures. We propose a novel approach, SDAT, Sub-Dataset Alternation Training, that tackles the problem from a training protocol perspective. SDAT is comprised of two essential phases. In the initial phase, we employ a method to create sub-datasets from the entire dataset, each inducing a distinct bias. The subsequent phase involves an alternating training process, which uses the derived sub-datasets in addition to training also on the entire dataset. SDAT can be applied regardless of the chosen architecture as demonstrated by various experiments we conducted for the demosaicing task. The experiments are performed across a range of architecture sizes and types, namely CNNs and transformers. We show improved performance in all cases. We are also able to achieve state-of-the-art results on three highly popular image demosaicing benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 图像去马赛克是数码相机图像处理流程中的重要步骤。在以数据为中心的方法中，例如深度学习，用于训练的数据集的分布可能会对网络的结果产生偏差。例如，在自然图像中，大多数补丁都是平滑的，而高内容补丁则要少得多。这可能会导致去马赛克算法的性能偏差。大多数深度学习方法通​​过利用特定损失或设计特殊网络架构来解决这一挑战。我们提出了一种新方法，SDAT，子数据集交替训练，从训练协议的角度解决这个问题。 SDAT 由两个基本阶段组成。在初始阶段，我们采用一种方法从整个数据集创建子数据集，每个子​​数据集都会产生不同的偏差。后续阶段涉及交替训练过程，除了对整个数据集进行训练之外，还使用派生的子数据集。正如我们为去马赛克任务进行的各种实验所证明的那样，无论选择何种架构，都可以应用 SDAT。这些实验是在一系列架构尺寸和类型（即 CNN 和 Transformer）上进行的。我们在所有情况下都表现出了改进的性能。我们还能够在三个非常流行的图像去马赛克基准上取得最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SDAT（子数据集交替训练）的新方法，用于改进图像去马赛克任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习方法在图像去马赛克任务中因训练数据集分布偏差（如自然图像中平滑区域占比高）导致算法性能受限，现有方法多依赖特定损失函数或网络结构，未能从训练策略层面系统解决偏差问题。
AI.method: SDAT包含两个阶段：首先从完整数据集中生成具有不同偏差的子数据集；随后采用交替训练机制，在完整数据集与子数据集间交替训练，且该方法适用于CNN和Transformer等不同架构。
AI.result: 在多种网络架构和规模下均取得性能提升，并在三个主流去马赛克基准测试中达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: SDAT通过创新训练协议有效缓解了数据集偏差问题，为图像去马赛克任务提供了通用且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Shan Ning,Longtian Qiu,Yongfei Liu,Xuming He
title: HOICLIP: Efficient Knowledge Transfer for HOI Detection with Vision-Language Models
title_zh: HOICLIP：使用视觉语言模型进行 HOI 检测的高效知识转移
comment: CVPR 2023.Open sourced, Code and Model Available
comments: CVPR 2023.Open sourced, Code and Model Available
abstract: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection aims to localize human-object pairs and recognize their interactions. Recently, Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) has shown great potential in providing interaction prior for HOI detectors via knowledge distillation. However, such approaches often rely on large-scale training data and suffer from inferior performance under few/zero-shot scenarios. In this paper, we propose a novel HOI detection framework that efficiently extracts prior knowledge from CLIP and achieves better generalization. In detail, we first introduce a novel interaction decoder to extract informative regions in the visual feature map of CLIP via a cross-attention mechanism, which is then fused with the detection backbone by a knowledge integration block for more accurate human-object pair detection. In addition, prior knowledge in CLIP text encoder is leveraged to generate a classifier by embedding HOI descriptions. To distinguish fine-grained interactions, we build a verb classifier from training data via visual semantic arithmetic and a lightweight verb representation adapter. Furthermore, we propose a training-free enhancement to exploit global HOI predictions from CLIP. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms the state of the art by a large margin on various settings, e.g. +4.04 mAP on HICO-Det. The source code is available in https://github.com/Artanic30/HOICLIP.
summary: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection aims to localize human-object pairs and recognize their interactions. Recently, Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) has shown great potential in providing interaction prior for HOI detectors via knowledge distillation. However, such approaches often rely on large-scale training data and suffer from inferior performance under few/zero-shot scenarios. In this paper, we propose a novel HOI detection framework that efficiently extracts prior knowledge from CLIP and achieves better generalization. In detail, we first introduce a novel interaction decoder to extract informative regions in the visual feature map of CLIP via a cross-attention mechanism, which is then fused with the detection backbone by a knowledge integration block for more accurate human-object pair detection. In addition, prior knowledge in CLIP text encoder is leveraged to generate a classifier by embedding HOI descriptions. To distinguish fine-grained interactions, we build a verb classifier from training data via visual semantic arithmetic and a lightweight verb representation adapter. Furthermore, we propose a training-free enhancement to exploit global HOI predictions from CLIP. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms the state of the art by a large margin on various settings, e.g. +4.04 mAP on HICO-Det. The source code is available in https://github.com/Artanic30/HOICLIP.
abstract_zh: 人与物体交互（HOI）检测旨在定位人与物体对并识别他们的交互。最近，对比语言-图像预训练（CLIP）在通过知识蒸馏为 HOI 检测器提供交互之前显示出巨大的潜力。然而，此类方法通常依赖于大规模训练数据，并且在少量/零样本场景下性能较差。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 HOI 检测框架，可以有效地从 CLIP 中提取先验知识并实现更好的泛化。具体来说，我们首先引入一种新颖的交互解码器，通过交叉注意机制提取 CLIP 视觉特征图中的信息区域，然后通过知识集成块将其与检测主干融合，以实现更准确的人-物体对检测。此外，利用 CLIP 文本编码器中的先验知识，通过嵌入 HOI 描述来生成分类器。为了区分细粒度的交互，我们通过视觉语义算法和轻量级动词表示适配器从训练数据构建动词分类器。此外，我们提出了一种免训练增强功能，以利用 CLIP 的全局 HOI 预测。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在各种设置上都大大优于现有技术，例如HICO-Det 上 +4.04 mAP。源代码可在 https://github.com/Artanic30/HOICLIP 中获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HOICLIP框架，通过高效利用CLIP模型的先验知识提升人类-物体交互检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CLIP的知识蒸馏方法依赖大规模数据且在少样本/零样本场景下表现不佳，需更高效的通用性解决方案。
AI.method: 设计交互解码器通过交叉注意力机制提取CLIP视觉特征，结合知识融合模块优化检测；利用CLIP文本编码器生成分类器，并通过视觉语义运算构建轻量动词表示适配器，提出无需训练的全局预测增强方法。
AI.result: 在HICO-Det数据集上mAP提升4.04，多项实验表明优于现有最优方法。
AI.conclusion: HOICLIP通过高效知识迁移显著提升了HOI检测的泛化能力，为少样本场景提供有效解决方案。

search_text: HOICLIP: Efficient Knowledge Transfer for HOI Detection with Vision-Language Models HOICLIP：使用视觉语言模型进行 HOI 检测的高效知识转移 Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection aims to localize human-object pairs and recognize their interactions. Recently, Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) has shown great potential in providing interaction prior for HOI detectors via knowledge distillation. However, such approaches often rely on large-scale training data and suffer from inferior performance under few/zero-shot scenarios. In this paper, we propose a novel HOI detection framework that efficiently extracts prior knowledge from CLIP and achieves better generalization. In detail, we first introduce a novel interaction decoder to extract informative regions in the visual feature map of CLIP via a cross-attention mechanism, which is then fused with the detection backbone by a knowledge integration block for more accurate human-object pair detection. In addition, prior knowledge in CLIP text encoder is leveraged to generate a classifier by embedding HOI descriptions. To distinguish fine-grained interactions, we build a verb classifier from training data via visual semantic arithmetic and a lightweight verb representation adapter. Furthermore, we propose a training-free enhancement to exploit global HOI predictions from CLIP. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms the state of the art by a large margin on various settings, e.g. +4.04 mAP on HICO-Det. The source code is available in https://github.com/Artanic30/HOICLIP. 人与物体交互（HOI）检测旨在定位人与物体对并识别他们的交互。最近，对比语言-图像预训练（CLIP）在通过知识蒸馏为 HOI 检测器提供交互之前显示出巨大的潜力。然而，此类方法通常依赖于大规模训练数据，并且在少量/零样本场景下性能较差。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 HOI 检测框架，可以有效地从 CLIP 中提取先验知识并实现更好的泛化。具体来说，我们首先引入一种新颖的交互解码器，通过交叉注意机制提取 CLIP 视觉特征图中的信息区域，然后通过知识集成块将其与检测主干融合，以实现更准确的人-物体对检测。此外，利用 CLIP 文本编码器中的先验知识，通过嵌入 HOI 描述来生成分类器。为了区分细粒度的交互，我们通过视觉语义算法和轻量级动词表示适配器从训练数据构建动词分类器。此外，我们提出了一种免训练增强功能，以利用 CLIP 的全局 HOI 预测。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在各种设置上都大大优于现有技术，例如HICO-Det 上 +4.04 mAP。源代码可在 https://github.com/Artanic30/HOICLIP 中获取。 本文提出HOICLIP框架，通过高效利用CLIP模型的先验知识提升人类-物体交互检测的性能。 Shan Ning,Longtian Qiu,Yongfei Liu,Xuming He cs.CV

authors_text: Nick Heppert,Muhammad Zubair Irshad,Sergey Zakharov,Katherine Liu,Rares Andrei Ambrus,Jeannette Bohg,Abhinav Valada,Thomas Kollar
title: CARTO: Category and Joint Agnostic Reconstruction of ARTiculated Objects
title_zh: CARTO：铰接对象的类别和联合不可知重建
comment: 20 pages, 11 figures, accepted at CVPR 2023
comments: 20 pages, 11 figures, accepted at CVPR 2023
abstract: We present CARTO, a novel approach for reconstructing multiple articulated objects from a single stereo RGB observation. We use implicit object-centric representations and learn a single geometry and articulation decoder for multiple object categories. Despite training on multiple categories, our decoder achieves a comparable reconstruction accuracy to methods that train bespoke decoders separately for each category. Combined with our stereo image encoder we infer the 3D shape, 6D pose, size, joint type, and the joint state of multiple unknown objects in a single forward pass. Our method achieves a 20.4% absolute improvement in mAP 3D IOU50 for novel instances when compared to a two-stage pipeline. Inference time is fast and can run on a NVIDIA TITAN XP GPU at 1 HZ for eight or less objects present. While only trained on simulated data, CARTO transfers to real-world object instances. Code and evaluation data is available at: http://carto.cs.uni-freiburg.de
summary: We present CARTO, a novel approach for reconstructing multiple articulated objects from a single stereo RGB observation. We use implicit object-centric representations and learn a single geometry and articulation decoder for multiple object categories. Despite training on multiple categories, our decoder achieves a comparable reconstruction accuracy to methods that train bespoke decoders separately for each category. Combined with our stereo image encoder we infer the 3D shape, 6D pose, size, joint type, and the joint state of multiple unknown objects in a single forward pass. Our method achieves a 20.4% absolute improvement in mAP 3D IOU50 for novel instances when compared to a two-stage pipeline. Inference time is fast and can run on a NVIDIA TITAN XP GPU at 1 HZ for eight or less objects present. While only trained on simulated data, CARTO transfers to real-world object instances. Code and evaluation data is available at: http://carto.cs.uni-freiburg.de
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 CARTO，一种从单个立体 RGB 观察中重建多个铰接物体的新颖方法。我们使用隐式的以对象为中心的表示，并为多个对象类别学习单个几何和关节解码器。尽管对多个类别进行了训练，我们的解码器仍实现了与为每个类别单独训练定制解码器的方法相当的重建精度。结合我们的立体图像编码器，我们在一次前向传递中推断出多个未知对象的 3D 形状、6D 姿态、大小、关节类型和关节状态。与两级管道相比，我们的方法在新实例的 mAP 3D IOU50 方面实现了 20.4% 的绝对改进。推理时间很快，并且可以在 NVIDIA TITAN XP GPU 上以 1 HZ 运行，以处理 8 个或更少的对象。虽然仅接受模拟数据的训练，但 CARTO 可以转移到现实世界的对象实例。代码和评估数据可在以下网址获取：http://carto.cs.uni-freiburg.de

AI.tldr: 本文提出CARTO方法，通过单目RGB图像重建多个可变形物体的3D形状、姿态及关节状态，无需针对每个物体类别单独训练模型。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需为不同物体类别单独训练解码器，效率低且难以处理未知物体。本文旨在开发一种通用解码器，实现多类别物体的联合重建与高效推理。
AI.method: 采用隐式物体中心表示，设计统一的几何与关节解码器，结合立体图像编码器，通过单次前向传递同时推断多物体的3D形状、6D姿态、尺寸、关节类型及状态。
AI.result: 在新型实例测试中，mAP 3D IOU50指标较两阶段方法提升20.4%，推理速度达1Hz（处理≤8物体），且模拟训练模型可迁移至真实场景。
AI.conclusion: CARTO验证了通用解码器在多类别可变形物体重建中的有效性，为高效、泛化的物体理解提供了新思路。

We use implicit object-centric representations and learn a single geometry and articulation decoder for multiple object categories. Despite training on multiple categories, our decoder achieves a comparable reconstruction accuracy to methods that train bespoke decoders separately for each category. Combined with our stereo image encoder we infer the 3D shape, 6D pose, size, joint type, and the joint state of multiple unknown objects in a single forward pass. Our method achieves a 20.4% absolute improvement in mAP 3D IOU50 for novel instances when compared to a two-stage pipeline. Inference time is fast and can run on a NVIDIA TITAN XP GPU at 1 HZ for eight or less objects present. While only trained on simulated data, CARTO transfers to real-world object instances. authors_text: Hiromichi Kamata,Yuiko Sakuma,Akio Hayakawa,Masato Ishii,Takuya Narihira
title: Instruct 3D-to-3D: Text Instruction Guided 3D-to-3D conversion
title_zh: 指导 3D 到 3D：文本指导引导 3D 到 3D 转换
comment: Project page: https://sony.github.io/Instruct3Dto3D-doc/
comments: Project page: https://sony.github.io/Instruct3Dto3D-doc/
abstract: We propose a high-quality 3D-to-3D conversion method, Instruct 3D-to-3D. Our method is designed for a novel task, which is to convert a given 3D scene to another scene according to text instructions. Instruct 3D-to-3D applies pretrained Image-to-Image diffusion models for 3D-to-3D conversion. This enables the likelihood maximization of each viewpoint image and high-quality 3D generation. In addition, our proposed method explicitly inputs the source 3D scene as a condition, which enhances 3D consistency and controllability of how much of the source 3D scene structure is reflected. We also propose dynamic scaling, which allows the intensity of the geometry transformation to be adjusted. We performed quantitative and qualitative evaluations and showed that our proposed method achieves higher quality 3D-to-3D conversions than baseline methods.
summary: We propose a high-quality 3D-to-3D conversion method, Instruct 3D-to-3D. Our method is designed for a novel task, which is to convert a given 3D scene to another scene according to text instructions. Instruct 3D-to-3D applies pretrained Image-to-Image diffusion models for 3D-to-3D conversion. This enables the likelihood maximization of each viewpoint image and high-quality 3D generation. In addition, our proposed method explicitly inputs the source 3D scene as a condition, which enhances 3D consistency and controllability of how much of the source 3D scene structure is reflected. We also propose dynamic scaling, which allows the intensity of the geometry transformation to be adjusted. We performed quantitative and qualitative evaluations and showed that our proposed method achieves higher quality 3D-to-3D conversions than baseline methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种高质量的 3D 到 3D 转换方法，Instruct 3D-to-3D。我们的方法是为一项新颖的任务而设计的，即根据文本指令将给定的 3D 场景转换为另一个场景。指导 3D 到 3D 应用预训练的图像到图像扩散模型进行 3D 到 3D 转换。这使得每个视点图像的似然最大化和高质量的 3D 生成成为可能。此外，我们提出的方法明确输入源 3D 场景作为条件，这增强了 3D 一致性以及反映源 3D 场景结构的可控性。我们还提出了动态缩放，它允许调整几何变换的强度。我们进行了定量和定性评估，结果表明我们提出的方法比基线方法实现了更高质量的 3D 到 3D 转换。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于文本指令的高质量3D到3D场景转换方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的3D生成方法难以根据文本指令进行精确的3D到3D场景转换，缺乏对源3D场景结构的控制和几何变换强度的调整。
AI.method: 该方法利用预训练的图像到图像扩散模型，并将源3D场景作为条件输入，以提高3D一致性和可控性，同时提出动态缩放技术以调整几何变换强度。
AI.result: 定量和定性评估表明，该方法在3D到3D场景转换任务上优于基线方法，生成质量更高。
AI.conclusion: Instruct 3D-to-3D方法通过结合文本指令和源3D场景条件，实现了高质量且可控的3D到3D场景转换，为相关领域提供了新的研究方向。

authors_text: Rishi Bommasani,Dilara Soylu,Thomas I. Liao,Kathleen A. Creel,Percy Liang
title: Ecosystem Graphs: The Social Footprint of Foundation Models
title_zh: 生态系统图：基础模型的社会足迹
comment: Authored by the Center for Research on Foundation Models (CRFM) at the Stanford Institute for Human-Centered Artificial Intelligence (HAI). Ecosystem Graphs available at https://crfm.stanford.edu/ecosystem-graphs/
comments: Authored by the Center for Research on Foundation Models (CRFM) at the Stanford Institute for Human-Centered Artificial Intelligence (HAI). Ecosystem Graphs available at https://crfm.stanford.edu/ecosystem-graphs/
abstract: Foundation models (e.g. ChatGPT, StableDiffusion) pervasively influence society, warranting immediate social attention. While the models themselves garner much attention, to accurately characterize their impact, we must consider the broader sociotechnical ecosystem. We propose Ecosystem Graphs as a documentation framework to transparently centralize knowledge of this ecosystem. Ecosystem Graphs is composed of assets (datasets, models, applications) linked together by dependencies that indicate technical (e.g. how Bing relies on GPT-4) and social (e.g. how Microsoft relies on OpenAI) relationships. To supplement the graph structure, each asset is further enriched with fine-grained metadata (e.g. the license or training emissions). We document the ecosystem extensively at https://crfm.stanford.edu/ecosystem-graphs/. As of March 16, 2023, we annotate 262 assets (64 datasets, 128 models, 70 applications) from 63 organizations linked by 356 dependencies. We show Ecosystem Graphs functions as a powerful abstraction and interface for achieving the minimum transparency required to address myriad use cases. Therefore, we envision Ecosystem Graphs will be a community-maintained resource that provides value to stakeholders spanning AI researchers, industry professionals, social scientists, auditors and policymakers.

abstract_zh: 基金会模型（例如 ChatGPT、StableDiffusion）普遍影响着社会，值得社会立即关注。虽然模型本身引起了广泛关注，但为了准确描述其影响，我们必须考虑更广泛的社会技术生态系统。我们建议将生态系统图作为文档框架，以透明地集中该生态系统的知识。生态系统图由资产（数据集、模型、应用程序）组成，这些资产通过依赖关系链接在一起，这些依赖关系表明技术（例如 Bing 如何依赖 GPT-4）和社交（例如 Microsoft 如何依赖 OpenAI）关系。为了补充图结构，每个资产都通过细粒度元数据（例如许可证或训练排放）进一步丰富。我们在 https://crfm.stanford.edu/ecosystem-graphs/ 上广泛记录了生态系统。截至 2023 年 3 月 16 日，我们注释了来自 63 个组织的 262 个资产（64 个数据集、128 个模型、70 个应用程序），这些组织由 356 个依赖项链接。我们将生态系统图功能展示为强大的抽象和接口，用于实现解决无数用例所需的最低透明度。因此，我们设想生态系统图将成为社区维护的资源，为人工智能研究人员、行业专业人士、社会科学家、审计师和政策制定者等利益相关者提供价值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'生态系统图'的框架，用于记录基础模型（如ChatGPT、StableDiffusion）的更广泛社会技术生态系统。
AI.motivation: 基础模型对社会影响深远，但现有研究多聚焦模型本身，缺乏对其社会技术生态系统的透明度和系统性分析。
AI.method: 构建由资产（数据集、模型、应用）和依赖关系（技术与社会关联）组成的图结构，并为每个资产添加详细元数据（如许可证、训练碳排放）。
AI.result: 截至2023年3月16日，已标注来自63个组织的262个资产（64个数据集、128个模型、70个应用），通过356个依赖关系连接。
AI.conclusion: 生态系统图作为社区维护的资源，可为AI研究者、行业从业者、政策制定者等提供透明度支持，助力多方利益相关者的决策与监管。

authors_text: Xiangyun Meng,Nathan Hatch,Alexander Lambert,Anqi Li,Nolan Wagener,Matthew Schmittle,JoonHo Lee,Wentao Yuan,Zoey Chen,Samuel Deng,Greg Okopal,Dieter Fox,Byron Boots,Amirreza Shaban
title: TerrainNet: Visual Modeling of Complex Terrain for High-speed, Off-road Navigation
title_zh: TerrainNet：用于高速越野导航的复杂地形可视化建模
abstract: Effective use of camera-based vision systems is essential for robust performance in autonomous off-road driving, particularly in the high-speed regime. Despite success in structured, on-road settings, current end-to-end approaches for scene prediction have yet to be successfully adapted for complex outdoor terrain. To this end, we present TerrainNet, a vision-based terrain perception system for semantic and geometric terrain prediction for aggressive, off-road navigation. The approach relies on several key insights and practical considerations for achieving reliable terrain modeling. The network includes a multi-headed output representation to capture fine- and coarse-grained terrain features necessary for estimating traversability. Accurate depth estimation is achieved using self-supervised depth completion with multi-view RGB and stereo inputs. Requirements for real-time performance and fast inference speeds are met using efficient, learned image feature projections. Furthermore, the model is trained on a large-scale, real-world off-road dataset collected across a variety of diverse outdoor environments. We show how TerrainNet can also be used for costmap prediction and provide a detailed framework for integration into a planning module. We demonstrate the performance of TerrainNet through extensive comparison to current state-of-the-art baselines for camera-only scene prediction. Finally, we showcase the effectiveness of integrating TerrainNet within a complete autonomous-driving stack by conducting a real-world vehicle test in a challenging off-road scenario.
summary: Effective use of camera-based vision systems is essential for robust performance in autonomous off-road driving, particularly in the high-speed regime. Despite success in structured, on-road settings, current end-to-end approaches for scene prediction have yet to be successfully adapted for complex outdoor terrain. To this end, we present TerrainNet, a vision-based terrain perception system for semantic and geometric terrain prediction for aggressive, off-road navigation. The approach relies on several key insights and practical considerations for achieving reliable terrain modeling. The network includes a multi-headed output representation to capture fine- and coarse-grained terrain features necessary for estimating traversability. Accurate depth estimation is achieved using self-supervised depth completion with multi-view RGB and stereo inputs. Requirements for real-time performance and fast inference speeds are met using efficient, learned image feature projections. Furthermore, the model is trained on a large-scale, real-world off-road dataset collected across a variety of diverse outdoor environments. We show how TerrainNet can also be used for costmap prediction and provide a detailed framework for integration into a planning module. We demonstrate the performance of TerrainNet through extensive comparison to current state-of-the-art baselines for camera-only scene prediction. Finally, we showcase the effectiveness of integrating TerrainNet within a complete autonomous-driving stack by conducting a real-world vehicle test in a challenging off-road scenario.
abstract_zh: 有效使用基于摄像头的视觉系统对于自主越野驾驶的稳健性能至关重要，特别是在高速状态下。尽管在结构化道路环境中取得了成功，但当前的端到端场景预测方法尚未成功适应复杂的室外地形。为此，我们推出了 TerrainNet，这是一种基于视觉的地形感知系统，用于语义和几何地形预测，以实现积极的越野导航。该方法依赖于实现可靠地形建模的几个关键见解和实际考虑。该网络包括多头输出表示，以捕获估计可通行性所需的细粒度和粗粒度地形特征。使用具有多视图 RGB 和立体输入的自监督深度完成来实现准确的深度估计。使用高效的学习图像特征投影可以满足实时性能和快速推理速度的要求。此外，该模型还根据在各种不同的户外环境中收集的大规模真实越野数据集进行训练。我们展示了 TerrainNet 如何用于成本图预测，并提供一个用于集成到规划模块中的详细框架。我们通过与当前最先进的仅相机场景预测基线进行广泛比较，展示了 TerrainNet 的性能。最后，我们通过在具有挑战性的越野场景中进行真实车辆测试，展示了将 TerrainNet 集成到完整的自动驾驶堆栈中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TerrainNet，一种基于视觉的复杂地形感知系统，用于高机动性越野导航中的语义和几何地形预测。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端场景预测方法在结构化道路表现良好，但难以适应复杂户外地形，尤其在高速越野场景中缺乏可靠解决方案。
AI.method: 采用多头输出网络捕捉细粒度和粗粒度地形特征，结合自监督深度估计与多视角RGB/立体视觉输入，通过高效特征投影满足实时性要求，并基于大规模真实越野数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 在相机-only场景预测任务中优于现有SOTA方法，并通过真实车辆测试验证了其在复杂越野场景中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TerrainNet通过融合语义-几何地形建模与高效推理，为自主驾驶系统提供了可靠的越野导航解决方案。

authors_text: Xiaoyue Li,Kai Shang,Gaoang Wang,Mark D. Butala
title: DDMM-Synth: A Denoising Diffusion Model for Cross-modal Medical Image Synthesis with Sparse-view Measurement Embedding
title_zh: DDMM-Synth：具有稀疏视图测量嵌入的跨模态医学图像合成的去噪扩散模型
comment: llncs.cls v2.20,12 pages with 6 figures
comments: llncs.cls v2.20,12 pages with 6 figures
abstract: Reducing the radiation dose in computed tomography (CT) is important to mitigate radiation-induced risks. One option is to employ a well-trained model to compensate for incomplete information and map sparse-view measurements to the CT reconstruction. However, reconstruction from sparsely sampled measurements is insufficient to uniquely characterize an object in CT, and a learned prior model may be inadequate for unencountered cases. Medical modal translation from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) to CT is an alternative but may introduce incorrect information into the synthesized CT images in addition to the fact that there exists no explicit transformation describing their relationship. To address these issues, we propose a novel framework called the denoising diffusion model for medical image synthesis (DDMM-Synth) to close the performance gaps described above. This framework combines an MRI-guided diffusion model with a new CT measurement embedding reverse sampling scheme. Specifically, the null-space content of the one-step denoising result is refined by the MRI-guided data distribution prior, and its range-space component derived from an explicit operator matrix and the sparse-view CT measurements is directly integrated into the inference stage. DDMM-Synth can adjust the projection number of CT a posteriori for a particular clinical application and its modified version can even improve the results significantly for noisy cases. Our results show that DDMM-Synth outperforms other state-of-the-art supervised-learning-based baselines under fair experimental conditions.
summary: Reducing the radiation dose in computed tomography (CT) is important to mitigate radiation-induced risks. One option is to employ a well-trained model to compensate for incomplete information and map sparse-view measurements to the CT reconstruction. However, reconstruction from sparsely sampled measurements is insufficient to uniquely characterize an object in CT, and a learned prior model may be inadequate for unencountered cases. Medical modal translation from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) to CT is an alternative but may introduce incorrect information into the synthesized CT images in addition to the fact that there exists no explicit transformation describing their relationship. To address these issues, we propose a novel framework called the denoising diffusion model for medical image synthesis (DDMM-Synth) to close the performance gaps described above. This framework combines an MRI-guided diffusion model with a new CT measurement embedding reverse sampling scheme. Specifically, the null-space content of the one-step denoising result is refined by the MRI-guided data distribution prior, and its range-space component derived from an explicit operator matrix and the sparse-view CT measurements is directly integrated into the inference stage. DDMM-Synth can adjust the projection number of CT a posteriori for a particular clinical application and its modified version can even improve the results significantly for noisy cases. Our results show that DDMM-Synth outperforms other state-of-the-art supervised-learning-based baselines under fair experimental conditions.
abstract_zh: 减少计算机断层扫描 (CT) 中的辐射剂量对于减轻辐射引起的风险非常重要。一种选择是采用训练有素的模型来补偿不完整的信息，并将稀疏视图测量映射到 CT 重建。然而，稀疏采样测量的重建不足以唯一地表征 CT 中的对象，并且学习的先验模型可能不足以应对未遇到的情况。从磁共振成像 (MRI) 到 CT 的医学模态转换是一种替代方案，但除了不存在描述其关系的明确转换这一事实之外，还可能将不正确的信息引入到合成的 CT 图像中。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种称为医学图像合成去噪扩散模型（DDMM-Synth）的新颖框架，以缩小上述性能差距。该框架将 MRI 引导的扩散模型与嵌入反向采样方案的新 CT 测量相结合。具体来说，一步去噪结果的零空间内容通过 MRI 引导的数据分布先验进行细化，并且其从显式算子矩阵导出的距离空间分量和稀疏视图 CT 测量直接集成到推理阶段。 DDMM-Synth 可以针对特定的临床应用调整 CT 后验的投影数，其修改版本甚至可以显着改善噪声情况下的结果。我们的结果表明，在公平的实验条件下，DDMM-Synth 优于其他最先进的基于监督学习的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DDMM-Synth的去噪扩散模型框架，用于解决稀疏视角CT测量与MRI引导下的跨模态医学图像合成问题。
AI.motivation: 降低CT辐射剂量需通过稀疏视角测量重建CT图像，但现有方法存在重建信息不足及跨模态翻译引入错误信息的问题，需开发更鲁棒的模型。
AI.method: 结合MRI引导的扩散模型与稀疏视角CT测量嵌入的反向采样方案，通过MRI先验优化空域噪声并融合CT显式算子的值域信息，支持后期调整投影数量。
AI.result: 实验表明DDMM-Synth在公平条件下优于现有监督学习基线，尤其在噪声场景下改进版本显著提升重建质量。
AI.conclusion: DDMM-Synth通过融合多模态先验与测量嵌入，有效解决了稀疏CT重建与跨模态合成的性能瓶颈，具有临床应用潜力。

To address these issues, we propose a novel framework called the denoising diffusion model for medical image synthesis (DDMM-Synth) to close the performance gaps described above. This framework combines an MRI-guided diffusion model with a new CT measurement embedding reverse sampling scheme. Specifically, the null-space content of the one-step denoising result is refined by the MRI-guided data distribution prior, and its range-space component derived from an explicit operator matrix and the sparse-view CT measurements is directly integrated into the inference stage. DDMM-Synth can adjust the projection number of CT a posteriori for a particular clinical application and its modified version can even improve the results significantly for noisy cases. authors_text: Jaeseong Lee,Taewoo Kim,Sunghyun Park,Younggun Lee,Jaegul Choo
title: RobustSwap: A Simple yet Robust Face Swapping Model against Attribute Leakage
title_zh: RobustSwap：一种简单而鲁棒的防止属性泄漏的换脸模型
comment: 21 pages
comments: 21 pages
abstract: Face swapping aims at injecting a source image's identity (i.e., facial features) into a target image, while strictly preserving the target's attributes, which are irrelevant to identity. However, we observed that previous approaches still suffer from source attribute leakage, where the source image's attributes interfere with the target image's. In this paper, we analyze the latent space of StyleGAN and find the adequate combination of the latents geared for face swapping task. Based on the findings, we develop a simple yet robust face swapping model, RobustSwap, which is resistant to the potential source attribute leakage. Moreover, we exploit the coordination of 3DMM's implicit and explicit information as a guidance to incorporate the structure of the source image and the precise pose of the target image. Despite our method solely utilizing an image dataset without identity labels for training, our model has the capability to generate high-fidelity and temporally consistent videos. Through extensive qualitative and quantitative evaluations, we demonstrate that our method shows significant improvements compared with the previous face swapping models in synthesizing both images and videos. Project page is available at https://robustswap.github.io/
summary: Face swapping aims at injecting a source image's identity (i.e., facial features) into a target image, while strictly preserving the target's attributes, which are irrelevant to identity. However, we observed that previous approaches still suffer from source attribute leakage, where the source image's attributes interfere with the target image's. In this paper, we analyze the latent space of StyleGAN and find the adequate combination of the latents geared for face swapping task. Based on the findings, we develop a simple yet robust face swapping model, RobustSwap, which is resistant to the potential source attribute leakage. Moreover, we exploit the coordination of 3DMM's implicit and explicit information as a guidance to incorporate the structure of the source image and the precise pose of the target image. Despite our method solely utilizing an image dataset without identity labels for training, our model has the capability to generate high-fidelity and temporally consistent videos. Through extensive qualitative and quantitative evaluations, we demonstrate that our method shows significant improvements compared with the previous face swapping models in synthesizing both images and videos. Project page is available at https://robustswap.github.io/
abstract_zh: 人脸交换的目的是将源图像的身份（即面部特征）注入到目标图像中，同时严格保留目标图像与身份无关的属性。然而，我们观察到以前的方法仍然存在源属性泄漏的问题，即源图像的属性干扰目标图像的属性。在本文中，我们分析了 StyleGAN 的潜在空间，并找到适合换脸任务的潜在空间的适当组合。基于这些发现，我们开发了一个简单而强大的面部交换模型，RobustSwap，它可以抵抗潜在的源属性泄漏。此外，我们利用 3DMM 的隐式和显式信息的协调作为指导来合并源图像的结构和目标图像的精确姿态。尽管我们的方法仅利用没有身份标签的图像数据集进行训练，但我们的模型能够生成高保真且时间一致的视频。通过广泛的定性和定量评估，我们证明我们的方法在合成图像和视频方面比以前的面部交换模型显示出显着的改进。项目页面位于 https://robustswap.github.io/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RobustSwap的简单但稳健的换脸模型，能够有效防止属性泄露问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的换脸方法仍然存在源图像属性泄露的问题，即源图像的属性会干扰目标图像的属性，因此需要一种更稳健的换脸模型。
AI.method: 本文分析了StyleGAN的潜在空间，找到适用于换脸任务的潜在组合，并利用3DMM的隐式和显式信息作为指导，以融合源图像的结构和目标图像的精确姿态。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在生成图像和视频方面相比现有换脸模型有显著改进，且无需身份标签即可生成高保真和时间一致的视频。
AI.conclusion: RobustSwap是一种有效防止属性泄露的换脸模型，能够生成高质量的图像和视频，具有较高的实用价值。

authors_text: Yiwei Ma,Xiaioqing Zhang,Xiaoshuai Sun,Jiayi Ji,Haowei Wang,Guannan Jiang,Weilin Zhuang,Rongrong Ji
title: X-Mesh: Towards Fast and Accurate Text-driven 3D Stylization via Dynamic Textual Guidance
title_zh: X-Mesh：通过动态文本引导实现快速、准确的文本驱动 3D 风格化
comment: 12 pages, 7 figures, ICCV2023
comments: 12 pages, 7 figures, ICCV2023
abstract: Text-driven 3D stylization is a complex and crucial task in the fields of computer vision (CV) and computer graphics (CG), aimed at transforming a bare mesh to fit a target text. Prior methods adopt text-independent multilayer perceptrons (MLPs) to predict the attributes of the target mesh with the supervision of CLIP loss. However, such text-independent architecture lacks textual guidance during predicting attributes, thus leading to unsatisfactory stylization and slow convergence. To address these limitations, we present X-Mesh, an innovative text-driven 3D stylization framework that incorporates a novel Text-guided Dynamic Attention Module (TDAM). The TDAM dynamically integrates the guidance of the target text by utilizing text-relevant spatial and channel-wise attentions during vertex feature extraction, resulting in more accurate attribute prediction and faster convergence speed. Furthermore, existing works lack standard benchmarks and automated metrics for evaluation, often relying on subjective and non-reproducible user studies to assess the quality of stylized 3D assets. To overcome this limitation, we introduce a new standard text-mesh benchmark, namely MIT-30, and two automated metrics, which will enable future research to achieve fair and objective comparisons. Our extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate that X-Mesh outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Text-driven 3D stylization is a complex and crucial task in the fields of computer vision (CV) and computer graphics (CG), aimed at transforming a bare mesh to fit a target text. Prior methods adopt text-independent multilayer perceptrons (MLPs) to predict the attributes of the target mesh with the supervision of CLIP loss. However, such text-independent architecture lacks textual guidance during predicting attributes, thus leading to unsatisfactory stylization and slow convergence. To address these limitations, we present X-Mesh, an innovative text-driven 3D stylization framework that incorporates a novel Text-guided Dynamic Attention Module (TDAM). The TDAM dynamically integrates the guidance of the target text by utilizing text-relevant spatial and channel-wise attentions during vertex feature extraction, resulting in more accurate attribute prediction and faster convergence speed. Furthermore, existing works lack standard benchmarks and automated metrics for evaluation, often relying on subjective and non-reproducible user studies to assess the quality of stylized 3D assets. To overcome this limitation, we introduce a new standard text-mesh benchmark, namely MIT-30, and two automated metrics, which will enable future research to achieve fair and objective comparisons. Our extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate that X-Mesh outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 文本驱动的 3D 风格化是计算机视觉 (CV) 和计算机图形 (CG) 领域中一项复杂而关键的任务，旨在将裸网格转换为适合目标文本。现有方法采用与文本无关的多层感知器（MLP）在 CLIP 损失的监督下预测目标网格的属性。然而，这种与文本无关的架构在预测属性时缺乏文本指导，从而导致风格化效果不理想且收敛缓慢。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了 X-Mesh，这是一种创新的文本驱动的 3D 风格化框架，其中包含新颖的文本引导动态注意力模块 (TDAM)。 TDAM 在顶点特征提取过程中利用与文本相关的空间和通道注意力来动态集成目标文本的引导，从而实现更准确的属性预测和更快的收敛速度。此外，现有作品缺乏用于评估的标准基准和自动化指标，通常依赖于主观且不可重复的用户研究来评估风格化 3D 资产的质量。为了克服这一限制，我们引入了一个新的标准文本网格基准测试，即 MIT-30 和两个自动化指标，这将使未来的研究能够实现公平和客观的比较。我们广泛的定性和定量实验表明，X-Mesh 优于以前最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出X-Mesh框架，通过动态文本引导实现快速且精确的文本驱动3D风格化。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖文本无关的MLP预测网格属性，缺乏文本引导导致风格化效果不佳且收敛速度慢，同时缺乏标准化基准和自动化评估指标。
AI.method: 设计文本引导动态注意力模块（TDAM），利用文本相关的空间和通道注意力进行顶点特征提取，并构建MIT-30基准及自动化评估指标。
AI.result: 实验表明X-Mesh在风格化精度和收敛速度上优于现有最先进方法，且新基准支持客观比较。
AI.conclusion: X-Mesh通过动态文本引导机制提升了3D风格化效果，同时为未来研究提供了标准化评估体系。
