search_text: X-Mesh: Towards Fast and Accurate Text-driven 3D Stylization via Dynamic Textual Guidance X-Mesh：通过动态文本引导实现快速、准确的文本驱动 3D 风格化 Text-driven 3D stylization is a complex and crucial task in the fields of computer vision (CV) and computer graphics (CG), aimed at transforming a bare mesh to fit a target text. Prior methods adopt text-independent multilayer perceptrons (MLPs) to predict the attributes of the target mesh with the supervision of CLIP loss. However, such text-independent architecture lacks textual guidance during predicting attributes, thus leading to unsatisfactory stylization and slow convergence. To address these limitations, we present X-Mesh, an innovative text-driven 3D stylization framework that incorporates a novel Text-guided Dynamic Attention Module (TDAM). The TDAM dynamically integrates the guidance of the target text by utilizing text-relevant spatial and channel-wise attentions during vertex feature extraction, resulting in more accurate attribute prediction and faster convergence speed. Furthermore, existing works lack standard benchmarks and automated metrics for evaluation, often relying on subjective and non-reproducible user studies to assess the quality of stylized 3D assets. To overcome this limitation, we introduce a new standard text-mesh benchmark, namely MIT-30, and two automated metrics, which will enable future research to achieve fair and objective comparisons. Our extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate that X-Mesh outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods. 文本驱动的 3D 风格化是计算机视觉 (CV) 和计算机图形 (CG) 领域中一项复杂而关键的任务，旨在将裸网格转换为适合目标文本。现有方法采用与文本无关的多层感知器（MLP）在 CLIP 损失的监督下预测目标网格的属性。然而，这种与文本无关的架构在预测属性时缺乏文本指导，从而导致风格化效果不理想且收敛缓慢。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了 X-Mesh，这是一种创新的文本驱动的 3D 风格化框架，其中包含新颖的文本引导动态注意力模块 (TDAM)。 TDAM 在顶点特征提取过程中利用与文本相关的空间和通道注意力来动态集成目标文本的引导，从而实现更准确的属性预测和更快的收敛速度。此外，现有作品缺乏用于评估的标准基准和自动化指标，通常依赖于主观且不可重复的用户研究来评估风格化 3D 资产的质量。为了克服这一限制，我们引入了一个新的标准文本网格基准测试，即 MIT-30 和两个自动化指标，这将使未来的研究能够实现公平和客观的比较。我们广泛的定性和定量实验表明，X-Mesh 优于以前最先进的方法。 本文提出X-Mesh框架，通过动态文本引导实现快速且精确的文本驱动3D风格化。 Yiwei Ma,Xiaioqing Zhang,Xiaoshuai Sun,Jiayi Ji,Haowei Wang,Guannan Jiang,Weilin Zhuang,Rongrong Ji cs.CV

authors_text: Xinyi Ye,Weiyue Zhao,Hao Lu,Zhiguo Cao
title: Learning Second-Order Attentive Context for Efficient Correspondence Pruning
title_zh: 学习二阶注意力上下文以进行有效的对应修剪
comment: 9 pages, 8 figures; Accepted to AAAI 2023 (Oral)
comments: 9 pages, 8 figures; Accepted to AAAI 2023 (Oral)
abstract: Correspondence pruning aims to search consistent correspondences (inliers) from a set of putative correspondences. It is challenging because of the disorganized spatial distribution of numerous outliers, especially when putative correspondences are largely dominated by outliers. It's more challenging to ensure effectiveness while maintaining efficiency. In this paper, we propose an effective and efficient method for correspondence pruning. Inspired by the success of attentive context in correspondence problems, we first extend the attentive context to the first-order attentive context and then introduce the idea of attention in attention (ANA) to model second-order attentive context for correspondence pruning. Compared with first-order attention that focuses on feature-consistent context, second-order attention dedicates to attention weights itself and provides an additional source to encode consistent context from the attention map. For efficiency, we derive two approximate formulations for the naive implementation of second-order attention to optimize the cubic complexity to linear complexity, such that second-order attention can be used with negligible computational overheads. We further implement our formulations in a second-order context layer and then incorporate the layer in an ANA block. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method is effective and efficient in pruning outliers, especially in high-outlier-ratio cases. Compared with the state-of-the-art correspondence pruning approach LMCNet, our method runs 14 times faster while maintaining a competitive accuracy.
summary: Correspondence pruning aims to search consistent correspondences (inliers) from a set of putative correspondences. It is challenging because of the disorganized spatial distribution of numerous outliers, especially when putative correspondences are largely dominated by outliers. It's more challenging to ensure effectiveness while maintaining efficiency. In this paper, we propose an effective and efficient method for correspondence pruning. Inspired by the success of attentive context in correspondence problems, we first extend the attentive context to the first-order attentive context and then introduce the idea of attention in attention (ANA) to model second-order attentive context for correspondence pruning. Compared with first-order attention that focuses on feature-consistent context, second-order attention dedicates to attention weights itself and provides an additional source to encode consistent context from the attention map. For efficiency, we derive two approximate formulations for the naive implementation of second-order attention to optimize the cubic complexity to linear complexity, such that second-order attention can be used with negligible computational overheads. We further implement our formulations in a second-order context layer and then incorporate the layer in an ANA block. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method is effective and efficient in pruning outliers, especially in high-outlier-ratio cases. Compared with the state-of-the-art correspondence pruning approach LMCNet, our method runs 14 times faster while maintaining a competitive accuracy.
abstract_zh: 对应修剪的目的是从一组假定的对应中搜索一致的对应（内点）。由于许多异常值的空间分布杂乱，特别是当假定的对应关系主要由异常值主导时，这是具有挑战性的。在保持效率的同时确保有效性更具挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效且高效的对应剪枝方法。受到注意上下文在对应问题中成功的启发，我们首先将注意上下文扩展到一阶注意上下文，然后引入注意中注意（ANA）的思想来建模二阶注意上下文以进行对应剪枝。与关注特征一致上下文的一阶注意力相比，二阶注意力致力于注意力权重本身，并提供额外的来源来从注意力图中编码一致的上下文。为了提高效率，我们推导了二阶注意力的朴素实现的两个近似公式，以将立方复杂度优化为线性复杂度，使得二阶注意力可以在计算开销可以忽略不计的情况下使用。我们进一步在二阶上下文层中实现我们的公式，然后将该层合并到 ANA 块中。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在修剪异常值方面是有效且高效的，特别是在高异常值比率的情况下。与最先进的对应剪枝方法 LMCNet 相比，我们的方法运行速度快了 14 倍，同时保持了有竞争力的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于二阶注意力机制的高效对应关系筛选方法，用于从大量潜在对应关系中去除异常值。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在高异常值比例场景下效率与准确性难以兼顾，需设计兼顾效率与效果的新型注意力机制。
AI.method: 扩展一阶注意力为二阶注意力（ANA），通过注意力权重自身建模上下文关系，并推导线性复杂度近似公式降低计算成本，最终集成至二阶上下文层与ANA模块。
AI.result: 在高异常值比场景下，相较LMCNet方法提速14倍且保持竞争力精度，验证了方法的有效性与高效性。
AI.conclusion: 二阶注意力机制为对应关系筛选提供了新思路，在保证精度的同时显著提升计算效率，适用于实时处理场景。

It is challenging because of the disorganized spatial distribution of numerous outliers, especially when putative correspondences are largely dominated by outliers. It's more challenging to ensure effectiveness while maintaining efficiency. In this paper, we propose an effective and efficient method for correspondence pruning. Inspired by the success of attentive context in correspondence problems, we first extend the attentive context to the first-order attentive context and then introduce the idea of attention in attention (ANA) to model second-order attentive context for correspondence pruning. Compared with first-order attention that focuses on feature-consistent context, second-order attention dedicates to attention weights itself and provides an additional source to encode consistent context from the attention map. We further implement our formulations in a second-order context layer and then incorporate the layer in an ANA block. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method is effective and efficient in pruning outliers, especially in high-outlier-ratio cases. authors_text: Jianping Zhang,Yizhan Huang,Weibin Wu,Michael R. Lyu
title: Transferable Adversarial Attacks on Vision Transformers with Token Gradient Regularization
title_zh: 使用令牌梯度正则化对视觉变压器进行可转移对抗攻击
comment: CVPR 2023, Code is available at https://github.com/jpzhang1810/TGR
comments: CVPR 2023, Code is available at https://github.com/jpzhang1810/TGR
abstract: Vision transformers (ViTs) have been successfully deployed in a variety of computer vision tasks, but they are still vulnerable to adversarial samples. Transfer-based attacks use a local model to generate adversarial samples and directly transfer them to attack a target black-box model. The high efficiency of transfer-based attacks makes it a severe security threat to ViT-based applications. Therefore, it is vital to design effective transfer-based attacks to identify the deficiencies of ViTs beforehand in security-sensitive scenarios. Existing efforts generally focus on regularizing the input gradients to stabilize the updated direction of adversarial samples. However, the variance of the back-propagated gradients in intermediate blocks of ViTs may still be large, which may make the generated adversarial samples focus on some model-specific features and get stuck in poor local optima. To overcome the shortcomings of existing approaches, we propose the Token Gradient Regularization (TGR) method. According to the structural characteristics of ViTs, TGR reduces the variance of the back-propagated gradient in each internal block of ViTs in a token-wise manner and utilizes the regularized gradient to generate adversarial samples. Extensive experiments on attacking both ViTs and CNNs confirm the superiority of our approach. Notably, compared to the state-of-the-art transfer-based attacks, our TGR offers a performance improvement of 8.8% on average.
summary: Vision transformers (ViTs) have been successfully deployed in a variety of computer vision tasks, but they are still vulnerable to adversarial samples. Transfer-based attacks use a local model to generate adversarial samples and directly transfer them to attack a target black-box model. The high efficiency of transfer-based attacks makes it a severe security threat to ViT-based applications. Therefore, it is vital to design effective transfer-based attacks to identify the deficiencies of ViTs beforehand in security-sensitive scenarios. Existing efforts generally focus on regularizing the input gradients to stabilize the updated direction of adversarial samples. However, the variance of the back-propagated gradients in intermediate blocks of ViTs may still be large, which may make the generated adversarial samples focus on some model-specific features and get stuck in poor local optima. To overcome the shortcomings of existing approaches, we propose the Token Gradient Regularization (TGR) method. According to the structural characteristics of ViTs, TGR reduces the variance of the back-propagated gradient in each internal block of ViTs in a token-wise manner and utilizes the regularized gradient to generate adversarial samples. Extensive experiments on attacking both ViTs and CNNs confirm the superiority of our approach. Notably, compared to the state-of-the-art transfer-based attacks, our TGR offers a performance improvement of 8.8% on average.
abstract_zh: 视觉变压器（ViT）已成功部署在各种计算机视觉任务中，但它们仍然容易受到对抗性样本的影响。基于转移的攻击使用本地模型生成对抗样本并直接转移它们来攻击目标黑盒模型。基于传输的攻击的高效率使其对基于ViT的应用程序构成严重的安全威胁。因此，设计有效的基于传输的攻击以在安全敏感场景中提前识别ViT的缺陷至关重要。现有的工作通常集中在规范输入梯度以稳定对抗样本的更新方向。然而，ViT 中间块中反向传播梯度的方差可能仍然很大，这可能使生成的对抗样本集中于某些特定于模型的特征并陷入较差的局部最优。为了克服现有方法的缺点，我们提出了令牌梯度正则化（TGR）方法。根据ViT的结构特点，TGR以token-wise的方式降低ViT内部每个块中反向传播梯度的方差，并利用正则化梯度生成对抗性样本。攻击 ViT 和 CNN 的大量实验证实了我们方法的优越性。值得注意的是，与最先进的基于传输的攻击相比，我们的 TGR 平均性能提高了 8.8%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对视觉Transformer（ViT）的可迁移对抗攻击方法，通过引入Token梯度正则化（TGR）提升攻击效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于转移的对抗攻击方法在ViT的中间块中存在梯度方差大、易陷入局部最优的问题，导致攻击效果受限。
AI.method: 设计Token梯度正则化（TGR）方法，在ViT每个内部块的token层面减少反向传播梯度方差，生成更有效的对抗样本。
AI.result: 实验表明，TGR在攻击ViT和CNNs时相比现有方法平均提升8.8%，验证了其优越性。
AI.conclusion: TGR通过结构化梯度正则化有效解决了ViT对抗攻击的局限性，为模型安全评估提供了新思路。

search_text: Transferable Adversarial Attacks on Vision Transformers with Token Gradient Regularization 使用令牌梯度正则化对视觉变压器进行可转移对抗攻击 Vision transformers (ViTs) have been successfully deployed in a variety of computer vision tasks, but they are still vulnerable to adversarial samples. Transfer-based attacks use a local model to generate adversarial samples and directly transfer them to attack a target black-box model. The high efficiency of transfer-based attacks makes it a severe security threat to ViT-based applications. Therefore, it is vital to design effective transfer-based attacks to identify the deficiencies of ViTs beforehand in security-sensitive scenarios. Existing efforts generally focus on regularizing the input gradients to stabilize the updated direction of adversarial samples. However, the variance of the back-propagated gradients in intermediate blocks of ViTs may still be large, which may make the generated adversarial samples focus on some model-specific features and get stuck in poor local optima. To overcome the shortcomings of existing approaches, we propose the Token Gradient Regularization (TGR) method. According to the structural characteristics of ViTs, TGR reduces the variance of the back-propagated gradient in each internal block of ViTs in a token-wise manner and utilizes the regularized gradient to generate adversarial samples. Extensive experiments on attacking both ViTs and CNNs confirm the superiority of our approach. Notably, compared to the state-of-the-art transfer-based attacks, our TGR offers a performance improvement of 8.8% on average. 视觉变压器（ViT）已成功部署在各种计算机视觉任务中，但它们仍然容易受到对抗性样本的影响。基于转移的攻击使用本地模型生成对抗样本并直接转移它们来攻击目标黑盒模型。基于传输的攻击的高效率使其对基于ViT的应用程序构成严重的安全威胁。因此，设计有效的基于传输的攻击以在安全敏感场景中提前识别ViT的缺陷至关重要。现有的工作通常集中在规范输入梯度以稳定对抗样本的更新方向。然而，ViT 中间块中反向传播梯度的方差可能仍然很大，这可能使生成的对抗样本集中于某些特定于模型的特征并陷入较差的局部最优。为了克服现有方法的缺点，我们提出了令牌梯度正则化（TGR）方法。根据ViT的结构特点，TGR以token-wise的方式降低ViT内部每个块中反向传播梯度的方差，并利用正则化梯度生成对抗性样本。攻击 ViT 和 CNN 的大量实验证实了我们方法的优越性。值得注意的是，与最先进的基于传输的攻击相比，我们的 TGR 平均性能提高了 8.8%。 本文提出一种针对视觉Transformer（ViT）的可迁移对抗攻击方法，通过引入Token梯度正则化（TGR）提升攻击效果。 Jianping Zhang,Yizhan Huang,Weibin Wu,Michael R. Lyu cs.CV

authors_text: Hongyi Wang,Luyang Luo,Fang Wang,Ruofeng Tong,Yen-Wei Chen,Hongjie Hu,Lanfen Lin,Hao Chen
title: Iteratively Coupled Multiple Instance Learning from Instance to Bag Classifier for Whole Slide Image Classification
title_zh: 用于整个幻灯片图像分类的从实例到袋分类器的迭代耦合多实例学习
abstract: Whole Slide Image (WSI) classification remains a challenge due to their extremely high resolution and the absence of fine-grained labels. Presently, WSI classification is usually regarded as a Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) problem when only slide-level labels are available. MIL methods involve a patch embedding module and a bag-level classification module, but they are prohibitively expensive to be trained in an end-to-end manner. Therefore, existing methods usually train them separately, or directly skip the training of the embedder. Such schemes hinder the patch embedder's access to slide-level semantic labels, resulting in inconsistency within the entire MIL pipeline. To overcome this issue, we propose a novel framework called Iteratively Coupled MIL (ICMIL), which bridges the loss back-propagation process from the bag-level classifier to the patch embedder. In ICMIL, we use category information in the bag-level classifier to guide the patch-level fine-tuning of the patch feature extractor. The refined embedder then generates better instance representations for achieving a more accurate bag-level classifier. By coupling the patch embedder and bag classifier at a low cost, our proposed framework enables information exchange between the two modules, benefiting the entire MIL classification model. We tested our framework on two datasets using three different backbones, and our experimental results demonstrate consistent performance improvements over state-of-the-art MIL methods. The code is available at: https://github.com/Dootmaan/ICMIL.
summary: Whole Slide Image (WSI) classification remains a challenge due to their extremely high resolution and the absence of fine-grained labels. Presently, WSI classification is usually regarded as a Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) problem when only slide-level labels are available. MIL methods involve a patch embedding module and a bag-level classification module, but they are prohibitively expensive to be trained in an end-to-end manner. Therefore, existing methods usually train them separately, or directly skip the training of the embedder. Such schemes hinder the patch embedder's access to slide-level semantic labels, resulting in inconsistency within the entire MIL pipeline. To overcome this issue, we propose a novel framework called Iteratively Coupled MIL (ICMIL), which bridges the loss back-propagation process from the bag-level classifier to the patch embedder. In ICMIL, we use category information in the bag-level classifier to guide the patch-level fine-tuning of the patch feature extractor. The refined embedder then generates better instance representations for achieving a more accurate bag-level classifier. By coupling the patch embedder and bag classifier at a low cost, our proposed framework enables information exchange between the two modules, benefiting the entire MIL classification model. We tested our framework on two datasets using three different backbones, and our experimental results demonstrate consistent performance improvements over state-of-the-art MIL methods. The code is available at: https://github.com/Dootmaan/ICMIL.
abstract_zh: 由于分辨率极高且缺乏细粒度标签，全切片图像 (WSI) 分类仍然是一个挑战。目前，当只有幻灯片级标签可用时，WSI 分类通常被视为多实例学习 (MIL) 问题。 MIL 方法涉及补丁嵌入模块和包级分类模块，但以端到端方式进行训练的成本过高。因此，现有的方法通常单独训练它们，或者直接跳过嵌入器的训练。此类方案阻碍了补丁嵌入器对幻灯片级语义标签的访问，导致整个 MIL 管道内的不一致。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了一种称为迭代耦合 MIL (ICMIL) 的新颖框架，它将损失反向传播过程从袋级分类器连接到补丁嵌入器。在ICMIL中，我们使用包级分类器中的类别信息来指导补丁特征提取器的补丁级微调。然后，经过改进的嵌入器会生成更好的实例表示，以实现更准确的袋级分类器。通过以低成本耦合补丁嵌入器和袋分类器，我们提出的框架可以实现两个模块之间的信息交换，从而有利于整个 MIL 分类模型。我们使用三种不同的骨干网在两个数据集上测试了我们的框架，我们的实验结果表明，与最先进的 MIL 方法相比，性能得到了一致的改进。该代码位于：https://github.com/Dootmaan/ICMIL。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ICMIL的新框架，通过迭代耦合机制改进全切片图像分类中的多实例学习方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因独立训练补丁嵌入模块与袋级分类器导致语义不一致，无法有效利用滑动级标签信息。
AI.method: 设计迭代耦合机制，使袋级分类器的类别信息反向指导补丁嵌入器的微调，实现模块间信息交互。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上使用三种主干网络测试，实验结果表明ICMIL在分类性能上优于现有最先进的MIL方法。
AI.conclusion: ICMIL通过低成本耦合机制解决了MIL管道中的语义不一致问题，显著提升了全切片图像分类的准确性。

authors_text: Marco Nittscher,Michael Lameter,Riccardo Barbano,Johannes Leuschner,Bangti Jin,Peter Maass
title: SVD-DIP: Overcoming the Overfitting Problem in DIP-based CT Reconstruction
title_zh: SVD-DIP：克服基于DIP的CT重建中的过拟合问题
abstract: The deep image prior (DIP) is a well-established unsupervised deep learning method for image reconstruction; yet it is far from being flawless. The DIP overfits to noise if not early stopped, or optimized via a regularized objective. We build on the regularized fine-tuning of a pretrained DIP, by adopting a novel strategy that restricts the learning to the adaptation of singular values. The proposed SVD-DIP uses ad hoc convolutional layers whose pretrained parameters are decomposed via the singular value decomposition. Optimizing the DIP then solely consists in the fine-tuning of the singular values, while keeping the left and right singular vectors fixed. We thoroughly validate the proposed method on real-measured $μ$CT data of a lotus root as well as two medical datasets (LoDoPaB and Mayo). We report significantly improved stability of the DIP optimization, by overcoming the overfitting to noise.
summary: The deep image prior (DIP) is a well-established unsupervised deep learning method for image reconstruction; yet it is far from being flawless. The DIP overfits to noise if not early stopped, or optimized via a regularized objective. We build on the regularized fine-tuning of a pretrained DIP, by adopting a novel strategy that restricts the learning to the adaptation of singular values. The proposed SVD-DIP uses ad hoc convolutional layers whose pretrained parameters are decomposed via the singular value decomposition. Optimizing the DIP then solely consists in the fine-tuning of the singular values, while keeping the left and right singular vectors fixed. We thoroughly validate the proposed method on real-measured $μ$CT data of a lotus root as well as two medical datasets (LoDoPaB and Mayo). We report significantly improved stability of the DIP optimization, by overcoming the overfitting to noise.
abstract_zh: 深度图像先验（DIP）是一种成熟的无监督深度学习图像重建方法；但它远非完美无缺。如果不及早停止或通过正则化目标进行优化，DIP 就会过度拟合噪声。我们以预训练 DIP 的正则化微调为基础，采用一种新颖的策略，将学习限制为适应奇异值。所提出的 SVD-DIP 使用临时卷积层，其预训练参数通过奇异值分解进行分解。然后，优化 DIP 仅在于奇异值的微调，同时保持左右奇异向量固定。我们在实际测量的莲藕 $μ$CT 数据以及两个医学数据集（LoDoPaB 和 Mayo）上彻底验证了所提出的方法。我们报告通过克服噪声的过度拟合，显着提高了 DIP 优化的稳定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SVD-DIP的新方法，旨在解决基于深度图像先验（DIP）的CT重建中的过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 传统的DIP方法在未及时停止或未使用正则化优化时容易过拟合噪声，影响重建质量。
AI.method: 通过奇异值分解（SVD）对预训练卷积层参数进行分解，固定左右奇异向量，仅优化奇异值以实现正则化微调。
AI.result: 在莲藕μCT数据及两个医学数据集（LoDoPaB和Mayo）上验证，显著提升了DIP优化的稳定性并减少了噪声过拟合。
AI.conclusion: SVD-DIP通过限制学习到奇异值的调整，有效克服了DIP的过拟合问题，提升了CT重建的鲁棒性。

search_text: SVD-DIP: Overcoming the Overfitting Problem in DIP-based CT Reconstruction SVD-DIP：克服基于DIP的CT重建中的过拟合问题 The deep image prior (DIP) is a well-established unsupervised deep learning method for image reconstruction; yet it is far from being flawless. The DIP overfits to noise if not early stopped, or optimized via a regularized objective. We build on the regularized fine-tuning of a pretrained DIP, by adopting a novel strategy that restricts the learning to the adaptation of singular values. The proposed SVD-DIP uses ad hoc convolutional layers whose pretrained parameters are decomposed via the singular value decomposition. Optimizing the DIP then solely consists in the fine-tuning of the singular values, while keeping the left and right singular vectors fixed. We thoroughly validate the proposed method on real-measured $μ$CT data of a lotus root as well as two medical datasets (LoDoPaB and Mayo). We report significantly improved stability of the DIP optimization, by overcoming the overfitting to noise. 深度图像先验（DIP）是一种成熟的无监督深度学习图像重建方法；但它远非完美无缺。如果不及早停止或通过正则化目标进行优化，DIP 就会过度拟合噪声。我们以预训练 DIP 的正则化微调为基础，采用一种新颖的策略，将学习限制为适应奇异值。所提出的 SVD-DIP 使用临时卷积层，其预训练参数通过奇异值分解进行分解。然后，优化 DIP 仅在于奇异值的微调，同时保持左右奇异向量固定。我们在实际测量的莲藕 $μ$CT 数据以及两个医学数据集（LoDoPaB 和 Mayo）上彻底验证了所提出的方法。我们报告通过克服噪声的过度拟合，显着提高了 DIP 优化的稳定性。 本文提出了一种名为SVD-DIP的新方法，旨在解决基于深度图像先验（DIP）的CT重建中的过拟合问题。 Marco Nittscher,Michael Lameter,Riccardo Barbano,Johannes Leuschner,Bangti Jin,Peter Maass eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Soma Onishi,Kenta Oono,Kohei Hayashi
title: TabRet: Pre-training Transformer-based Tabular Models for Unseen Columns
title_zh: TabRet：针对看不见的列预训练基于 Transformer 的表格模型
comment: Accepted at the Workshop on Understanding Foundation Models at ICLR 2023
comments: Accepted at the Workshop on Understanding Foundation Models at ICLR 2023
abstract: We present \emph{TabRet}, a pre-trainable Transformer-based model for tabular data. TabRet is designed to work on a downstream task that contains columns not seen in pre-training. Unlike other methods, TabRet has an extra learning step before fine-tuning called \emph{retokenizing}, which calibrates feature embeddings based on the masked autoencoding loss. In experiments, we pre-trained TabRet with a large collection of public health surveys and fine-tuned it on classification tasks in healthcare, and TabRet achieved the best AUC performance on four datasets. In addition, an ablation study shows retokenizing and random shuffle augmentation of columns during pre-training contributed to performance gains. The code is available at https://github.com/pfnet-research/tabret .
summary: We present \emph{TabRet}, a pre-trainable Transformer-based model for tabular data. TabRet is designed to work on a downstream task that contains columns not seen in pre-training. Unlike other methods, TabRet has an extra learning step before fine-tuning called \emph{retokenizing}, which calibrates feature embeddings based on the masked autoencoding loss. In experiments, we pre-trained TabRet with a large collection of public health surveys and fine-tuned it on classification tasks in healthcare, and TabRet achieved the best AUC performance on four datasets. In addition, an ablation study shows retokenizing and random shuffle augmentation of columns during pre-training contributed to performance gains. The code is available at https://github.com/pfnet-research/tabret .
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 \emph{TabRet}，一种基于 Transformer 的预训练表格数据模型。 TabRet 旨在处理包含预训练中未见的列的下游任务。与其他方法不同，TabRet 在微调之前有一个额外的学习步骤，称为 \emph{retokenizing}，它根据屏蔽自动编码损失来校准特征嵌入。在实验中，我们用大量公共卫生调查数据对 TabRet 进行了预训练，并在医疗保健分类任务上对其进行了微调，TabRet 在四个数据集上实现了最佳 AUC 性能。此外，一项消融研究表明，在预训练期间对列进行重新标记和随机洗牌增强有助于提高性能。该代码可在 https://github.com/pfnet-research/tabret 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TabRet的预训练Transformer模型，用于处理表格数据，并能够应对预训练阶段未见过的列。
AI.motivation: 现有的表格模型在预训练阶段无法处理未见过的列，限制了其在实际任务中的应用，因此需要一种能够处理新列的预训练模型。
AI.method: TabRet通过一种称为retokenizing的额外学习步骤，在微调前校准特征嵌入，并在预训练过程中使用列的随机打乱增强方法。
AI.result: 在医疗健康领域的分类任务中，TabRet在四个数据集上取得了最佳的AUC性能。
AI.conclusion: TabRet通过引入retokenizing和列增强方法，提高了模型对新列的适应能力，实验结果验证了其有效性。

authors_text: Arunav Gupta,Rohit Mishra,William Luu,Mehdi Bouassami
title: On Feature Scaling of Recursive Feature Machines
title_zh: 关于递归特征机的特征缩放
abstract: In this technical report, we explore the behavior of Recursive Feature Machines (RFMs), a type of novel kernel machine that recursively learns features via the average gradient outer product, through a series of experiments on regression datasets. When successively adding random noise features to a dataset, we observe intriguing patterns in the Mean Squared Error (MSE) curves with the test MSE exhibiting a decrease-increase-decrease pattern. This behavior is consistent across different dataset sizes, noise parameters, and target functions. Interestingly, the observed MSE curves show similarities to the "double descent" phenomenon observed in deep neural networks, hinting at new connection between RFMs and neural network behavior. This report lays the groundwork for future research into this peculiar behavior.
summary: In this technical report, we explore the behavior of Recursive Feature Machines (RFMs), a type of novel kernel machine that recursively learns features via the average gradient outer product, through a series of experiments on regression datasets. When successively adding random noise features to a dataset, we observe intriguing patterns in the Mean Squared Error (MSE) curves with the test MSE exhibiting a decrease-increase-decrease pattern. This behavior is consistent across different dataset sizes, noise parameters, and target functions. Interestingly, the observed MSE curves show similarities to the "double descent" phenomenon observed in deep neural networks, hinting at new connection between RFMs and neural network behavior. This report lays the groundwork for future research into this peculiar behavior.
abstract_zh: In this technical report, we explore the behavior of Recursive Feature Machines (RFMs), a type of novel kernel machine that recursively learns features via the average gradient outer product, through a series of experiments on regression datasets.当连续向数据集中添加随机噪声特征时，我们在均方误差 (MSE) 曲线中观察到有趣的模式，测试 MSE 呈现出减少-增加-减少模式。 This behavior is consistent across different dataset sizes, noise parameters, and target functions. Interestingly, the observed MSE curves show similarities to the "double descent" phenomenon observed in deep neural networks, hinting at new connection between RFMs and neural network behavior. This report lays the groundwork for future research into this peculiar behavior.

AI.tldr: 研究递归特征机在特征扩展下的行为，特别是其均方误差的变化模式及其与深度神经网络双重下降现象的关联。
AI.motivation: 探索递归特征机在特征扩展时的特性，揭示其与深度神经网络行为的潜在联系，为未来研究提供基础。
AI.method: 通过在回归数据集上进行实验，逐步添加随机噪声特征，分析测试均方误差的变化模式，并与双重下降现象进行比较。
AI.result: 测试均方误差呈现下降-上升-下降模式，该模式在不同数据集规模、噪声参数和目标函数下保持一致，且与深度神经网络的双重下降现象相似。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了递归特征机与深度神经网络行为之间的潜在联系，为后续研究提供了理论基础和实验依据。

authors_text: Linfang Zheng,Chen Wang,Yinghan Sun,Esha Dasgupta,Hua Chen,Ales Leonardis,Wei Zhang,Hyung Jin Chang
title: HS-Pose: Hybrid Scope Feature Extraction for Category-level Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: HS-Pose：用于类别级物体姿态估计的混合范围特征提取
comment: Accepted by the 2023 IEEE/CVF Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Conference (CVPR)
comments: Accepted by the 2023 IEEE/CVF Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Conference (CVPR)
abstract: In this paper, we focus on the problem of category-level object pose estimation, which is challenging due to the large intra-category shape variation. 3D graph convolution (3D-GC) based methods have been widely used to extract local geometric features, but they have limitations for complex shaped objects and are sensitive to noise. Moreover, the scale and translation invariant properties of 3D-GC restrict the perception of an object's size and translation information. In this paper, we propose a simple network structure, the HS-layer, which extends 3D-GC to extract hybrid scope latent features from point cloud data for category-level object pose estimation tasks. The proposed HS-layer: 1) is able to perceive local-global geometric structure and global information, 2) is robust to noise, and 3) can encode size and translation information. Our experiments show that the simple replacement of the 3D-GC layer with the proposed HS-layer on the baseline method (GPV-Pose) achieves a significant improvement, with the performance increased by 14.5% on 5d2cm metric and 10.3% on IoU75. Our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by a large margin (8.3% on 5d2cm, 6.9% on IoU75) on the REAL275 dataset and runs in real-time (50 FPS).
summary: In this paper, we focus on the problem of category-level object pose estimation, which is challenging due to the large intra-category shape variation. 3D graph convolution (3D-GC) based methods have been widely used to extract local geometric features, but they have limitations for complex shaped objects and are sensitive to noise. Moreover, the scale and translation invariant properties of 3D-GC restrict the perception of an object's size and translation information. In this paper, we propose a simple network structure, the HS-layer, which extends 3D-GC to extract hybrid scope latent features from point cloud data for category-level object pose estimation tasks. The proposed HS-layer: 1) is able to perceive local-global geometric structure and global information, 2) is robust to noise, and 3) can encode size and translation information. Our experiments show that the simple replacement of the 3D-GC layer with the proposed HS-layer on the baseline method (GPV-Pose) achieves a significant improvement, with the performance increased by 14.5% on 5d2cm metric and 10.3% on IoU75. Our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by a large margin (8.3% on 5d2cm, 6.9% on IoU75) on the REAL275 dataset and runs in real-time (50 FPS).
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们关注类别级物体姿态估计的问题，由于类别内形状变化较大，该问题具有挑战性。基于3D图卷积（3D-GC）的方法已被广泛用于提取局部几何特征，但它们对于形状复杂的物体有局限性并且对噪声敏感。此外，3D-GC 的尺度和平移不变特性限制了对对象大小和平移信息的感知。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单的网络结构，即 HS 层，它扩展了 3D-GC 以从点云数据中提取混合范围潜在特征，以执行类别级物体姿态估计任务。所提出的 HS 层：1）能够感知局部全局几何结构和全局信息，2）对噪声具有鲁棒性，3）可以对大小和平移信息进行编码。我们的实验表明，在基线方法（GPV-Pose）上用所提出的 HS 层简单替换 3D-GC 层取得了显着的改进，在 5d2cm 指标上性能提高了 14.5%，在 IoU75 上性能提高了 10.3%。我们的方法在 REAL275 数据集上大大优于最先进的方法（5d2cm 上为 8.3%，IoU75 上为 6.9%），并且实时运行（50 FPS）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HS-Pose方法，通过混合范围特征提取解决类别级物体姿态估计中的形状变化和噪声敏感问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于3D图卷积的方法在处理复杂形状物体时存在局限性，且对噪声敏感，无法有效捕捉物体尺寸和位移信息。
AI.method: 设计HS-layer结构，扩展3D-GC以从点云中提取局部-全局混合范围特征，增强对几何结构、噪声的鲁棒性，并编码尺寸与位移信息。
AI.result: 在REAL275数据集上，相较基线方法性能提升14.5%（5d2cm）和10.3%（IoU75），优于现有方法8.3%和6.9%，且实现50 FPS实时运行。
AI.conclusion: HS-Pose通过混合范围特征提取有效解决了类别级姿态估计的挑战，兼具高精度与实时性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出HS-Pose方法，通过混合范围特征提取解决类别级物体姿态估计中的形状变化和噪声敏感问题。

search_text: HS-Pose: Hybrid Scope Feature Extraction for Category-level Object Pose Estimation HS-Pose：用于类别级物体姿态估计的混合范围特征提取 In this paper, we focus on the problem of category-level object pose estimation, which is challenging due to the large intra-category shape variation. 3D graph convolution (3D-GC) based methods have been widely used to extract local geometric features, but they have limitations for complex shaped objects and are sensitive to noise. Moreover, the scale and translation invariant properties of 3D-GC restrict the perception of an object's size and translation information. In this paper, we propose a simple network structure, the HS-layer, which extends 3D-GC to extract hybrid scope latent features from point cloud data for category-level object pose estimation tasks. The proposed HS-layer: 1) is able to perceive local-global geometric structure and global information, 2) is robust to noise, and 3) can encode size and translation information. Our experiments show that the simple replacement of the 3D-GC layer with the proposed HS-layer on the baseline method (GPV-Pose) achieves a significant improvement, with the performance increased by 14.5% on 5d2cm metric and 10.3% on IoU75. Our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by a large margin (8.3% on 5d2cm, 6.9% on IoU75) on the REAL275 dataset and runs in real-time (50 FPS). 在本文中，我们关注类别级物体姿态估计的问题，由于类别内形状变化较大，该问题具有挑战性。基于3D图卷积（3D-GC）的方法已被广泛用于提取局部几何特征，但它们对于形状复杂的物体有局限性并且对噪声敏感。此外，3D-GC 的尺度和平移不变特性限制了对对象大小和平移信息的感知。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单的网络结构，即 HS 层，它扩展了 3D-GC 以从点云数据中提取混合范围潜在特征，以执行类别级物体姿态估计任务。所提出的 HS 层：1）能够感知局部全局几何结构和全局信息，2）对噪声具有鲁棒性，3）可以对大小和平移信息进行编码。我们的实验表明，在基线方法（GPV-Pose）上用所提出的 HS 层简单替换 3D-GC 层取得了显着的改进，在 5d2cm 指标上性能提高了 14.5%，在 IoU75 上性能提高了 10.3%。我们的方法在 REAL275 数据集上大大优于最先进的方法（5d2cm 上为 8.3%，IoU75 上为 6.9%），并且实时运行（50 FPS）。 本文提出HS-Pose方法，通过混合范围特征提取解决类别级物体姿态估计中的形状变化和噪声敏感问题。 Linfang Zheng,Chen Wang,Yinghan Sun,Esha Dasgupta,Hua Chen,Ales Leonardis,Wei Zhang,Hyung Jin Chang cs.CV

authors_text: Lin Geng Foo,Jia Gong,Zhipeng Fan,Jun Liu
title: System-status-aware Adaptive Network for Online Streaming Video Understanding
title_zh: 用于在线流媒体视频理解的系统状态感知自适应网络
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2023
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2023
abstract: Recent years have witnessed great progress in deep neural networks for real-time applications. However, most existing works do not explicitly consider the general case where the device's state and the available resources fluctuate over time, and none of them investigate or address the impact of varying computational resources for online video understanding tasks. This paper proposes a System-status-aware Adaptive Network (SAN) that considers the device's real-time state to provide high-quality predictions with low delay. Usage of our agent's policy improves efficiency and robustness to fluctuations of the system status. On two widely used video understanding tasks, SAN obtains state-of-the-art performance while constantly keeping processing delays low. Moreover, training such an agent on various types of hardware configurations is not easy as the labeled training data might not be available, or can be computationally prohibitive. To address this challenging problem, we propose a Meta Self-supervised Adaptation (MSA) method that adapts the agent's policy to new hardware configurations at test-time, allowing for easy deployment of the model onto other unseen hardware platforms.

However, most existing works do not explicitly consider the general case where the device's state and the available resources fluctuate over time, and none of them investigate or address the impact of varying computational resources for online video understanding tasks. Usage of our agent's policy improves efficiency and robustness to fluctuations of the system status. On two widely used video understanding tasks, SAN obtains state-of-the-art performance while constantly keeping processing delays low. Moreover, training such an agent on various types of hardware configurations is not easy as the labeled training data might not be available, or can be computationally prohibitive. To address this challenging problem, we propose a Meta Self-supervised Adaptation (MSA) method that adapts the agent's policy to new hardware configurations at test-time, allowing for easy deployment of the model onto other unseen hardware platforms.
abstract_zh: 近年来，实时应用的深度神经网络取得了巨大进展。 However, most existing works do not explicitly consider the general case where the device's state and the available resources fluctuate over time, and none of them investigate or address the impact of varying computational resources for online video understanding tasks. This paper proposes a System-status-aware Adaptive Network (SAN) that considers the device's real-time state to provide high-quality predictions with low delay.使用我们的代理策略可以提高效率和对系统状态波动的鲁棒性。在两个广泛使用的视频理解任务中，SAN 获得了最先进的性能，同时不断保持较低的处理延迟。 Moreover, training such an agent on various types of hardware configurations is not easy as the labeled training data might not be available, or can be computationally prohibitive. To address this challenging problem, we propose a Meta Self-supervised Adaptation (MSA) method that adapts the agent's policy to new hardware configurations at test-time, allowing for easy deployment of the model onto other unseen hardware platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种系统状态感知的自适应网络（SAN），用于在线流视频理解任务，以应对设备状态和计算资源的动态变化。
AI.motivation: 现有深度神经网络在实时应用中未充分考虑设备状态和资源波动的影响，导致效率和鲁棒性不足，且缺乏针对不同硬件配置的适应性方法。
AI.method: 设计了系统状态感知的自适应网络（SAN），结合强化学习策略动态调整计算资源；提出元自监督适应（MSA）方法，在测试时无需标注数据即可适配新硬件。
AI.result: 在两个主流视频理解任务中，SAN在保持低延迟的同时达到最先进性能，且MSA有效实现了跨硬件平台的模型部署。
AI.conclusion: SAN和MSA方法通过动态资源分配和硬件自适应能力，显著提升了在线视频理解任务的效率与泛化性。

authors_text: Tao He,Sheng Huang,Wenhao Tang,Bo Liu
title: Deformable Kernel Expansion Model for Efficient Arbitrary-shaped Scene Text Detection
title_zh: 用于高效任意形状场景文本检测的可变形核扩展模型
abstract: Scene text detection is a challenging computer vision task due to the high variation in text shapes and ratios. In this work, we propose a scene text detector named Deformable Kernel Expansion (DKE), which incorporates the merits of both segmentation and contour-based detectors. DKE employs a segmentation module to segment the shrunken text region as the text kernel, then expands the text kernel contour to obtain text boundary by regressing the vertex-wise offsets. Generating the text kernel by segmentation enables DKE to inherit the arbitrary-shaped text region modeling capability of segmentation-based detectors. Regressing the kernel contour with some sampled vertices enables DKE to avoid the complicated pixel-level post-processing and better learn contour deformation as the contour-based detectors. Moreover, we propose an Optimal Bipartite Graph Matching Loss (OBGML) that measures the matching error between the predicted contour and the ground truth, which efficiently minimizes the global contour matching distance. Extensive experiments on CTW1500, Total-Text, MSRA-TD500, and ICDAR2015 demonstrate that DKE achieves a good tradeoff between accuracy and efficiency in scene text detection.
summary: Scene text detection is a challenging computer vision task due to the high variation in text shapes and ratios. In this work, we propose a scene text detector named Deformable Kernel Expansion (DKE), which incorporates the merits of both segmentation and contour-based detectors. DKE employs a segmentation module to segment the shrunken text region as the text kernel, then expands the text kernel contour to obtain text boundary by regressing the vertex-wise offsets. Generating the text kernel by segmentation enables DKE to inherit the arbitrary-shaped text region modeling capability of segmentation-based detectors. Regressing the kernel contour with some sampled vertices enables DKE to avoid the complicated pixel-level post-processing and better learn contour deformation as the contour-based detectors. Moreover, we propose an Optimal Bipartite Graph Matching Loss (OBGML) that measures the matching error between the predicted contour and the ground truth, which efficiently minimizes the global contour matching distance. Extensive experiments on CTW1500, Total-Text, MSRA-TD500, and ICDAR2015 demonstrate that DKE achieves a good tradeoff between accuracy and efficiency in scene text detection.
abstract_zh: 由于文本形状和比例变化很大，场景文本检测是一项具有挑战性的计算机视觉任务。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为可变形内核扩展（DKE）的场景文本检测器，它结合了分割和基于轮廓的检测器的优点。 DKE采用分割模块将缩小的文本区域分割为文本内核，然后扩展文本内核轮廓以通过逐点偏移回归来获得文本边界。通过分割生成文本内核使 DKE 能够继承基于分割的检测器的任意形状文本区域建模能力。使用一些采样顶点对内核轮廓进行回归使 DKE 能够避免复杂的像素级后处理，并像基于轮廓的检测器一样更好地学习轮廓变形。此外，我们提出了一种最佳二部图匹配损失（OBGML）来测量预测轮廓和地面实况之间的匹配误差，从而有效地最小化全局轮廓匹配距离。在 CTW1500、Total-Text、MSRA-TD500 和 ICDAR2015 上进行的大量实验表明，DKE 在场景文本检测的准确性和效率之间实现了良好的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DKE的场景文本检测模型，通过结合分割与轮廓检测优势，实现对任意形状文本的高效检测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理复杂形状文本时存在分割精度不足或后处理复杂的问题，需平衡检测精度与计算效率。
AI.method: DKE采用分割模块生成文本内核，通过回归顶点偏移扩展轮廓获取边界，并引入最优二分图匹配损失优化轮廓匹配。
AI.result: 在CTW1500、Total-Text等数据集上验证，DKE在保持高检测精度的同时显著提升推理效率。
AI.conclusion: DKE通过融合分割与轮廓检测优势，为复杂场景文本检测提供了兼顾精度与效率的新范式。

Regressing the kernel contour with some sampled vertices enables DKE to avoid the complicated pixel-level post-processing and better learn contour deformation as the contour-based detectors. Moreover, we propose an Optimal Bipartite Graph Matching Loss (OBGML) that measures the matching error between the predicted contour and the ground truth, which efficiently minimizes the global contour matching distance. Extensive experiments on CTW1500, Total-Text, MSRA-TD500, and ICDAR2015 demonstrate that DKE achieves a good tradeoff between accuracy and efficiency in scene text detection. 由于文本形状和比例变化很大，场景文本检测是一项具有挑战性的计算机视觉任务。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为可变形内核扩展（DKE）的场景文本检测器，它结合了分割和基于轮廓的检测器的优点。 DKE采用分割模块将缩小的文本区域分割为文本内核，然后扩展文本内核轮廓以通过逐点偏移回归来获得文本边界。通过分割生成文本内核使 DKE 能够继承基于分割的检测器的任意形状文本区域建模能力。使用一些采样顶点对内核轮廓进行回归使 DKE 能够避免复杂的像素级后处理，并像基于轮廓的检测器一样更好地学习轮廓变形。此外，我们提出了一种最佳二部图匹配损失（OBGML）来测量预测轮廓和地面实况之间的匹配误差，从而有效地最小化全局轮廓匹配距离。在 CTW1500、Total-Text、MSRA-TD500 和 ICDAR2015 上进行的大量实验表明，DKE 在场景文本检测的准确性和效率之间实现了良好的权衡。 本文提出一种名为DKE的场景文本检测模型，通过结合分割与轮廓检测优势，实现对任意形状文本的高效检测。 Tao He,Sheng Huang,Wenhao Tang,Bo Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Jianping Zhang,Jen-tse Huang,Wenxuan Wang,Yichen Li,Weibin Wu,Xiaosen Wang,Yuxin Su,Michael R. Lyu
title: Improving the Transferability of Adversarial Samples by Path-Augmented Method
title_zh: 通过路径增强方法提高对抗样本的可迁移性
comment: 10 pages + appendix, CVPR 2023
comments: 10 pages + appendix, CVPR 2023
abstract: Deep neural networks have achieved unprecedented success on diverse vision tasks. However, they are vulnerable to adversarial noise that is imperceptible to humans. This phenomenon negatively affects their deployment in real-world scenarios, especially security-related ones. To evaluate the robustness of a target model in practice, transfer-based attacks craft adversarial samples with a local model and have attracted increasing attention from researchers due to their high efficiency. The state-of-the-art transfer-based attacks are generally based on data augmentation, which typically augments multiple training images from a linear path when learning adversarial samples. However, such methods selected the image augmentation path heuristically and may augment images that are semantics-inconsistent with the target images, which harms the transferability of the generated adversarial samples. To overcome the pitfall, we propose the Path-Augmented Method (PAM). Specifically, PAM first constructs a candidate augmentation path pool. It then settles the employed augmentation paths during adversarial sample generation with greedy search. Furthermore, to avoid augmenting semantics-inconsistent images, we train a Semantics Predictor (SP) to constrain the length of the augmentation path. Extensive experiments confirm that PAM can achieve an improvement of over 4.8% on average compared with the state-of-the-art baselines in terms of the attack success rates.
summary: Deep neural networks have achieved unprecedented success on diverse vision tasks. However, they are vulnerable to adversarial noise that is imperceptible to humans. This phenomenon negatively affects their deployment in real-world scenarios, especially security-related ones. To evaluate the robustness of a target model in practice, transfer-based attacks craft adversarial samples with a local model and have attracted increasing attention from researchers due to their high efficiency. The state-of-the-art transfer-based attacks are generally based on data augmentation, which typically augments multiple training images from a linear path when learning adversarial samples. However, such methods selected the image augmentation path heuristically and may augment images that are semantics-inconsistent with the target images, which harms the transferability of the generated adversarial samples. To overcome the pitfall, we propose the Path-Augmented Method (PAM). Specifically, PAM first constructs a candidate augmentation path pool. It then settles the employed augmentation paths during adversarial sample generation with greedy search. Furthermore, to avoid augmenting semantics-inconsistent images, we train a Semantics Predictor (SP) to constrain the length of the augmentation path. Extensive experiments confirm that PAM can achieve an improvement of over 4.8% on average compared with the state-of-the-art baselines in terms of the attack success rates.
abstract_zh: Deep neural networks have achieved unprecedented success on diverse vision tasks.然而，它们很容易受到人类无法察觉的敌对噪音的影响。这种现象会对它们在现实场景中的部署产生负面影响，尤其是与安全相关的场景。 To evaluate the robustness of a target model in practice, transfer-based attacks craft adversarial samples with a local model and have attracted increasing attention from researchers due to their high efficiency. The state-of-the-art transfer-based attacks are generally based on data augmentation, which typically augments multiple training images from a linear path when learning adversarial samples. However, such methods selected the image augmentation path heuristically and may augment images that are semantics-inconsistent with the target images, which harms the transferability of the generated adversarial samples.为了克服这个缺陷，我们提出了路径增强方法（PAM）。具体来说，PAM首先构建候选增强路径池。然后，它通过贪婪搜索来确定对抗性样本生成期间所采用的增强路径。 Furthermore, to avoid augmenting semantics-inconsistent images, we train a Semantics Predictor (SP) to constrain the length of the augmentation path. Extensive experiments confirm that PAM can achieve an improvement of over 4.8% on average compared with the state-of-the-art baselines in terms of the attack success rates.

AI.tldr: 提出路径增强方法（PAM）以提升对抗样本的可迁移性，从而提高攻击成功率
AI.motivation: 现有基于数据增强的迁移攻击方法因启发式选择增强路径可能导致语义不一致，从而损害对抗样本的可迁移性，需改进方法以提高攻击效果
AI.method: 提出路径增强方法（PAM），构建候选增强路径池并通过贪心搜索选择路径；训练语义预测器（SP）约束增强路径长度以避免语义不一致
AI.result: 实验表明，PAM在多个基准测试中平均提升攻击成功率超过4.8%，优于现有最先进方法
AI.conclusion: PAM通过优化增强路径选择和语义约束，有效提升了对抗样本的可迁移性，验证了其在提高攻击成功率上的有效性

authors_text: Ibrahim Khan,Thai Van Nguyen,Chollakorn Nimpattanavong,Ruck Thawonmas
title: Adaptive Background Music for a Fighting Game: A Multi-Instrument Volume Modulation Approach
title_zh: 格斗游戏的自适应背景音乐：多乐器音量调制方法
comment: In the updated version, the description of the association between the distance between the two players (PD) and the instrument's volume on page 3 has been revised
comments: In the updated version, the description of the association between the distance between the two players (PD) and the instrument's volume on page 3 has been revised
abstract: This paper presents our work to enhance the background music (BGM) in DareFightingICE by adding an adaptive BGM. The adaptive BGM consists of five different instruments playing a classical music piece called "Air on G-String." The BGM adapts by changing the volume of the instruments. Each instrument is connected to a different element of the game. We then run experiments to evaluate the adaptive BGM by using a deep reinforcement learning AI that only uses audio as input (Blind DL AI). The results show that the performance of the Blind DL AI improves while playing with the adaptive BGM as compared to playing without the adaptive BGM.
summary: This paper presents our work to enhance the background music (BGM) in DareFightingICE by adding an adaptive BGM. The adaptive BGM consists of five different instruments playing a classical music piece called "Air on G-String." The BGM adapts by changing the volume of the instruments. Each instrument is connected to a different element of the game. We then run experiments to evaluate the adaptive BGM by using a deep reinforcement learning AI that only uses audio as input (Blind DL AI). The results show that the performance of the Blind DL AI improves while playing with the adaptive BGM as compared to playing without the adaptive BGM.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们通过添加自适应 BGM 来增强 DareFightingICE 中的背景音乐 (BGM) 的工作。自适应背景音乐由五种不同的乐器组成，演奏一首名为“Air on G-String”的古典音乐作品。 BGM 通过改变乐器的音量来适应。每个乐器都连接到游戏的不同元素。然后，我们使用仅使用音频作为输入的深度强化学习 AI（Blind DL AI）进行实验来评估自适应 BGM。结果表明，与不使用自适应 BGM 的情况相比，使用自适应 BGM 时 Blind DL AI 的性能有所提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过多乐器音量调制实现的自适应背景音乐系统，用于增强格斗游戏《DareFightingICE》的沉浸感。
AI.motivation: 传统背景音乐缺乏与游戏动态的互动性，可能影响玩家体验及AI决策效率，需探索音乐与游戏机制的深度结合方式。
AI.method: 将经典乐曲《Air on G-String》拆分为五种乐器，分别绑定至游戏不同元素，通过实时调节各乐器音量实现音乐自适应，并采用仅依赖音频输入的深度强化学习AI进行效果验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用自适应背景音乐时，盲测AI的战斗表现显著优于传统固定音乐场景。
AI.conclusion: 动态音量调控的自适应音乐能有效提升游戏AI的环境感知能力，为游戏音效设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Farhan Rozaidi,Emma Waters,Olivia Dawes,Jennifer Yang,Joseph R. Davidson,Ross L. Hatton
title: HISSbot: Sidewinding with a Soft Snake Robot
title_zh: HISSbot：用软蛇机器人进行侧绕
comment: 7 pages, 9 figures, to be published in RoboSoft 2023
comments: 7 pages, 9 figures, to be published in RoboSoft 2023
abstract: Snake robots are characterized by their ability to navigate through small spaces and loose terrain by utilizing efficient cyclic forms of locomotion. Soft snake robots are a subset of these robots which utilize soft, compliant actuators to produce movement. Prior work on soft snake robots has primarily focused on planar gaits, such as undulation. More efficient spatial gaits, such as sidewinding, are unexplored gaits for soft snake robots. We propose a novel means of constructing a soft snake robot capable of sidewinding, and introduce the Helical Inflating Soft Snake Robot (HISSbot). We validate this actuation through the physical HISSbot, and demonstrate its ability to sidewind across various surfaces. Our tests show robustness in locomotion through low-friction and granular media.
summary: Snake robots are characterized by their ability to navigate through small spaces and loose terrain by utilizing efficient cyclic forms of locomotion. Soft snake robots are a subset of these robots which utilize soft, compliant actuators to produce movement. Prior work on soft snake robots has primarily focused on planar gaits, such as undulation. More efficient spatial gaits, such as sidewinding, are unexplored gaits for soft snake robots. We propose a novel means of constructing a soft snake robot capable of sidewinding, and introduce the Helical Inflating Soft Snake Robot (HISSbot). We validate this actuation through the physical HISSbot, and demonstrate its ability to sidewind across various surfaces. Our tests show robustness in locomotion through low-friction and granular media.
abstract_zh: 蛇形机器人的特点是能够利用有效的循环运动形式在狭小的空间和松散的地形中导航。 Soft snake robots are a subset of these robots which utilize soft, compliant actuators to produce movement. Prior work on soft snake robots has primarily focused on planar gaits, such as undulation. More efficient spatial gaits, such as sidewinding, are unexplored gaits for soft snake robots.我们提出了一种构建能够侧绕的软蛇机器人的新方法，并介绍了螺旋充气软蛇机器人（HISSbot）。 We validate this actuation through the physical HISSbot, and demonstrate its ability to sidewind across various surfaces. Our tests show robustness in locomotion through low-friction and granular media.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型软体蛇形机器人HISSbot，通过螺旋充气结构实现侧向移动（sidewinding）并验证其在不同地形中的运动能力。
AI.motivation: 传统软体蛇形机器人多采用平面运动模式（如波动），而空间运动模式（如侧向移动）在复杂地形中效率更高，但尚未被探索。
AI.method: 设计基于螺旋充气结构的软体机器人HISSbot，通过物理原型验证其侧向移动能力，并测试其在低摩擦表面和颗粒介质中的运动表现。
AI.result: HISSbot成功实现侧向移动，且在多种地形中表现出稳定的运动能力，证明了螺旋充气驱动方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: HISSbot为软体机器人提供了新的运动模式，展示了其在复杂环境中的应用潜力，推动了软体机器人运动机制的研究。

search_text: HISSbot: Sidewinding with a Soft Snake Robot HISSbot：用软蛇机器人进行侧绕 Snake robots are characterized by their ability to navigate through small spaces and loose terrain by utilizing efficient cyclic forms of locomotion. Soft snake robots are a subset of these robots which utilize soft, compliant actuators to produce movement. Prior work on soft snake robots has primarily focused on planar gaits, such as undulation. More efficient spatial gaits, such as sidewinding, are unexplored gaits for soft snake robots. We propose a novel means of constructing a soft snake robot capable of sidewinding, and introduce the Helical Inflating Soft Snake Robot (HISSbot). We validate this actuation through the physical HISSbot, and demonstrate its ability to sidewind across various surfaces. Our tests show robustness in locomotion through low-friction and granular media. 蛇形机器人的特点是能够利用有效的循环运动形式在狭小的空间和松散的地形中导航。 Soft snake robots are a subset of these robots which utilize soft, compliant actuators to produce movement. Prior work on soft snake robots has primarily focused on planar gaits, such as undulation. More efficient spatial gaits, such as sidewinding, are unexplored gaits for soft snake robots.我们提出了一种构建能够侧绕的软蛇机器人的新方法，并介绍了螺旋充气软蛇机器人（HISSbot）。 We validate this actuation through the physical HISSbot, and demonstrate its ability to sidewind across various surfaces. Our tests show robustness in locomotion through low-friction and granular media. 本文提出一种新型软体蛇形机器人HISSbot，通过螺旋充气结构实现侧向移动（sidewinding）并验证其在不同地形中的运动能力。 Farhan Rozaidi,Emma Waters,Olivia Dawes,Jennifer Yang,Joseph R. Davidson,Ross L. Hatton cs.RO

authors_text: Hoa T. Nguyen,Muhammad Usman,Rajkumar Buyya
title: iQuantum: A Case for Modeling and Simulation of Quantum Computing Environments
title_zh: iQuantum：量子计算环境建模与仿真案例
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures
comments: 10 pages, 8 figures
abstract: Today's quantum computers are primarily accessible through the cloud and potentially shifting to the edge network in the future. With the rapid advancement and proliferation of quantum computing research worldwide, there has been a considerable increase in demand for using cloud-based quantum computation resources. This demand has highlighted the need for designing efficient and adaptable resource management strategies and service models for quantum computing. However, the limited quantity, quality, and accessibility of quantum resources pose significant challenges to practical research in quantum software and systems. To address these challenges, we propose iQuantum, a first-of-its-kind simulation toolkit that can model hybrid quantum-classical computing environments for prototyping and evaluating system design and scheduling algorithms. This paper presents the quantum computing system model, architectural design, proof-of-concept implementation, potential use cases, and future development of iQuantum. Our proposed iQuantum simulator is anticipated to boost research in quantum software and systems, particularly in the creation and evaluation of policies and algorithms for resource management, job scheduling, and hybrid quantum-classical task orchestration in quantum computing environments integrating edge and cloud resources.

However, the limited quantity, quality, and accessibility of quantum resources pose significant challenges to practical research in quantum software and systems. To address these challenges, we propose iQuantum, a first-of-its-kind simulation toolkit that can model hybrid quantum-classical computing environments for prototyping and evaluating system design and scheduling algorithms. This paper presents the quantum computing system model, architectural design, proof-of-concept implementation, potential use cases, and future development of iQuantum. Our proposed iQuantum simulator is anticipated to boost research in quantum software and systems, particularly in the creation and evaluation of policies and algorithms for resource management, job scheduling, and hybrid quantum-classical task orchestration in quantum computing environments integrating edge and cloud resources.
abstract_zh: 今天的量子计算机主要可以通过云访问，并且未来可能会转移到边缘网络。随着全球量子计算研究的快速发展和扩散，对使用基于云的量子计算资源的需求大幅增加。这种需求凸显了为量子计算设计高效且适应性强的资源管理策略和服务模型的必要性。然而，量子资源的数量、质量和可访问性有限，对量子软件和系统的实际研究提出了重大挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 iQuantum，这是一款首创的仿真工具包，可以对混合量子经典计算环境进行建模，用于原型设计和评估系统设计和调度算法。本文介绍了 iQuantum 的量子计算系统模型、架构设计、概念验证实施、潜在用例和未来发展。我们提出的 iQuantum 模拟器预计将促进量子软件和系统的研究，特别是在集成边缘和云资源的量子计算环境中资源管理、作业调度和混合量子经典任务编排的策略和算法的创建和评估方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出iQuantum模拟工具包，用于建模和模拟混合量子-经典计算环境，以解决量子计算资源管理与调度的挑战。
AI.motivation: 当前量子计算资源通过云端访问且数量有限，导致量子软件和系统研究面临资源管理策略设计和评估的困难。
AI.method: 设计iQuantum模拟器，包含量子计算系统模型、架构设计及概念验证实现，支持边缘与云端资源集成的混合环境模拟。
AI.result: 成功开发iQuantum工具包，为资源管理、任务调度及混合量子-经典任务编排算法的原型设计与评估提供平台。
AI.conclusion: iQuantum将推动量子软件和系统研究，特别是在资源管理策略和混合计算环境调度算法的开发与验证方面。

authors_text: Bishal Lamichhane
title: Evaluation of ChatGPT for NLP-based Mental Health Applications
title_zh: ChatGPT 基于 NLP 的心理健康应用的评估
abstract: Large language models (LLM) have been successful in several natural language understanding tasks and could be relevant for natural language processing (NLP)-based mental health application research. In this work, we report the performance of LLM-based ChatGPT (with gpt-3.5-turbo backend) in three text-based mental health classification tasks: stress detection (2-class classification), depression detection (2-class classification), and suicidality detection (5-class classification). We obtained annotated social media posts for the three classification tasks from public datasets. Then ChatGPT API classified the social media posts with an input prompt for classification. We obtained F1 scores of 0.73, 0.86, and 0.37 for stress detection, depression detection, and suicidality detection, respectively. A baseline model that always predicted the dominant class resulted in F1 scores of 0.35, 0.60, and 0.19. The zero-shot classification accuracy obtained with ChatGPT indicates a potential use of language models for mental health classification tasks.
summary: Large language models (LLM) have been successful in several natural language understanding tasks and could be relevant for natural language processing (NLP)-based mental health application research. In this work, we report the performance of LLM-based ChatGPT (with gpt-3.5-turbo backend) in three text-based mental health classification tasks: stress detection (2-class classification), depression detection (2-class classification), and suicidality detection (5-class classification). We obtained annotated social media posts for the three classification tasks from public datasets. Then ChatGPT API classified the social media posts with an input prompt for classification. We obtained F1 scores of 0.73, 0.86, and 0.37 for stress detection, depression detection, and suicidality detection, respectively. A baseline model that always predicted the dominant class resulted in F1 scores of 0.35, 0.60, and 0.19. The zero-shot classification accuracy obtained with ChatGPT indicates a potential use of language models for mental health classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 大语言模型 (LLM) 在多项自然语言理解任务中取得了成功，并且可能与基于自然语言处理 (NLP) 的心理健康应用研究相关。在这项工作中，我们报告了基于 LLM 的 ChatGPT（带有 gpt-3.5-turbo 后端）在三个基于文本的心理健康分类任务中的性能：压力检测（2 类分类）、抑郁检测（2 类分类）和自杀检测（5 类分类）。我们从公共数据集中获得了三个分类任务的带注释的社交媒体帖子。然后 ChatGPT API 通过输入提示对社交媒体帖子进行分类。我们获得的压力检测、抑郁检测和自杀检测的 F1 分数分别为 0.73、0.86 和 0.37。始终预测主导阶层的基线模型的 F1 分数为 0.35、0.60 和 0.19。 ChatGPT 获得的零样本分类精度表明语言模型在心理健康分类任务中的潜在用途。

AI.tldr: 评估ChatGPT在基于自然语言处理的心理健康应用中的性能，包括压力、抑郁和自杀倾向检测任务。
AI.motivation: 探索大型语言模型（LLM）在心理健康分类任务中的潜力，以改进现有方法的准确性与实用性。
AI.method: 使用公开数据集中的社交媒体标注数据，通过ChatGPT API进行零样本分类，并与仅预测主导类别的基线模型对比。
AI.result: ChatGPT在压力检测、抑郁检测和自杀倾向检测中的F1分数分别为0.73、0.86和0.37，显著优于基线模型（0.35、0.60、0.19）。
AI.conclusion: ChatGPT在心理健康分类任务中展现潜力，尤其在抑郁检测表现突出，但自杀倾向检测需进一步优化。

The zero-shot classification accuracy obtained with ChatGPT indicates a potential use of language models for mental health classification tasks. 大语言模型 (LLM) 在多项自然语言理解任务中取得了成功，并且可能与基于自然语言处理 (NLP) 的心理健康应用研究相关。在这项工作中，我们报告了基于 LLM 的 ChatGPT（带有 gpt-3.5-turbo 后端）在三个基于文本的心理健康分类任务中的性能：压力检测（2 类分类）、抑郁检测（2 类分类）和自杀检测（5 类分类）。我们从公共数据集中获得了三个分类任务的带注释的社交媒体帖子。然后 ChatGPT API 通过输入提示对社交媒体帖子进行分类。我们获得的压力检测、抑郁检测和自杀检测的 F1 分数分别为 0.73、0.86 和 0.37。始终预测主导阶层的基线模型的 F1 分数为 0.35、0.60 和 0.19。 ChatGPT 获得的零样本分类精度表明语言模型在心理健康分类任务中的潜在用途。 评估ChatGPT在基于自然语言处理的心理健康应用中的性能，包括压力、抑郁和自杀倾向检测任务。 Bishal Lamichhane cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Satoshi Ikehata
title: Scalable, Detailed and Mask-Free Universal Photometric Stereo
title_zh: 可扩展、细致且无掩模的通用光度立体
comment: CVPR 2023 (Highlight). The source code will be available at https://github.com/satoshi-ikehata/SDM-UniPS-CVPR2023
comments: CVPR 2023 (Highlight). The source code will be available at https://github.com/satoshi-ikehata/SDM-UniPS-CVPR2023
abstract: In this paper, we introduce SDM-UniPS, a groundbreaking Scalable, Detailed, Mask-free, and Universal Photometric Stereo network. Our approach can recover astonishingly intricate surface normal maps, rivaling the quality of 3D scanners, even when images are captured under unknown, spatially-varying lighting conditions in uncontrolled environments. We have extended previous universal photometric stereo networks to extract spatial-light features, utilizing all available information in high-resolution input images and accounting for non-local interactions among surface points. Moreover, we present a new synthetic training dataset that encompasses a diverse range of shapes, materials, and illumination scenarios found in real-world scenes. Through extensive evaluation, we demonstrate that our method not only surpasses calibrated, lighting-specific techniques on public benchmarks, but also excels with a significantly smaller number of input images even without object masks.
summary: In this paper, we introduce SDM-UniPS, a groundbreaking Scalable, Detailed, Mask-free, and Universal Photometric Stereo network. Our approach can recover astonishingly intricate surface normal maps, rivaling the quality of 3D scanners, even when images are captured under unknown, spatially-varying lighting conditions in uncontrolled environments. We have extended previous universal photometric stereo networks to extract spatial-light features, utilizing all available information in high-resolution input images and accounting for non-local interactions among surface points. Moreover, we present a new synthetic training dataset that encompasses a diverse range of shapes, materials, and illumination scenarios found in real-world scenes. Through extensive evaluation, we demonstrate that our method not only surpasses calibrated, lighting-specific techniques on public benchmarks, but also excels with a significantly smaller number of input images even without object masks.
abstract_zh: In this paper, we introduce SDM-UniPS, a groundbreaking Scalable, Detailed, Mask-free, and Universal Photometric Stereo network.我们的方法可以恢复极其复杂的表面法线贴图，即使在不受控制的环境中未知的、空间变化的照明条件下捕获图像，其质量也可以与 3D 扫描仪的质量相媲美。我们扩展了以前的通用光度立体网络来提取空间光特征，利用高分辨率输入图像中的所有可用信息并考虑表面点之间的非局部相互作用。此外，我们提出了一个新的综合训练数据集，其中包含现实世界场景中发现的各种形状、材料和照明场景。通过广泛的评估，我们证明我们的方法不仅超越了公共基准上的校准、特定于照明的技术，而且即使在没有对象掩模的情况下，在输入图像数量明显较少的情况下也表现出色。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需遮罩且通用的光度立体方法SDM-UniPS，能够在未知光照条件下恢复高精度表面法线图。
AI.motivation: 现有光度立体技术受限于复杂光照环境、需依赖遮罩或大量输入图像，难以适应真实场景的多样性与实用性需求。
AI.method: 扩展通用光度立体网络以提取空间-光特征，利用高分辨率图像信息并建模非局部表面交互，同时构建包含多形状、材质与光照的合成数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 在公共基准测试中优于校准光照方法，且在无需遮罩情况下仅需更少输入图像即可达到更高精度。
AI.conclusion: SDM-UniPS通过创新网络设计与多样化数据集，在复杂环境下的表面重建任务中实现了突破性性能提升。

authors_text: Amin Shafiee,Benoit Charbonnier,Sudeep Pasricha,Mahdi Nikdast
title: Design Space Exploration for PCM-based Photonic Memory
title_zh: 基于 PCM 的光子存储器的设计空间探索
comment: This paper will appear in the proceedings of ACM GLSVLSI 2023
comments: This paper will appear in the proceedings of ACM GLSVLSI 2023
abstract: The integration of silicon photonics (SiPh) and phase change materials (PCMs) has created a unique opportunity to realize adaptable and reconfigurable photonic systems. In particular, the nonvolatile programmability in PCMs has made them a promising candidate for implementing optical memory systems. In this paper, we describe the design of an optical memory cell based on PCMs while exploring the design space of the cell in terms of PCM material choice (e.g., GST, GSST, Sb2Se3), cell bit capacity, latency, and power consumption. Leveraging this design-space exploration for the design of efficient optical memory cells, we present the design and implementation of an optical memory array and explore its scalability and power consumption when using different optical memory cells. We also identify performance bottlenecks that need to be alleviated to further scale optical memory arrays with competitive latency and energy consumption, compared to their electronic counterparts.
summary: The integration of silicon photonics (SiPh) and phase change materials (PCMs) has created a unique opportunity to realize adaptable and reconfigurable photonic systems. In particular, the nonvolatile programmability in PCMs has made them a promising candidate for implementing optical memory systems. In this paper, we describe the design of an optical memory cell based on PCMs while exploring the design space of the cell in terms of PCM material choice (e.g., GST, GSST, Sb2Se3), cell bit capacity, latency, and power consumption. Leveraging this design-space exploration for the design of efficient optical memory cells, we present the design and implementation of an optical memory array and explore its scalability and power consumption when using different optical memory cells. We also identify performance bottlenecks that need to be alleviated to further scale optical memory arrays with competitive latency and energy consumption, compared to their electronic counterparts.
abstract_zh: 硅光子学 (SiPh) 和相变材料 (PCM) 的集成为实现适应性和可重构光子系统创造了独特的机会。特别是，PCM 的非易失性可编程性使其成为实现光存储系统的有希望的候选者。在本文中，我们描述了基于 PCM 的光学存储单元的设计，同时探索了 PCM 材料选择（例如 GST、GSST、Sb2Se3）、单元位容量、延迟和功耗方面的单元设计空间。利用这种设计空间探索来设计高效的光学存储单元，我们介绍了光学存储阵列的设计和实现，并探讨了使用不同光学存储单元时的可扩展性和功耗。我们还确定了需要缓解的性能瓶颈，以进一步扩展光学存储阵列，与电子存储阵列相比，其延迟和能耗具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在设计基于相变材料（PCM）的光子存储单元，并探索其设计空间以优化性能。
AI.motivation: 将硅光子学与相变材料结合可实现可重构的光子系统，而PCM的非易失性编程特性使其成为光学存储的潜在候选材料。
AI.method: 通过比较不同PCM材料（如GST、GSST、Sb2Se3）及参数（位容量、延迟、功耗），进行设计空间探索，并实现光存储阵列以评估可扩展性与能耗。
AI.result: 确定了光存储阵列的性能瓶颈，包括延迟和能耗问题，需进一步优化以匹敌电子存储器。
AI.conclusion: PCM基光子存储具有潜力，但需解决延迟与能耗瓶颈以实现大规模应用。

authors_text: Congyi Wang,Feida Zhu,Shilei Wen
title: MeMaHand: Exploiting Mesh-Mano Interaction for Single Image Two-Hand Reconstruction
title_zh: MeMaHand：利用 Mesh-Mano 交互进行单图像双手重建
abstract: Existing methods proposed for hand reconstruction tasks usually parameterize a generic 3D hand model or predict hand mesh positions directly. The parametric representations consisting of hand shapes and rotational poses are more stable, while the non-parametric methods can predict more accurate mesh positions. In this paper, we propose to reconstruct meshes and estimate MANO parameters of two hands from a single RGB image simultaneously to utilize the merits of two kinds of hand representations. To fulfill this target, we propose novel Mesh-Mano interaction blocks (MMIBs), which take mesh vertices positions and MANO parameters as two kinds of query tokens. MMIB consists of one graph residual block to aggregate local information and two transformer encoders to model long-range dependencies. The transformer encoders are equipped with different asymmetric attention masks to model the intra-hand and inter-hand attention, respectively. Moreover, we introduce the mesh alignment refinement module to further enhance the mesh-image alignment. Extensive experiments on the InterHand2.6M benchmark demonstrate promising results over the state-of-the-art hand reconstruction methods.
summary: Existing methods proposed for hand reconstruction tasks usually parameterize a generic 3D hand model or predict hand mesh positions directly. The parametric representations consisting of hand shapes and rotational poses are more stable, while the non-parametric methods can predict more accurate mesh positions. In this paper, we propose to reconstruct meshes and estimate MANO parameters of two hands from a single RGB image simultaneously to utilize the merits of two kinds of hand representations. To fulfill this target, we propose novel Mesh-Mano interaction blocks (MMIBs), which take mesh vertices positions and MANO parameters as two kinds of query tokens. MMIB consists of one graph residual block to aggregate local information and two transformer encoders to model long-range dependencies. The transformer encoders are equipped with different asymmetric attention masks to model the intra-hand and inter-hand attention, respectively. Moreover, we introduce the mesh alignment refinement module to further enhance the mesh-image alignment. Extensive experiments on the InterHand2.6M benchmark demonstrate promising results over the state-of-the-art hand reconstruction methods.
abstract_zh: 针对手部重建任务提出的现有方法通常参数化通用 3D 手部模型或直接预测手部网格位置。由手形和旋转姿势组成的参数表示更稳定，而非参数方法可以预测更准确的网格位置。在本文中，我们建议同时从单个 RGB 图像中重建网格并估计两只手的 MANO 参数，以利用两种手表示的优点。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了新颖的 Mesh-Mano 交互块（MMIB），它将网格顶点位置和 MANO 参数作为两种查询标记。 MMIB 由一个用于聚合本地信息的图残差块和两个用于对远程依赖关系进行建模的变换器编码器组成。 Transformer 编码器配备了不同的非对称注意力掩模，分别对手内和手间注意力进行建模。此外，我们引入了网格对齐细化模块来进一步增强网格图像对齐。 InterHand2.6M 基准的大量实验表明，与最先进的手部重建方法相比，结果有希望。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MeMaHand方法，通过同时重建单张图像中两只手的网格模型并估计MANO参数，结合参数化与非参数化方法的优势。
AI.motivation: 现有手部重建方法存在参数化模型稳定性高但精度不足、非参数化方法精度高但稳定性差的问题，需融合两者优势。
AI.method: 设计Mesh-Mano交互块（MMIB），包含图残差块聚合局部信息、双Transformer编码器建模长程依赖（分别处理单手内与双手间注意力），并引入网格对齐优化模块。
AI.result: 在InterHand2.6M基准测试中，该方法在两只手重建任务上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合网格与MANO参数的交互建模，有效提升了单图像双手重建的精度与稳定性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出MeMaHand方法，通过同时重建单张图像中两只手的网格模型并估计MANO参数，结合参数化与非参数化方法的优势。

tldr: 本文提出MeMaHand方法，通过同时重建单张图像中两只手的网格模型并估计MANO参数，结合参数化与非参数化方法的优势。
motivation: 现有手部重建方法存在参数化模型稳定性高但精度不足、非参数化方法精度高但稳定性差的问题，需融合两者优势。

search_text: MeMaHand: Exploiting Mesh-Mano Interaction for Single Image Two-Hand Reconstruction MeMaHand：利用 Mesh-Mano 交互进行单图像双手重建 Existing methods proposed for hand reconstruction tasks usually parameterize a generic 3D hand model or predict hand mesh positions directly. The parametric representations consisting of hand shapes and rotational poses are more stable, while the non-parametric methods can predict more accurate mesh positions. In this paper, we propose to reconstruct meshes and estimate MANO parameters of two hands from a single RGB image simultaneously to utilize the merits of two kinds of hand representations. To fulfill this target, we propose novel Mesh-Mano interaction blocks (MMIBs), which take mesh vertices positions and MANO parameters as two kinds of query tokens. MMIB consists of one graph residual block to aggregate local information and two transformer encoders to model long-range dependencies. The transformer encoders are equipped with different asymmetric attention masks to model the intra-hand and inter-hand attention, respectively. Moreover, we introduce the mesh alignment refinement module to further enhance the mesh-image alignment. Extensive experiments on the InterHand2.6M benchmark demonstrate promising results over the state-of-the-art hand reconstruction methods. 针对手部重建任务提出的现有方法通常参数化通用 3D 手部模型或直接预测手部网格位置。由手形和旋转姿势组成的参数表示更稳定，而非参数方法可以预测更准确的网格位置。在本文中，我们建议同时从单个 RGB 图像中重建网格并估计两只手的 MANO 参数，以利用两种手表示的优点。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了新颖的 Mesh-Mano 交互块（MMIB），它将网格顶点位置和 MANO 参数作为两种查询标记。 MMIB 由一个用于聚合本地信息的图残差块和两个用于对远程依赖关系进行建模的变换器编码器组成。 Transformer 编码器配备了不同的非对称注意力掩模，分别对手内和手间注意力进行建模。此外，我们引入了网格对齐细化模块来进一步增强网格图像对齐。 InterHand2.6M 基准的大量实验表明，与最先进的手部重建方法相比，结果有希望。 本文提出MeMaHand方法，通过同时重建单张图像中两只手的网格模型并估计MANO参数，结合参数化与非参数化方法的优势。 Congyi Wang,Feida Zhu,Shilei Wen cs.CV,cs.AI
